meanings.meaning_en: to say firmly that you will not do something that someone has asked you to do
meanings.example: She asked him to leave, but he refused.
meanings.example_cn: 她叫他走，但他不肯。

meanings.meaning_en: a soluble substance can be  dissolved  in a liquid
meanings.example: soluble aspirin
meanings.example_cn: 可溶性阿司匹林

meanings.meaning_en: dealing with danger, pain, or difficult situations with courage and confidence
meanings.example: brave soldiers
meanings.example_cn: 勇敢的士兵

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of clothing that you wear on your head
meanings.example: Maria was wearing a beautiful new hat.
meanings.example_cn: 玛丽亚戴着一顶漂亮的新帽子。

meanings.meaning_en: an area of sand or small stones at the edge of the sea or a lake
meanings.example: a sandy beach
meanings.example_cn: 沙滩

meanings.meaning_en: [plural] the people or organizations that are in charge of a particular country or area
meanings.example: an agreement between the US and Colombian authorities
meanings.example_cn: 美国和哥伦比亚当局的一份协议

meanings.meaning_en: to cook something, such as meat, in an  oven  or over a fire, or to cook in this way
meanings.example: Are you going to roast the chicken?
meanings.example_cn: 这鸡你是准备烤的吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to make sound louder, especially musical sound
meanings.example: an amplified guitar
meanings.example_cn: 带有扩音设备的电吉他

meanings.meaning_en: the main or largest part of something
meanings.example: The bulk of consumers are based in towns.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数消费者都是城镇居民。

meanings.meaning_en: to move something to a particular place or position, especially using your hands
meanings.example: He put the coffee on the table.
meanings.example_cn: 他把咖啡放在桌上。

meanings.meaning_en: steady and not likely to move or change
meanings.example: A wide base will make the structure much more stable.
meanings.example_cn: 宽大的底座会使结构牢固许多。

meanings.meaning_cn: 证书，证件，执照；（毕业）文凭，合格证书
meanings.meaning_en: an official document that states that a fact or facts are true
meanings.example: birth/death/marriage certificate (=giving details of someone’s birth, death, or marriage)
meanings.example_cn: 出生/死亡/结婚证书

meanings.meaning_en: a large imaginary animal that has wings and a long tail and can breathe out fire
meanings.example: She worked a dragon on the new linen cloth.
meanings.example_cn: 她在新的亚麻布上绣了条龙。

meanings.meaning_en: having the qualities or ability needed to do something
meanings.example: I don’t think he’s capable of murder.
meanings.example_cn: 我认为他没有能力杀人。

meanings.meaning_en: remarks that say what you think is bad about someone or something
meanings.example: Despite strong criticism , the new system is still in place.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管遭到了猛烈的批评，新制度依然原封不动。

meanings.meaning_en: a place for someone to stay, live, or work
meanings.example: The price for the holiday includes flights and accommodation.
meanings.example_cn: 度假的价格包括机票和住宿。

meanings.meaning_en: to suggest that something is true, without saying this directly
meanings.example: an implied threat
meanings.example_cn: 隐含的威胁

meanings.meaning_en: the 12th month of the year, between November and January
meanings.example: Last December they visited Prague.
meanings.example_cn: 去年12月他们去了布拉格。

meanings.meaning_cn: 总统；（某组织的）最高权力人
meanings.meaning_en: the official leader of a country that does not have a king or queen
meanings.example: President Bush
meanings.example_cn: 布什总统

meanings.meaning_en: recently
meanings.example: What have you been doing lately?
meanings.example_cn: 你最近在干什么？

meanings.meaning_en: to or towards a lower place or position
meanings.example: David bent down to tie his shoelace.
meanings.example_cn: 戴维弯腰系鞋带。

meanings.meaning_en: a subject or situation that you have to think about or deal with
meanings.example: There are more important matters we need to discuss.
meanings.example_cn: 我们有更重要的事情需要讨论。

meanings.meaning_en: to be important, especially to be important to you, or to have an effect on what happens
meanings.example: particles of matte
meanings.example_cn: 物质的微粒

meanings.meaning_en: a large area of water surrounded by land
meanings.example: Lake Michigan
meanings.example_cn: 密歇根湖

meanings.meaning_en: used when mentioning two things that are not true or do not happen
meanings.example: He can neither read nor write (= he cannot read or write ).
meanings.example_cn: 他既不会读也不会写。

meanings.meaning_en: a long seat for two or more people, especially outdoors
meanings.example: We sat on a park bench.
meanings.example_cn: 我们坐在公园的长椅上。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of thick cloth or wool that covers part of a floor, used for warmth or as a decoration
meanings.example: A Persian rug covered the hardwood floors.
meanings.example_cn: 一张波斯小地毯铺在了那硬木地板上。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of special glass that you can look at and see yourself in
meanings.example: He spends hours in front of the mirror !
meanings.example_cn: 他老是照镜子！

meanings.meaning_en: if one thing mirrors another, it is very similar to it and may seem to copy or represent it
meanings.example: When I looked in the mirror I couldn’t believe it. I looked fantastic!
meanings.example_cn: 我看着镜子简直不敢相信，我看上去棒极了！

meanings.meaning_en: to produce a picture of something using a pencil, pen etc
meanings.example: Katie had drawn a cottage with a little stream running next to it.
meanings.example_cn: 凯蒂画了一间小茅舍，旁边流淌着一条小溪。

meanings.meaning_en: something used for catching fish, insects, or animals which is made of threads or wires woven across each other with regular spaces between them
meanings.example: a fishing net
meanings.example_cn: 渔网

meanings.meaning_en: a machine for weighing people or objects
meanings.example: a set of kitchen scales
meanings.example_cn: 一套厨房用秤

meanings.meaning_en: a line around the edge of something which shows its shape
meanings.example: an outline map of Europe
meanings.example_cn: 欧洲略图

meanings.meaning_en: not making much noise, or making no noise at all
meanings.example: We’ll have to be quiet so as not to wake the baby.
meanings.example_cn: 我们得安静点，免得吵醒宝宝。

meanings.meaning_en: the clear liquid without colour, smell, or taste that falls as rain and that is used for drinking, washing etc
meanings.example: There’s water all over the bathroom floor.
meanings.example_cn: 浴室地面上都是水。

meanings.meaning_en: if you water plants or the ground they are growing in, you pour water on them
meanings.example: Does anyone want a drink of water?
meanings.example_cn: 有谁想喝杯水吗？

meanings.meaning_en: worried or frightened about something, and unable to relax
meanings.example: I wish you’d stop looking at me like that. You’re making me nervous.
meanings.example_cn: 我希望你不要再那样看着我了，你让我紧张。

meanings.meaning_en: You use nevertheless when saying something that contrasts with what has just been said.
meanings.example: What you said was true. It was, nevertheless, a little unkind.
meanings.example_cn: 你说的都是实话，只不过有点刻薄。

meanings.meaning_en: in spite of a fact that you have just mentioned
meanings.example: Although the market has been flat, residential property costs remain high. Nevertheless, the fall-off in demand has had an impact on resale values.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管市场一直疲软，房价持续偏高。然而需求的减少还是对二手房价格产生了影响。

meanings.meaning_en: the meeting together of a group of people for a particular purpose
meanings.example: Police have imposed conditions on public assemblies.
meanings.example_cn: 警方给公共集会设置了条件。

meanings.meaning_en: to take part in a war or battle
meanings.example: Neither country is capable of fighting a long war .
meanings.example_cn: 两个国家都没有能力打持久战。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is missing is not in its usual place, so that you cannot find it
meanings.example: We found the missing piece of the jigsaw under the chair.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在椅子下面找到了那块丢失的拼图。

meanings.meaning_en: to move something or someone upwards into the air
meanings.example: Sophie lifted the phone before the second ring.
meanings.example_cn: 铃响了一下苏菲就接起了电话。

meanings.meaning_en: a machine that you can ride in, that moves up and down between the floors in a tall building
meanings.example: He lifted the lid on the pot of soup.
meanings.example_cn: 他揭开汤锅的盖子。

meanings.meaning_en: a large piece of electrical kitchen equipment, shaped like a cupboard, used for keeping food and drink cool
meanings.example: Take the beef out of the refrigerator to defrost.
meanings.example_cn: 把牛肉从冰箱里拿出来解冻。

meanings.meaning_en: covered in or marked by an unwanted substance
meanings.example: a stack of dirty dishes in the sink
meanings.example_cn: 洗涤槽里的一堆脏碟子

meanings.meaning_en: the money that someone pays regularly to use a room, house etc that belongs to someone else
meanings.example: I pay the rent at the beginning of every month.
meanings.example_cn: 我每逢月初交付房租。

meanings.meaning_en: to let someone live in a house, room etc that you own, or use your land, in return for money
meanings.example: She rents out two rooms to students.
meanings.example_cn: 她把两个房间出租给学生

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel certain that something is true
meanings.example: Her arguments didn’t convince everyone, but changes were made.
meanings.example_cn: 她的论点不能说服每个人，但还是引起了一些变化。

meanings.meaning_en: in or to a foreign country
meanings.example: I’ve never lived abroad before.
meanings.example_cn: 我以前从未在国外生活过。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone angry or upset by doing or saying something that they think is rude, unkind etc
meanings.example: His remarks deeply offended many Scottish people.
meanings.example_cn: 他的话严重冒犯了许多苏格兰人。

meanings.meaning_en: to commit a crime or crimes
meanings.example: The careful language is designed not to offend.
meanings.example_cn: 使用谨慎的语言是为了不得罪人。

meanings.meaning_en: If something belongs to you, you own it
meanings.example: The house had belonged to her family for three or four generations.
meanings.example_cn: 这座房子属于她家已有三四代了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make you become interested, expect something etc; to wake someone
meanings.example: Matt’s behavior was arousing the interest of the neighbors.
meanings.example_cn: 马特的行为渐渐引起了邻居的兴趣。

meanings.meaning_en: a statement in which you admit that something is true or that you have done something wrong
meanings.example: Reese, by his own admission , lacks the necessary experience.
meanings.example_cn: 里斯自己也承认缺乏必要的经验。

meanings.meaning_en: to make small changes to something in order to improve it and make it more suitable or effective
meanings.example: The feedback will be used to modify the course for next year.
meanings.example_cn: 这些反馈意见将用于修改明年的课程。

meanings.meaning_en: to tell or show what you are feeling or thinking by using words, looks, or actions
meanings.example: Parents have expressed their concerns about their children’s safety.
meanings.example_cn: 父母对自己孩子的安全表示忧虑。

meanings.meaning_en: a train or bus that does not stop in many places and therefore travels quickly
meanings.example: She expressed an interest in seeing York.
meanings.example_cn: 她表示有兴趣见见约克。

meanings.meaning_en: to form a picture or idea in your mind about what something could be like
meanings.example: Imagine that you have just won a million pounds.
meanings.example_cn: 设想你刚刚赢得一百万英镑。

meanings.meaning_en: without limits in space or time
meanings.example: The universe is infinite.
meanings.example_cn: 宇宙是无限的。

meanings.meaning_en: a rule, problem etc that prevents people from doing something, or limits what they can do
meanings.example: He advocated the removal of trade barriers.
meanings.example_cn: 他提倡消除贸易壁垒。

meanings.meaning_en: a narrow road in the countryside
meanings.example: a quiet country lane
meanings.example_cn: 一条宁静的乡间小路

meanings.meaning_en: a book made of plain paper on which you can write notes
meanings.example: He brought out a notebook and pen from his pocket.
meanings.example_cn: 他从口袋里掏出了一个笔记本和一支钢笔。

meanings.meaning_en: a general area of knowledge, activity, or thought
meanings.example: the spiritual realm
meanings.example_cn: 精神领域

meanings.meaning_en: a stick or handle on a machine or piece of equipment, that you move to operate it
meanings.example: Pull this lever to open the gate.
meanings.example_cn: 拉此横杆开启大门。

meanings.meaning_en: in a particular group
meanings.example: I fear we have an enemy in our midst.
meanings.example_cn: 我担心我们中间有内奸。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who operates the controls of an aircraft or spacecraft
meanings.example: an airline pilot
meanings.example_cn: 航空公司飞行员

meanings.meaning_en: done without any other people, actions, processes etc coming between
meanings.example: Experienced users have direct access to the main data files.
meanings.example_cn: 高级用户可直接浏览主数据文档。

meanings.meaning_en: an un-reasonable dislike and distrust of people who are different from you in some way, especially because of their race, sex, religion etc – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: Women still face prejudice in the workplace.
meanings.example_cn: 女性在职场中仍然面临歧视。

meanings.meaning_en: a journey for pleasure, during which you visit several different towns, areas etc
meanings.example: He devilled her during the tour.
meanings.example_cn: 他在旅行中拿她打趣逗乐。

meanings.meaning_en: to visit several parts of a country or area
meanings.example: We tour by car every summer.
meanings.example_cn: 每年夏天我们都驾车出外旅行。

meanings.meaning_en: willingness to allow people to do, say, or believe what they want without criticizing or punishing them
meanings.example: ...his tolerance and understanding of diverse human nature.
meanings.example_cn: …他对各种人性的宽容和理解。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone less confident or less willing to do something
meanings.example: You should not let one failure discourage you.
meanings.example_cn: 你不该失败一次就灰心丧气。

meanings.meaning_cn: 获得，得到；到达；变成，成为
meanings.meaning_en: to obtain something by finding it, asking for it, or paying for it
meanings.example: We need to get help quickly!
meanings.example_cn: 我们需要马上得到帮助！

meanings.meaning_en: a picture, set of words, or a short film, which is intended to persuade people to buy a product or use a service, or that gives information about a job that is available, an event that is going to happen etc
meanings.example: They put an advertisement in ‘The Morning News’, offering a high salary for the right person.
meanings.example_cn: 他们在《晨报》上刊登了一则启事，出高薪寻找合适的人选。

meanings.meaning_en: a narrow piece of attractive cloth that you use, for example, to tie your hair or hold things together
meanings.example: little girls with ribbons in their hair
meanings.example_cn: 头发上系着丝带的小姑娘们

meanings.meaning_en: one of two people who are married, or who live together and have a sexual relationship
meanings.example: Discuss your worries with your partner.
meanings.example_cn: 和伴侣谈谈你的忧虑。

meanings.meaning_en: a flat round piece of finely cut beef which is cooked and eaten in a bread bun
meanings.example: The whole stadium stink of the hamburger.
meanings.example_cn: 整个体育场内散发着汉堡包的香味。

meanings.meaning_en: to move up, down, or across something using your feet and hands, especially when this is difficult to do
meanings.example: Harry climbed the stairs.
meanings.example_cn: 哈里爬上楼梯。

meanings.meaning_en: to be different from something in some way
meanings.example: The two systems differ in many respects.
meanings.example_cn: 这两个系统在许多方面不同。

meanings.meaning_en: a show of paintings, photographs, or other objects that people can go to see
meanings.example: an exhibition of black and white photographs
meanings.example_cn: 黑白摄影作品展

meanings.meaning_en: a substance that is formed naturally in the earth, such as coal, salt, stone, or gold. Minerals can be dug out of the ground and used
meanings.example: The area is very rich in minerals .
meanings.example_cn: 该地区矿产非常丰富。

meanings.meaning_en: of or containing or derived from minerals
meanings.example: a country with few mineral resources
meanings.example_cn: 矿产资源稀少的国家

meanings.meaning_en: relating to all the ordinary people in a country, who are not members of the government or do not have important jobs
meanings.example: We have to show that publishing this story is in the public interest (= helpful or useful to ordinary people ) .
meanings.example_cn: 我们必须证明刊登这篇报道有利于公众。

meanings.meaning_en: ordinary people who do not work for the government or have any special position in society
meanings.example: full public access to information
meanings.example_cn: 公众对信息的充分知情权

meanings.meaning_en: the official home of a person of very high rank, especially a king or queen – often used in names
meanings.example: Buckingham Palace
meanings.example_cn: 白金汉宫

meanings.meaning_en: the regular beat that can be felt, for example at your wrist, as your heart pumps blood around your body
meanings.example: His breathing was shallow and his pulse was weak.
meanings.example_cn: 他呼吸很浅，脉搏微弱。

meanings.meaning_en: very soon before or after something
meanings.example: He retired immediately after the end of the war.
meanings.example_cn: 战争一结束他就退休了。

meanings.meaning_en: a large female animal that is kept on farms and used to produce milk or meat
meanings.example: He kept a few dairy cows.
meanings.example_cn: 他养了几头奶牛。

meanings.meaning_en: for use by one person or group, not for everyone
meanings.example: Morris has a private jet.
meanings.example_cn: 莫里斯拥有一架私人喷气式飞机。

meanings.meaning_en: bread that has been heated so that it is brown on both sides and no longer soft
meanings.example: I had a piece of toast for breakfast.
meanings.example_cn: 我早饭吃了一片吐司。

meanings.meaning_en: to make bread or other food brown by placing it close to heat
meanings.example: I toasted the cheese sandwiches.
meanings.example_cn: 我烤了干酪三明治。

meanings.meaning_en: the natural features of a particular part of a country that you can see, such as mountains, forests, deserts etc
meanings.example: The best part of the trip was the fantastic scenery.
meanings.example_cn: 此次旅行最精彩之处就是那美妙绝伦的风景。

meanings.meaning_en: an experience or activity that is very enjoyable and exciting
meanings.example: There’s plenty of fun for all the family.
meanings.example_cn: 可以让全家人玩得很开心。

meanings.meaning_en: alive now
meanings.example: He’s one of the greatest living composers.
meanings.example_cn: 他是仍然健在的最伟大的作曲家之一。

meanings.meaning_en: the way that you earn money or the money that you earn
meanings.example: The sun affects all living things (= people, animals, and plants ).
meanings.example_cn: 太阳与一切生物息息相关。

meanings.meaning_en: the Mediterranean Sea
meanings.example: You have the choice of night fishing in the Mediterranean, or windsurfing on a lake in Switzerland.
meanings.example_cn: 你可选择在地中海夜间垂钓，或是在瑞士的湖上玩帆板。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the Mediterranean Sea, or typical of the area of southern Europe around it
meanings.example: a Mediterranean country
meanings.example_cn: 地中海国家

meanings.meaning_en: having a value in money, etc.
meanings.example: One of the pictures is worth £50,000.
meanings.example_cn: 其中一幅画值5万英镑。

meanings.meaning_en: how good or useful something is or how important it is to people
meanings.example: You should not deprecate your own worth.
meanings.example_cn: 你不应该贬低你自己的价值。

meanings.meaning_en: to get control of a country by fighting
meanings.example: The Normans conquered England in 1066.
meanings.example_cn: 诺曼人于 1066 年征服英格兰。

meanings.meaning_en: to take in liquid, gas, or another substance from the surface or space around something
meanings.example: Plants absorb nutrients from the soil.
meanings.example_cn: 植物从土壤中吸收养分。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong feeling of interest and enjoyment about something and an eagerness to be involved in it
meanings.example: Gillian and Darren greeted the speakers with great enthusiasm.
meanings.example_cn: 吉利恩和达伦非常热情地接待了演讲者。

meanings.meaning_en: a family of young birds all born at the same time
meanings.example: ...a hungry brood of fledglings.
meanings.example_cn: …一窝饥饿的雏鸟。

meanings.meaning_en: if a bird broods, it sits on its eggs to make the young birds break out
to hit or strike lightly
meanings.example: Did you tip the waiter?
meanings.example_cn: 你给侍应生小费了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to go somewhere with someone
meanings.example: Children under 14 must be accompanied by an adult.
meanings.example_cn: 14岁以下儿童必须有成人陪同。

meanings.meaning_en: to kill someone, especially legally as a punishment
meanings.example: 13 people were summarily executed (= killed without any trial or legal process ) by the guerrillas.
meanings.example_cn: 有13人被游击队员就地处决。

meanings.meaning_en: to hide something carefully
meanings.example: The shadows concealed her as she crept up to the house.
meanings.example_cn: 她借着阴影蹑手蹑脚地走向房子。

meanings.meaning_en: confident and sure, without any doubts
meanings.example: I felt certain that I’d passed the test.
meanings.example_cn: 我感觉自己肯定通过这次测验了。

meanings.meaning_en: easy to notice
meanings.example: The difference in quality was immediately apparent.
meanings.example_cn: 质量的差异显而易见。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to deliver messages or documents, or someone who takes a message to someone else
meanings.example: There will be a messenger at the airport to collect the photographs from our courier.
meanings.example_cn: 机场会有一名信使从我们的快递员那儿取走照片。

meanings.meaning_en: an advantage or good feature of something
meanings.example: The merit of the report is its realistic assessment of the changes required.
meanings.example_cn: 这份报告的优点就是它对所要求的变动进行了实事求是的评估。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality or state of being young
meanings.example: Despite his youth, he had travelled alone.
meanings.example_cn: 他虽然年纪还小，却已独自旅行过了。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the navy or used by the navy
meanings.example: The harbour is an important naval base.
meanings.example_cn: 该港是一个重要的海军基地。

meanings.meaning_en: moving or pointing towards a lower position
meanings.example: a gentle downward slope
meanings.example_cn: 缓坡

meanings.meaning_en: towards a lower level or position
meanings.example: Benedict pointed downward again with his stick.
meanings.example_cn: 贝内迪克特又用他的拐杖向下指了指。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of information that is known to be true
meanings.example: First of all, we need to know the facts of the case.
meanings.example_cn: 首先，我们需要了解案子的相关事实。

meanings.meaning_en: a small simple building with only one or two rooms
meanings.example: a wooden hut
meanings.example_cn: 小木屋

meanings.meaning_en: used when saying the names of the people or things you are referring to
meanings.example: Three students were mentioned, namely John, Sarah and Sylvia.
meanings.example_cn: 有三名学生被提到，即约翰、萨拉和西尔维娅。

meanings.meaning_en: a building,  statue  , or other large structure that is built to remind people of an important event or famous person
meanings.example: He erected a monument on the spot where his daughter was killed.
meanings.example_cn: 他在女儿遇难的地方立了块纪念碑。

meanings.meaning_en: low in temperature, but not cold, often in a way that feels pleasant
meanings.example: She swam out into the cool water.
meanings.example_cn: 她往外游向清凉的水里。

meanings.meaning_en: the person in charge of governing a state in the US
meanings.example: He was governor of Iowa in the late 1970s.
meanings.example_cn: 他是20世纪70年代末爱荷华州的州长。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of instructions given to a computer to make it perform an operation
meanings.example: a word processing program
meanings.example_cn: 文字处理程序

meanings.meaning_en: a disease of the body or mind, or the condition of being ill
meanings.example: She had all the normal childhood illnesses.
meanings.example_cn: 儿童的常见病她小时候都得过。

meanings.meaning_en: usual, typical, or expected
meanings.example: A normal working week is 40 hours.
meanings.example_cn: 一个正常的工作周是40小时。

meanings.meaning_en: the number of people living in a particular area, country etc
meanings.example: Nearly 70 percent of the population still live in the countryside.
meanings.example_cn: 人口中差不多有70%仍住在乡村。

meanings.meaning_en: the border of a country
meanings.example: Lille is close to the frontier between France and Belgium.
meanings.example_cn: 里尔靠近法比边境。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of something that can be counted or measured
meanings.example: Your work has improved in quantity and quality this term.
meanings.example_cn: 这学期你的作业在完成数量和质量上都有提高。

meanings.meaning_en: the way that things or events are arranged in relation to each other, so that one thing is first, another thing is second etc
meanings.example: There seemed to be no logical order to the sections.
meanings.example_cn: 这几部分似乎没有逻辑顺序。

meanings.meaning_en: to tell someone that they must do something, especially using your official power or authority
meanings.example: Let’s have some order in here.
meanings.example_cn: 我们把这里整理一下吧。

meanings.meaning_en: knowledge gained through reading and study
meanings.example: a man of great learning
meanings.example_cn: 学识渊博的人

meanings.meaning_en: in or to every place
meanings.example: I’ve looked everywhere but I can’t find the map.
meanings.example_cn: 我到处都找过了，但就是找不到地图。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular time or state that something reaches as it grows or develops
meanings.example: We’re getting to the stage where we hardly ever go out together.
meanings.example_cn: 我们快要到几乎不一起外出的地步了。

meanings.meaning_en: every person
meanings.example: If everyone is ready, I’ll begin.
meanings.example_cn: 如果大家都准备好了，我就开始。

meanings.meaning_en: if an insect or a plant stings you, it makes a very small hole in your skin and you feel a sharp pain because of a poisonous substance
meanings.example: He was stung by a bee.
meanings.example_cn: 他被蜜蜂蜇了。

meanings.meaning_en: the sharp needle-shaped part of an insect’s or animal’s body, with which it stings you
meanings.example: Antiseptic stings a little.
meanings.example_cn: 消毒剂稍有刺痛感。

meanings.meaning_en: if an egg hatches, or if it is hatched, it breaks, letting the young bird, insect etc come out
meanings.example: The eggs take three days to hatch.
meanings.example_cn: 这些蛋要三天时间才能孵化。

meanings.meaning_en: a sweet sticky substance produced by bees, used as food
meanings.example: Where did you buy the honey?
meanings.example_cn: 你在哪里买到这蜂蜜的？

meanings.meaning_en: a place made or chosen by a bird to lay its eggs in and to live in
meanings.example: a bird’s nest
meanings.example_cn: 鸟窝

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring temperature. It can be shown as a symbol after a number. For example, 70° means 70 degrees.
meanings.example: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees.
meanings.example_cn: 把烘箱预热至425度。

meanings.meaning_en: having the same value, purpose, job etc as a person or thing of a different kind
meanings.example: I had no dollars, but offered him an equivalent amount of sterling.
meanings.example_cn: 我没有美金，但给了他等值的英镑。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of pages that show the days, weeks, and months of a particular year, that you usually hang on a wall
meanings.example: There was a calendar on the wall above, with large squares around the dates.
meanings.example_cn: 墙的上方曾有一本日历，日期框在大方格里。

meanings.meaning_en: manual work involves using your hands or your physical strength rather than your mind
meanings.example: People in manual occupations have a lower life expectancy.
meanings.example_cn: 干体力活的人预期寿命较短。

meanings.meaning_en: a book that gives instructions about how to do something, especially how to use a machine
the politicians with important positions in a government who meet to make decisions or advise the leader of the government
meanings.example: a cabinet meeting
meanings.example_cn: 内阁会议

meanings.meaning_en: firmly held in a particular position and not moving or shaking
meanings.example: It takes a steady hand to perform surgery.
meanings.example_cn: 做手术手要稳。

meanings.meaning_en: to hold someone or something so they become more balanced or controlled, or to become more balanced or controlled
meanings.example: The plane steadied, and the passengers relaxed
meanings.example_cn: 飞机平稳后，乘客们松了一口气。

meanings.meaning_en: a greater amount or number
meanings.example: I have no more questions.
meanings.example_cn: 我没问题了。

meanings.meaning_en: having a particular quality to a greater degree
meanings.example: The film deserves more attention from the public.
meanings.example_cn: 这部影片应受到公众的更多注意。

meanings.meaning_en: a hard round fruit that has red, light green, or yellow skin and is white inside
meanings.example: apple pie
meanings.example_cn: 苹果馅饼

meanings.meaning_en: not at any time, or not once
meanings.example: He’s never been to Australia.
meanings.example_cn: 他从未去过澳大利亚。

meanings.meaning_en: a statement telling someone what they must do
meanings.example: (= I have been told ) to give the package to him personally.
meanings.example_cn: 我接到的指示是亲手把包裹交给他。

meanings.meaning_en: when people laugh, or the sound of people laughing
meanings.example: Foster joined in the laughter.
meanings.example_cn: 福斯特也跟着笑了起来。

meanings.meaning_en: an urgent request for something important
meanings.example: The girl’s family have made a public appeal for help to try and catch her killer.
meanings.example_cn: 那名遇害女孩的家人吁请公众协助捉拿凶手。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a serious public request for help, money, information etc
meanings.example: an appeal to the European Court of Human Rights
meanings.example_cn: 向欧洲人权法庭提出的上诉

meanings.meaning_en: a group of words that has a special meaning that is different from the ordinary meaning of each separate word. For example, ‘under the weather’ is an idiom meaning ‘ill’.
meanings.example: ..familiar idioms and metaphors, such as "turning over a new leaf.
meanings.example_cn: …如“翻开新的一页”这样熟悉的习语和比喻。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is impressive makes you admire it because it is very good, large, important etc
meanings.example: The figures certainly look impressive.
meanings.example_cn: 这些数字看上去确实很可观。

meanings.meaning_en: the number 14
meanings.example: He used to work fourteen hours a day.
meanings.example_cn: 他过去一天工作14个小时。

meanings.meaning_en: used to say what part of someone or something is hit or touched
meanings.example: I wanted to punch him on the nose.
meanings.example_cn: 我真想一拳打到他鼻子上。

meanings.meaning_en: a neat pile of things
meanings.example: stacks of dirty dishes
meanings.example_cn: 一摞摞脏盘子

meanings.meaning_en: to make things into a neat pile, or to form a neat pile
meanings.example: The assistants price the items and stack them on the shelves.
meanings.example_cn: 售货员给商品标价，然后把它们叠放到货架上。

meanings.meaning_en: to copy the way someone behaves, speaks, moves etc, especially in order to make people laugh
meanings.example: She was a splendid mimic and loved to imitate Winston Churchill.
meanings.example_cn: 她是个出色的模仿者，喜欢模仿温斯顿·丘吉尔。

meanings.meaning_en: to throw something somewhere
meanings.example: Sparks leapt as he cast more wood on the fire.
meanings.example_cn: 他往火里投进更多的木块，火星四处飞溅。

meanings.meaning_en: a machine for forcing liquid or gas into or out of something
meanings.example: water/air/beer etc pump (=for moving water, air etc)
meanings.example_cn: 抽水机/抽气机/啤酒泵等

meanings.meaning_en: to make liquid or gas move in a particular direction, using a pump
meanings.example: It's not enough to get rid of raw sewage by pumping it out to sea.
meanings.example_cn: 仅用水泵将未经处理的污水排入海中是不够的。

meanings.meaning_en: a living creature such as a dog or cat, that is not an insect, plant, bird, fish, or person
meanings.example: furry little animals
meanings.example_cn: 毛茸茸的小动物

meanings.meaning_en: human feelings, desires etc that are connected with sex, food, and other basic needs
meanings.example: The cosmetics have not been tested on animals.
meanings.example_cn: 这些化妆品没有进行过动物试验。

meanings.meaning_en: to repair a tear or hole in a piece of clothing
meanings.example: My father used to mend our shoes.
meanings.example_cn: 我父亲过去常为我们修补鞋子。

meanings.meaning_en: twelve
meanings.example: a dozen eggs
meanings.example_cn: 一打鸡蛋

meanings.meaning_en: to wash yourself or someone else in a bath
meanings.example: I bathed, washed my hair, and got dressed.
meanings.example_cn: 我洗了澡，洗了头，然后穿上衣服。

meanings.meaning_en: a way of doing or achieving something
meanings.example: The only means of communication was sign language.
meanings.example_cn: 唯一的交流方法是手语。

meanings.meaning_en: special attention or importance
meanings.example: a change of emphasis in government policy
meanings.example_cn: 政府政策重心的变化

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which there is not enough of something that people need
meanings.example: There is no heating available due to fuel shortages.
meanings.example_cn: 因为燃料短缺，所以没有供暖。

meanings.meaning_en: contrary ideas, opinions, or actions are completely different and opposed to each other
meanings.example: Two contrary views emerged.
meanings.example_cn: 出现了两种相反的观点。

meanings.meaning_en: used to add to a negative statement, to disagree with a negative statement by someone else, or to answer no to a question
meanings.example: The men shouted contrary orders.
meanings.example_cn: 这些人大声喊叫的命令互相矛盾。

meanings.meaning_en: a passage that has been dug under the ground for cars, trains etc to go through
meanings.example: a railway tunnel
meanings.example_cn: 铁路隧道

meanings.meaning_en: something that is visible can be seen
meanings.example: The comet is visible to the naked eye (= can be seen without using special equipment ).
meanings.example_cn: 这颗彗星肉眼看得见。

meanings.meaning_en: the smallest amount of something or number of things that is possible or necessary
meanings.example: This will take a minimum of one hour.
meanings.example_cn: 这最少要用一个小时。

meanings.meaning_en: the minimum number, degree, or amount of something is the smallest or least that is possible, allowed, or needed
meanings.example: The minimum number of students we need to run the course is fifteen.
meanings.example_cn: 我们开这门课程最少要有15个学生。

meanings.meaning_en: a row of small bushes or trees growing close together, usually dividing one field or garden from another
meanings.example: a privet hedge
meanings.example_cn: 女贞树篱

meanings.meaning_en: a group of things such as papers, clothes, or sticks that are fastened or tied together
meanings.example: a small bundle containing mostly clothing
meanings.example_cn: 一个小包袱，里面主要是衣服

meanings.meaning_en: to straighten your arms, legs, or body to full length
meanings.example: Carl sat up in bed, yawned, and stretched.
meanings.example_cn: 卡尔从床上坐起来，打了个呵欠,伸了伸懒腰。

meanings.meaning_en: the action of stretching a part of your body out to its full length, or a particular way of doing this
meanings.example: Always stretch before exercising.
meanings.example_cn: 锻炼之前都要做伸展运动。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to electricity
meanings.example: The fire was caused by an electrical fault.
meanings.example_cn: 大火是电力故障引起的。

meanings.meaning_en: not real or not made of natural things but made to be like something that is real or natural
meanings.example: artificial flowers
meanings.example_cn: 假花

meanings.meaning_en: feeling that you want to thank someone because of something kind that they have done, or showing this feeling
meanings.example: Our grateful thanks go to all who participated.
meanings.example_cn: 我们衷心感谢所有参与者。

meanings.meaning_en: a member of the same class in a school, college or – in the US – a university
meanings.example: He acquainted his classmate with my sister.
meanings.example_cn: 他把我妹妹介绍给他的同班同学。

meanings.meaning_en: to calculate the value or cost of something
meanings.example: The value of the business was assessed at £1.25 million.
meanings.example_cn: 对该企业估价125万英镑

meanings.meaning_en: belonging or relating to one particular person, rather than to other people or to people in general
meanings.example: My personal view is that we shouldn’t offer him the job.
meanings.example_cn: 我个人认为我们不该给他这份工作。

meanings.meaning_en: to have the right to have or do something, or to give someone this right
meanings.example: Free school lunches are given to children who qualify.
meanings.example_cn: 符合条件的儿童可获得免费的学生午餐。

meanings.meaning_en: to change a situation, discussion etc by giving special attention to one idea or subject instead of to a previous one
meanings.example: They need to shift from farming to industry, and they need to do so desperately.
meanings.example_cn: 他们需要从农业领域转移到工业领域。 他们需要拼命地那么做。

meanings.meaning_en: a change in the way people think about something, in the way something is done etc
meanings.example: the shift from one type of economic system to another
meanings.example_cn: 从一种经济体系向另一种经济体系的转变

meanings.meaning_en: happening or coming before the time, place, or part mentioned
meanings.example: As we saw in the preceding chapter, groups can be powerful agents of socialization.
meanings.example_cn: 如我们在前一章所见，团组可以是社会化的有力动因。

meanings.meaning_en: a flat piece of wood, plastic, card etc that you use for a particular purpose such as cutting things on, or for playing indoor games
meanings.example: Martha was chopping vegetables on a wooden board.
meanings.example_cn: 玛莎正在用一块木砧板切蔬菜。

meanings.meaning_en: to get on a bus, plane, train etc in order to travel somewhere
meanings.example: a chess board
meanings.example_cn: 棋盘

meanings.meaning_en: something that is done by people in a particular society because it is traditional
meanings.example: The guide offers information on local customs.
meanings.example_cn: 导游手册介绍了当地的风俗习惯。

meanings.meaning_cn: 补丁；〔与周围部分不同的〕斑，小块
meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of material that is sewn on something to cover a hole in it
meanings.example: a jacket with leather patches at the elbows
meanings.example_cn: 肘部有皮革补丁的短上衣

meanings.meaning_en: to repair a hole in something by putting a piece of something else over it
meanings.example: Look out for icy patches on the road.
meanings.example_cn: 小心路上结冰的地方。

meanings.meaning_en: a glass container with a wide top and a lid, used for storing food such as jam or honey, or the amount it contains
meanings.example: a jam jar
meanings.example_cn: 果酱罐

meanings.meaning_en: to win a victory over someone in a war, competition, game etc
meanings.example: They hoped to defeat the enemy at sea.
meanings.example_cn: 他们希望在海上击败敌人。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is not yet an adult
meanings.example: The hotel is ideal for families with young children.
meanings.example_cn: 这家宾馆对带小孩的家庭再合适不过。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of teaching and learning, usually at school, college, or university
meanings.example: She also hopes her children will get a good education.
meanings.example_cn: 她也希望她的孩子可以受到良好的教育。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of steps built for going from one level of a building to another
meanings.example: We walked up four flights of stairs (= sets of stairs ) .
meanings.example_cn: 我们往上走了四段楼梯。

meanings.meaning_en: a small object that you keep in your house because it is beautiful rather than useful
meanings.example: a shelf covered with books and ornaments
meanings.example_cn: 摆满书籍和装饰品的架子

meanings.meaning_en: towards or on a lower floor of a building, especially a house
meanings.example: Rosie ran downstairs to answer the door.
meanings.example_cn: 罗茜跑下楼去开门。

meanings.meaning_en: be situated on the ground floor of a building or on a lower floor than you are
meanings.example: Charles was downstairs in the kitchen.
meanings.example_cn: 查尔斯在楼下厨房里。

meanings.meaning_en: an animal like a rabbit but larger, which can run very quickly
meanings.example: Because it makes its home in an extreme environment, the desert hare is biologically designed to radiate excess heat through its lanky limbs and oversized ears.
meanings.example_cn: 因为生长在极端环境中，沙漠兔子形成了独特的生物学构造，通过瘦长的四肢和超大的耳朵辐射多余的热量。

meanings.meaning_en: a small stream
meanings.example: a babbling brook
meanings.example_cn: 潺潺的小溪

meanings.meaning_en: a way of doing something, especially the correct or usual way
meanings.example: On board, we were given the usual talk on safety procedures (= what to do if an accident happens, or to prevent an accident ) .
meanings.example_cn: 在飞机上，我们听了例行的飞行安全讲解。

meanings.meaning_en: to pay someone to work for you
meanings.example: The factory employs over 2,000 people.
meanings.example_cn: 这家工厂雇用了2,000多名员工。

meanings.meaning_en: if something may happen or may be true, there is a possibility that it will happen or be true but this is not certain
meanings.example: I may be late, so don’t wait for me.
meanings.example_cn: 我可能会迟到，所以别等我。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the large areas into which some countries are divided, and which usually has its own local government
meanings.example: a Chinese province
meanings.example_cn: 中国的一个省

meanings.meaning_en: if a liquid or something wet freezes or is frozen, it becomes hard and solid because the temperature is very cold
meanings.example: The lake had frozen overnight.
meanings.example_cn: 湖上一夜之间就结了冰。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to art or culture
meanings.example: artistic work
meanings.example_cn: 艺术作品

meanings.meaning_en: two or more different things that exist together or are used or put together
meanings.example: Certain combinations of sounds are not possible in English.
meanings.example_cn: 在英语中，某些音是不可能组合的。

meanings.meaning_en: to gradually change your behaviour and attitudes in order to be successful in a new situation
meanings.example: The ability to adapt is a definite asset in this job.
meanings.example_cn: 适应能力是做这份工作的绝对有利条件。

meanings.meaning_en: a special vehicle that is used to take people who are ill or injured to hospital
meanings.example: the ambulance service
meanings.example_cn: 救护车服务

meanings.meaning_en: something difficult or worrying that you are responsible for
meanings.example: His family responsibilities had started to become a burden.
meanings.example_cn: 家庭责任已开始成为他的负担。

meanings.meaning_en: not guilty of a crime
meanings.example: Nobody would believe that I was innocent.
meanings.example_cn: 没人肯相信我是清白的。

meanings.meaning_en: a choice you can make in a particular situation
meanings.example: There are a number of options available.
meanings.example_cn: 有多种选择。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money that you pay to do something or that you pay to a professional person for their work
meanings.example: You can use the gym and pool for a fee of £35 a month.
meanings.example_cn: 月付35英镑，即可使用健身房和游泳池。

meanings.meaning_en: something you say or do when you meet someone
meanings.example: I smiled a polite greeting, but the woman hardly acknowledged me.
meanings.example_cn: 我客气地笑着打了个招呼，可是那女人没有答理我。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling, belief, or statement that is sincere is honest and true, and based on what you really feel and believe
meanings.example: Please accept my sincere apologies .
meanings.example_cn: 请接受我真诚的道歉。

meanings.meaning_en: strong metal that can be shaped easily, consisting of iron and  carbon
meanings.example: a steel bridge
meanings.example_cn: 钢铁大桥

meanings.meaning_en: to protect a person, place, or object by staying near them and watching them
meanings.example: The Sergeant told Swift to guard the entrance.
meanings.example_cn: 中士叫斯威夫特守着入口。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to protect a place or person
meanings.example: a lioness guarding her cubs
meanings.example_cn: 守护着幼狮的母狮

meanings.meaning_en: deserving respect from people
meanings.example: Leeds United were worthy winners of the competition.
meanings.example_cn: 利兹联队是比赛当之无愧的获胜者。

meanings.meaning_en: the meal you have in the morning
meanings.example: We had bacon and eggs for breakfast .
meanings.example_cn: 我们早餐吃了熏肉鸡蛋。

meanings.meaning_en: to feel sorry for someone because you understand their problems
meanings.example: I sympathize, but I don’t know how to help.
meanings.example_cn: 我很同情，但不知道如何帮忙。

meanings.meaning_en: a large building where people can see famous pieces of art
meanings.example: an art/a picture gallery
meanings.example_cn: 美术馆；绘画陈列室

meanings.meaning_en: if you notice something or someone, you realize that they exist, especially because you can see, hear, or feel them
meanings.example: He noticed a woman in a black dress sitting across from him.
meanings.example_cn: 他看到有位黑衣女子坐在他的对面。

meanings.meaning_en: when you notice or pay attention to someone or something
meanings.example: I didn’t notice any smoke.
meanings.example_cn: 我没注意到有烟。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount expressed as if it is part of a total which is 100
meanings.example: Interest rates fell by six percentage points (= 6% ) .
meanings.example_cn: 利息下降了6个百分点。

meanings.meaning_en: what you earn by working and can use to buy things. Money can be in the form of notes and coins or cheques, and can be kept in a bank
meanings.example: Don’t spend all your money on the first day of your holiday!
meanings.example_cn: 别在度假的第一天就把钱都花完了！

meanings.meaning_en: better than anything else or anyone else in quality, skill, how effective it is etc
meanings.example: He won the best actor award.
meanings.example_cn: 他获得最佳男演员奖。

meanings.meaning_en: to see someone by chance and talk to them
meanings.example: You’ll never guess who I met in town.
meanings.example_cn: 你绝对猜不出我在镇上碰到谁了。

meanings.meaning_en: a circle made of gold and decorated with jewels, worn by kings and queens on their heads
meanings.example: a crown of flowers
meanings.example_cn: 花冠

meanings.meaning_en: the start or first part of an event, story, period of time etc
meanings.example: There’s a short poem at the beginning of every chapter.
meanings.example_cn: 每一章的开头都有一首短诗。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or using mathematics
meanings.example: mathematical analysis
meanings.example_cn: 数学分析

meanings.meaning_en: the liquid that comes from fruit and vegetables, or a drink that is made from this
meanings.example: a carton of orange juice
meanings.example_cn: 一纸盒橙汁

meanings.meaning_en: a field with wild grass and flowers
meanings.example: water meadows (= near a river)
meanings.example_cn: 岸边的草地

meanings.meaning_en: an area of a town or the countryside, especially one with particular features
meanings.example: a house in a pleasant suburban district
meanings.example_cn: 地处宜人郊区的一幢房屋

meanings.meaning_en: an animal that lives in water, and uses its fins and tail to swim
meanings.example: Over 1,500 different species of fish inhabit the waters around the reef.
meanings.example_cn: 那片礁石周围的水域生活着1,500多种不同的鱼类。

meanings.meaning_en: to try to catch fish
meanings.example: The stonefish is the most deadly of all fishes.
meanings.example_cn: 石鱼是所有鱼类中毒性最强的。

meanings.meaning_en: not correct or true
meanings.example: The information you gave us was incorrect.
meanings.example_cn: 你给我们的信息不准确。

meanings.meaning_en: to stop having a particular attitude, quality, ability etc, or to gradually have less of it
meanings.example: I’ve lost my appetite.
meanings.example_cn: 我已经没有了胃口。

meanings.meaning_en: an adult male human
meanings.example: There were two men and a woman in the car.
meanings.example_cn: 车上有两男一女。

meanings.meaning_en: used to emphasize how small or unimportant something or someone is
meanings.example: She lost the election by a mere 20 votes.
meanings.example_cn: 她仅仅以20票之差落选。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of electrical equipment that makes a ringing sound, used as a signal or to get someone’s attention
meanings.example: church bells
meanings.example_cn: 教堂的钟

meanings.meaning_en: to have or represent a particular meaning
meanings.example: The red light means ‘Stop’.
meanings.example_cn: 红灯表示“停”。

meanings.meaning_en: to give up something or someone, especially because you are forced to
meanings.example: They agreed to surrender their weapons.
meanings.example_cn: 他们同意交出武器。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a problem or situation more difficult
meanings.example: I do not wish to complicate the task more than is necessary.
meanings.example_cn: 我不想使这项任务不必要地复杂化。

meanings.meaning_en: the language used in Britain, the US, Australia, and some other countries
meanings.example: Do you speak English?
meanings.example_cn: 你会说英语吗？

meanings.meaning_en: relating to England or its people
meanings.example: leaflets written in plain English
meanings.example_cn: 用简单英语写的传单

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to work in gardens
meanings.example: She employed a gardener.
meanings.example_cn: 她雇了一个园丁。

meanings.meaning_en: to use a word or name to describe someone or something in a particular way
meanings.example: You may call it harmless fun, but I call it pornography.
meanings.example_cn: 你可能会说这是无恶意的小玩笑，但是我却认为这是色情。

meanings.meaning_en: enjoyable or attractive and making you feel happy
meanings.example: It had been a pleasant evening.
meanings.example_cn: 那是个愉快的夜晚。

meanings.meaning_en: when you change something from one form, purpose, or system to a different one
meanings.example: the conversion of waste into usable products
meanings.example_cn: 把废物变成可用的产品

meanings.meaning_en: to take someone else’s child into your home and legally become its parent
meanings.example: Sally was adopted when she was four.
meanings.example_cn: 莎莉四岁时被人收养。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is very skilled at something
meanings.example: a work of art by a true master
meanings.example_cn: 一件真正的大师之作

meanings.meaning_en: a tube through which a liquid or gas flows
meanings.example: a water pipe
meanings.example_cn: 水管

meanings.meaning_en: to get back something that was taken from you, lost, or almost destroyed
meanings.example: Four paintings stolen from the gallery have been recovered.
meanings.example_cn: 美术馆的四幅被盗画作已经失而复得。

meanings.meaning_en: to exchange information or conversation with other people, using words, signs, writing etc
meanings.example: We communicated mostly by e-mail.
meanings.example_cn: 我们主要是用电子邮件沟通。

meanings.meaning_en: a bicycle
meanings.example: Let’s go for a bike ride.
meanings.example_cn: 我们去骑会儿自行车吧。

meanings.meaning_en: to ride a bicycle
meanings.example: She bikes to work every day.
meanings.example_cn: 她每天骑自行车上班。

meanings.meaning_en: to decide what group something belongs to
meanings.example: We’d classify Drabble’s novels under ‘Romance’.
meanings.example_cn: 我们把德拉布尔的小说归类为“言情小说”。

meanings.meaning_en: a musical instrument that you blow into, which consists of a curved metal tube that is wide at the end, and three buttons you press to change the notes
meanings.example: I played the trumpet in the school orchestra.
meanings.example_cn: 我在学校管弦乐队吹小号。

meanings.meaning_en: a long light boat that is pointed at both ends and which you move along using a  paddle
meanings.example: His canoe was there, on the river below the rapids.
meanings.example_cn: 他的独木舟在险滩下面的河水中。

meanings.meaning_en: to amuse or interest people in a way that gives them pleasure
meanings.example: A museum should aim to entertain as well as educate.
meanings.example_cn: 博物馆应该致力于成为娱乐和教育功能并重的场所。

meanings.meaning_en: a series of actions intended to achieve a particular result relating to politics or business, or a social improvement
meanings.example: Jones ran a good campaign.
meanings.example_cn: 琼斯的活动搞得很成功。

meanings.meaning_en: to leave someone, especially someone you are responsible for
meanings.example: How could she abandon her own child?
meanings.example_cn: 她怎么能抛弃自己的孩子？

meanings.meaning_en: a large vehicle for carrying heavy goods
meanings.example: Now and then they heard the roar of a heavy lorry.
meanings.example_cn: 他们不时听见一辆重型卡车的轰响声。

meanings.meaning_en: a formal meeting of representatives of different groups, countries etc, to discuss ideas, make decisions etc
meanings.example: a congress of the ruling Labor Party
meanings.example_cn: 执政党工党的代表大会

meanings.meaning_en: consisting of two parts that are similar or exactly the same
meanings.example: a double sink
meanings.example_cn: 双水槽

meanings.meaning_en: sure that something will happen in the way that you want or expect
meanings.example: We are confident next year’s profits will be higher.
meanings.example_cn: 我们确信明年的利润会增加。

meanings.meaning_en: very great in degree
meanings.example: Extreme poverty still exists in many rural areas.
meanings.example_cn: 许多农村地区仍处于赤贫状态。

meanings.meaning_en: the number of times that something happens within a particular period of time or within a particular group of people
meanings.example: Side effects from prescribed drugs are being reported with increasing frequency (= more and more often ) .
meanings.example_cn: 处方药的副作用正越来越频繁地被报道出来。

meanings.meaning_en: to admit, especially to the police, that you have done something wrong or illegal
meanings.example: Occasionally people confess to crimes they haven’t committed just to get attention.
meanings.example_cn: 偶尔人们会承认自己并未犯过的罪行，那只是为了引人注意。

meanings.meaning_en: to pay to live in a room in someone’s house
meanings.example: John lodged with a family in Bristol when he first started work.
meanings.example_cn: 约翰刚开始工作时寄住在布里斯托尔的一户人家家里。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of rooms on one floor of a large building, where someone lives
meanings.example: She lives in a small apartment.
meanings.example_cn: 她住在一套小公寓里。

meanings.meaning_en: a machine that takes people and goods from one level to another in a building
meanings.example: We’ll have to take the elevator.
meanings.example_cn: 我们只好坐电梯了。

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring weight, equal to 1,000 grams
meanings.example: By comparison, one kilogram of tomatoes requires 160 litres of water.
meanings.example_cn: 相比之下，生产一公斤的番茄需要160升水。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to industry or the people working in it
meanings.example: industrial accident/injury (=happening at work)
meanings.example_cn: 工业事故/工伤

meanings.meaning_en: a substance that can cause an explosion
meanings.example: ...one-hundred-and-fifty pounds of Semtex explosive.
meanings.example_cn: …150磅的塞姆汀塑料炸药。

meanings.meaning_en: able or likely to explode
meanings.example: Because the gas is highly explosive, it needs to be kept in high-pressure containers.
meanings.example_cn: 由于这种气体极易爆炸，因此需要保存在高压容器内。

meanings.meaning_en: something that tests strength, skill, or ability, especially in a way that is interesting
meanings.example: The company is ready to meet the challenges of the next few years.
meanings.example_cn: 公司已准备好迎接今后几年的挑战。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a public official promise, especially in a court of law
meanings.example: Remember that you have sworn an oath and so must tell the truth.
meanings.example_cn: 记住你已经宣过誓了，所以必须讲真话。

meanings.meaning_en: an act of leaving a place, especially at the start of a journey
meanings.example: I saw Simon shortly before his departure for Russia.
meanings.example_cn: 西蒙去俄罗斯前不久我见过他。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of rubber material that can stretch and then return to its usual length or size
meanings.example: a piece of elastic
meanings.example_cn: 一根橡皮带

meanings.meaning_en: a material that is elastic can stretch and then go back to its usual length or size
meanings.example: the horny elastic pad in a horse’s hoof
meanings.example_cn: 马蹄上粗硬而有弹性的肉掌

meanings.meaning_en: if you break something, you make it separate into two or more pieces, for example by hitting it, dropping it, or bending it
meanings.example: I had to break a window to get into the house.
meanings.example_cn: 我只得打破一扇窗户进屋。

meanings.meaning_en: an important city where the main government of a country, state etc is
meanings.example: Washington D.C., the capital of the United States
meanings.example_cn: 美国首都华盛顿特区

meanings.meaning_en: enough in quantity or of a good enough quality for a particular purpose
meanings.example: Farmers have been slow to make adequate provision for their retirement.
meanings.example_cn: 农民们迟迟没有为退休做好适当安排。

meanings.meaning_en: slow or steady movement somewhere
meanings.example: We made good progress despite the snow.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管下雪，我们的行程还是很顺利。

meanings.meaning_en: a soft thick mixture that can easily be shaped or spread
meanings.example: Mix the powder with enough water to make a smooth paste.
meanings.example_cn: 把粉末和足够的水混合调成均匀的糊状。

meanings.meaning_en: directly relating to the subject or problem being discussed or considered
meanings.example: Relevant documents were presented in court.
meanings.example_cn: 法庭上出示了相关的文件。

meanings.meaning_en: a spoken or written test of knowledge, especially an important one
meanings.example: At the end of each level, there’s an exam.
meanings.example_cn: 在每一级别结束时都有一次考试。

meanings.meaning_en: not liking changes or new ideas
meanings.example: a very conservative attitude to education
meanings.example_cn: 对待教育非常守旧的态度

meanings.meaning_en: someone who does not like changes in politics, ideas, or fashion
meanings.example: conservative views
meanings.example_cn: 保守的观点

meanings.meaning_en: if animals or people inhabit an area or place, they live there
meanings.example: The woods are inhabited by many wild animals.
meanings.example_cn: 很多野生动物栖居在这片森林里。

meanings.meaning_en: a government department that is responsible for one of the areas of government work, such as education or health
meanings.example: the Ministry of Agriculture
meanings.example_cn: 农业部

meanings.meaning_en: the long thin part of a plant, from which leaves, flowers, or fruit grow
meanings.example: He stooped down, cut the stem for her with his knife and handed her the flower.
meanings.example_cn: 他弯下腰，用刀替她割下花茎，然后把花递给她。

meanings.meaning_en: to develop as a result of something else
meanings.example: All my problems stem from drink.
meanings.example_cn: 我所有的问题都是酗酒引起的。

meanings.meaning_en: the empty space at the side of a page
meanings.example: Someone had scribbled a note in the margin .
meanings.example_cn: 有人在页边写了条批注。

meanings.meaning_en: the hard central part of a fruit such as an apple
meanings.example: Remove the cores, and bake the apples for 40 minutes.
meanings.example_cn: 去除果心，然后把苹果烤40分钟。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is employed by a newspaper or a television station etc to report news from a particular area or on a particular subject
meanings.example: Our correspondent in South Africa sent this report.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的驻南非记者发来这份报道。

meanings.meaning_en: used when saying that something may be true or likely, although you are not completely certain
meanings.example: This last task is possibly the most difficult.
meanings.example_cn: 这最后一项任务也许是最难的。

meanings.meaning_en: if something rolls, especially something round, or if you roll it, it moves along a surface by turning over and over
meanings.example: The ball rolled into the street.
meanings.example_cn: 球滚到了街上。

meanings.meaning_en: to fix something that is damaged, broken, split, or not working properly
meanings.example: Dad was up the ladder, repairing the roof.
meanings.example_cn: 爸爸在梯子上修补屋顶。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you do to fix a thing that is damaged, broken, or not working
meanings.example: Where can I get my shoes repaired ?
meanings.example_cn: 哪儿能修补鞋子？

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the principles of what is right and wrong behaviour, and with the difference between good and evil
meanings.example: It is easy to have an opinion on a moral issue like the death penalty for murder.
meanings.example_cn: 对于判谋杀犯死刑这种涉及伦理道德的问题，有个观点并非难事。

meanings.meaning_en: in small pieces because it has been hit, dropped etc
meanings.example: Mind the broken glass.
meanings.example_cn: 当心碎玻璃。

meanings.meaning_en: to control the direction a vehicle is going, for example by turning a wheel
meanings.example: He was steering with only one hand.
meanings.example_cn: 他只用一只手在驾驶。

meanings.meaning_en: a solid substance made of fat or oil and used to make candles, polish etc
meanings.example: wax crayons
meanings.example_cn: 蜡笔

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring length. There are 100 centimetres in one metre.
meanings.example: ...a tiny fossil plant, only a few centimetres high.
meanings.example_cn: …一块小小的植物化石，只有几厘米高。

meanings.meaning_en: like gas or in the form of gas
meanings.example: Freon exists both in liquid and gaseous states.
meanings.example_cn: 氟利昂既有液态也有气态。

meanings.meaning_en: the same in size, number, amount, value etc as something else
meanings.example: Both candidates received an equal number of votes.
meanings.example_cn: 两位候选人的得票数相等。

meanings.meaning_en: a long talk on a particular subject that someone gives to a group of people, especially to students in a university
meanings.example: He regularly gives lectures on modern French literature.
meanings.example_cn: 他经常讲授法国现代文学课程。

meanings.meaning_en: to talk to a group of people on a particular subject, especially to students in a university
meanings.example: He lectures on European art at Manchester University.
meanings.example_cn: 他在曼彻斯特大学讲授欧洲艺术。

meanings.meaning_en: a suggestion to someone that they should choose a particular thing or person that you think is very good
meanings.example: Academic staff are appointed on the recommendation of a committee.
meanings.example_cn: 教员是委员会推荐任命的。

meanings.meaning_en: to lose blood, especially because of an injury
meanings.example: Your nose is bleeding.
meanings.example_cn: 你的鼻子流血了。

meanings.meaning_en: a child
meanings.example: She’d always loved animals since she was a little kid.
meanings.example_cn: 她从小就喜爱动物。

meanings.meaning_en: to start to have a feeling or quality, or to start to develop into something
meanings.example: The weather became warmer.
meanings.example_cn: 天气变暖和了。

meanings.meaning_en: to take action so that a person, place etc is no longer affected by something bad or no longer has it
meanings.example: a promise to rid the country of nuclear weapons
meanings.example_cn: 销毁本国核武器的承诺

meanings.meaning_en: an area of ground, especially when used for farming or building
meanings.example: They own a lot of land.
meanings.example_cn: 他们拥有许多土地。

meanings.example: He bought a piece of land.
meanings.example_cn: 他买了一块地。

meanings.meaning_en: not afraid of taking risks and making difficult decisions
meanings.example: In a surprisingly bold move , he is threatening court action against the company.
meanings.example_cn: 他出人意料地做出一个大胆举动，威胁要起诉这家公司。

meanings.meaning_en: a building where people are kept as a punishment for a crime, or while they are waiting to go to court for their  trial
meanings.example: He visits his dad in prison every week.
meanings.example_cn: 他每周都去探望狱中的父亲。

meanings.meaning_cn: 谦虚的；不太大的；不很贵的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is modest does not want to talk about their abilities or achievements
meanings.example: You’re too modest! You’ve been a huge help to us.
meanings.example_cn: 你太谦虚了！你帮了我们大忙呢。

meanings.meaning_en: animal skin that has been treated to preserve it, and is used for making shoes, bags etc
meanings.example: The inside of the bag was lined with soft leather.
meanings.example_cn: 这包的里面衬了软皮。

meanings.meaning_en: the measurement of how long something is from one end to the other
meanings.example: We measured the length and width of the living room.
meanings.example_cn: 我们量了客厅的长和宽。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to education, especially at college or university level
meanings.example: He possessed no academic qualifications.
meanings.example_cn: 他没有学历。

meanings.meaning_en: rich and successful
meanings.example: a prosperous landowner
meanings.example_cn: 富裕的土地拥有者

meanings.meaning_en: concerning grammar
meanings.example: grammatical rules
meanings.example_cn: 语法规则

meanings.meaning_en: the science concerned with the study of physical objects and substances, and of natural forces such as light, heat, and movement
meanings.example: ...the laws of physics.
meanings.example_cn: …物理学定律。

meanings.meaning_en: an engine or motor in which the pressure of a liquid or gas moves a special wheel around
meanings.example: The new ship will be powered by two gas turbines and four diesel engines.
meanings.example_cn: 那艘新轮船将由2台燃气涡轮机和4台柴油机驱动。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling that someone or something is not important and deserves no respect
meanings.example: The public is treated with contempt by broadcasters.
meanings.example_cn: 公众受到了节目主持人的轻蔑对待。

meanings.meaning_en: an official agreement or decision that ends an argument, a court case, or a fight, or the action of making an agreement
meanings.example: Union leaders and company bosses will meet tomorrow in an attempt to reach a settlement.
meanings.example_cn: 工会领导人和公司老板将于明天举行会议以期达成协议。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of paper or another material that is attached to something and gives information about it
meanings.example: a luggage label
meanings.example_cn: 行李标签

meanings.meaning_en: the small drops of water that form on outdoor surfaces during the night
meanings.example: The dew gathered on the leaves.
meanings.example_cn: 露水在叶片上聚集。

meanings.meaning_en: a teacher of the highest rank in a university department
meanings.example: The professor improvised a poem in the class.
meanings.example_cn: 教授在课堂上即兴创作了一首诗。

meanings.meaning_en: not anything or no thing
meanings.example: Nothing ever happens in this town.
meanings.example_cn: 这镇上从来都不会发生什么特别的事。

meanings.meaning_en: to have no qualities or features that are similar to someone or something else
meanings.example: There’s nothing in this box.
meanings.example_cn: 这盒子里什么也没有。

meanings.meaning_en: the inside surface of your hand, in which you hold things
meanings.example: He held the pebble in the palm of his hand .
meanings.example_cn: 他把那颗卵石握在手心里。

meanings.meaning_en: the greatest or least amount, number, speed etc that is allowed
meanings.example: a 55 mph speed limit
meanings.example_cn: 55英里的时速限制

meanings.meaning_en: not developed to a high standard, or made with little skill
meanings.example: a crude wooden bridge
meanings.example_cn: 粗糙的木桥

meanings.meaning_en: something that is cold has a low temperature
meanings.example: She splashed her face with cold water.
meanings.example_cn: 她往脸上泼冷水。

meanings.meaning_en: a low temperature or cold weather
meanings.example: a blast of cold air
meanings.example_cn: 一股冷空气

meanings.meaning_en: honest and truthful
meanings.example: He was completely frank with her about what happened.
meanings.example_cn: 对于发生的一切，他都对她坦言相告。

meanings.meaning_en: to not remember facts, information, or people or things from the past
meanings.example: I’m sorry, I’ve forgotten your name.
meanings.example_cn: 对不起，我忘记你的名字了。

meanings.meaning_en: a seed or a  pod, that comes from a climbing plant and is cooked as food. There are very many types of beans.
meanings.example: baked beans
meanings.example_cn: 烘豆

meanings.meaning_en: used to say how something seems, especially from what you know about it or from what you can see
meanings.example: Police have found what appear to be human remains.
meanings.example_cn: 警方发现了疑似人体遗骸的东西。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of money you have to pay for something
meanings.example: The price of fuel keeps going up.
meanings.example_cn: 燃料价格持续上涨。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong human feeling such as love, hate, or anger
meanings.example: Her voice was full of emotion.
meanings.example_cn: 她的声音充满了激情。

meanings.meaning_en: worse than anything or anyone else
meanings.example: This is the worst recession for fifty years.
meanings.example_cn: 这是50年来最严重的一次经济衰退。

meanings.meaning_en: most badly
meanings.example: My worst fear was that we would run out of food.
meanings.example_cn: 我最大的担忧是我们会把食物吃光。

meanings.meaning_en: a long low sound expressing pain, unhappiness, or sexual pleasure
meanings.example: She gave a little moan of pleasure.
meanings.example_cn: 她轻轻地发出一声快乐的呻吟。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a long low sound expressing pain, unhappiness, or sexual pleasure
meanings.example: a low moan
meanings.example_cn: 低沉的呻吟声

meanings.meaning_en: very bad
meanings.example: The hotel was absolutely terrible.
meanings.example_cn: 这家宾馆糟糕透了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 元〔美国、加拿大、澳大利亚等国的货币单位〕
meanings.meaning_en: the standard unit of money in the US, Canada, Australia, and some other countries, divided into 100  cent s  : symbol $
meanings.example: It cost three dollars.
meanings.example_cn: 它要三美元。

meanings.meaning_en: to say something to someone as a reply when they have asked you a question, made a suggestion etc
meanings.example: She thought for a moment before answering.
meanings.example_cn: 她想了一会儿才回答。

meanings.meaning_en: a large farm building for storing crops, or for keeping animals in
meanings.example: a hay barn
meanings.example_cn: 干草棚

meanings.meaning_en: something you decide after considering all the information you have
meanings.example: These are the report’s main conclusions.
meanings.example_cn: 这些就是这篇报告的主要结论。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask for something very firmly, especially because you think you have a right to do this
meanings.example: Angry demonstrators demanded the resignation of two senior officials.
meanings.example_cn: 愤怒的示威者要求两名高级官员辞职。

meanings.meaning_en: to gain knowledge of a subject or skill, by experience, by studying it, or by being taught
meanings.example: What’s the best way to learn a language?
meanings.example_cn: 学习语言的最佳方法是什么？

meanings.meaning_en: a person, group, or organization that you compete with in sport, business, a fight etc
meanings.example: This gives the company a competitive advantage over its rivals.
meanings.example_cn: 这使该公司与其对手相比具有一项竞争优势。

meanings.example: He finished 39 seconds ahead of his main rival .
meanings.example_cn: 他比主要对手早39秒到达终点。

meanings.meaning_en: businesses that produce a particular type of thing or provide a particular service
meanings.example: I work in the oil industry.
meanings.example_cn: 我在石油行业工作。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of worry about something important
meanings.example: The recent rise in crime is a matter of considerable public concern.
meanings.example_cn: 近来犯罪增多是民众极为关切的事。

meanings.meaning_en: behaving towards someone in a way that shows you like them and are ready to talk to them or help them
meanings.example: a friendly smile
meanings.example_cn: 亲切的微笑

meanings.meaning_en: having a skin colour that is very white, or whiter than it usually is
meanings.example: Why do your face look like so pale? What's wrong with you?
meanings.example_cn: 为什么你的脸色看起来是如此苍白？发生什么事了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: connected with acting or plays
meanings.example: the amateur dramatic society
meanings.example_cn: 业余剧团

meanings.meaning_en: a regular repeated pattern of sounds or movements
meanings.example: Drums are basic to African rhythm.
meanings.example_cn: 非洲音乐节奏少不了鼓。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the particular area you live in, or the area you are talking about
meanings.example: local hospital
meanings.example_cn: 当地医院

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or involving the nucleus of an atom, or the energy produced when the nucleus of an atom is either split or joined with the nucleus of another atom
meanings.example: France’s reliance on nuclear energy
meanings.example_cn: 法国对核能的依赖

meanings.meaning_en: a man who is always polite, has good manners, and treats other people well
meanings.example: Martin – always the perfect gentleman – got to his feet when my mother walked in.
meanings.example_cn: 马丁在我母亲进来时站了起来——他一向是十足的绅士派头。

meanings.meaning_en: used when emphasizing that something is no more and no less than a number or amount, or is completely correct in every detail
meanings.example: It’s exactly half past five.
meanings.example_cn: 一分不差，正好5点半。

meanings.meaning_en: a large piece of metal or leather that soldiers used in the past to protect themselves when fighting
meanings.example: He clanged his sword three times on his shield.
meanings.example_cn: 他用他的剑当当当地敲了3下盾。

meanings.meaning_en: to protect someone or something from being harmed or damaged
meanings.example: He used his left hand as a shield against the reflecting sunlight.
meanings.example_cn: 他用左手遮挡反射过来的阳光。

meanings.meaning_en: a large bird that hunts and eats small birds and animals
meanings.example: He waited, watching her like a hawk (= watching her very closely) .
meanings.example_cn: 他等待着，用鹰一样锐利的目光紧盯着她。

meanings.meaning_en: a system of lines, tubes, wires, roads etc that cross each other and are connected to each other
meanings.example: Hungary’s telephone network
meanings.example_cn: 匈牙利的电话网

meanings.meaning_en: an illness which affects a person, animal, or plant
meanings.example: His father died of heart disease.
meanings.example_cn: 他父亲死于心脏病。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to France, its people, or its language
meanings.example: an excellent French wine
meanings.example_cn: 上等的法国葡萄酒

meanings.meaning_en: people from France
to show that a particular situation exists, or that something is likely to be true
meanings.example: The study indicates a connection between poverty and crime.
meanings.example_cn: 研究显示贫穷和犯罪有关联。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the sense of hearing, or someone’s ability to understand sounds
meanings.example: an aural stimulus
meanings.example_cn: 听觉刺激

meanings.meaning_en: a container made of thin pieces of plastic, wire, or wood woven together, used to carry things or put things in
meanings.example: a shopping basket
meanings.example_cn: 购物篮

meanings.meaning_en: someone who changes spoken words from one language into another, especially as their job
meanings.example: Speaking through an interpreter (= using an interpreter ), Ahmed said, ‘I’m very worried about my wife and children.’
meanings.example_cn: 艾哈迈德通过口译者说:“我很担心我的妻子和孩子们。”

meanings.meaning_en: a very high hill
meanings.example: the highest mountain in Austria
meanings.example_cn: 奥地利最高的山

meanings.meaning_en: to get something that you want, especially through your own effort, skill, or work
meanings.example: Evans was trying to obtain a false passport and other documents.
meanings.example_cn: 埃文斯当时正试图获取假护照和其他文件。

meanings.meaning_en: things that people do, especially in order to achieve a particular aim
meanings.example: Everyone is free to engage in peaceful political activity.
meanings.example_cn: 每个人都可以自由参加和平的政治活动。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the two organs in your body that you breathe with
meanings.example: Smoking can cause lung cancer.
meanings.example_cn: 吸烟会引起肺癌。

meanings.meaning_en: in every part of a particular area, place etc
meanings.example: a large organization with offices throughout the world
meanings.example_cn: 在世界各地都设有办事处的一家大型机构

meanings.meaning_en: during all of a particular period, from the beginning to the end
meanings.example: The disease spread rapidly throughout Europe.
meanings.example_cn: 疾病迅速在整个欧洲蔓延开来。

meanings.meaning_en: able to be measured
meanings.example: measurable results
meanings.example_cn: 可衡量的结果

meanings.meaning_en: a small metal object for fastening a bag, belt, piece of jewellery etc
meanings.example: ...the clasp of her handbag.
meanings.example_cn: …她的手包扣。

meanings.meaning_en: a thing, person, or group that is regarded as one single whole part of something larger
meanings.example: The family is the basic social unit of modern society.
meanings.example_cn: 家庭是现代社会的基本单位。

meanings.meaning_en: to move suddenly and quickly in a particular direction, especially by jumping
meanings.example: He sprang to his feet (= stood up suddenly ) and rushed after her.
meanings.example_cn: 他腾地站起身，冲过去追她。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where water comes up naturally from the ground
meanings.example: There are several hot springs in the area.
meanings.example_cn: 这地区有几处温泉。

meanings.meaning_en: the house, apartment, or place where you live
meanings.example: They have a beautiful home in California.
meanings.example_cn: 他们在加州有个美丽的家。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or belonging to your home or family
meanings.example: Good luck in your new home!
meanings.example_cn: 祝你在新家一切顺利！

meanings.meaning_en: the rules by which words change their forms and are combined into sentences, or the study or use of these rules
meanings.example: Check your spelling and grammar.
meanings.example_cn: 检查你的拼写和语法。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a country’s military force that is trained to fight on land in a war
meanings.example: The army are helping to clear up after the floods.
meanings.example_cn: 陆军部队正协助洪灾后的清理工作。

meanings.meaning_en: an instrument that shows what time it is, in a room or outside on a building
meanings.example: I heard the clock strike six (= make six loud sounds ) .
meanings.example_cn: 我听到钟敲了六下。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or happening in one particular country and not involving any other countries
meanings.example: the booming domestic economy
meanings.example_cn: 迅速增长的国内经济

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment used for climbing up to or down from high places. A ladder has two bars that are connected by rungs
meanings.example: She climbed up the ladder.
meanings.example_cn: 她爬上梯子。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of being not sure whether something is true or right
meanings.example: There was still one little nagging doubt at the back of his mind.
meanings.example_cn: 他的心头仍有一丝挥之不去的疑虑。

meanings.meaning_en: to think that something may not be true or that it is unlikely
meanings.example: Kim never doubted his story.
meanings.example_cn: 例句：金对于他讲的事情从不怀疑。

meanings.meaning_en: a tool you use for picking up and eating food, with a handle and three or four points
meanings.example: Put the knives and forks on the table.
meanings.example_cn: 把刀叉摆放在桌子上。

meanings.meaning_en: a series of lessons in a particular subject
meanings.example: Andy’s doing a one-year journalism course.
meanings.example_cn: 安迪正在修读为期一年的新闻课程。

meanings.meaning_en: having a very strong effect or felt very strongly
meanings.example: Young people today are under intense pressure to succeed.
meanings.example_cn: 如今的年轻人面临要出人头地的巨大压力。

meanings.meaning_en: an opinion you give someone about what they should do
meanings.example: You should have followed my advice.
meanings.example_cn: 你真该听我的建议。

meanings.meaning_en: almost
meanings.example: Virtually all the children come to school by bus.
meanings.example_cn: 几乎所有的孩子都乘公交车上学。

meanings.meaning_en: to wish that you had someone else’s possessions, abilities etc
meanings.example: I really envy you and Ian, you seem so happy together.
meanings.example_cn: 我真是羡慕你和伊恩，你俩在一起看起来多幸福。

meanings.meaning_en: the feeling of wanting something that someone else has
meanings.example: She has a lifestyle which most people would envy.
meanings.example_cn: 她的生活方式会令大多数人感到羡慕。

meanings.meaning_cn: 鸭；中文释义: 雌鸭；鸭肉
meanings.meaning_en: a very common water bird with short legs and a wide beak, used for its meat, eggs, and soft feathers
meanings.example: Chickens and ducks scratch around the outbuildings.
meanings.example_cn: 鸡鸭在外屋四周挖扒。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you say when you express an opinion or say what you have noticed
meanings.example: to make a remark
meanings.example_cn: 发表评论

meanings.meaning_en: to say or write a comment about sth/sb
meanings.example: Critics remarked that the play was not original.
meanings.example_cn: 评论家们指出这部戏剧缺乏创意

meanings.meaning_en: growing, living, produced etc in one particular place
meanings.example: Singapore has many native species of palm.
meanings.example_cn: 新加坡有很多土生的棕榈树种。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who lives in a place all the time or has lived there a long time
meanings.example: You can always tell the difference between the tourists and the natives.
meanings.example_cn: 游客与当地人之间的区别一望即知。

meanings.meaning_en: something you buy, or the act of buying it
meanings.example: She paid for her purchases and left.
meanings.example_cn: 她付钱买好东西离开了。

meanings.meaning_en: to buy something
meanings.example: I enclose my receipt as proof of purchase .
meanings.example_cn: 我附上小票作为购物凭证。

meanings.meaning_en: to burst, or to make something burst, into small pieces, usually with a loud noise and in a way that causes damage
meanings.example: The device was thrown at an army patrol but failed to explode.
meanings.example_cn: 炸弹投向了陆军巡逻队，但没有爆炸。

meanings.meaning_en: a very sad event, that shocks people because it involves death
meanings.example: The tragedy happened as they were returning home from a night out.
meanings.example_cn: 悲剧发生在他们夜里外出归来的路上。

meanings.meaning_en: a tool for cutting paper, cloth etc, made of two sharp blades fastened together in the middle, with holes for your finger and thumb
meanings.example: a pair of scissors
meanings.example_cn: 一把剪刀

meanings.meaning_en: the smallest part of an  element  that can exist alone or can combine with other substances to form a  molecule
meanings.example: carbon atoms
meanings.example_cn: 碳原子

meanings.meaning_en: to take air, liquid etc into your mouth by making your lips form a small hole and using the muscles of your mouth to pull it in
meanings.example: a baby sucking at its mother’s breast
meanings.example_cn: 一个在吸吮母乳的婴儿
