meanings.meaning_en: a piece of cloth with a coloured pattern or picture on it that represents a country or organization
meanings.example: Children waving flags greeted the Russian leader.
meanings.example_cn: 孩子们挥舞着旗帜，欢迎俄罗斯领导人。

meanings.meaning_en: a human being, especially considered as someone with their own particular character
meanings.example: He was a very nice person, always pleasant and friendly.
meanings.example_cn: 他是个很好的人，始终彬彬有礼。

meanings.meaning_en: a short piece of writing about a particular subject by a student as part of a course of study
meanings.example: an essay on Bernard Shaw
meanings.example_cn: 关于萧伯纳的文章

meanings.meaning_en: a large area of rock or a mountain with a very steep side, often at the edge of the sea or a river
meanings.example: The car rolled over the edge of a cliff.
meanings.example_cn: 汽车翻下了悬崖边。

meanings.meaning_en: a method of drawing a picture that makes objects look solid and shows distance and depth, or the effect this method produces in a picture
meanings.example: the artist’s use of perspective
meanings.example_cn: 那位画家对透视法的运用

meanings.meaning_en: a question you ask in order to get information
meanings.example: I don’t know who sent the gift, but I’ll make some inquiries.
meanings.example_cn: 我不知道礼物是谁送的，但我会打听一下。

meanings.meaning_en: the mass of things like fine threads that grows on your head
meanings.example: Her hair was short and dark.
meanings.example_cn: 她的头发又短又黑。

meanings.meaning_en: able to learn and understand things quickly
meanings.example: a clever man
meanings.example_cn: 聪明的人

meanings.meaning_en: to rub your skin with your nails because it feels uncomfortable
meanings.example: John yawned and scratched his leg.
meanings.example_cn: 约翰打了个呵欠，挠了挠腿。

meanings.meaning_en: when you rub part of your body with your nails because it feels uncomfortable
meanings.example: Try not to scratch.
meanings.example_cn: 尽量别挠。

meanings.meaning_en: to demand that something should happen
meanings.example: Stay for supper – I insist!
meanings.example_cn: 留下来吃晚餐——一定的！

meanings.meaning_en: a structure through which smoke or steam is carried up away from a fire, etc. and through the roof of a building; the part of this that is above the roof
meanings.example: We can’t light a fire because the chimney hasn’t been swept.
meanings.example_cn: 烟囱管没有清扫过，我们生不了火。

meanings.meaning_en: a child whose parents are both dead
meanings.example: The war has left thousands of children as orphans.
meanings.example_cn: 这场战争使成千上万的孩子成为孤儿。

meanings.meaning_en: a vehicle that flies in the air and has wings and at least one engine
meanings.example: It is a big airline with a large fleet of planes.
meanings.example_cn: 这是一家大航空公司，拥有庞大的机群。

meanings.meaning_en: to succeed in doing something, especially after trying very hard
meanings.example: We have accomplished all we set out to do.
meanings.example_cn: 所有计划要做的事情，我们都已完成。

meanings.meaning_en: the female ruler of a country
meanings.example: Queen Elizabeth
meanings.example_cn: 伊丽莎白女王

meanings.meaning_en: used when you are talking about what actually happened or is true, rather than what people might wrongly think
meanings.example: Why don’t you tell us what really happened?
meanings.example_cn: 你为什么不把真相告诉我们？

meanings.meaning_en: a curved piece of metal or plastic that you use for hanging things on
meanings.example: Tom hung his coat on the hook behind the door.
meanings.example_cn: 汤姆把外套挂在门后的衣钩上。

meanings.meaning_en: to bend your finger, arm, or leg, especially so that you can pull or hold something else
meanings.example: Ruth hooked her arm through Tony’s.
meanings.example_cn: 露丝挽住了托尼的手臂。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of realizing and accepting that something is true or important
meanings.example: There is a general recognition of the urgent need for reform.
meanings.example_cn: 人们普遍认识到迫切需要改革。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the flat green parts of a plant that are joined to its stem or branches
meanings.example: a flowering bush with large shiny leaves
meanings.example_cn: 叶子大而油亮的开花灌木

meanings.meaning_en: happening before something that is more important, often in order to prepare for it
meanings.example: the preliminary stages of the competition
meanings.example_cn: 竞赛的预赛阶段

meanings.meaning_en: an event at which people meet to discuss and decide things
meanings.example: We’re having a meeting next week to discuss the matter.
meanings.example_cn: 我们下周将开会讨论此事。

meanings.meaning_en: the thing or things that someone owns
meanings.example: The hotel is not responsible for any loss or damage to guests’ personal property .
meanings.example_cn: 宾馆对住客个人财物的丢失和损坏概不负责。

meanings.meaning_en: having no mistakes
meanings.example: If my calculations are correct, we’re about ten miles from Exeter.
meanings.example_cn: 如果我计算得没错的话，我们离埃克塞特大约十英里。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something right or to make it work the way it should
meanings.example: Score one point for each correct answer .
meanings.example_cn: 答对一题得一分。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the 12 named periods of time that a year is divided into
meanings.example: I hope I’ll have finished the work by the end of the month.
meanings.example_cn: 我希望我这个月底能完成工作。

meanings.meaning_en: the place that someone or something is going to
meanings.example: Ellis Island has become one of America's most popular tourist destinations.
meanings.example_cn: 埃利斯岛已经成为美国最受欢迎的游览地之一。

meanings.meaning_en: a small bag in which women keep paper money, coins, cards etc
meanings.example: Julie opened her handbag and took out her purse.
meanings.example_cn: 朱莉打开手袋，拿出钱包。

meanings.meaning_en: a part of something that you notice because it seems important, interesting, or typical
meanings.example: Air bags are a standard feature in most new cars.
meanings.example_cn: 气囊是大多数新车的标准配置。

meanings.meaning_en: a way from one place to another
meanings.example: the most direct route home
meanings.example_cn: 最直接的回家路线

meanings.meaning_en: a mistake
meanings.example: There must be an error in our calculations.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的计算肯定有错。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong belief in the honesty, goodness etc of someone or something
meanings.example: At first there was a lack of trust between them.
meanings.example_cn: 起初，他们之间缺乏信任。

meanings.meaning_en: to believe that someone is honest or will not do anything bad or wrong
meanings.example: an agreement made on the basis of mutual trust
meanings.example_cn: 在相互信任的基础上达成的一项协议

meanings.meaning_en: the place or situation in which something begins to exist
meanings.example: The tradition has its origins in the Middle Ages.
meanings.example_cn: 这一传统源于中世纪。

meanings.meaning_en: lasting for or taking only a short time
meanings.example: That was quick! I thought you’d be another hour.
meanings.example_cn: 很快啊！我以为你还要一个小时呢。

meanings.meaning_en: the feeling that you need to eat
meanings.example: Try to satisfy your hunger by eating some fruit.
meanings.example_cn: 吃些水果充充饥吧。

meanings.meaning_en: frightened that something bad might happen
meanings.example: a shy and fearful child
meanings.example_cn: 一个羞涩、胆怯的小孩

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling you have that someone is probably guilty of doing something wrong or dishonest
meanings.example: I wondered how I could leave early without arousing anyone’s suspicions.
meanings.example_cn: 我不知道怎么才能早点离开而又不引起别人的怀疑。

meanings.meaning_en: the information, skills, and understanding that you have gained through learning or experience
meanings.example: He did not have much knowledge of American history.
meanings.example_cn: 他对美国历史所知不多。

meanings.meaning_en: a flat container with low sides, for serving food from or cooking food in
meanings.example: a serving dish
meanings.example_cn: 上菜用的盘子

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone laugh or smile
meanings.example: He made funny faces to amuse the children.
meanings.example_cn: 他做鬼脸逗孩子们开心。

meanings.meaning_en: a printed piece of paper that you write an amount of money on, sign, and use instead of money to pay for things
meanings.example: You could write her a cheque .
meanings.example_cn: 你可以给她开张支票。

meanings.meaning_en: a large group of musicians playing many different kinds of instruments and led by a conductor
meanings.example: the Berlin Symphony Orchestra
meanings.example_cn: 柏林交响乐团

meanings.meaning_en: your favourite person or thing is the one that you like the most
meanings.example: a child’s favourite toy
meanings.example_cn: 孩子最喜欢的玩具

meanings.meaning_en: the middle of a space, area, or object, especially the exact middle
meanings.example: lines radiating out from the centre
meanings.example_cn: 从中心向外辐射的线条

meanings.meaning_en: to move something to a position at the centre of something else
meanings.example: chocolates with soft centres
meanings.example_cn: 软夹心巧克力

meanings.meaning_en: to move towards you or arrive at the place where you are
meanings.example: Let me know when they come.
meanings.example_cn: 他们来了就告诉我。

meanings.meaning_en: a large animal of the cat family that lives in Africa and parts of southern Asia. Lions have gold-coloured fur and the male has a mane (long hair around its neck ).
meanings.example: The wounded lion bellowed out.
meanings.example_cn: 受伤的狮子发出了怒吼。

meanings.meaning_en: a small soft fruit with small seeds
meanings.example: Birds feed on nuts and berries in the winter.
meanings.example_cn: 鸟类靠坚果和浆果过冬。

meanings.meaning_en: the form that a book, newspaper, magazine etc is produced in
meanings.example: a paperback edition
meanings.example_cn: 平装本

meanings.meaning_en: an angry feeling of extreme dislike for someone or something
meanings.example: A look of pure hatred flashed across her face.
meanings.example_cn: 她脸上闪过十足的仇恨表情。

meanings.meaning_en: the situation or experience of being poor
meanings.example: Millions of elderly people live in poverty.
meanings.example_cn: 数百万老年人生活在贫困之中。

meanings.meaning_en: one member of a group of people or things that have similar features or qualities
meanings.example: I’ve already seen a few movies of this type.
meanings.example_cn: 我已经看过几部这种类型的影片了。

meanings.meaning_en: to write something using a computer or a typewriter
meanings.example: He types with two fingers.
meanings.example_cn: 他用两个手指打字。

meanings.meaning_en: a series of actions that are done in order to achieve a particular result
meanings.example: the process of economic change
meanings.example_cn: 经济改革的进程

meanings.meaning_en: to make food, materials, or goods ready to be used or sold, for example by preserving or improving them in some way
meanings.example: Repetition can help the learning process.
meanings.example_cn: 重复对学习过程会有帮助。

meanings.meaning_en: the feeling of happiness, enjoyment, or satisfaction that you get from an experience
meanings.example: She sipped her drink with obvious pleasure.
meanings.example_cn: 她小口抿着喝饮料，显然很高兴

meanings.meaning_en: a long piece of cloth on which something is written, often carried between two poles
meanings.example: The onlookers were shouting, cheering, and waving banners.
meanings.example_cn: 观众挥动着横幅，又是叫喊又是欢呼。

meanings.meaning_en: a scientific test done to find out how something reacts under certain conditions, or to find out if a particular idea is true
meanings.example: experiments with alcohol-fuelled cars
meanings.example_cn: 研究以酒精作燃料的汽车实验

meanings.meaning_en: a sweet juicy fruit that has a round base and is thinner near the top, or the tree that produces this fruit
meanings.example: a pear tree
meanings.example_cn: 梨树

meanings.meaning_en: the system of political thinking invented by Karl Marx, which explains changes in history as the result of a struggle between social classes
meanings.example: Marxist theory/doctrine/ideology
meanings.example_cn: 马克思主义理论 / 信条 / 意识形态

meanings.meaning_en: to let liquid fall in drops
meanings.example: The tap’s dripping .
meanings.example_cn: 水龙头在滴水。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the drops of liquid that fall from something
meanings.example: Her boots were muddy and her hair was dripping.
meanings.example_cn: 她的靴子沾满了泥，头发在滴水。

meanings.meaning_en: when you say words for someone to write down
meanings.example: There were no secretaries available to take dictation (= write down what someone is saying ).
meanings.example_cn: 身边没有秘书记录口授内容。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is advisable should be done in order to avoid problems or risks
meanings.example: Regular medical check-ups are advisable.
meanings.example_cn: 定期检查身体是明智的。

meanings.meaning_en: the regular rising and falling of the level of the sea
meanings.example: Is the tide going out or coming in ?
meanings.example_cn: 现在是退潮还是涨潮？

meanings.meaning_en: your thoughts or your ability to think, feel, and imagine things
meanings.example: It is impossible to understand the complex nature of the human mind.
meanings.example_cn: 要想了解人类思维复杂的特性是不可能的。

meanings.meaning_en: if the wind or a current of air blows, it moves
meanings.example: A cold breeze was blowing hard.
meanings.example_cn: 寒风劲吹。

meanings.meaning_en: a small copy of a building, vehicle, machine etc, especially one that can be put together from separate parts
meanings.example: a working model (= one with parts which move ) of a steam engine
meanings.example_cn: 蒸汽机车的活动模型

meanings.meaning_en: an instrument that shows directions and has a needle that always points north
meanings.example: a map and compass
meanings.example_cn: 地图和指南针

meanings.meaning_en: a very small living thing that can make you ill
meanings.example: Put disinfectant down the toilet to kill any germs.
meanings.example_cn: 在抽水马桶里投放消毒剂杀菌。

meanings.meaning_en: used to say that sth is likely to happen or to be true
meanings.example: It'll probably be OK.
meanings.example_cn: 这大概没有问题。

meanings.meaning_en: a room or building containing books that can be looked at or borrowed
meanings.example: a public library
meanings.example_cn: 公共图书馆

meanings.meaning_en: to move towards someone or something, especially in a slow and determined way – used especially to talk about soldiers
meanings.example: A line of US tanks slowly advanced.
meanings.example_cn: 一列美军坦克缓缓前进。

meanings.meaning_en: a change, discovery, or invention that brings progress
meanings.example: This research has done much to advance our understanding of language learning.
meanings.example_cn: 这项研究大大提高了我们对语言学习的认识。

meanings.meaning_en: of or belonging to the speaker or writer
meanings.example: All my friends do not smoke.
meanings.example_cn: 我的朋友并不全都吸烟。

meanings.meaning_en: loved very much by someone
meanings.example: He never recovered from the death of his beloved daughter.
meanings.example_cn: 他一直没有走出失去爱女的阴影。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is loved very much
meanings.example: He’s always talking about his beloved computer!
meanings.example_cn: 他老是在谈论他的宝贝电脑！

meanings.meaning_en: the son of your brother or sister, or the son of your husband’s or wife’s brother or sister
meanings.example: I am planning a 25th birthday party for my nephew.
meanings.example_cn: 我正在为侄子筹划他25岁的生日聚会。

meanings.meaning_en: a silver-white metal that is very light and is used to make cans, cooking pans, window frames etc. It is a chemical  element  : symbol Al
meanings.example: recycled aluminium cans
meanings.example_cn: 再生铝罐

meanings.meaning_en: not very often
meanings.example: She is rarely seen in public nowadays.
meanings.example_cn: 如今她很少公开露面。

meanings.meaning_en: happening or coming after something else
meanings.example: These skills were passed on to subsequent generations.
meanings.example_cn: 这些技能代代相传。

meanings.meaning_en: charity organizations in general
meanings.example: All the money raised by the concert will go to charity.
meanings.example_cn: 音乐会筹得的钱款将全部用于慈善事业。

meanings.meaning_en: used to show that a thing, organization, animal, or baby that does something is affected by its own action
meanings.example: The cat lay on the sofa, washing itself.
meanings.example_cn: 猫躺在沙发上把自己舔干。

meanings.meaning_en: an object or piece of information that helps someone solve a crime or mystery
meanings.example: Police have found a vital clue .
meanings.example_cn: 警方发现了至关重要的线索。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to Jews or Judaism
meanings.example: the Jewish religion
meanings.example_cn: 犹太教

meanings.meaning_en: happening or existing now
meanings.example: the current President
meanings.example_cn: 现任总统

meanings.meaning_en: an occasion when you travel from one place to another, especially over a long distance
meanings.example: the friends they made on the journey
meanings.example_cn: 他们在旅途中交下的朋友

meanings.meaning_en: to hold up the weight of something
meanings.example: He leant against her so heavily that she could barely sustain his weight.
meanings.example_cn: 他重重地靠在她身上，让她几乎撑不住了。

meanings.meaning_en: very big in size or in amount
meanings.example: an enormous bunch of flowers
meanings.example_cn: 巨大的花束

meanings.meaning_en: to use your teeth to cut, crush, or chew something
meanings.example: The dog bit him and made his hand bleed.
meanings.example_cn: 那只狗把他的手咬出血了。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you give someone, for example to thank them or because you like them, especially on a special occasion
meanings.example: The earrings were a gift from my aunt.
meanings.example_cn: 这副耳环是我姑姑送给我的礼物。

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of metal that you fire from a gun
meanings.example: He was killed by a single bullet.
meanings.example_cn: 他被一枪打死。

meanings.meaning_en: all the things that happened in the past, especially the political, social, or economic development of a nation
meanings.example: Throughout history the achievements of women have been largely ignored.
meanings.example_cn: 从古至今，妇女的成就都被大大地忽视了。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of names, numbers etc, usually written one below the other, for example so that you can remember or check them
meanings.example: Make a list of all the things you have to do.
meanings.example_cn: 把你必须做的所有事情列一个清单。

meanings.meaning_en: to write a list, or mention things one after the other
meanings.example: The first person on my list is Mrs Gilling.
meanings.example_cn: 我的名单上排在第一位的是吉林夫人。

meanings.meaning_en: to do things that are good, bad, sensible etc
meanings.example: She behaved in a very responsible way .
meanings.example_cn: 她表现得很有责任心。

meanings.meaning_en: recently made, built, invented, written, designed etc
meanings.example: the city’s new hospital
meanings.example_cn: 市里新建的医院

meanings.meaning_en: a vehicle used especially for carrying goods, which is smaller than a truck and has a roof and usually no windows at the sides
meanings.example: a delivery van
meanings.example_cn: 运货车

meanings.meaning_en: a quantity of something such as time, money, or a substance
meanings.example: Please pay the full amount (=  of money  ) by the end of the month.
meanings.example_cn: 请在月底前全额付清。

meanings.meaning_en: to find out how much something will cost, how long something will take etc, by using numbers
meanings.example: These instruments calculate distances precisely.
meanings.example_cn: 这些仪器计算距离非常精确。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is generous is willing to give money, spend time etc, in order to help people or give them pleasure
meanings.example: a generous glass of wine
meanings.example_cn: 一大杯葡萄酒

meanings.meaning_en: always following the behaviour and attitudes that most people in a society consider to be normal, right, and socially acceptable, so that you seem slightly boring
meanings.example: a strong believer in conventional morals
meanings.example_cn: 坚守传统道德观念的人

meanings.meaning_en: before the usual, arranged, or expected time
meanings.example: We arrived early.
meanings.example_cn: 我们提早到了。

meanings.meaning_en: in the first part of a period of time, event, or process
meanings.example: They must have come home early.
meanings.example_cn: 他们肯定提早回到家了。

meanings.meaning_en: a word or sign that represents an amount or a quantity
meanings.example: They wrote various numbers on a large sheet of paper.
meanings.example_cn: 他们在一张大纸上写下了很多不同的数字。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you say or do to suggest something to someone, without telling them directly
meanings.example: There have been hints that he may take up coaching.
meanings.example_cn: 他暗示过可能会出任教练。

meanings.meaning_en: popular, especially for a short period of time
meanings.example: Strong colours are very fashionable at the moment.
meanings.example_cn: 眼下流行艳丽的色彩。

meanings.meaning_en: to allow people to do, say, or believe something without criticizing or punishing them
meanings.example: We simply will not tolerate vigilante groups on our streets.
meanings.example_cn: 我们决不容许有自行惩办犯罪的组织出现在我们的街头。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something that is spoken or written shorter, by not giving as much detail or using fewer words to give the same information
meanings.example: This whole chapter could be condensed into a few paragraphs.
meanings.example_cn: 这一整章可以压缩成几个段落。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to check equipment or machines and make sure that they are working properly
meanings.example: a laboratory technician
meanings.example_cn: 实验室技术人员

meanings.meaning_en: a bright light that shines for a short time and then stops shining
meanings.example: Two flashes mean danger.
meanings.example_cn: 两次闪光表示危险。

meanings.meaning_en: to shine suddenly and brightly for a short time, or to make something shine in this way
meanings.example: Lightning flashed overhead.
meanings.example_cn: 头顶上电光闪闪。

meanings.meaning_en: a powder that is made by crushing wheat or other grain and is used for making bread, cakes etc
meanings.example: white/wholemeal/rice/wheat etc flour
meanings.example_cn: 精白面粉/全麦面粉/米粉/小麦粉等

meanings.meaning_en: to trap an animal or fish by using a trap, net, or hook, or by hunting it
meanings.example: Did you catch any fish?
meanings.example_cn: 你捕到鱼了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a dark colour that is a mixture of red and blue
meanings.example: She was dressed in purple.
meanings.example_cn: 她穿一身紫色衣裳。

meanings.meaning_en: having a dark colour that is a mixture of red and blue
meanings.example: She had a purple dress on with a silver-white necklace.
meanings.example_cn: 她穿着一条紫色的连衣裙配着一条银白色的项链。

meanings.meaning_en: to give food to a person or animal
meanings.example: Have you fed the cat?
meanings.example_cn: 你喂猫了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a group of sports teams or players who play games against each other to see who is best
meanings.example: He makes his football league debut tomorrow.
meanings.example_cn: 明天他将在足球联赛中首次出战。

meanings.meaning_en: to use your power, influence etc in order to make something happen
meanings.example: They exerted considerable influence within the school.
meanings.example_cn: 他们在校内施加了很大的影响力。

meanings.meaning_en: the information that someone has discovered as a result of their study, work etc
meanings.example: Surveys conducted in other countries reported similar findings.
meanings.example_cn: 在其他国家进行的调查也报告说有类似的结果。

meanings.meaning_en: from or relating to a country that is not your own
meanings.example: foreign students
meanings.example_cn: 外国学生

meanings.meaning_en: to cut off hair very close to the skin, especially from the face, using a  razor
meanings.example: He hadn’t shaved for days.
meanings.example_cn: 他已经好几天没刮脸了。

meanings.meaning_en: to think that something is true, although you do not have definite proof
meanings.example: I think we can safely assume (=  it is almost certain  ) that interest rates will go up again soon.
meanings.example_cn: 我想我们几乎可以肯定，利率很快会再次上调。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is done as a reaction to something that has happened or been said
meanings.example: His immediate response was one of disbelief.
meanings.example_cn: 他的第一反应是不相信。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a substance purer using an industrial process
meanings.example: oil refining
meanings.example_cn: 石油的提炼

meanings.meaning_en: the next afternoon, month etc
meanings.example: He was sick in the evening, but the following day he was better.
meanings.example_cn: 那天晚上他生病了，但第二天就好一些了。

meanings.meaning_en: when children play, they do things that they enjoy, often with other people or with toys
meanings.example: Kids were playing and chasing each other.
meanings.example_cn: 孩子们在互相追逐嬉闹。

meanings.meaning_en: a  steamship
meanings.example: The steamer touched at 3 ports.
meanings.example_cn: 这艘轮船曾停靠3个港口。

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of something solid, without a particular shape
meanings.example: Strain the custard to remove lumps.
meanings.example_cn: 滤去牛奶蛋糊里的面块。

meanings.meaning_en: the son of a king, queen, or prince
meanings.example: Prince William
meanings.example_cn: 威廉王子

meanings.meaning_en: the process by which something develops into a particular thing or shape
meanings.example: We now know a lot more about the early stages of planetary formation.
meanings.example_cn: 我们现在对行星形成过程的早期阶段有了更多的了解。

meanings.meaning_en: felt or experienced in your own mind but not expressed to other people
meanings.example: I sighed with inward relief.
meanings.example_cn: 我内心释然地长出了一口气。

meanings.meaning_en: towards the inside or centre
meanings.example: He pushed open the front door, which swung inward with a groan.
meanings.example_cn: 他推开前门，门呀的一声向里开了。

meanings.meaning_en: more than enough in quantity
meanings.example: a plentiful supply of food
meanings.example_cn: 食物的大量供应

meanings.meaning_en: mutual feelings such as respect, trust, or hatred are feelings that two or more people have for each other
meanings.example: I didn’t like Dev, and the feeling seemed to be mutual.
meanings.example_cn: 我不喜欢德夫，他好像也不喜欢我。

meanings.meaning_en: an arrangement with a company in which you pay them money, especially regularly, and they pay the costs if something bad happens, for example if you become ill or your car is damaged
meanings.example: Your father took out insurance to cover the mortgage.
meanings.example_cn: 你父亲购买了抵押借款保险。

meanings.meaning_en: funny and enjoyable
meanings.example: humorous stories
meanings.example_cn: 诙谐的故事

meanings.meaning_en: if a solid dissolves, or if you dissolve it, it mixes with a liquid and becomes part of it
meanings.example: Stir until the sugar dissolves.
meanings.example_cn: 一直搅拌到糖溶解掉。

meanings.meaning_en: existing or arranged before something else or before the present situation
meanings.example: You do not need any prior knowledge of the subject.
meanings.example_cn: 你无需事先具备该方面的知识。

meanings.meaning_en: a greater distance than before or than something else; a  comparative  form of ‘far’
meanings.example: We decided not to go any farther.
meanings.example_cn: 我们决定不再往前走了。

meanings.meaning_en: more distant; a  comparative  form of ‘far’
meanings.example: Most of them were locals, but some had come from farther afield (= a greater distance away ) .
meanings.example_cn: 他们大部分是当地人，但也有一些来自较远的地方。

meanings.meaning_en: a passenger ship or airplane run by a shipping line or airline
meanings.example: Then he would take an air liner to another city for travel.
meanings.example_cn: 然后他会乘一架班机去另一个城市旅游。

meanings.meaning_en: a light cloud low over the ground that makes it difficult for you to see very far
meanings.example: We could just see the outline of the house through the mist.
meanings.example_cn: 薄雾中我们只能看到房子的轮廓。

meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately use something for the wrong purpose or for your own advantage
meanings.example: Williams abused his position as Mayor to give jobs to his friends.
meanings.example_cn: 威廉斯滥用市长权力，给不少朋友安排了工作。

meanings.meaning_en: the use of something in a way that it should not be used
meanings.example: She was sexually abused as a child.
meanings.example_cn: 她小时候遭到过性虐待。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely
meanings.example: Thank you. You’ve been exceedingly kind.
meanings.example_cn: 谢谢，你真是太好了。

meanings.meaning_en: one ring of wire, rope etc in a continuous series
meanings.example: Shake the rope and let the coils unwind.
meanings.example_cn: 抖动绳索把绳圈展开。

meanings.meaning_en: to wind or twist into a series of rings, or to make something do this
meanings.example: a coil of wire
meanings.example_cn: 一圈金属线

meanings.meaning_en: the solid layer of  cement  , bricks, stones etc that is put under a building to support it
meanings.example: It took the builders three weeks to lay the foundations.
meanings.example_cn: 建筑工人花了三星期的时间打地基。

meanings.meaning_en: your ability to think quickly and clearly and to make good decisions
meanings.example: He needed all his wits to find his way out.
meanings.example_cn: 他需要绞尽脑汁找到出路。

meanings.meaning_en: to turn around and around very quickly, or to make something do this
meanings.example: The plane’s propellers were spinning.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机的螺旋桨在快速旋转。

meanings.meaning_en: an act of turning around quickly
meanings.example: She sat by the window spinning.
meanings.example_cn: 她坐在窗前纺线。

meanings.meaning_en: a sound, especially one that is loud, unpleasant, or frightening
meanings.example: What’s that noise?
meanings.example_cn: 那是什么声音？

meanings.meaning_en: to expect that something will happen and be ready for it
meanings.example: Sales are better than anticipated.
meanings.example_cn: 销量比预期要好。

meanings.meaning_en: a work of art, a piece of writing or music etc that is of very high quality or that is the best that a particular artist, writer etc has produced
meanings.example: Mary Shelley was just 18 when she wrote the horror masterpiece ‘Frankenstein’.
meanings.example_cn: 玛丽•雪莱创作《科学怪人》这部恐怖小说名作的时候年仅18岁。

meanings.meaning_en: a picture in a book, article etc, especially one that helps you to understand it
meanings.example: The book contains 62 pages of illustrations.
meanings.example_cn: 这本书有62页插图。

meanings.meaning_en: having happened or started only a short time ago
meanings.example: Irving’s most recent book
meanings.example_cn: 欧文最新的书

meanings.meaning_en: a place or business where clothes etc are washed and ironed
meanings.example: We had to have the washing done at the laundry.
meanings.example_cn: 我们不得不把衣服放在洗衣店里洗。

meanings.meaning_en: to calculate a result, answer, sum etc
meanings.example: Final results had not yet been computed.
meanings.example_cn: 最终的结果还未计算出来。

meanings.meaning_en: if you have difficulty doing something, it is difficult for you to do
meanings.example: They had great difficulty in finding a replacement.
meanings.example_cn: 他们找接替的人费了很大劲

meanings.meaning_en: typical of a particular group or thing
meanings.example: The latest incident is representative of a wider trend.
meanings.example_cn: 最近发生的事件代表了一个更大的趋势。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has been chosen to speak, vote, or make decisions for someone else
meanings.example: an elected representative of the people
meanings.example_cn: 民选代表

meanings.meaning_en: the power that is carried by wires, cables etc, and is used to provide light or heat, to make machines work etc
meanings.example: The farm was very isolated, but it had electricity.
meanings.example_cn: 那个农场非常偏远，但有电力供应。

meanings.meaning_en: done, used, or experienced before now
meanings.example: Judging by her past performance, Jane should do very well.
meanings.example_cn: 从以往的表现来看，简应该会干得很好。

meanings.meaning_en: the time that existed before the present
meanings.example: From past experience she knew that it was no use arguing with him.
meanings.example_cn: 根据过去的经验，她知道和他争论是没有用的。

meanings.meaning_en: a metal that consists of two or more metals mixed together
meanings.example: Brass is an alloy of copper and zinc.
meanings.example_cn: 黄铜是铜和锌的合金。

meanings.meaning_en: a building where people go to  worship  , in the Jewish, Hindu, Buddhist, Sikh, and Mormon religions
meanings.example: We go to temple on Saturdays.
meanings.example_cn: 我们每个星期六去寺庙。

meanings.meaning_en: a large meal where a lot of people celebrate a special occasion
meanings.example: a wedding feast
meanings.example_cn: 婚筵

meanings.meaning_en: a written or spoken request to someone, inviting them to go somewhere or do something
meanings.example: an invitation to speak at a scientific conference
meanings.example_cn: 在科学大会上发言的邀请

meanings.meaning_en: several people or things that are all together in the same place
meanings.example: He was surrounded by a group of admirers.
meanings.example_cn: 他的身边围了一群仰慕者。

meanings.meaning_en: to come together and form a group, or to arrange things or people together in a group
meanings.example: The photo shows four men grouped round a jeep.
meanings.example_cn: 照片上是四个男人围着一辆吉普车。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to seeing
meanings.example: Artists translate their ideas into visual images.
meanings.example_cn: 画家把自己的思想转换成视觉画面。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the Earth’s atmosphere
meanings.example: atmospheric pressure
meanings.example_cn: 大气压力

meanings.meaning_en: happening once a year
meanings.example: The school trip has become an annual event.
meanings.example_cn: 学校组织的旅行成了一年一度的活动。

meanings.meaning_en: a book, especially for children, that is produced once a year with the same title but different stories, pictures etc
meanings.example: He tried the various almanacs, annuals and gazettes which were held in the library.
meanings.example_cn: 他试着在图书馆里找过各种历书、年鉴和报纸。

meanings.meaning_en: someone that you do not know
meanings.example: Children must not talk to strangers.
meanings.example_cn: 小孩子千万不要同陌生人说话。

meanings.meaning_en: happening or existing now
meanings.example: the present situation of the millions of people who are suffering poverty and disease
meanings.example_cn: 遭受贫困和疾病折磨的数百万人民的现状

meanings.meaning_en: the time that is happening now
meanings.example: Stop worrying about the past and live in the present.
meanings.example_cn: 别再为过去烦恼，好好地过眼前的日子。

meanings.meaning_en: a small green animal that lives near water and has long legs for jumping
meanings.example: The tadpole has become a frog.
meanings.example_cn: 这个蝌蚪已长成青蛙。

meanings.meaning_en: a series of sounds made by instruments or voices in a way that is pleasant or exciting
meanings.example: I often listen to classic music when I’m in the car.
meanings.example_cn: 我在车上经常听古典音乐。

meanings.meaning_en: if you say or explain something simply, you say it in a way that is easy for people to understand
meanings.example: Try to express yourself more simply.
meanings.example_cn: 尽量把你的意思表达得更简单明了。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of you that feels strong emotions and feelings
meanings.example: His heart was full of anger and grief.
meanings.example_cn: 他的内心充满愤怒和悲伤。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who does someone else’s job for a limited period of time, especially in a sports team or school
meanings.example: Germany brought on a substitute at half time.
meanings.example_cn: 德国队在比赛半场时换上一名替补队员。

meanings.meaning_en: to use something new or different instead of something else
meanings.example: substitute goalkeeper
meanings.example_cn: 替补守门员

meanings.meaning_en: without problems or difficulties
meanings.example: They won quite easily.
meanings.example_cn: 他们赢得相当轻松。

meanings.meaning_en: to hang sth from sth else
meanings.example: A lamp was suspended from the ceiling.
meanings.example_cn: 一盏吊灯悬在天花板上。

meanings.meaning_en: if a fire burns, it produces heat and flames
meanings.example: There was a fire burning in the fireplace.
meanings.example_cn: 壁炉里烧着火。

meanings.meaning_en: an injury caused by fire, heat, the light of the sun, or acid
meanings.example: An average household candle will burn for about six hours.
meanings.example_cn: 一般的家用蜡烛可以点六小时左右。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who does physical work such as building, repairing things etc
meanings.example: In University Square workmen are building a steel fence.
meanings.example_cn: 在大学广场工人们正在筑一个钢栅栏。

meanings.meaning_en: the position of being the leader of a group, organization, country etc
meanings.example: The US must now take a firm leadership role.
meanings.example_cn: 美国现在必须扮演一个强有力的领导人角色。

meanings.meaning_en: feeling unhappy because someone has something that you wish you had
meanings.example: Why are you so jealous of his success?
meanings.example_cn: 你为什么这么嫉妒他的成功？

meanings.meaning_en: a metal container in which food or drink is preserved without air
meanings.example: a Coke can
meanings.example_cn: 可乐罐

meanings.meaning_en: cloth or thread made from the white hair of the cotton plant
meanings.example: a white cotton shirt
meanings.example_cn: 白色棉布衬衫

meanings.meaning_en: relating to Europe or its people
meanings.example: European languages
meanings.example_cn: 欧洲的语言

meanings.meaning_en: someone from Europe
meanings.example: our European partners
meanings.example_cn: 我们的欧洲伙伴

meanings.meaning_en: to tell someone about something in a way that is clear or easy to understand
meanings.example: He carefully explained the procedure.
meanings.example_cn: 他仔细解释了程序。

meanings.meaning_en: existing in nature and not caused, made, or controlled by people
meanings.example: the study of the natural world
meanings.example_cn: 对自然界的研究

meanings.meaning_en: without any dirt, marks etc
meanings.example: Are your hands clean?
meanings.example_cn: 你的手干净吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to oppose or fight against someone in authority or against an idea or situation which you do not agree with
meanings.example: Voters rebelled against high property taxes.
meanings.example_cn: 投票者们反对高额财产税。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who opposes or fights against people in authority
meanings.example: Anti-government rebels attacked the town.
meanings.example_cn: 反政府的叛乱分子攻击该镇。

meanings.meaning_en: to make it possible for someone to do something, or for something to happen
meanings.example: The new test should enable doctors to detect the disease early.
meanings.example_cn: 新的检验使医生能在早期发现该种疾病。

meanings.meaning_en: easy to see, notice, or understand
meanings.example: Bob ate his lunch with evident enjoyment.
meanings.example_cn: 显然鲍勃吃午饭吃得津津有味。

meanings.meaning_en: water that falls in small drops from clouds in the sky
meanings.example: a night of wind and rain
meanings.example_cn: 风雨交加的夜晚

meanings.meaning_en: if it rains, drops of water fall from clouds in the sky
meanings.example: There will be heavy rain in most parts of the country.
meanings.example_cn: 全国大部分地区将有大雨。

meanings.meaning_en: the activity of controlling and organizing the work that a company or organization does
meanings.example: a lack of management skills
meanings.example_cn: 缺乏管理技巧

meanings.meaning_en: one of eight equal parts of something
meanings.example: in the eighth century
meanings.example_cn: 在8世纪

meanings.meaning_en: one of eight equal parts of something
meanings.example: her eighth birthday
meanings.example_cn: 她的8岁生日

meanings.meaning_en: a type of food made from flour and water that is mixed together and then baked
meanings.example: Would you like some bread with your soup?
meanings.example_cn: 你喝汤时要吃点面包吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of great sadness, usually because someone has died or because something terrible has happened to you
meanings.example: the family’s joys and sorrows
meanings.example_cn: 这家人的喜与悲

meanings.meaning_en: cows and  bulls  kept on a farm for their meat or milk
meanings.example: herds of cattle
meanings.example_cn: 成群的牛

meanings.meaning_en: to examine something carefully in order to find out more about it or to find out what is wrong with it
meanings.example: I got out of the car to inspect the damage.
meanings.example_cn: 我下车查看损坏情况。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the health or state of someone’s mind
meanings.example: The centre provides help for people suffering from mental illness.
meanings.example_cn: 该中心对精神病患者提供帮助。

meanings.meaning_en: one of several kinds of  fungus  with stems and round tops, some of which can be eaten
meanings.example: mushroom soup
meanings.example_cn: 蘑菇汤

meanings.meaning_en: to carefully examine or consider sth again, especially so that you can decide if it is necessary to make changes
meanings.example: The government will review the situation later in the year.
meanings.example_cn: 政府将在今年晚些时候对形势重新加以研究。

meanings.meaning_en: (North Amercian English) a lesson in which you look again at sth you have studied, especially in order to prepare for an exam
meanings.example: The decision will be reviewed by the Supreme Court.
meanings.example_cn: 这个判决将由最高法院复核。

meanings.meaning_en: someone or something that is beautiful is extremely attractive to look at
meanings.example: She was even more beautiful than I had remembered.
meanings.example_cn: 她比我记忆中更美。

meanings.meaning_en: to move from a higher level to a lower one
meanings.example: Our plane started to descend.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的飞机开始下降。

meanings.meaning_en: a scale of temperature in which water freezes at 32˚ and boils at 212˚
meanings.example: 72˚ Fahrenheit (= 72 degrees on the Fahrenheit scale )
meanings.example_cn: 72华氏度

meanings.meaning_en: the right to do what you want without being controlled or restricted by anyone
meanings.example: People here like their freedom and privacy.
meanings.example_cn: 这里的人喜欢他们所拥有的自由与隐私权。

meanings.meaning_en: the place in the ground where a dead body is buried
meanings.example: At the head of the grave there was a small wooden cross.
meanings.example_cn: 坟头上有一个小小的木十字架。

meanings.meaning_en: grave problems, situations, or worries are very great or bad
meanings.example: Matthew’s life is in grave danger.
meanings.example_cn: 马修的生命危在旦夕。

meanings.meaning_en: pieces of wood used for building, that have been cut to specific lengths and widths
meanings.example: It was made of soft lumber, spruce by the look of it.
meanings.example_cn: 它是软木做的，看样子是云杉。

meanings.meaning_en: to experience something, especially problems or opposition
meanings.example: The doctor had encountered several similar cases in the past.
meanings.example_cn: 那位医生过去曾碰到过好几个类似病例。

meanings.meaning_en: an occasion when you meet someone, or do something with someone you do not know
meanings.example: She didn’t remember our encounter last summer.
meanings.example_cn: 她不记得我和她去年夏天那次邂逅了。

meanings.meaning_en: the feeling that an event or place gives you
meanings.example: The hotel had a lovely relaxed atmosphere .
meanings.example_cn: 那家宾馆的气氛轻松愉快。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the five movable parts at the end of your foot
meanings.example: He stubbed his toe (= hurt it by kicking it against something ) on a rock.
meanings.example_cn: 他的脚趾踢到一块石头上受了伤。

meanings.meaning_en: to put your hand, finger etc on someone or something
meanings.example: She reached out to touch his arm.
meanings.example_cn: 她伸手去碰他的胳膊。

meanings.meaning_en: the action of putting your hand, finger, or another part of your body on something or someone
meanings.example: If your house has been burgled, you shouldn’t touch anything until the police arrive.
meanings.example_cn: 如果家中被盗，在警察赶到之前不要动任何物品。

meanings.meaning_en: causing problems, in an annoying way
meanings.example: a troublesome child
meanings.example_cn: 烦人的孩子

meanings.meaning_en: when you tell someone that you are happy because they have achieved something or because something nice has happened to them
meanings.example: letters of congratulation
meanings.example_cn: 祝贺信

meanings.meaning_en: something wrapped in paper, packed in a box, and then sent by mail or delivered
meanings.example: There’s a package here for a Miami Lakes address.
meanings.example_cn: 这里有一个寄往迈阿密湖的包裹。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece or feature of something such as an object, area, event, or period of time
meanings.example: For part of the day, you will be outside doing practical work.
meanings.example_cn: 你们每天将有一部分时间在户外实际操作。

meanings.meaning_en: an arrangement with a shop, bank etc that allows you to buy something and pay for it later
meanings.example: The store agreed to let him have credit.
meanings.example_cn: 商店同意他赊购。

meanings.meaning_en: the official in control of a court, who decides how criminals should be punished
meanings.example: The trial judge specifies the number of years to be spent in prison.
meanings.example_cn: 由主审法官确定刑期。

meanings.meaning_en: existing or happening first, before other people or things
meanings.example: The land was returned to its original owner.
meanings.example_cn: 这块土地归还给了原主。

meanings.meaning_en: a choice or judgment that you make after a period of discussion or thought
meanings.example: Do you ever wonder if you made the right decision?
meanings.example_cn: 你怀疑过自己所作的决定是否正确吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to write a piece of music
meanings.example: Barrington has composed the music for a new production of ‘A Midsummer Night’s Dream’.
meanings.example_cn: 巴林顿为新版的《仲夏夜之梦》谱了曲。

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of old cloth, for example one used for cleaning things
meanings.example: He wiped his boots dry with an old rag.
meanings.example_cn: 他用一块旧布把他的靴子擦干。

meanings.meaning_en: a machine that has been sent into space and goes around the Earth, moon etc, used for radio, television, and other electronic communication
meanings.example: the launch of a communications and weather satellite
meanings.example_cn: 气象通信卫星的发射

meanings.meaning_en: to take goods, people etc from one place to another in a vehicle
meanings.example: trucks used for transporting oil
meanings.example_cn: 运输石油的卡车

meanings.meaning_en: the process or business of taking goods from one place to another
meanings.example: Canals were used for the transport of goods.
meanings.example_cn: 利用运河来运输货物。

meanings.meaning_en: a picture that you draw with a pencil, pen etc
meanings.example: a drawing of Canterbury Cathedral
meanings.example_cn: 一幅坎特伯雷大教堂的素描画

meanings.meaning_en: used or intended for protection
meanings.example: protective clothing
meanings.example_cn: 防护服

meanings.meaning_en: used to show how far back in the past something happened
meanings.example: They moved to a new house some time ago (=  a fairly long time ago  ) .
meanings.example_cn: 他们搬进新居已有些日子了。

meanings.meaning_en: your name written in the way you usually write it, for example at the end of a letter, or on a cheque etc, to show that you have written it
meanings.example: Her signature is totally illegible (= cannot be read ) .
meanings.example_cn: 她的签字完全无法辨认。

meanings.meaning_en: main; most important; basic
meanings.example: Our primary concern must be the children.
meanings.example_cn: 我们首先要关心的必须是儿童。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of writing that expresses emotions, experiences, and ideas, especially in short lines using words that  rhyme
meanings.example: I decided to write a poem about how I felt.
meanings.example_cn: 我决定把我的感受写成一首诗。

meanings.meaning_en: to know that a sound is being made, using your ears
meanings.example: Blanche heard a crash as the back door was flung open.
meanings.example_cn: 布兰奇听见后门哗啦一声被推开。

meanings.meaning_en: heavy cotton trousers with a piece covering your chest, held up by pieces of cloth that go over your shoulders
meanings.example: The overall cost of the exhibition was £400,000.
meanings.example_cn: 展览会的全部费用是40万英镑。

meanings.meaning_en: considering or including everything
meanings.example: The overall result is an increase in population.
meanings.example_cn: 总的结果是人口增加。

meanings.meaning_en: without anyone stopping or limiting something
meanings.example: the country’s first freely elected president
meanings.example_cn: 该国首位自由选举产生的总统

meanings.meaning_en: anything that is living, such as an animal, fish, or insect, but not a plant
meanings.example: all the living creatures in the sea
meanings.example_cn: 海洋中所有的生物

meanings.meaning_en: to state something in an exact and detailed way
meanings.example: Payments will be made for a specified number of months.
meanings.example_cn: 款项将在规定的几个月内支付。

meanings.meaning_en: if you combine two or more different things, or if they combine, they begin to exist or work together
meanings.example: Diets are most effective when combined with exercise.
meanings.example_cn: 节食和锻炼相结合是最有效的。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the sun
meanings.example: a solar eclipse
meanings.example_cn: 日食

meanings.meaning_en: a group or class of people, things etc that have similar qualities or features
meanings.example: Most of the victims developed psychological problems of one sort or another (= of various different types ).
meanings.example_cn: 大多数受害者都出现了这样那样的心理问题。

meanings.meaning_en: to put things in a particular order or arrange them in groups according to size, type etc
meanings.example: They do burgers, pizzas, that sort of thing.
meanings.example_cn: 他们供应汉堡包、比萨饼什么的。

meanings.meaning_en: loss of respect from other people, because you have behaved in a morally unacceptable way
meanings.example: You’ve brought enough dishonour on your family already without causing any more trouble.
meanings.example_cn: 你惹的麻烦已经让你的家人够丢脸的了，不用再添乱了。

meanings.meaning_en: to allow something to happen, especially by an official decision, rule, or law
meanings.example: Smoking is only permitted in the public lounge.
meanings.example_cn: 只允许在公共休息室里抽烟。

meanings.meaning_en: an official written statement giving you the right to do something
meanings.example: He had more than the permitted level of alcohol in his blood.
meanings.example_cn: 他血液中的酒精含量超出了允许的水平。

meanings.meaning_en: very good or beautiful, and very impressive
meanings.example: a magnificent performance
meanings.example_cn: 气势恢宏的演出

meanings.meaning_en: to move slowly on water or in the air
meanings.example: Smoke drifted up from the jungle ahead of us.
meanings.example_cn: 我们前方的丛林里有烟升起。

meanings.meaning_en: a slow change or development from one situation, opinion etc to another
meanings.example: Jenni spent the year drifting around Europe.
meanings.example_cn: 珍妮这一年来一直在欧洲各地漂泊。

meanings.meaning_en: to try to find out the truth about something such as a crime, accident, or scientific problem
meanings.example: The state police are investigating the incident.
meanings.example_cn: 州警察正调查此事。

meanings.meaning_en: right, suitable, or correct
meanings.example: Everything was in its proper place (= where it should be ) .
meanings.example_cn: 每样东西都放在恰当的位置。

meanings.meaning_en: unable to walk properly because your leg or foot is injured or weak
meanings.example: a lame dog
meanings.example_cn: 一条瘸腿的狗

meanings.meaning_en: affecting or involving a machine
meanings.example: The flight has been cancelled due to mechanical failure.
meanings.example_cn: 因机械故障航班被取消了。

meanings.meaning_en: full of energy in a way that is exciting and attractive
meanings.example: Rodgers and Hart’s music sounds as fresh and vital as the day it was written.
meanings.example_cn: 罗杰斯与哈特的音乐现在听来还有刚写成时的那份清新和活力。

meanings.meaning_en: moving or doing things in a careless way, especially so that you drop things, knock into things etc
meanings.example: A clumsy waiter spilled wine all over her new skirt.
meanings.example_cn: 一名笨手笨脚的服务员把葡萄酒洒得她新裙子上到处都是。

meanings.meaning_en: to reduce someone’s pain or unpleasant feelings
meanings.example: Drugs helped to relieve the pain.
meanings.example_cn: 药物有助于舒缓疼痛。

meanings.meaning_en: to say what something or someone is like by giving details about them
meanings.example: The police asked her to describe the man.
meanings.example_cn: 警察叫她描述一下那名男子。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has written a book
meanings.example: Nothomb is a Belgian author.
meanings.example_cn: 诺东是位比利时作家。

meanings.meaning_en: having feelings of pleasure, for example because something good has happened to you or you are very satisfied with your life
meanings.example: It’s a lovely house and we’ve been very happy here.
meanings.example_cn: 房子很漂亮，我们住在这里非常开心。

meanings.meaning_en: to move smoothly and quietly, as if without effort
meanings.example: Swans went gliding past.
meanings.example_cn: 天鹅滑行而过。

meanings.meaning_en: a smooth quiet movement that seems to take no effort
meanings.example: the graceful glide of a skater
meanings.example_cn: 滑冰者优美的滑行动作

meanings.meaning_en: to make the water or liquid in something flow away
meanings.example: The swimming pool is drained and cleaned every winter.
meanings.example_cn: 每年冬天这座游泳池都要排干清洗。

meanings.meaning_en: a thing that uses a lot of the time, money, etc. that could be used for sth else
meanings.example: Military spending is a huge drain on the country's resources.
meanings.example_cn: 军费开支是对国家资源的巨大耗费。

meanings.meaning_en: an instrument for writing or drawing with ink
meanings.example: a ballpoint pen
meanings.example_cn: 圆珠笔

meanings.meaning_en: very great tiredness
meanings.example: Sam’s face was grey with fatigue.
meanings.example_cn: 萨姆累得脸色灰白。

meanings.meaning_en: ideas, opinions, statements etc that are not true or that seem very stupid
meanings.example: ‘I’m a prisoner in my own home.’ ‘Nonsense!’
meanings.example_cn: “我在自己家里就像个囚犯。”“胡说！”

meanings.meaning_en: complete or total
meanings.example: I have absolute confidence in her.
meanings.example_cn: 我对她充满信心。

meanings.meaning_en: a large bag made of strong rough cloth or strong paper, used for storing or carrying flour, coal, vegetables etc
meanings.example: a sack of potatoes
meanings.example_cn: 一大袋马铃薯

meanings.meaning_en: the set of tools and machines that you use for a particular scientific, medical, or technical purpose
meanings.example: Astronauts have special breathing apparatus.
meanings.example_cn: 航天员有专门的呼吸装装备。

meanings.meaning_en: coming straight after sb/sth in time, order or space
meanings.example: The next six months will be the hardest.
meanings.example_cn: 接下来的六个月将是最难熬的。

meanings.meaning_en: a smooth way of moving that looks natural, relaxed, and attractive
meanings.example: Lena moved with the grace of a dancer.
meanings.example_cn: 莉娜走路姿势有着舞者般的优美。

meanings.meaning_en: an introduction at the beginning of a book or speech
meanings.example: ...the preface to Kelman's novel.
meanings.example_cn: …凯尔曼小说的前言。

meanings.meaning_en: the way your voice sounds, which shows how you are feeling or what you mean
meanings.example: Her tone was sharp with anger.
meanings.example_cn: 她很气愤，语气尖刻。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of kitchen equipment on which you cook food in pots and pans, and that contains an oven
meanings.example: a pot of soup simmering on the stove
meanings.example_cn: 在炉灶上煨着的一锅汤

meanings.meaning_en: exactly the same, or very similar
meanings.example: four identical houses
meanings.example_cn: 四幢一模一样的房子

meanings.meaning_en: a word that describes a noun or  pronoun. In the phrase ‘black hat’, ‘black’ is an adjective and in the sentence ‘It makes her happy’, ‘happy’ is an adjective.
meanings.example: an adjectival phrase
meanings.example_cn: 形容词短语

meanings.meaning_en: the joint that bends in the middle of your leg
meanings.example: Lucy had a bandage round her knee.
meanings.example_cn: 露西的膝盖上缠着绷带。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who produces art, especially paintings or drawings
meanings.example: an exhibition of paintings by local artists
meanings.example_cn: 当地画家的画展

meanings.meaning_en: if something chokes you, it makes you unable to breathe properly
meanings.example: I felt as if there was a weight on my chest, choking me.
meanings.example_cn: 我感觉好像有重物压在胸口，让我喘不过气来。

meanings.meaning_en: without being affected or influenced by something
meanings.example: Despite her recent surgery she has been carrying on regardless.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管她最近动了手术，她却一直在不顾一切地继续工作。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who reads books, or who reads in a particular way
meanings.example: The book will appeal to young readers.
meanings.example_cn: 这本书会吸引年轻读者。

meanings.meaning_en: flat and level
meanings.example: a horizontal surface
meanings.example_cn: 水平面

meanings.meaning_en: good enough to be used for a particular purpose or to be considered satisfactory
meanings.example: Students who achieve an acceptable standard will progress to degree studies.
meanings.example_cn: 达到一定程度的学生可以进一步攻读学位。

meanings.meaning_en: the letters and packages that are delivered to you
meanings.example: You shouldn’t read other people’s mail.
meanings.example_cn: 你不应该看别人的信件。

meanings.meaning_en: to send a letter or package to someone
meanings.example: He found a mountain of mail waiting for him.
meanings.example_cn: 他发现有堆积如山的邮件等着他处理。

meanings.meaning_en: a white or grey mass in the sky that forms from very small drops of water
meanings.example: Dark clouds floated across the moon.
meanings.example_cn: 乌云飘过月亮。

meanings.meaning_en: if you are busy, you are working hard and have a lot of things to do
meanings.example: She’s busy now – can you phone later?
meanings.example_cn: 她现在正忙，你稍后打来好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: someone who works in an office typing letters, keeping records, answering telephone calls, arranging meetings etc
meanings.example: My secretary will fax you all the details.
meanings.example_cn: 我的秘书会把所有的细节发传真给你。

meanings.meaning_en: likely to cause death
meanings.example: a deadly poison
meanings.example_cn: 致命的毒药

meanings.meaning_en: an area of water next to the land where the water is calm, so that ships are safe when they are inside it
meanings.example: as they sailed into Portsmouth Harbour
meanings.example_cn: 当他们驶入朴次茅斯港的时候

meanings.meaning_en: to protect and hide criminals that the police are searching for
meanings.example: Accusations of harbouring suspects were raised against the former Hungarian leadership.
meanings.example_cn: 匈牙利前领导人被指控窝藏疑犯。

meanings.meaning_en: a flower or flowers
meanings.example: beautiful red blooms
meanings.example_cn: 美丽的红花

meanings.meaning_en: to keep something or continue to have something
meanings.example: You have the right to retain possession of the goods.
meanings.example_cn: 你有权保留这些物品。

meanings.meaning_en: to compete for something or to try to win it
meanings.example: His wife is contesting a seat on the council.
meanings.example_cn: 他妻子在角逐市政会的一个席位。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of goods or work produced by a person, machine, factory etc
meanings.example: Output is up 30% on last year.
meanings.example_cn: 产量比去年提高了30%。

meanings.meaning_en: a railway or the railway
meanings.example: The supplies were sent on the railroad.
meanings.example_cn: 补给经由铁路运送。

meanings.meaning_en: a large organization that has a particular kind of work or purpose
meanings.example: the Institution of Electrical Engineers
meanings.example_cn: 电机工程师学会

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a vehicle that produces power to make it move
meanings.example: Is the engine running smoothly?
meanings.example_cn: 发动机运转平稳吗？

meanings.meaning_en: the soft part of the body of a person or animal that is between the skin and the bones
meanings.example: a freshwater fish with firm white flesh
meanings.example_cn: 一种肉色雪白、肉质紧实的淡水鱼

meanings.meaning_en: a male who has the same parents as you
meanings.example: I have two brothers, William and Mark.
meanings.example_cn: 我有两个兄弟，威廉和马克。

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring length, equal to 2.54 centimetres. There are 12 inches in a foot.
meanings.example: The curtains were an inch too short.
meanings.example_cn: 窗帘短了一英寸。

meanings.meaning_en: a flying vehicle with wings and at least one engine
meanings.example: The aeroplane landed us at the airport in Barcelona.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机把我们降落在巴塞罗那机场。

meanings.meaning_en: a hot dark brown drink that has a slightly bitter taste
meanings.example: Do you want a cup of coffee?
meanings.example_cn: 你要来杯咖啡吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to send out gas, heat, light, sound etc
meanings.example: The kettle emitted a shrill whistle.
meanings.example_cn: 水壶发出了刺耳的鸣笛声。

meanings.meaning_en: while or when
meanings.example: I saw Peter as I was getting off the bus.
meanings.example_cn: 我下公共汽车的时候看见了彼得。

meanings.meaning_en: simple or basic
meanings.example: the elementary principles of justice and democracy
meanings.example_cn: 正义和民主的基本信条

meanings.meaning_en: the person who is in charge of a newspaper or magazine, or part of a newspaper or magazine, and decides what should be included in it
meanings.example: the editor of the Daily Telegraph
meanings.example_cn: 《每日电讯报》的主编

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of metal, usually flat and round, that is used as money
meanings.example: Toss a coin to see who goes first.
meanings.example_cn: 抛硬币决定谁先来。

meanings.meaning_en: to make pieces of money from metal
clearly known, seen, or stated
meanings.example: It’s impossible for me to give you a definite answer.
meanings.example_cn: 我不可能给你明确的答复。

meanings.meaning_en: to move along quickly over a surface, never touching it or not touching it often
meanings.example: seagulls skimming the waves
meanings.example_cn: 掠过浪尖的海鸥

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is visiting a place for pleasure on holiday
meanings.example: Cambridge is always full of tourists in the summer.
meanings.example_cn: 剑桥在夏季总是挤满了游客。

meanings.meaning_en: to develop well and be successful
meanings.example: The economy is booming and small businesses are flourishing.
meanings.example_cn: 经济繁荣，小企业蒸蒸日上。

meanings.meaning_en: the sense by which you know one food from another
meanings.example: Some birds have a highly developed sense of taste.
meanings.example_cn: 有些鸟的味觉很发达。

meanings.meaning_en: the way that a story, film, activity etc finishes
meanings.example: a story with a happy ending
meanings.example_cn: 结局美满的故事

meanings.meaning_en: to state or show that sth is definitely true or correct, especially by providing evidence
meanings.example: New evidence has confirmed the first witness’s story.
meanings.example_cn: 新的证据证实了第一个证人的说法。

meanings.meaning_en: almost, but not quite or not completely
meanings.example: It took nearly two hours to get here.
meanings.example_cn: 到这里花了将近两小时。

meanings.meaning_en: used to say that someone leaves a place or person, or stays some distance from a place or person
meanings.example: Go away!
meanings.example_cn: 走开！

meanings.meaning_en: something that is difficult to understand or explain
meanings.example: The meaning of the poem has always been a puzzle.
meanings.example_cn: 那首诗的含义始终是个谜。

meanings.meaning_en: to confuse someone or make them feel slightly anxious because they do not understand something
meanings.example: He thought he had solved the puzzle.
meanings.example_cn: 他认为他已经解开了那个谜。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to advise people about laws, write formal agreements, or represent people in court
meanings.example: Prosecution and defence lawyers are expected to deliver closing arguments next week.
meanings.example_cn: 原告律师和被告律师下周将要作终结辩论。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being very exact or correct
meanings.example: The choir sang with precision.
meanings.example_cn: 合唱团的演唱准确无误。

meanings.meaning_en: a sum of money that a person or organization owes
meanings.example: He had enough money to pay off his outstanding debts.
meanings.example_cn: 他有足够的钱偿还亏欠的债务。

meanings.meaning_en: to help something to develop or increase
meanings.example: Fertilizer promotes leaf growth.
meanings.example_cn: 肥料促进叶子的生长。

meanings.meaning_en: to breathe quickly in a way that can be heard because you are having difficulty breathing
meanings.example: Brendan climbed slowly, gasping for breath.
meanings.example_cn: 布伦丹上气不接下气地缓慢攀爬。

meanings.meaning_en: to arrange for a book, magazine etc to be written, printed, and sold
meanings.example: The first edition was published in 1765.
meanings.example_cn: 第一版于1765年出版。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to a measurement of space which is calculated by multiplying the length of something by its width and height
meanings.example: the cubic capacity of an engine
meanings.example_cn: 引擎汽缸的容积

meanings.meaning_en: intelligent or sensible
meanings.example: The smart kids get good grades and go off to college.
meanings.example_cn: 聪明的孩子成绩好，可以去上大学。

meanings.meaning_en: the flat surface that you stand on inside a building
meanings.example: a polished wooden floor
meanings.example_cn: 上过蜡的木地板

meanings.meaning_en: to argue or disagree with someone
meanings.example: What happened next is hotly disputed.
meanings.example_cn: 关于后来发生了什么，争论很激烈。

meanings.meaning_en: a serious argument or disagreement
meanings.example: He got into a dispute over a taxi fare.
meanings.example_cn: 他因出租车费和人发生了争执。

meanings.meaning_en: a board with a dark smooth surface, used in schools for writing on with  chalk
meanings.example: He chalked out a design on the blackboard.
meanings.example_cn: 他用粉笔在黑板上勾划出一个图样。

meanings.meaning_en: to put a piece of equipment somewhere and connect it so that it is ready to be used
meanings.example: They’ve installed the new computer network at last.
meanings.example_cn: 他们终于安装了新电脑网络。

meanings.meaning_en: behaviour that is intended to make someone believe something that is not true
meanings.example: an atmosphere of hypocrisy and deceit
meanings.example_cn: 充满虚伪和欺骗的氛围

meanings.meaning_en: a description of what is likely to happen in the future, based on the information that you have now
meanings.example: The weather forecast is good for tomorrow.
meanings.example_cn: 天气预报说明天是晴天。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a statement saying what is likely to happen in the future, based on the information that you have now
meanings.example: Rain was forecast for the weekend.
meanings.example_cn: 预报周末有雨。

meanings.meaning_en: (at) the present time
meanings.example: She's a widow now.
meanings.example_cn: 她现在是一个寡妇。

meanings.meaning_en: to be sure that something is true or that someone is telling the truth
meanings.example: You shouldn’t believe everything you read.
meanings.example_cn: 你不应尽信书上看来的东西。

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring distance, equal to 1,760  yard s  or about 1,609 metres
meanings.example: It’s 40 miles from here to the Polish border.
meanings.example_cn: 从这里到波兰边界有40英里。

meanings.meaning_en: a space between two objects or two parts of an object, especially because something is missing
meanings.example: a gap in the traffic
meanings.example_cn: 车流中的一个空档

meanings.meaning_en: to happen
meanings.example: A third of accidental deaths occur in the home.
meanings.example_cn: 有三分之一的意外死亡发生在家里。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of clothing that you wear on your hand in order to protect it or keep it warm
meanings.example: a pair of gloves
meanings.example_cn: 一副手套

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has completed a university degree, especially a first degree
meanings.example: a Harvard graduate
meanings.example_cn: 哈佛毕业生

meanings.meaning_en: to obtain a degree, especially a first degree, from a college or university
meanings.example: university graduates
meanings.example_cn: 大学毕业生

meanings.meaning_cn: 〔职业体育的〕俱乐部；俱乐部；夜总会
meanings.meaning_en: a professional organization including the players, managers, and owners of a sports team
meanings.example: Manchester United Football Club
meanings.example_cn: 曼联（队）足球俱乐部

meanings.meaning_en: a fierce person or animal is angry or ready to attack, and looks very frightening
meanings.example: fierce guard dogs
meanings.example_cn: 凶猛的看门狗

meanings.meaning_en: to get rid of sth you do not want, especially in a place which is not suitable
meanings.example: Too much toxic waste is being dumped at sea.
meanings.example_cn: 太多的有毒废料在向大海里倾倒。

meanings.meaning_en: to move or develop more slowly than others
meanings.example: She stopped to wait for Ian who was lagging behind.
meanings.example_cn: 她停下来等落在后面的伊恩。

meanings.meaning_en: a tool with a heavy metal part on a long handle, used for hitting nails into wood
meanings.example: I had no hammer,so I had to pound the nail in with a stone.
meanings.example_cn: 我没有锤子，所以只得用石头把钉子敲进去。

meanings.meaning_en: to hit something with a hammer in order to force it into a particular position or shape
meanings.example: Hammer the nails into the back of the frame.
meanings.example_cn: 把钉子锤入框子的背面。

meanings.meaning_en: to tell someone that you are happy because they have achieved something or because something nice has happened to them
meanings.example: He never even stopped to congratulate me.
meanings.example_cn: 他甚至没有过来向我祝贺。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of keeping or putting something in a special place while it is not being used
meanings.example: the storage of highly radioactive material
meanings.example_cn: 高放射性材料的存放

meanings.meaning_en: to try to answer a question or form an opinion when you are not sure whether you will be correct
meanings.example: I’d say he’s around 50, but I’m only guessing.
meanings.example_cn: 我想他50岁左右，不过也只是猜测。

meanings.meaning_en: an attempt to answer a question or make a judgement when you are not sure whether you will be correct
meanings.example: What star sign are you? No, let me guess.
meanings.example_cn: 你是什么星座的？别说，让我来猜猜看。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is desirable is worth having or doing
meanings.example: The ability to speak a foreign language is highly desirable .
meanings.example_cn: 能说一门外语是非常理想的。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to make judgments about the good and bad qualities of art, music, films etc
meanings.example: Mather was a film critic for many years.
meanings.example_cn: 马瑟做过多年的电影评论家。

meanings.meaning_en: the lowest part of something
meanings.example: Can you hold the bottom of the ladder for me?
meanings.example_cn: 你帮我扶住梯子底部好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a young tightly rolled-up flower or leaf before it opens
meanings.example: rose buds
meanings.example_cn: 玫瑰花苞

meanings.meaning_en: An island country and continent in the southern hemisphere, in the south-western Pacific Ocean, a member state of the Commonwealth of Nations; population 28,500,000 (estimated 2015); capital, Canberra; official language, English.
meanings.example: He transplanted his family to Australia.
meanings.example_cn: 他把家迁到澳大利亚。

meanings.meaning_en: living in a place
meanings.example: Many retired British people are now resident in Spain.
meanings.example_cn: 许多退休的英国人现在住在西班牙。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who lives or stays in a particular place
meanings.example: A resident said, "I think we should write it down on paper or tell our family members.
meanings.example_cn: 一位居民说：“我觉得我们应该把遗嘱写在纸上或者告诉给自己的家人。

meanings.meaning_en: to decide which one of a number of things or people you want
meanings.example: It took us ages to choose a new carpet.
meanings.example_cn: 我们挑选新地毯花了很长时间。

meanings.meaning_en: while something else is happening
meanings.example: Cook the sauce over a medium heat until it thickens. Meanwhile start boiling the water for the pasta.
meanings.example_cn: 用中火把调味汁煮到变稠，同时烧水准备煮意大利面。

meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately not include something
meanings.example: a special diet that excludes dairy products
meanings.example_cn: 不包含奶制品的特别食谱

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being suitable or useful for a particular purpose, especially by making something easier or saving you time
meanings.example: Ready meals sell well because of their convenience.
meanings.example_cn: 即食餐因为方便销路好。

meanings.meaning_en: a rank of people or things is a line or row of them
meanings.example: Everyone lines up in ranks, all facing the instructor.
meanings.example_cn: 大家都一排排站好，面朝教练。

meanings.meaning_en: now, compared with what happened in the past
meanings.example: Most people nowadays are aware of the importance of a healthy diet.
meanings.example_cn: 现在大多数人都明白健康饮食的重要性。

meanings.meaning_en: to move or drop down from a higher position to a lower position
meanings.example: The tree was about to fall.
meanings.example_cn: 那棵树快要倒下了。

meanings.meaning_en: very angry
meanings.example: She was absolutely furious .
meanings.example_cn: 她怒不可遏。

meanings.meaning_en: an act of hitting something lightly, especially to get someone’s attention
meanings.example: She felt a tap on her shoulder.
meanings.example_cn: 她觉得有人轻轻拍了拍她的肩膀。

meanings.meaning_en: to hit your fingers lightly on something, for example to get someone’s attention
meanings.example: I went up and tapped on the window.
meanings.example_cn: 我走上去轻轻敲敲窗户。

meanings.meaning_en: happening or done at once and without delay
meanings.example: Our immediate response to the attack was sheer horror.
meanings.example_cn: 我们对攻击的第一反应就是非常惊恐。

meanings.meaning_en: a purple or brown mark on your skin that you get because you have fallen, been hit etc
meanings.example: minor cuts and bruises
meanings.example_cn: 轻微的伤口和淤青

meanings.meaning_en: used to say that someone or something is the same as the subject of the sentence
meanings.example: My name is Susan.
meanings.example_cn: 我的名字叫苏珊。

meanings.meaning_en: ideas and activities relating to gaining and using power in a country, city etc
meanings.example: a good understanding of politics in China
meanings.example_cn: 对中国政治很好的了解

meanings.meaning_en: to explain exactly the meaning of a particular word or idea
meanings.example: I’ll now try to define the term ‘popular culture’.
meanings.example_cn: 我现在来试试给 “通俗文化” 这个词下定义。

meanings.meaning_en: in large amounts, to a high degree, or with great severity
meanings.example: I became heavily involved in politics.
meanings.example_cn: 我深陷政治之中。

meanings.meaning_en: to lightly touch someone or something several times with your hand flat, especially to give comfort
meanings.example: He patted the dog affectionately.
meanings.example_cn: 他亲热地轻轻拍了拍那只狗。

meanings.meaning_en: a friendly act of touching someone with your hand flat
meanings.example: Mrs Dodd gave the child a pat on the head.
meanings.example_cn: 多德夫人轻轻拍了拍那个孩子的头。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of a medicine or a drug that you should take
meanings.example: Never exceed the recommended dose of painkillers
meanings.example_cn: 服用止痛药不可超过建议的剂量。

meanings.meaning_en: to use and control a machine or equipment
meanings.example: The Lewis family operated a number of boats on the canal.
meanings.example_cn: 刘易斯一家在运河上经营着几艘船。

meanings.meaning_en: to see and notice something
meanings.example: Scientists have observed a drop in ozone levels over the Antarctic.
meanings.example_cn: 科学家已经观察到南极洲上方的臭氧浓度有所下降。

meanings.meaning_en: auxiliary workers provide additional help for another group of workers
meanings.example: an auxiliary nurse
meanings.example_cn: 助理护士

meanings.meaning_en: a part of a number or an amount, considered in relation to the whole
meanings.example: A large proportion of the dolphins in that area will eventually die.
meanings.example_cn: 那个地区的很大一部分海豚最终都会死去。

meanings.meaning_en: information about something that is written down or stored on computer, film etc so that it can be looked at in the future
meanings.example: According to official records, five people were killed last year near that road junction.
meanings.example_cn: 据官方记录，去年有五人在那个路口附近丧生。

meanings.meaning_en: to write information down or store it in a computer or on film so that it can be looked at in the future
meanings.example: His record reveals a tough streak.
meanings.example_cn: 他的经历说明他个性坚强。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a long deep sound because you are in pain, upset, or disappointed, or because something is very enjoyable
meanings.example: The kids all groaned when I switched off the TV.
meanings.example_cn: 我关掉电视时，孩子们都发出不满的抱怨声。

meanings.meaning_en: a long deep sound that you make when you are in pain or do not want to do something
meanings.example: Richard’s jokes make you groan rather than laugh.
meanings.example_cn: 理查德的笑话让你哭笑不得。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong feeling of trust or confidence in someone or something
meanings.example: People have lost faith in the government.
meanings.example_cn: 人们已失去了对政府的信心。

meanings.meaning_en: the flesh of animals and birds eaten as food
meanings.example: I gave up eating meat a few months ago.
meanings.example_cn: 我几个月以前开始不吃肉了。

meanings.meaning_en: to become firm or stiff, or to make something firm or stiff
meanings.example: It will take about 24 hours for the glue to harden.
meanings.example_cn: 胶水干透大约需要24小时。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular thing or person is the one that you are talking about, and not any other
meanings.example: In this particular case, no one else was involved.
meanings.example_cn: 这件事没有其他人牵涉其中。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the two long parts of your body between your shoulders and your hands
meanings.example: Dave has a broken arm .
meanings.example_cn: 戴夫手臂断了。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the two soft parts around your mouth where your skin is redder or darker
meanings.example: She had big eyes and full lips (= large and round lips ).
meanings.example_cn: 她眼睛大大的，嘴唇很丰满。

meanings.meaning_en: a traditional short story that teaches a moral lesson, especially a story about animals
meanings.example: the fable of the fox and the crow
meanings.example_cn: 狐狸和乌鸦的寓言故事

meanings.meaning_en: to forgive someone for doing something that is not seriously wrong, such as being rude or careless
meanings.example: I’ll excuse you this time, but don’t be late again.
meanings.example_cn: 这次我原谅你，但别再迟到了。

meanings.meaning_en: a reason that you invent to explain an action and to hide your real intentions
meanings.example: Please excuse my bad handwriting.
meanings.example_cn: 请原谅，我的字写得不好。

meanings.meaning_en: to send out gas, liquid, smoke etc, or to allow it to escape
meanings.example: Sewage is discharged directly into the sea.
meanings.example_cn: 污水被直接排放到海里。

meanings.meaning_en: when gas, liquid, smoke etc is sent out, or the substance that is sent out
meanings.example: the discharge of toxic waste into the sea
meanings.example_cn: 有毒废物向海里的排放

meanings.meaning_en: a room under a house or other building, often used for storing things
meanings.example: a coal cellar
meanings.example_cn: 煤窖

meanings.meaning_en: someone or something that is noisy makes a lot of noise
meanings.example: The kids have been really noisy today.
meanings.example_cn: 孩子们今天实在是吵。

meanings.meaning_en: organized carefully and done thoroughly
meanings.example: a systematic approach to solving the problem
meanings.example_cn: 对这个问题采取的有条不紊的解决方法

meanings.meaning_en: a rough path across countryside or through a forest
meanings.example: The trail led over Boulder Pass before descending to a lake.
meanings.example_cn: 小路越过博尔德山口，然后向下通往湖边。

meanings.meaning_en: to follow someone by looking for signs that they have gone in a particular direction
meanings.example: The bus left a trail of black smoke behind it.
meanings.example_cn: 公共汽车开过，留下一股黑烟。

meanings.meaning_en: used to refer to a woman, girl, or female animal that has already been mentioned or is already known about
meanings.example: Jane? I don’t really know her.
meanings.example_cn: 简？我不太认识她。

meanings.meaning_en: belonging to or connected with a woman, girl, or female animal that has already been mentioned
meanings.example: Margaret wants me to go with her.
meanings.example_cn: 玛格丽特想让我和她一起去。

meanings.meaning_en: fairly or to some degree
meanings.example: I grew up in rather unusual circumstances.
meanings.example_cn: 我在相当不寻常的环境中长大。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance that is not a solid or a gas, for example water or milk
meanings.example: Add a little more liquid to the sauce.
meanings.example_cn: 在酱汁中再加一点水。

meanings.meaning_en: in the form of a liquid instead of a gas or solid
meanings.example: Children take antibiotics in liquid form.
meanings.example_cn: 儿童服用液态抗生素。

meanings.meaning_en: not directly caused by something
meanings.example: Losing weight is an indirect result of smoking cigarettes.
meanings.example_cn: 吸烟间接导致体重减轻。

meanings.meaning_en: in the period of time between two times or two events
meanings.example: My first novel was rejected by six publishers. In the meantime I had written a play.
meanings.example_cn: 我的第一部小说遭到六家出版商的拒绝。其间我又完成了一部戏剧。

meanings.meaning_en: 英文释义: meanwhile
meanings.example: The doctor will be here soon. In the meantime, try and relax.
meanings.example_cn: 医生很快就来，现在尽量放松一下。

meanings.meaning_en: a part of something larger, especially a part that is different from the other parts
meanings.example: The front portion of the rocket breaks off.
meanings.example_cn: 火箭的前部脱落了。

meanings.meaning_en: the main meal of the day, eaten in the middle of the day or the evening
meanings.example: What time do you usually have dinner?
meanings.example_cn: 你通常什么时候吃饭？

meanings.meaning_en: the act of sharing things among a large group of people in a planned way
meanings.example: the distribution of aid supplies
meanings.example_cn: 救济物资的分发

meanings.meaning_en: relating to Africa or its people
meanings.example: ...the African continent.
meanings.example_cn: …非洲大陆。

meanings.meaning_en: someone from Africa
to say something in a strong way
meanings.example: The report emphasizes the importance of improving safety standards.
meanings.example_cn: 报告强调了改进安全标准的重要性。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a person or animal die
