meanings.example: Why did she kill her husband?
meanings.example_cn: 她为什么杀死丈夫？

meanings.meaning_en: to suddenly push air out of your throat with a short sound, often repeatedly
meanings.example: Matthew coughed and cleared his throat.
meanings.example_cn: 马修咳了一声清清喉咙。

meanings.meaning_en: a medical condition that makes you cough a lot
meanings.example: I think I’m getting a cold or flu – I’ve been coughing and sneezing all day.
meanings.example_cn: 我想我是着凉了，或者得了流感——我整天都在咳嗽和打喷嚏。

meanings.meaning_en: calm sensible controlled behaviour, especially in a situation when it is difficult to stay calm
meanings.example: The police were praised for their restraint in handling the demonstrators.
meanings.example_cn: 警方因对待示威者时所表现出的克制而受到赞扬。

meanings.meaning_en: the way in which something is made up of different parts, things, or members
meanings.example: Some minerals have complex chemical compositions.
meanings.example_cn: 有些矿物的化学构成很复杂。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to carry people’s bags at railway stations, airports etc
meanings.example: Our taxi pulled up at Old Delhi station and a porter sprinted to the door.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的出租车停在老德里车站，一个搬运工疾步跑向车门。

meanings.meaning_en: to state that something is true
meanings.example: His statement was verified by several witnesses.
meanings.example_cn: 他的说法得到了几位证人的证实。

meanings.meaning_en: used to refer to a thing, animal, situation, idea etc that has already been mentioned or is already known about
meanings.example: ‘Where’s your office?’ ‘It’s on the third floor.’
meanings.example_cn: “你的办公室在哪儿？”“在三楼。”

meanings.meaning_en: a flat piece of plastic, metal etc with a row of thin teeth on one side, used for making your hair tidy
meanings.example: Your hair needs a good comb.
meanings.example_cn: 你的头发需要好好梳理一下。

meanings.meaning_en: to make hair look tidy using a comb
meanings.example: Melanie ran upstairs to comb her hair.
meanings.example_cn: 梅拉妮跑上楼去梳头发。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of getting control of a country by fighting
meanings.example: the Norman Conquest (= the conquest of England by the Normans )
meanings.example_cn: 诺曼征服

meanings.meaning_en: a short stiff hair that feels rough
meanings.example: His chin was covered with bristles.
meanings.example_cn: 他满下巴都是胡茬。

meanings.meaning_en: used to emphasize that something is more important or happens more with one particular thing than with others
meanings.example: I never liked long walks, especially in winter.
meanings.example_cn: 我向来不喜欢长距离散步，尤其在冬天。

meanings.meaning_en: if someone or something is absent, they are missing or not in the place where they are expected to be
meanings.example: plans to force absent fathers to pay child maintenance
meanings.example_cn: 强制不和小孩生活在一起的父亲支付抚养费的计划

meanings.meaning_en: a container with a narrow top for keeping liquids in, usually made of plastic or glass
meanings.example: an empty bottle
meanings.example_cn: 一个空瓶子

meanings.meaning_en: to press something so hard that it breaks or is damaged
meanings.example: His leg was crushed in the accident.
meanings.example_cn: 他的腿在事故中被压断。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of people who represent a company, organization etc
meanings.example: A trade delegation will visit Kuwait.
meanings.example_cn: 一个贸易代表团将访问科威特。

meanings.meaning_en: used by the person speaking to show that they and one or more other people are affected by their own action
meanings.example: We prepared ourselves for the long journey ahead.
meanings.example_cn: 我们为将要开始的长途旅行做好了准备。

meanings.meaning_en: a society that is well organized and developed, used especially about a particular society in a particular place or at a particular time
meanings.example: modern American civilization
meanings.example_cn: 现代美国文明

meanings.meaning_en: based on facts, or making a decision that is based on facts rather than on your feelings or beliefs
meanings.example: Scientists need to be objective when doing research.
meanings.example_cn: 科学家做研究时要客观。

meanings.meaning_en: a common light yellow chemical substance that burns with a very strong unpleasant smell, and is used in drugs, explosives, and industry. It is a chemical element :symbol S
meanings.example: Burning sulphur creates poisonous fumes.
meanings.example_cn: 燃烧的硫磺会产生有毒烟雾。

meanings.meaning_en: a polite or formal demand for something
meanings.example: They have made an urgent request for international aid.
meanings.example_cn: 他们紧急请求国际援助。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask for something in a polite or formal way
meanings.example: To request more information, please call our toll free number.
meanings.example_cn: 欲知详情，请拨打我们的免费电话。

meanings.meaning_en: a natural ability to do something well
meanings.example: He has a lot of talent , and his work is fresh and interesting.
meanings.example_cn: 他很有天赋，作品新颖有趣。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to real objects that you can touch, see, or feel
meanings.example: the physical world around us
meanings.example_cn: 我们周遭的物质世界

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment, especially electrical equipment, such as a  cooker  or  washing machine  , used in people’s homes
meanings.example: There’s plenty of space for all the usual kitchen appliances.
meanings.example_cn: 有足够的空间摆放各种日常厨房器具。

meanings.meaning_en: an official visit to a building or organization to check that everything is satisfactory and that rules are being obeyed
meanings.example: An inspection was carried out at the school.
meanings.example_cn: 有人来学校视察了一遍。

meanings.meaning_en: a sudden loud noise caused by something such as a gun or an object hitting a hard surface
meanings.example: There was a loud bang outside the kitchen door.
meanings.example_cn: 厨房门外传来砰的一声巨响。

meanings.meaning_en: to throw back light, heat, sound, etc. from a surface
meanings.example: Wear something white – it reflects the heat.
meanings.example_cn: 穿件白色的衣服——它能反射热。

meanings.meaning_en: the state of being happy
meanings.example: Juliet’s eyes shone with happiness.
meanings.example_cn: 朱丽叶的双眼闪耀着幸福的光芒。

meanings.meaning_en: when you carefully listen to, look at, or think about someone or something
meanings.example: My attention wasn’t really on the game.
meanings.example_cn: 我的注意力其实不在比赛上。

meanings.meaning_en: the first month of the year, between December and February
meanings.example: We always have snow in January.
meanings.example_cn: 我们这里1月份总会下雪。

meanings.meaning_en: a new business activity that involves taking risks
meanings.example: business/commercial venture
meanings.example_cn: 商业风投

meanings.meaning_en: to go somewhere that could be dangerous
meanings.example: When darkness fell, he would venture out.
meanings.example_cn: 天黑以后，他就会壮着胆子出去。

meanings.meaning_en: information that is put into a computer
meanings.example: If the input data specified it, the file will close and the process terminates.
meanings.example_cn: 如果输入数据指定，该文件就会关闭，数据处理终止。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a deep, very loud noise
meanings.example: We heard a lion roar.
meanings.example_cn: 我们听到狮子在吼叫。

meanings.meaning_en: a deep, loud noise made by an animal such as a lion, or by someone’s voice
meanings.example: The engines roared.
meanings.example_cn: 引擎轰鸣。

meanings.meaning_en: remaining loyal to a particular person, belief, political party etc and continuing to support them
meanings.example: a faithful friend
meanings.example_cn: 忠诚的朋友

meanings.meaning_en: a small brown animal with a long tail, which uses its hands to climb trees and lives in hot countries
meanings.example: The monkey is beating up and down.
meanings.example_cn: 那只猴子到处乱窜。

meanings.meaning_en: instead of someone, or as their representative
meanings.example: She asked the doctor to speak to her parents on her behalf.
meanings.example_cn: 她请医生代她同她父母谈谈。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who works on a telephone switchboard, who you can call for help
meanings.example: Hello, operator? Could you put me through to Room 31?
meanings.example_cn: 喂，接线员吗？请帮我接31号房间。

meanings.meaning_en: not considering yourself or your ideas to be as important as other people’s
meanings.example: a modest and humble man
meanings.example_cn: 一个谦卑的男人

meanings.meaning_en: a company that makes large quantities of goods
meanings.example: Read the manufacturer’s instructions before using your new dishwasher.
meanings.example_cn: 使用新洗碗机之前，请先阅读厂家的说明书。

meanings.meaning_en: a tall cup used for drinking tea, coffee etc
meanings.example: a coffee mug
meanings.example_cn: 一个咖啡杯

meanings.meaning_en: an animal that has horns on top of its head and long hair under its chin, and can climb steep hills and rocks. Goats live wild in the mountains or are kept as farm animals.
meanings.example: The tiger sprang on the goat.
meanings.example_cn: 老虎向山羊扑去。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation or system in which everyone is equal and has the right to vote, make decisions etc
meanings.example: a return to democracy after 16 years of military rule
meanings.example_cn: 16年军人统治后民主制度的恢复

meanings.meaning_en: to be a member of a group of people and act or speak on their behalf at an event, a meeting, etc.
meanings.example: Mr Kobayashi was chosen to represent the company at the conference.
meanings.example_cn: 小林先生被选中代表公司出席会议。

meanings.meaning_en: to make yourself or another person become used to a situation or place
meanings.example: She tried to accustom herself to the tight bandages.
meanings.example_cn: 她尝试着使自己习惯那些紧绷的绷带。

meanings.meaning_en: a large important town
meanings.example: The nearest big city was St. Louis.
meanings.example_cn: 最近的大城市是圣路易斯。

meanings.meaning_en: to have a bad effect on something so that it is no longer attractive, enjoyable, useful etc
meanings.example: The whole park is spoiled by litter.
meanings.example_cn: 整个公园环境都给垃圾破坏了。

meanings.meaning_en: a container made of paper, plastic, or cardboard that something is sold in
meanings.example: a packet of envelopes
meanings.example_cn: 一包信封

meanings.meaning_en: a solid thing that you can hold, touch, or see but that is not alive
meanings.example: an everyday object such as a spoon
meanings.example_cn: 调羹之类的日常用品

meanings.meaning_en: the number of times something happens, or the number of examples of something within a certain period
meanings.example: Immediately his heart rate (= the number of beats per minute ) increased.
meanings.example_cn: 他的心率立即加快了。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the US or its people
meanings.example: Her mother is American.
meanings.example_cn: 她妈妈是美国人。

meanings.meaning_en: someone from the US
meanings.example: a famous American writer
meanings.example_cn: 一位著名的美国作家

meanings.meaning_en: to use your hands to make something or someone move towards you or in the direction that your hands are moving
meanings.example: Mom! Davey’s pulling my hair!
meanings.example_cn: 妈妈! 戴维拽我的头发！

meanings.meaning_en: an act of using force to move something towards you or in the same direction that you are moving
meanings.example: He gave her a sharp pull forward.
meanings.example_cn: 他猛地把她往前一拉。

meanings.meaning_en: a combination of two or more different things, feelings, or types of people
meanings.example: The town is a mixture of the old and the new.
meanings.example_cn: 这个小城新旧结合。

meanings.meaning_en: the tenth month of the year, between September and November
meanings.example: Most seasonal hiring is done in early October.
meanings.example_cn: 多数季节性招聘是在10月初进行。

meanings.meaning_en: a grey bird with short legs that is common in cities
meanings.example: Many journalists here choose to pigeon all but the most innocuous of stories.
meanings.example_cn: 除了平淡乏味的报道，这儿的新闻记者将一切通过鸽子传递出去。

meanings.meaning_en: used when one situation is the opposite of another
meanings.example: American consumers prefer white eggs; conversely, British buyers like brown eggs.
meanings.example_cn: 美国的消费者喜欢白色的鸡蛋，而英国的消费者却相反，他们喜欢棕色的鸡蛋。

meanings.meaning_en: to do a calculation in which you add a number to itself a particular number of times
meanings.example: Children will learn to multiply in the second grade.
meanings.example_cn: 儿童在二年级学习乘法。

meanings.meaning_en: the legal ending of a marriage
meanings.example: Why doesn’t she get a divorce?
meanings.example_cn: 她为什么不离婚呢？

meanings.meaning_en: if someone divorces their husband or wife, or if two people divorce, they legally end their marriage
meanings.example: One in three marriages ends in divorce.
meanings.example_cn: 有三分之一的婚姻以离婚告终。

meanings.meaning_en: a flat piece of plastic, metal, or wood, with raised edges, used for carrying things such as plates, food etc
meanings.example: The waiter brought drinks on a tray.
meanings.example_cn: 服务员用托盘端来饮料。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is very different from something else
meanings.example: The sauce is quite sweet, so add dried thyme as a contrast.
meanings.example_cn: 这调味汁很甜，所以要加点干百里香作为陪衬。

meanings.meaning_en: crazy or very silly
meanings.example: He can’t possibly get that finished in time. He must be mad !
meanings.example_cn: 他不可能按时完成的。他一定是疯了！

meanings.meaning_en: when you decide not to have something valuable, in order to get something that is more important
meanings.example: The minister stressed the need for economic sacrifice.
meanings.example_cn: 部长强调了在经济上作出牺牲的必要性。

meanings.meaning_en: to willingly stop having something you want or doing something you like in order to get something more important
meanings.example: The workforce were willing to make sacrifices in order to preserve jobs.
meanings.example_cn: 雇员为了保住饭碗情愿作出牺牲。

meanings.meaning_en: if there are various things, there are several different types of that thing
meanings.example: The jacket is available in various colours.
meanings.example_cn: 这种夹克有好多种颜色可选。

meanings.meaning_en: used when you are talking about things such as substances, materials, or groups of objects when you do not know what they are called, or it is not important to say exactly what they are
meanings.example: I’ve got some sticky stuff on my shoe.
meanings.example_cn: 我鞋子上有什么黏糊糊的东西。

meanings.meaning_en: to push or put something into a small space, especially in a quick careless way
meanings.example: She stuffed two more sweaters into her bag.
meanings.example_cn: 她又往她的袋子里塞了两件毛线衫。

meanings.meaning_en: to depend on something in order to continue to live or exist
meanings.example: I knew I could rely on David.
meanings.example_cn: 我知道我可以信赖戴维。

meanings.meaning_en: a straight line from one side of a circle to the other side, passing through the centre of the circle, or the length of this line
meanings.example: Draw a circle six centimetres in diameter.
meanings.example_cn: 画一个直径为六厘米的圆。

meanings.meaning_en: the person who employs you or who is in charge of you at work
meanings.example: I’ll have to ask my boss for a day off.
meanings.example_cn: 我得向老板请一天假。

meanings.meaning_en: to tell people to do things, give them orders etc, especially when you have no authority to do it
meanings.example: Since I’m my own boss (=  I work for myself, rather than for an employer  ) , my hours are flexible.
meanings.example_cn: 我自己当老板，所以我的时间很灵活。

meanings.meaning_en: happening just before someone dies
meanings.example: It was her dying wish to have a simple burial.
meanings.example_cn: 她的临终遗愿是办个简朴的葬礼。

meanings.meaning_en: used to emphasize a statement or answer
meanings.example: The blood tests prove that Vince is indeed the father.
meanings.example_cn: 验血证明文斯确实是父亲。

meanings.meaning_en: not knowing facts or information that you ought to know
meanings.example: an ignorant and uneducated man
meanings.example_cn: 不学无术的人

meanings.meaning_en: sometimes, but not regularly and not often
meanings.example: Occasionally Alice would look up from her books.
meanings.example_cn: 艾丽斯偶尔会从书中抬起头来。

meanings.meaning_en: acceptable to people in a particular situation
meanings.example: a decent burial
meanings.example_cn: 得体的葬礼

meanings.meaning_en: belonging to or relating to people, especially as opposed to machines or animals
meanings.example: There are many different cell types in the human body .
meanings.example_cn: 人体中有许多种不同的细胞类型。

meanings.meaning_en: a person
meanings.example: the power of the human mind
meanings.example_cn: 人脑的威力

meanings.meaning_en: to shine brightly with flashing points of light
meanings.example: The river glittered in the sunlight.
meanings.example_cn: 阳光下河面波光粼粼。

meanings.meaning_en: brightness consisting of many flashing points of light
meanings.example: the glitter of his gold cigarette case
meanings.example_cn: 他那金烟盒发出的亮光

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of paper that you are given which shows that you have paid for something
meanings.example: Keep your receipt in case you want to bring it back.
meanings.example_cn: 保留收据以备退货之需。

meanings.meaning_en: an exciting experience in which dangerous or unusual things happen
meanings.example: Ahab’s adventures at sea
meanings.example_cn: 亚哈的海上历险

meanings.meaning_en: someone’s lover is the person they are having a sexual relationship with but who they are not married to
meanings.example: He killed his wife’s lover.
meanings.example_cn: 他杀了妻子的情人。

meanings.meaning_en: a baby or very young child
meanings.example: An infant’s skin is very sensitive.
meanings.example_cn: 幼儿的皮肤非常敏感。

meanings.meaning_en: intended for babies or very young children
meanings.example: infant formula milk
meanings.example_cn: 婴(幼)儿配方奶

meanings.meaning_en: covered with mud or containing mud
meanings.example: Take your boots off outside if they’re muddy.
meanings.example_cn: 要是靴子上都是泥，你就脱在门外吧。

meanings.meaning_en: an animal, especially a large or dangerous one
meanings.example: ...the threats our ancestors faced from wild beasts.
meanings.example_cn: …我们祖辈所面临的来自野兽的威胁。

meanings.meaning_en: difficult to see, hear, smell etc
meanings.example: a faint hope that they might be alive
meanings.example_cn: 他们渺茫的生还希望

meanings.meaning_en: a loud noise or a signal that warns people of danger or of a problem
meanings.example: She decided to sound the alarm (= warn people that the situation was dangerous) .
meanings.example_cn: 她决定发出警报。

meanings.meaning_en: behaviour and attitudes that most people in a society consider to be normal and right
meanings.example: Playing together teaches children social conventions such as sharing.
meanings.example_cn: 一起玩耍可教会儿童与人分享等社会常规。

meanings.meaning_en: likely to last for a long time without breaking or getting weaker
meanings.example: Wood is a durable material.
meanings.example_cn: 木头是耐用材料。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of furniture that you sleep on
meanings.example: You should go to bed early.
meanings.example_cn: 你应该早点上床。

meanings.meaning_en: without any sound, or not making any sound
meanings.example: The large house was silent and lonely.
meanings.example_cn: 这幢大房子寂静荒凉。

meanings.meaning_en: to think someone or something is unpleasant and not like them
meanings.example: Why do you dislike her so much?
meanings.example_cn: 你为什么那么讨厌她？

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of not liking someone or something
meanings.example: They took an instant dislike to each other (= they disliked each other immediately ) .
meanings.example_cn: 他俩立刻就互相讨厌对方了。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely or very much
meanings.example: All offers of help will be greatly appreciated .
meanings.example_cn: 如蒙帮助，感激不尽。

meanings.meaning_en: a sentence or phrase from a book, speech etc which you repeat in a speech or piece of writing because it is interesting or amusing
meanings.example: The following quotation is taken from a nineteenth century travel diary.
meanings.example_cn: 下文引自19世纪的一篇旅行日记。

meanings.meaning_en: used to show that you are disappointed about something and you wish things could happen differently
meanings.example: It’s a great pity Joyce wasn’t invited.
meanings.example_cn: 乔伊斯没有受到邀请太遗憾了。

meanings.meaning_en: to feel sorry for someone because they are in a very bad situation
meanings.example: I like Charlie. Pity he had to marry that awful woman.
meanings.example_cn: 我喜欢查利，遗憾的是他得和那个糟糕的女人结婚。

meanings.meaning_en: a band along or around the edge of something such as a picture or piece of material
meanings.example: writing paper with a black border
meanings.example_cn: 饰有黑边的信纸

meanings.meaning_en: a group of specialists who give their advice or opinion about sth; a group of people who discuss topics of interest on television or radio
meanings.example: He assembled a panel of scholars to advise him.
meanings.example_cn: 他集结了一个学者小组为他出谋划策。

meanings.meaning_en: to put paper or cloth over something to cover it
meanings.example: I’ve still got a few Christmas presents to wrap up.
meanings.example_cn: 我还有一些圣诞礼物要包起来。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of thick cloth that a woman wears around her shoulders
a way through something
meanings.example: My office is just along the passage.
meanings.example_cn: 我的办公室就在过道旁边。

meanings.meaning_en: to wake up, or to wake someone up
meanings.example: She gently wakened the sleeping child.
meanings.example_cn: 她轻轻地唤醒睡梦中的孩子。

meanings.meaning_en: to think that something is important, so that you are interested in it, worried about it etc
meanings.example: ‘He looked angry.’ ‘ I don’t care !’
meanings.example_cn: “他好像很生气。”“我不管！”

meanings.meaning_en: when you are careful to avoid damage, mistakes etc
meanings.example: She felt that nobody cared.
meanings.example_cn: 她觉得没有人在乎。

meanings.meaning_en: very large or important, when compared to other things or people of a similar kind
meanings.example: There are two major political parties in the US.
meanings.example_cn: 美国有两大政党。

meanings.meaning_en: the main subject that a student studies at college or university
meanings.example: The government’s major concern is with preventing road accidents.
meanings.example_cn: 政府关注的大事是预防道路交通事故。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to farming or gardening methods of growing food without using artificial chemicals, or produced or grown by these methods
meanings.example: Organic farming is better for the environment.
meanings.example_cn: 有机耕作对环境更有利。

meanings.meaning_en: not difficult to do, and not needing much effort
meanings.example: The test was easy.
meanings.example_cn: 考试很容易。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something better, or to become better
meanings.example: a course for students wishing to improve their English
meanings.example_cn: 为想提高英语水平的学生开设的一门课

meanings.meaning_en: hello
meanings.example: Hi! How are you?
meanings.example_cn: 嗨！你好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: light thin paper used for wrapping, packing etc
meanings.example: ...a small package wrapped in tissue paper.
meanings.example_cn: …一个小包裹，用薄棉纸包着。

meanings.meaning_en: very active, determined or full of energy
meanings.example: a vigorous young man
meanings.example_cn: 精力充沛的年轻男子

meanings.meaning_en: something that you imagine; your imagination
meanings.example: Oh, that was just a fancy of his.
meanings.example_cn: 啊，那只是他的异想天开。

meanings.meaning_en: the money that you earn from your work or that you receive from investments, the government etc
meanings.example: low-income families
meanings.example_cn: 低收入家庭

meanings.meaning_en: a join made by tying together two pieces or ends of string, rope, etc.
meanings.example: One lace had broken and been tied in a knot.
meanings.example_cn: 一根带子已经断了，被打成一个结。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of building things such as houses, bridges, roads etc
meanings.example: a road construction project
meanings.example_cn: 道路修建计划

meanings.meaning_en: to ask someone for information
meanings.example: ‘Why are you doing that?’ the boy inquired.
meanings.example_cn: “你为什么这么做？”男孩问道。

meanings.meaning_en: a very small piece of burning material produced by a fire or by hitting or rubbing two hard objects together
meanings.example: sparks from the fire
meanings.example_cn: 火里飞出的火星

meanings.meaning_en: moved to one side or away from you
meanings.example: He pushed his half-eaten salad aside and left.
meanings.example_cn: 他推开吃了一半的色拉走了。

meanings.meaning_en: a line of colour, especially one of several lines of colour all close together
meanings.example: a shirt with black and white stripes
meanings.example_cn: 黑白条纹衬衫

meanings.meaning_en: a machine that measures and shows the amount of something you have used or the amount of money that you must pay
meanings.example: A man came to read the electricity meter.
meanings.example_cn: 有个男的来抄电表。

meanings.meaning_en: happening or doing something often
meanings.example: Trains rushed past at frequent intervals.
meanings.example_cn: 火车频频驶过。

meanings.meaning_en: not mixed with anything else; with nothing added
meanings.example: rings made of pure gold
meanings.example_cn: 纯金制成的戒指

meanings.meaning_en: on or to the further side of something
meanings.example: They crossed the mountains and headed for the valleys beyond.
meanings.example_cn: 他们翻过山，向更远处的山谷进发。

meanings.meaning_en: very keen and excited about something that is going to happen or about something you want to do
meanings.example: He’s a bright kid and eager to learn.
meanings.example_cn: 他是个聪明的孩子，热爱学习。

meanings.meaning_en: a wild animal like a dog with reddish-brown fur, a pointed face, and a thick tail
meanings.example: The clever fox escaped the hunter.
meanings.example_cn: 伶俐的狐狸逃过了猎人的追捕。

meanings.meaning_en: a small unit of money in Britain. There are 100 pence in one pound.
meanings.example: The bus fare is 80 pence.
meanings.example_cn: 公共汽车费是80便士。

meanings.meaning_en: to form an opinion that something is probably true because of information that you have
meanings.example: I inferred from what she said that you have not been well.
meanings.example_cn: 我从她的话里推断出你身体一直不大好。

meanings.meaning_en: the hot mist that water produces when it is boiled
meanings.example: Steam rose from the hot tub.
meanings.example_cn: 水蒸气从热腾腾的浴缸里升起。

meanings.meaning_en: to send out steam
meanings.example: a mug of steaming hot coffee
meanings.example_cn: 一大杯热气腾腾的咖啡

meanings.meaning_en: a set of papers, records etc that contain information about a particular person or subject
meanings.example: We will keep your details on file (= store them for later use ) .
meanings.example_cn: 我们将把你的详细资料存档。

meanings.meaning_en: to keep papers, documents etc in a particular place so that you can find them easily
meanings.example: The contracts are filed alphabetically.
meanings.example_cn: 这些合同是按字母顺序归档的。

meanings.meaning_en: 12 o’clock at night
meanings.example: You can’t phone her now – it’s gone midnight (= after midnight ) !
meanings.example_cn: 你现在不能打电话给她，都过午夜了！

meanings.meaning_en: about or related to science, or using its methods
meanings.example: We believe in investing in scientific research.
meanings.example_cn: 我们相信科学研究的投资价值。

meanings.meaning_en: the thick dark liquid from under the ground from which petrol is produced
meanings.example: a rise in the price of oil
meanings.example_cn: 石油价格的上涨

meanings.meaning_en: to put oil onto part of a machine or part of something that moves, to help it to move or work more smoothly
meanings.example: the importance of protecting our oil supplies
meanings.example_cn: 保护我们石油供应的重要性

meanings.meaning_en: to officially tell someone what to do
meanings.example: Eva went straight to the hotel, as instructed (= as she had been told ).
meanings.example_cn: 伊娃按照指示径直去了宾馆。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you do to show publicly that you think that something is wrong and unfair, for example taking part in big public meetings, refusing to work, or refusing to buy a company’s products
meanings.example: Five thousand employees came out on strike in protest at the poor working conditions.
meanings.example_cn: 五千名雇员公开罢工，抗议恶劣的工作条件。

meanings.meaning_en: to come together to publicly express disapproval or opposition to something
meanings.example: Thousands of people blocked the street, protesting against the new legislation.
meanings.example_cn: 成千上万的人堵住了街道，抗议新法规。

meanings.meaning_en: a very serious disease in which cells in one part of the body start to grow in a way that is not normal
meanings.example: A lot of cancers can now be treated successfully.
meanings.example_cn: 现在许多癌症可以治愈。

meanings.meaning_en: immediately
meanings.example: All four victims died instantly.
meanings.example_cn: 四名受害人全部当即死亡。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to China, its people, or its language
meanings.example: Do you fancy going out for a Chinese?
meanings.example_cn: 你想不想出去吃顿中餐？

meanings.meaning_en: people from China
a way of dealing with a problem or making a bad situation better
meanings.example: The problems in our schools do not have a simple remedy.
meanings.example_cn: 我们学校的问题没有简单的解决办法。

meanings.meaning_en: to deal with a problem or improve a bad situation
meanings.example: To remedy the situation, the water must be chemically treated.
meanings.example_cn: 为了改善这种情况，水必须进行化学处理。

meanings.meaning_en: of a high standard or quality
meanings.example: a good hotel
meanings.example_cn: 一家不错的宾馆

meanings.meaning_en: a planned way of doing something, especially one that a lot of people know about and use
meanings.example: traditional teaching methods
meanings.example_cn: 传统的教学法

meanings.meaning_en: used to talk about the total amount of something that is received, paid, measured, or calculated in a month
meanings.example: a monthly salary of 850
meanings.example_cn: 850美元的月薪

meanings.meaning_en: every month or once a month
meanings.example: The mortgage is payable in monthly instalments.
meanings.example_cn: 抵押贷款每月分期偿还。

meanings.meaning_en: a series of thoughts, images, and feelings that you experience when you are asleep
meanings.example: I had lots of dreams last night.
meanings.example_cn: 昨晚我做了很多梦。

meanings.meaning_en: to have a dream while you are asleep
meanings.example: Her dream is to make a movie.
meanings.example_cn: 她的梦想是要拍一部电影。

meanings.meaning_en: to put a large quantity of something into a vehicle or container
meanings.example: Have you finished loading up?
meanings.example_cn: 你装完货了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a large quantity of something that is carried by a vehicle, person etc
meanings.example: It took an hour to load the van.
meanings.example_cn: 给小型货车装货花了一小时。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance such as coal, gas, or oil that can be burned to produce heat or energy
meanings.example: Coal is one of the cheapest fuels.
meanings.example_cn: 煤是最廉价的燃料之一。

meanings.meaning_en: if you fuel a vehicle, or if it fuels up, fuel is put into it
meanings.example: We’d better fuel up at the next town.
meanings.example_cn: 我们最好在下个小镇加油。

meanings.meaning_en: belonging to the present time or most recent time
meanings.example: Such companies must change if they are to compete in the modern world .
meanings.example_cn: 此类公司如果想在现代社会中与别人竞争，就必须有所改变。

meanings.meaning_en: happening often and to many people or in many places
meanings.example: Heart disease is one of the commonest causes of death.
meanings.example_cn: 心脏病是最常见的死因之一。

meanings.meaning_en: to advise someone to do something, especially because you have special knowledge of a situation or subject
meanings.example: Doctors strongly recommend that fathers should be present at their baby’s birth.
meanings.example_cn: 医生极力建议孩子出生时父亲应该在场。

meanings.meaning_en: to cause a particular result or effect
meanings.example: New drugs are producing remarkable results.
meanings.example_cn: 新药正在产生显著的效果。

meanings.meaning_en: a phrase or sentence that says exactly what a word, phrase, or idea means
meanings.example: a dictionary definition
meanings.example_cn: 词典里的释义

meanings.meaning_en: a very large strong building, built in the past as a safe place that could be easily defended against attack
meanings.example: Edinburgh Castle
meanings.example_cn: 爱丁堡城堡

meanings.meaning_en: having the highest position of power, importance, or influence
meanings.example: the Supreme Allied Commander in Europe
meanings.example_cn: 欧洲盟军最高指挥官

meanings.meaning_en: to speak or write to someone in order to get an answer, information, or a solution
meanings.example: ‘What’s your name?’ she asked.
meanings.example_cn: “你叫什么名字？”她问道 。

meanings.meaning_en: unable to speak
meanings.example: She was born deaf and dumb.
meanings.example_cn: 她天生又聋又哑。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of metal, sometimes containing jewels, that you fasten to your clothes to wear as a decoration
meanings.example: a diamond pin
meanings.example_cn: 一枚钻石胸针

meanings.meaning_en: to fasten something somewhere, or to join two things together, using a pin
meanings.example: He pinned the name tag on his jacket.
meanings.example_cn: 他把姓名牌别在自己的短外套上。

meanings.meaning_en: to succeed in achieving something after trying for a long time
meanings.example: More women are attaining positions of power.
meanings.example_cn: 越来越多的女性获得要职。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of hanging cloth that can be pulled across to cover a window, divide a room etc
meanings.example: red velvet curtains
meanings.example_cn: 红色的丝绒窗帘

meanings.meaning_en: to move or lift something to a higher position, place, or level
meanings.example: Can you raise the lamp so I can see?
meanings.example_cn: 你能把灯举高点好让我看清吗？

meanings.meaning_en: cloudy air near the ground which is difficult to see through
meanings.example: It will be a cold night, and there may be fog patches .
meanings.example_cn: 今夜天气寒冷，部分地区可能有雾。

meanings.meaning_en: badly decayed and no longer good to use
meanings.example: the smell of rotten eggs
meanings.example_cn: 坏鸡蛋的气味

meanings.meaning_en: mysterious events or situations are difficult to explain or understand
meanings.example: The police are investigating the mysterious deaths of children at the hospital.
meanings.example_cn: 警察正在调查这家医院的儿童神秘死亡事件。

meanings.meaning_en: a book in which you write down the things that happen to you each day
meanings.example: Inge kept a diary (= wrote in a diary ) during the war years.
meanings.example_cn: 英奇在战争年代里一直写日记。

meanings.meaning_en: to continue to live after an accident, war, or illness
meanings.example: When the market economy is introduced, many factories will not survive.
meanings.example_cn: 一旦推行市场经济，很多工厂将无法存活下去。

meanings.meaning_en: a vehicle with two wheels that you ride by pushing its pedals with your feet
meanings.example: Can James ride a bicycle yet?
meanings.example_cn: 詹姆斯会骑自行车了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a small tube of skin filled with a mixture of meat, spices etc, eaten hot or cold after it has been cooked
meanings.example: pork sausages
meanings.example_cn: 猪肉香肠

meanings.meaning_en: to use weapons, such as guns and bombs against an enemy in a war, etc.
meanings.example: The king hight them to attack the castle.
meanings.example_cn: 国王命令他们向城堡发起进攻。

meanings.meaning_en: an act of trying to kill or injure the enemy in war, using weapons such as guns and bombs
meanings.example: We reopened an attack against our enemy last week.
meanings.example_cn: 上周我们向敌人重新发动了一次进攻。

meanings.meaning_en: a tool that you use for cutting wood. It has a flat blade with an edge cut into many V shapes.
meanings.example: The only tools in the house are a hammer and a saw.
meanings.example_cn: 屋子里仅有的工具是一把锤子和一把锯。

meanings.meaning_en: to cut something using a saw
meanings.example: She was in the back yard sawing logs.
meanings.example_cn: 她在后院锯木头。

meanings.meaning_en: a sign, remark, event etc that shows what is happening, what someone is thinking or feeling, or what is true
meanings.example: Could you give me some indication as to when I am likely to receive a reply?
meanings.example_cn: 你能给我透露一下什么时候我能收到回复吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to try to do something, especially something difficult
meanings.example: Weather conditions prevented them from attempting the jump.
meanings.example_cn: 天气状况使他们无法尝试跳伞。

meanings.meaning_en: an act of trying to do something, especially something difficult
meanings.example: She passed her driving test at the first attempt.
meanings.example_cn: 她第一次考驾驶执照就通过了。

meanings.meaning_en: growing or used under the sea
meanings.example: submarine plant life
meanings.example_cn: 海生植物

meanings.meaning_en: a ship, especially a military one, that can stay under water
meanings.example: The captain dived his submarine deep to escape from the destroyers.
meanings.example_cn: ：海军上校使他的潜艇深深下潜以逃避驱逐艇。

meanings.meaning_en: an attempt, by a large number of people, to change the government of a country, especially by violent action
meanings.example: the French Revolution of 1789
meanings.example_cn: 1789年法国大革命

meanings.meaning_en: to or in a foreign country that is across the sea
meanings.example: Chris is going to work overseas.
meanings.example_cn: 克里斯要去国外工作。

meanings.meaning_en: coming from, existing in, or happening in a foreign country that is across the sea
meanings.example: Most applications came from overseas.
meanings.example_cn: 大部分申请来自海外。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or from the eastern part of the world, especially China and Japan
meanings.example: a beautiful oriental rug
meanings.example_cn: 漂亮的东方地毯

meanings.meaning_en: used to say who is intended to get or use something, or where something is intended to be used
meanings.example: I’ve got a present for you.
meanings.example_cn: 我有件礼物送给你。

meanings.meaning_en: to use machines to make goods or materials, usually in large numbers or amounts
meanings.example: the company that manufactured the drug
meanings.example_cn: 生产这种药的公司

meanings.meaning_en: the process of making goods or materials using machines, usually in large numbers or amounts
meanings.example: manufactured goods
meanings.example_cn: 工业品，制成品

meanings.meaning_en: physically strong and not likely to become ill or weak
meanings.example: a healthy baby boy
meanings.example_cn: 健康的男婴

meanings.meaning_en: many, or involving many things, people, events etc
meanings.example: Baxter was rushed to the hospital with multiple stab wounds.
meanings.example_cn: 巴克斯特因多处刺伤被紧急送往医院。

meanings.meaning_en: an adult male chicken
meanings.example: A cock crowed in the distance.
meanings.example_cn: 远处有只公鸡在打鸣。

meanings.meaning_en: a woman who performs in a play or film
meanings.example: She's not only a great dramatic actress but she's also very funny.
meanings.example_cn: 她不仅是一位伟大的女戏剧演员，而且也很幽默。

meanings.meaning_en: a narrow band of strong material that is used to fasten, hang, or hold onto something
meanings.example: The strap of my bag is broken.
meanings.example_cn: 我包上的带子断了。

meanings.meaning_en: to fasten something or someone in place with one or more straps
meanings.example: soldiers with grenades strapped to their belts
meanings.example_cn: 腰带上绑着手榴弹的士兵

meanings.meaning_en: relating to trade, in-dustry, and the management of money
meanings.example: Economic growth is slow.
meanings.example_cn: 经济增长缓慢。

meanings.meaning_en: a way of solving a problem or dealing with a difficult situation
meanings.example: The best solution would be for them to separate.
meanings.example_cn: 最好的解决方法是他们分开。

meanings.meaning_en: a large curved container with a flat top and bottom, made of wood or metal, and used for storing beer, wine etc
meanings.example: The wine is aged in oak barrels.
meanings.example_cn: 这种葡萄酒是用橡木酒桶放陈的。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of your body at the end of your arm, including your fingers and thumb, that you use to hold things
meanings.example: Steve gripped the steering wheel tightly with both hands.
meanings.example_cn: 史蒂夫双手紧握方向盘。

meanings.meaning_en: to some degree, but not completely
meanings.example: The poor weather was partly responsible for the crash.
meanings.example_cn: 天气不好是造成坠机事故的部分原因。

meanings.meaning_en: an animal’s foot that has nails or claws
meanings.example: a lion’s paw
meanings.example_cn: 狮爪

meanings.meaning_en: to push something over without intending to
meanings.example: He upset a bowl of soup.
meanings.example_cn: 他打翻了一碗汤。

meanings.meaning_en: to make sb/sth experience sth unpleasant
meanings.example: The government's political and economic reforms threaten to plunge the country into chaos.
meanings.example_cn: 该政府的政治和经济改革有可能使这个国家陷入混乱之中。

meanings.meaning_en: a wound or damage to part of your body caused by an accident or attack
meanings.example: She was taken to hospital with serious head injuries.
meanings.example_cn: 她头部受重伤被送到医院。

meanings.meaning_en: if something that you try to do is hopeless, there is no possibility of it being successful
meanings.example: We tried to stop the flames from spreading, but we knew it was hopeless.
meanings.example_cn: 我们试图阻止火势蔓延，但我们知道这是不可能的。

meanings.meaning_en: to leave a place when someone is trying to catch you or stop you, or when there is a dangerous situation
meanings.example: He broke down the locked door and escaped.
meanings.example_cn: 他砸开上锁的门，逃走了。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of getting away from a place, or a dangerous or bad situation
meanings.example: Vents allow any steam to escape if the system overheats.
meanings.example_cn: 如果系统过热，排放口可使蒸汽逸出。

meanings.meaning_en: the study of the nature and meaning of existence, truth, good and evil, etc
meanings.example: Emma studies philosophy at university.
meanings.example_cn: 埃玛在大学攻读哲学。

meanings.meaning_en: to become very successful or very strong and healthy
meanings.example: plants that thrive in tropical rain forests
meanings.example_cn: 在热带雨林蓬勃生长的植物

meanings.meaning_en: a man whose job is to stop fires burning
meanings.example: Would you like to be a fireman?
meanings.example_cn: 你愿意是一名消防队员吗？

meanings.meaning_en: very
meanings.example: It’s awfully cold in here. Is the heater on?
meanings.example_cn: 这儿非常冷，取暖器开了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: having a bright yellow colour like gold
meanings.example: golden hair
meanings.example_cn: 金发

meanings.meaning_en: connected with knowledge of how machines work
meanings.example: Our staff will be available to give you technical support .
meanings.example_cn: 有我们的员工向你提供技术支持。

meanings.meaning_en: a long pointed orange vegetable that grows under the ground
meanings.example: grated carrots
meanings.example_cn: 磨碎的胡萝卜

meanings.meaning_en: about or relating to
meanings.example: calls from young children concerning lost pets
meanings.example_cn: 小孩子打来的有关宠物走失的电话

meanings.meaning_en: a large amount or number
meanings.example: We’ve spent a lot on the children’s education.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在孩子的教育上花费甚多。

meanings.meaning_en: to choose sb/sth by lot
meanings.example: ‘How many CDs have you got?’ ‘Lots.’
meanings.example_cn: “你有多少张CD？”“多着呢。”

meanings.meaning_en: not likely to happen
meanings.example: Donna might be able to come tomorrow, but it’s very unlikely.
meanings.example_cn: 唐娜明天也许能来，不过这可能性很小。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who deliberately says things which are not true
meanings.example: Are you calling me a liar?
meanings.example_cn: 你是说我在撒谎？

meanings.meaning_en: a group of people who are related to each other, especially a mother, a father, and their children
meanings.example: Do you know the family next door?
meanings.example_cn: 你认识隔壁那家人吗？

meanings.meaning_en: long grass that has been cut and dried, used as food for cattle
meanings.example: bales of hay.
meanings.example_cn: 中文例句: 一捆捆的干草。

meanings.meaning_en: continuous feelings of worry about your work or personal life, that prevent you from relaxing
meanings.example: Your headaches are due to stress.
meanings.example_cn: 你的头痛是压力造成的。

meanings.meaning_en: to emphasize a statement, fact, or idea
meanings.example: Janet’s been under a lot of stress since her mother’s illness.
meanings.example_cn: 珍妮特自从母亲生病以来承受了很大的压力。

meanings.meaning_en: a large number of people or things
meanings.example: Among his many hobbies was the breeding of fine horses.
meanings.example_cn: 在他的众多爱好中有饲养名马。

meanings.meaning_en: many people
meanings.example: The printing press gave power to a few to change the world for the many.
meanings.example_cn: 印刷机赋予了少数人为多数人改变世界的力量。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you hope to achieve in the future
meanings.example: Your goal as a parent is to help your child become an independent adult.
meanings.example_cn: 身为父母，你的目标就是要培养孩子成为独立的成年人。

meanings.meaning_en: not clear or exact
meanings.example: Teachers find the report’s terminology so indefinite that it is confusing.
meanings.example_cn: 老师们发现报告的专门用语含义不明确，令人费解。

meanings.meaning_en: on the inside or close to the centre of something
meanings.example: an inner room
meanings.example_cn: 内室

meanings.meaning_en: a large strong animal with thick fur, that eats flesh, fruit, and insects
meanings.example: a mother bear and her cubs
meanings.example_cn: 母熊和它的熊崽们

meanings.meaning_en: a woman or child who is pretty has a nice attractive face
meanings.example: a pretty little girl
meanings.example_cn: 漂亮的小姑娘

meanings.meaning_en: as a result of something that has just been mentioned
meanings.example: Their car was bigger and therefore more comfortable.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的车大些，所以更舒适些。

meanings.meaning_en: a bird that is like a duck but is larger and makes loud noises
meanings.example: roast goose
meanings.example_cn: 烤鹅

meanings.meaning_en: if you cannot afford to do something, you must not do it because it could cause serious problems for you
meanings.example: We can’t afford to wait any longer or we’ll miss the plane.
meanings.example_cn: 我们再也不能等下去了，否则会赶不上飞机的。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is being taught, especially a child
meanings.example: About 20 pupils study music here.
meanings.example_cn: 大约20名小学生在这里学习音乐。

meanings.meaning_en: a place on a farm where milk is kept and butter and cheese are made
meanings.example: In my childhood, local dairies bought milk from local farmers.
meanings.example_cn: 在我小时候，本地的乳品公司向当地农场主收购牛奶。

meanings.meaning_en: made from milk
meanings.example: dairy products/produce
meanings.example_cn: 乳制品；奶类产品

meanings.meaning_en: the real or imaginary line that marks the edge of a state, country etc, or the edge of an area of land that belongs to someone
meanings.example: National boundaries are becoming increasingly meaningless in the global economy.
meanings.example_cn: 在全球经济中，国界已经变得越来越没有意义。

meanings.meaning_en: If you do something or if something happens afterward, you do it or it happens after a particular event or time that has already been mentioned
meanings.example: Shortly afterward, police arrested four suspects.
meanings.example_cn: 之后不久，警方逮捕了４名嫌疑犯。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who likes a particular sport or performing art very much, or who admires a famous person
meanings.example: Groups of football fans began heading towards the ground.
meanings.example_cn: 成群结队的球迷开始向球场走去。

meanings.meaning_en: when people vote to choose someone for an official position
meanings.example: The Labour Party won the 2001 election by a huge majority.
meanings.example_cn: 工党在2001年选举中以巨大优势获胜。

meanings.meaning_en: the grain that bread is made from, or the plant that it grows on
meanings.example: a field of wheat
meanings.example_cn: 小麦地

meanings.meaning_en: a living thing that has leaves and roots and grows in earth, especially one that is smaller than a tree
meanings.example: Don’t forget to water the plants.
meanings.example_cn: 别忘记给植物浇水。

meanings.meaning_en: to put plants or seeds in the ground to grow
meanings.example: a huge chemical plant
meanings.example_cn: 一座大型化工厂

meanings.meaning_en: one side of a piece of paper in a book, newspaper, document etc, or the sheet of paper itself
meanings.example: The full address is given on page 15.
meanings.example_cn: 详细地址见第15页。

meanings.meaning_en: without being affected or prevented by something
meanings.example: We went out in spite of the rain.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管下着雨，我们还是出去了。

meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately annoy or upset someone
meanings.example: Kelly loved her husband in spite of the fact that he drank too much.
meanings.example_cn: 虽然丈夫酗酒，凯莉仍然爱着他。

meanings.meaning_en: the way in which two people or two groups feel about each other and behave towards each other
meanings.example: I have quite a good relationship with my parents.
meanings.example_cn: 我和父母关系很好。

meanings.meaning_en: one of a number of small round green or purple fruits that grow together on a  vine . Grapes are often used for making wine
meanings.example: a bunch of grapes
meanings.example_cn: 一串葡萄

meanings.meaning_en: to stop someone from doing something, often by using physical force
meanings.example: I had to restrain her from running out into the street.
meanings.example_cn: 我只得阻止她跑到街上去。

meanings.meaning_en: the length, height, width, depth, or diameter of something
meanings.example: a rectangle with the dimensions 5cm × 2cm
meanings.example_cn: 长五厘米、宽两厘米的长方形

meanings.meaning_en: a small round plate that curves up at the edges, that you put a cup on
meanings.example: a china cup and saucer
meanings.example_cn: 一套瓷茶杯和杯托

meanings.meaning_en: someone who regularly watches or pays attention to particular things, events, situations etc
meanings.example: political observers
meanings.example_cn: 政治观察员

meanings.meaning_en: a man who is admired for doing something extremely brave
meanings.example: He had dared to speak out against injustice, and overnight he became a national hero .
meanings.example_cn: 他敢于站出来抨击不公正的现象，一夜之间就成了国家英雄。

meanings.meaning_en: when something happens, there is an event, especially one that is not planned
meanings.example: When did the accident happen?
meanings.example_cn: 事故什么时候发生的？

meanings.meaning_en: to hit sb/sth with your foot
meanings.example: He kicked the door hard.
meanings.example_cn: 他用力踢门。

meanings.meaning_en: a movement with the foot or the leg, usually to hit sth with the foot
meanings.example: The boys were kicking a ball around in the yard.
meanings.example_cn: 男孩们在院子里踢球。

meanings.meaning_en: a fast plane with a jet engine
meanings.example: He owns a private jet.
meanings.example_cn: 他拥有一架私人喷气式飞机。

meanings.meaning_en: the science that is concerned with studying the structure of substances and the way that they change or combine with each other
meanings.example: inorganic/organic chemistry
meanings.example_cn: 无机 / 有机化学

meanings.meaning_en: a process by which two or more things affect each other
meanings.example: the complex interaction between mind and body
meanings.example_cn: 身心之间复杂的相互作用

meanings.meaning_en: something that is very bad or harmful
meanings.example: She wanted to protect her children from the evils of the outside world.
meanings.example_cn: 她想保护她的孩子不受外界的不良影响。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is evil deliberately does very cruel things to harm other people
meanings.example: Poverty is one of the greatest social evils of our time.
meanings.example_cn: 贫困是当代最大的社会弊端之一。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who officially introduces or supports a proposal for a new law
meanings.example: the sponsor of the new immigration bill
meanings.example_cn: 新移民法案的倡议者

meanings.meaning_en: to introduce a proposal for a new law, etc.
meanings.example: The bill was sponsored by a Labour MP.
meanings.example_cn: 这项议案是一位工党议员提交的。

meanings.meaning_en: a long loose piece of clothing worn for special ceremonies by judges, teachers, lawyers, and members of universities
meanings.example: a graduation gown
meanings.example_cn: 毕业礼服

meanings.meaning_en: the act of firing a gun; the sound this makes
meanings.example: He shot all his bullets, but no one hit.
meanings.example_cn: 他射出了所有的子弹却没有一发命中。

meanings.meaning_en: cheerful and excited
meanings.example: She felt excited and quite gay.
meanings.example_cn: 她感到兴奋而快活。

meanings.meaning_en: something that makes it difficult to achieve some­thing
meanings.example: The tax puts obstacles in the way of companies trying to develop trade overseas.
meanings.example_cn: 这项税收为想在海外发展贸易的公司设置了障碍。

meanings.meaning_en: at a time in the future or in the past, although you do not know exactly when
meanings.example: We’ll take a vacation sometime in September.
meanings.example_cn: 我们将在 9 月份的某个时候休假。

meanings.meaning_en: good enough for a particular purpose
meanings.example: His progress this term has been satisfactory.
meanings.example_cn: 他这学期的进步令人满意。

meanings.meaning_en: more than usual or more than others
meanings.example: Steve was in a particularly bad mood when he got back.
meanings.example_cn: 史蒂夫回来时情绪特别不好。

meanings.meaning_en: to share things among a group of people, especially in a planned way
meanings.example: a man distributing leaflets to passers-by
meanings.example_cn: 一个向路人派发传单的男子

meanings.meaning_en: why something happens, or why someone does something
meanings.example: She has reason to feel guilty.
meanings.example_cn: 她有理由感到内疚。

meanings.meaning_en: to form a particular judgment about a situation after carefully considering the facts
meanings.example: the human power of reason
meanings.example_cn: 人类的理性

meanings.meaning_en: to go across; to pass or stretch from one side to the other
meanings.example: He raised his arms in triumph as he crossed the line for his 100-metres win.
meanings.example_cn: 他以胜利的姿态高举双手跑过终点线，赢得了这场百米赛。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of gradually becoming bigger, better, stronger, or more advanced
meanings.example: child development
meanings.example_cn: 儿童发育

meanings.meaning_en: having a sharp acid taste, like the taste of a lemon or a fruit that is not ready to be eaten
meanings.example: Rachel sampled the wine. It was sour.
meanings.example_cn: 雷切尔尝了尝葡萄酒，是酸的。

meanings.meaning_en: something that causes problems, or that makes someone or something less likely to be successful or effective
meanings.example: Criminal behaviour can be linked to economic disadvantage.
meanings.example_cn: 犯罪行为可能会与经济困难有关。

meanings.meaning_en: to become red in the face, for example when you are angry or embarrassed
meanings.example: Susan flushed deeply and looked away.
meanings.example_cn: 苏珊脸涨得通红，目光转向别处。

meanings.meaning_en: small and not very important or serious, especially when compared with other things
meanings.example: We have made some minor changes to the program.
meanings.example_cn: 我们对那个程序做了一些小改动。

meanings.meaning_en: strong cloth used to make bags, tents, shoes etc
meanings.example: a canvas bag
meanings.example_cn: 帆布包

meanings.meaning_en: relating to medicine and the treatment of disease or injury
meanings.example: medical research
meanings.example_cn: 医学研究

meanings.meaning_en: using money, time, goods etc carefully and without wasting any
meanings.example: A small car is more economical to run.
meanings.example_cn: 开小型汽车比较省油。

meanings.meaning_en: used as the past tense of ‘can’ to say what someone was able to do or was allowed to do in the past
meanings.example: By the time she was eight, she could read Greek and Latin.
meanings.example_cn: 她八岁时就会读希腊文和拉丁文了。

meanings.meaning_en: to treat a group of people unfairly or cruelly, and prevent them from having the same rights that other people in society have
meanings.example: native tribes oppressed by the authorities
meanings.example_cn: 受到当局压迫的土著部落

meanings.meaning_en: quick to notice and understand things
meanings.example: Simon’s vague manner concealed an acute mind.
meanings.example_cn: 西蒙貌似蒙昧，其实头脑灵活。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the Latin language
meanings.example: a Latin inscription
meanings.example_cn: 拉丁语碑文

meanings.meaning_en: the language used in ancient Rome
having an uneven surface
meanings.example: Her hands were rough from hard work.
meanings.example_cn: 她的双手因为干重活而变得很粗糙。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who buys and sells goods in large quantities
meanings.example: the son of a wealthy merchant
meanings.example_cn: 一名富商的儿子

meanings.meaning_en: used to refer to all the people or things in a group apart from the one you have already men­tioned or the one that is already known about
meanings.example: The other hotels are all full.
meanings.example_cn: 其他的宾馆均已客满。

meanings.meaning_en: supporting new or modern ideas and methods, especially in politics and education
meanings.example: a progressive administration
meanings.example_cn: 进步的政府

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone who is ill become healthy again, especially by using natural powers or prayer
meanings.example: a preacher who claims that he can heal the sick
meanings.example_cn: 自称可以治病的传道士

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which people or organizations try to be more successful than other people or organizations
meanings.example: Competition for the job was intense.
meanings.example_cn: 该职位竞争很激烈。

meanings.meaning_en: the place where a trial is held, or the people there, especially the judge and the jury who examine the evidence and decide whether someone is guilty or not guilty
meanings.example: It could not be proved in a court of law.
meanings.example_cn: 这无法在法庭上证实。

meanings.meaning_en: to take liquid into your mouth and swallow it
meanings.example: You should drink plenty of water.
meanings.example_cn: 你应该大量喝水。

meanings.meaning_en: liquid that you can drink
meanings.example: What would you like to drink?
meanings.example_cn: 你想喝点什么？

meanings.meaning_en: a round object that is thrown, kicked, or hit in a game or sport
meanings.example: a tennis/golf/cricket etc ball
meanings.example_cn: 网球/高尔夫球/板球等

meanings.meaning_en: to make the necessary arrangements so that an activity can happen effectively
meanings.example: The course was organized by a training company.
meanings.example_cn: 这一课程是由一家培训公司组织的。

meanings.meaning_en: to stay in the same place without moving away
meanings.example: The refugees were allowed to remain in the UK.
meanings.example_cn: 难民获准留在英国。

meanings.meaning_en: information that is clearly arranged in the form of a simple picture, set of figures,  graph  etc, or a piece of paper with this information on it
meanings.example: a chart showing last year’s sales
meanings.example_cn: 显示去年销售情况的一份图表

meanings.meaning_en: an act of interfering
meanings.example: Industrial relations should be free from state interference.
meanings.example_cn: 劳资关系应不受政府干预。

meanings.meaning_en: a place in a port where ships are loaded, unloaded, or repaired
meanings.example: A crowd was waiting at the dock to greet them.
meanings.example_cn: 一群人在码头等着迎接他们。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of heavy metal that is lowered to the bottom of the sea, a lake etc to prevent a ship or boat moving
meanings.example: We dropped anchor a few yards offshore.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在离岸几码远的地方抛锚停航。

meanings.meaning_en: to lower the anchor on a ship or boat to hold it in one place
meanings.example: The next morning, they weighed anchor (=  lifted the anchor  ) and began to move south again.
meanings.example_cn: 第二天早上他们起锚，又开始向南航行。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the two round raised parts on a woman’s chest that produce milk when she has a baby
meanings.example: These bras are specially designed for women with large breasts.
meanings.example_cn: 这些胸罩专为乳房丰满的女性设计。

meanings.meaning_en: to quickly look at someone or something
meanings.example: Wyatt glanced around the restaurant.
meanings.example_cn: 怀亚特环视了一下餐馆。

meanings.meaning_en: a quick look
meanings.example: Emily glanced over her shoulder.
meanings.example_cn: 埃米莉回头看了一眼。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially tell people about something, especially about a plan or a decision
meanings.example: They announced their engagement in ‘The Times’.
meanings.example_cn: 他们在《泰晤士报》上宣布了订婚的消息。

meanings.meaning_en: to begin to take part in an activity that other people are involved in
meanings.example: Many sacrificed their weekend to join the hunt for the missing girl.
meanings.example_cn: 许多人牺牲周末时间，加入了寻找失踪女孩的行动。

meanings.meaning_en: having very little money and not many possessions
meanings.example: Her family were so poor they couldn’t afford to buy her new clothes.
meanings.example_cn: 她家穷得甚至买不起新衣服给她。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of looking at sth for information
meanings.example: Keep their price list on file for future reference (= so that it can be looked at in the future ) ..
meanings.example_cn: 将他们的价目表存档，以供日后参考。

meanings.meaning_en: to remove something that has been written down or stored in a computer
meanings.example: His name was deleted from the list.
meanings.example_cn: 他的名字从名单上删掉了。

meanings.meaning_en: to change food that you have just eaten into substances that your body can use
meanings.example: Most babies can digest a wide range of food easily.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数婴儿能轻易地消化很多种食物。

meanings.meaning_en: a short piece of writing that gives the most important facts from a book, report etc
meanings.example: I struggled to digest the news.
meanings.example_cn: 我费力地琢磨着那条新闻。

meanings.meaning_en: very large in amount or degree
meanings.example: The movie was a great success.
meanings.example_cn: 这部影片大获成功。

meanings.meaning_en: a dry brown fruit inside a hard shell, that grows on a tree
meanings.example: a pine nut
meanings.example_cn: 松子

meanings.meaning_en: a metal weapon which shoots bullets or shells
meanings.example: I’ve never fired a gun in my life.
meanings.example_cn: 我这辈子从来没开过枪。

meanings.meaning_en: to strongly suggest that someone does something
meanings.example: The charity urged quick action.
meanings.example_cn: 慈善机构敦促迅速采取行动。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong wish or need
meanings.example: He urged her forward, his hand under her elbow.
meanings.example_cn: 他托着她的胳膊肘，推她往前走。

meanings.meaning_en: used to connect two statements or phrases when the second one adds something different or seems surprising after the first one
meanings.example: It’s an old car, but it’s very reliable.
meanings.example_cn: 这是一辆旧车，但是性能非常可靠。

meanings.meaning_en: it is morally right to do a particular thing or that it is morally right for a particular situation to exist, especially when giving or asking for advice or opinions.
meanings.example: Basically the system ought to have worked.
meanings.example_cn: 其实这套系统本应发挥作用的。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is impossible cannot happen or be done
meanings.example: ‘I want to speak to Mr Franks.’ ‘I’m afraid that’s impossible.’
meanings.example_cn: “我想和弗兰克斯先生谈谈。”“恐怕不行。”

meanings.meaning_en: something that is real is actually what it seems to be and not false or artificial
meanings.example: She had never seen a real live elephant before.
meanings.example_cn: 她以前从未见过活生生的大象。

meanings.meaning_en: the number of points that each team or player has won in a game or competition
meanings.example: At half-time the score was one all.
meanings.example_cn: 半场时的比分是一比一。

meanings.meaning_en: to plan or invent a new way of doing something
meanings.example: She devised a method for quicker communications between offices.
meanings.example_cn: 她想出一种加快办公室之间通信联络的方法。

meanings.meaning_en: the tools, machines etc that you need to do a particular job or activity
meanings.example: a shop selling camping equipment
meanings.example_cn: 出售露营装备的商店

meanings.meaning_en: good things that happen to you by chance
meanings.example: You’re not having much luck today, are you?
meanings.example_cn: 你今天运气不太好，是不是？

meanings.meaning_en: completely and in every way
meanings.example: He made his reasons for resigning absolutely clear.
meanings.example_cn: 他把辞职的理由讲得一清二楚。

meanings.meaning_en: a line of people waiting to enter a building, buy something etc, or a line of vehicles waiting to move
meanings.example: You’ll have to join the queue.
meanings.example_cn: 你得排队。

meanings.meaning_en: to form or join a line of people or vehicles waiting to do something or go somewhere
meanings.example: Some of the people queuing for tickets had been there since dawn.
meanings.example_cn: 购票队伍中有些人天刚亮就来了。

meanings.meaning_en: happening in or relating to the countryside, not the city
meanings.example: a rural setting
meanings.example_cn: 乡村环境

meanings.meaning_en: a building that belongs to a company or organization, with rooms where people can work at desks
meanings.example: The department occupies an office just a mile from the White House.
meanings.example_cn: 该部门就在离白宫一英里远的地方有个办公楼。

meanings.meaning_en: a part of your body that is sore is painful, because of infection or because you have used a muscle too much
meanings.example: I had a sore throat and aching limbs.
meanings.example_cn: 我喉咙疼，四肢酸痛。

meanings.meaning_en: a painful, often red, place on your body caused by a wound or infection
meanings.example: Mac’s still sore because I didn’t invite him.
meanings.example_cn: 马克还在因为我没邀请他而生气呢。

meanings.meaning_en: to think wrongly that a person or thing is someone or something else
meanings.example: People might well confuse the two products.
meanings.example_cn: 人们很容易混淆这两种产品。

meanings.meaning_en: the area around you or around a particular place, or the people who live there
meanings.example: Be quiet! You’ll wake up the whole neighbourhood!
meanings.example_cn: 安静点！ 你会把邻居全都吵醒的！

meanings.meaning_en: relating to Japan, its people, or its language
meanings.example: a Japanese car
meanings.example_cn: 日本(汽)车

meanings.meaning_en: people from Japan
meanings.example: At least three British golf courses are now owned by the Japanese.
meanings.example_cn: 现在英国至少有3家高尔夫球场为日本人所有。

meanings.meaning_en: to do or provide what is necessary or needed
meanings.example: There is little doubt that the scheme fulfils a need for our community.
meanings.example_cn: 毫无疑问，这计划会满足我们社区的需求。

meanings.meaning_en: a sweet brown food that you can eat as a sweet or use in cooking to give foods such as cakes a special sweet taste
meanings.example: a chocolate bar
meanings.example_cn: 巧克力条

meanings.meaning_en: a common farm bird that is kept for its meat and eggs
meanings.example: Lionel built a coop so that they could raise chickens and have a supply of fresh eggs.
meanings.example_cn: 莱昂内尔搭建了一个鸡笼，这样他们就可以养鸡，得到新鲜鸡蛋。

meanings.meaning_en: not very great in amount, number, ability etc
meanings.example: My knowledge of the business is limited.
meanings.example_cn: 我对这一行了解有限。

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring distance, equal to 1,000 metres
meanings.example: He was a kilometre out from home when the storm struck.
meanings.example_cn: 暴风雨袭来时他离家有一公里远。

meanings.meaning_en: not joined to or touching something else
meanings.example: The gym and the sauna are in separate buildings.
meanings.example_cn: 健身房和桑拿浴室在不同的大楼里。

meanings.meaning_en: the land and buildings of a university or college, including the buildings where students live
meanings.example: a beautiful campus in New England
meanings.example_cn: 新英格兰的一个美丽校园

meanings.meaning_en: a cover for a bed, usually made of wool
meanings.example: She huddled herself in the blanket.
meanings.example_cn: 她用毯子紧紧裹住自己。

meanings.meaning_en: very often or many times
meanings.example: He was frequently drunk.
meanings.example_cn: 他经常喝醉。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment that measures the temperature of the air, of your body etc
meanings.example: The thermometer registered over 100˚C.
meanings.example_cn: 温度计显示高于100摄氏度。

meanings.meaning_en: used to emphasize that sth exists or is definitely true
meanings.example: There is undoubtedly a great deal of truth in what he says.
meanings.example_cn: 他所说的的确大部分都是实情。

meanings.meaning_en: a time when people buy and sell goods, food etc, or the place, usually outside or in a large building, where this happens
meanings.example: I usually buy all my vegetables at the market.
meanings.example_cn: 我通常都是在菜市场里购买蔬菜。

meanings.meaning_en: of more than average size or amount
meanings.example: a big house
meanings.example_cn: 大房子

meanings.meaning_en: one of two equal parts of something
meanings.example: Two halves make a whole.
meanings.example_cn: 两个一半构成一个整体。

meanings.meaning_en: exactly or about 50% (1/2) of an amount, time, distance, number etc
meanings.example: Only half the guests had arrived by seven o’clock.
meanings.example_cn: 7点钟前只来了一半客人。

meanings.meaning_en: the flat cutting part of a tool or weapon
meanings.example: a razor blade
meanings.example_cn: 剃刀刀片

meanings.meaning_en: frightened because you think that you may get hurt or that something bad may happen
meanings.example: There’s no need to be afraid.
meanings.example_cn: 没有必要害怕。

meanings.meaning_en: a building in which films are shown
meanings.example: It’s on at the local cinema.
meanings.example_cn: 此片正在当地影院上映。

meanings.meaning_en: firm, hard, or difficult to bend
meanings.example: a shirt with a stiff collar
meanings.example_cn: 领子挺括的衬衫

meanings.meaning_en: someone who works in a library
meanings.example: The new librarian is a friend of mine.
meanings.example_cn: 这位新来的图书管理员是我的朋友。

meanings.meaning_en: an object that produces light by using electricity, oil, or gas
meanings.example: She switched on the bedside lamp.
meanings.example_cn: 她打开了床头灯。

meanings.meaning_en: angry and deliberately unfriendly towards someone, and ready to argue with them
meanings.example: Southampton fans gave their former coach a hostile reception .
meanings.example_cn: 南安普敦队的球迷对球队的前任教练很不友善。

meanings.meaning_en: a long thin mark on a piece of paper, the ground, or another surface
meanings.example: Draw a straight line across the top of the page.
meanings.example_cn: 在这一页的上方画一条直线。

meanings.meaning_en: large in size, amount, or degree
meanings.example: The house stands in extensive grounds.
meanings.example_cn: 这栋房子占地面积很大。

meanings.meaning_en: to risk money on the result of a race, game, competition, or other future event
meanings.example: How much do you want to bet?
meanings.example_cn: 你想赌多少钱？

meanings.meaning_en: an agreement to risk money on the result of a race, game etc or on something happening, or the money that you risk
meanings.example: a £50 bet
meanings.example_cn: 50英镑的赌注

meanings.meaning_en: to show that something is true by providing facts, information etc
meanings.example: You’re wrong, and I can prove it.
meanings.example_cn: 你错了，我可以证明。

meanings.meaning_en: to move slowly from one side to another
meanings.example: The trees swayed gently in the breeze.
meanings.example_cn: 树木在和风中轻轻摇曳。

meanings.meaning_en: a railway engine
meanings.example: steam/diesel/electric locomotives
meanings.example_cn: 蒸汽 / 内燃 / 电力机车

meanings.meaning_en: from one place on something such as a line, road, or edge towards the other end of it
meanings.example: We were driving along Follyfoot Road.
meanings.example_cn: 我们沿着福莱福特路行驶。

meanings.meaning_en: going forward
meanings.example: She glanced anxiously along the line of faces.
meanings.example_cn: 她焦急地扫视着这一排面孔。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment that food is cooked inside, shaped like a metal box with a door on the front
meanings.example: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees C.
meanings.example_cn: 把烤箱预热至200摄氏度。

meanings.meaning_en: to put someone who has died in a  grave
meanings.example: He was buried in the churchyard of St Mary’s.
meanings.example_cn: 他被安葬在圣玛丽教堂的墓地里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 箭；箭状物；〔指示方向的〕箭号，箭头（符号）
meanings.meaning_en: a weapon usually made from a thin straight piece of wood with a sharp point at one end, that you shoot with a  bow
meanings.example: Warriors armed with bows and arrows and spears have invaded their villages.
meanings.example_cn: 佩有弓箭和长矛的武士们已入侵了他们的村庄。

meanings.meaning_en: having the colour of grass or leaves
meanings.example: beautiful green eyes
meanings.example_cn: 漂亮的碧眼

meanings.meaning_en: the colour of grass and leaves
meanings.example: Raw coffee beans are green in colour.
meanings.example_cn: 生咖啡豆是绿色的。

meanings.meaning_en: a way of thinking or explaining sth
meanings.example: I fail to see the logic behind his argument.
meanings.example_cn: 我不明白支持他论据的是什么逻辑。

meanings.meaning_en: a liquid
meanings.example: He is not allowed solid food yet, only fluids.
meanings.example_cn: 他还不能吃固体食物，只能进流食。

meanings.meaning_en: to push something firmly against a surface
meanings.example: Manville kept his back pressed flat against the wall.
meanings.example_cn: 曼维尔后背紧紧地贴在墙上。

meanings.meaning_en: a business or company, especially a small one
meanings.example: She works for an electronics firm.
meanings.example_cn: 她在一家电子公司工作。

meanings.meaning_en: a religious ceremony for burying or cremating someone who has died
meanings.example: The funeral will be held at St. Martin’s Church.
meanings.example_cn: 葬礼将在圣马丁教堂举行。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a book, list, record etc, using different pieces of information, music etc
meanings.example: The document was compiled by the Department of Health.
meanings.example_cn: 这份文件是由卫生部汇编的。

meanings.meaning_en: having the colour of dark clouds, neither black nor white
meanings.example: an old lady with grey hair
meanings.example_cn: 头发灰白的老太太

meanings.meaning_en: the colour of dark clouds, neither black nor white
meanings.example: a grey sky
meanings.example_cn: 灰色的天空

meanings.meaning_en: a sharp curved nail on an animal, bird, or some insects
meanings.example: The cat dug his claws into my leg.
meanings.example_cn: 猫的爪子抓进了我的腿中。

meanings.meaning_en: able to speak a language very well
meanings.example: She was fluent in English, French, and German.
meanings.example_cn: 她的英语、法语和德语都很流利。

meanings.meaning_en: important
meanings.example: a prominent Russian scientist
meanings.example_cn: 杰出的俄罗斯科学家

meanings.meaning_en: in a way that produces or shows feelings of great sadness or anger
meanings.example: He complained bitterly about his exam grades.
meanings.example_cn: 他悲叹自己的考试成绩不好。

meanings.meaning_en: to fail to satisfy; disappoint
meanings.example: Envy may dissatisfy us with our lot.
meanings.example_cn: 嫉妒可使我们对自己的命运不满意.

meanings.meaning_en: to put your arms around someone and hold them in a friendly or loving way
meanings.example: Jack warmly embraced his son.
meanings.example_cn: 杰克热情拥抱他的儿子。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of protecting sb/sth from attack, criticism, etc.
meanings.example: soldiers who died in defence of their country
meanings.example_cn: 为保卫祖国而献身的战士

meanings.meaning_en: the activity of buying, selling, or exchanging goods within a country or between countries
meanings.example: international trade agreements
meanings.example_cn: 国际贸易协定

meanings.meaning_en: to buy and sell goods, services etc as your job or business
meanings.example: unfair trade practices
meanings.example_cn: 不公平的贸易行为

meanings.meaning_en: to need to pay someone for something that they have done for you or sold to you, or to need to give someone back money that they have lent you
meanings.example: How much do I owe you (= often used to show that you want to pay for something )?
meanings.example_cn: 我该付你多少钱？

meanings.meaning_en: ( US spelling of grey )having the colour of smoke or ashes
meanings.example: I like that little gray one. The kids like that one too.
meanings.example_cn: 我喜欢那只灰色的小鸭子， 孩子们也喜欢那只。

meanings.meaning_en: the colour of smoke or ashes
meanings.example: Once again he found himself inside the apartment in the enormous gray house.
meanings.example_cn: 他又一次发现自己在那所庞大的灰色的房子的房间里了。

meanings.meaning_en: using a system in which information is recorded or sent out electronically in the form of numbers, usually ones and zeros
meanings.example: digital TV
meanings.example_cn: 数字电视

meanings.meaning_en: slowly, over a long period of time
meanings.example: Jill gradually became aware of an awful smell.
meanings.example_cn: 吉尔渐渐地闻到了一股难闻的气味。

meanings.meaning_en: ( US spelling of axe )a tool with a heavy metal blade on the end of a long handle, used to cut down trees or split pieces of wood
meanings.example: He grinds ax on the grindstone.
meanings.example_cn: 他在磨石上磨斧。

meanings.meaning_en: to try to judge the value, size, speed, cost etc of something, without calculating it exactly
meanings.example: Try to estimate how many steps it will take to get to a close object.
meanings.example_cn: 估计一下需要多少步才能到达一个近距目标。

meanings.meaning_en: a calculation of the value, size, amount etc of something made using the information that you have, which may not be complete
meanings.example: We just need an estimate of the number of people who will come.
meanings.example_cn: 我们只需估算一下有多少人会来。

meanings.meaning_en: to prevent something bad from happening
meanings.example: Road safety is taught to young children to avoid road accidents.
meanings.example_cn: 小孩子受到道路安全知识的教育，以避免交通事故。

meanings.meaning_en: a process in which something happens more and more quickly
meanings.example: an acceleration in the rate of inflation
meanings.example_cn: 通货膨胀率的加快

meanings.meaning_en: in addition to something else that you have mentioned
meanings.example: Information is also available on women’s health care.
meanings.example_cn: 还可以获得有关女性保健方面的资料。

meanings.meaning_en: a railway system that runs under the ground below a big city
meanings.example: the New York City subway
meanings.example_cn: 纽约市的地铁

meanings.meaning_en: the distance or measurement around the outside of a circle or any round shape
meanings.example: the circumference of the Earth
meanings.example_cn: 地球的周长

meanings.meaning_en: to look for someone or something
meanings.example: new graduates seeking employment
meanings.example_cn: 正在求职的刚毕业的大学生

meanings.meaning_en: to need something
meanings.example: Campbell’s broken leg will probably require surgery.
meanings.example_cn: 坎贝尔的一条腿骨折，可能需要手术。

meanings.meaning_en: if a ball or other object bounces, or you bounce it, it immediately moves up or away from a surface after hitting it
meanings.example: The ball bounced off the post and into the goal.
meanings.example_cn: 球从门柱上弹入了球门。

meanings.meaning_en: a politician who is in charge of a government depart-ment, in Britain and some other countries
meanings.example: a senior Cabinet minister
meanings.example_cn: 资深的内阁部长

meanings.meaning_en: something very lucky or very good that happens which you did not expect to happen or did not think was possible
meanings.example: It’s a miracle you weren’t killed!
meanings.example_cn: 你没有死真是奇迹！

meanings.meaning_en: to put clothes on your body
meanings.example: The King was clothed in a purple gown.
meanings.example_cn: 国王身穿紫袍。

meanings.meaning_en: recently
meanings.example: She was young at the time, and newly married.
meanings.example_cn: 那时她还年轻，刚结婚。

meanings.meaning_en: the feeling that you can trust someone or something to be good, work well, or produce good results
meanings.example: Public confidence in the government is at an all-time low.
meanings.example_cn: 公众对政府的信任度处于有史以来的最低点。

meanings.meaning_en: when there is not enough of something, or none of it
meanings.example: Too many teachers are treated with a lack of respect.
meanings.example_cn: 有太多老师得不到尊重。

meanings.meaning_en: to not have something that you need, or not have enough of it
meanings.example: comments based on a total lack of information
meanings.example_cn: 全无根据的评论

meanings.meaning_en: a government department or a part of a government department in the US
meanings.example: the Federal Bureau of Investigation
meanings.example_cn: 联邦调查局

meanings.meaning_en: when something is found that is not easy to see, hear etc, or the process of looking for it
meanings.example: Early detection of the disease is vital.
meanings.example_cn: 这种病关键在于及早发现。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of 12 ordinary people who listen to the details of a case in court and decide whether someone is guilty or not
meanings.example: the members of the jury
meanings.example_cn: 陪审团成员

meanings.meaning_en: a way in which two or more people or things are not like each other
meanings.example: There’s a big difference between knowing that something is true, and being able to prove it.
meanings.example_cn: 知道什么正确与能够证明它正确，这之间有很大的不同。

meanings.meaning_en: to want something to happen or be true and to believe that it is possible or likely
meanings.example: I do hope everything goes well.
meanings.example_cn: 我真心希望一切顺利。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of wanting something to happen or be true and believing that it is possible or likely
meanings.example: It was hoped that the job would be filled by a local person.
meanings.example_cn: 希望该职位由当地人来担任。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money given to someone, especially by the government, for a particular purpose
meanings.example: The university gets a government grant.
meanings.example_cn: 这所大学获得政府拨款。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone something or allow them to have something that they have asked for
meanings.example: Britain could grant Spain’s request .
meanings.example_cn: 英国可能会同意西班牙的请求。

meanings.meaning_en: not enough, or not great enough
meanings.example: Insufficient resources have been devoted to the health service.
meanings.example_cn: 用于医疗保健服务的资源不足。

meanings.meaning_en: happy, or behaving in a way that shows you are happy
meanings.example: She’s feeling more cheerful today.
meanings.example_cn: 今天她高兴些了。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of people chosen to do a particular job, make decisions etc
