meanings.example: a committee meeting
meanings.example_cn: 委员会会议

meanings.meaning_en: the direction from which the sun rises, and which is on the right if you are facing north
meanings.example: Which way is east?
meanings.example_cn: 哪边是东？

meanings.meaning_en: to or in the countries in Asia, especially China and Japan
meanings.example: housing problems in the east
meanings.example_cn: 东部的住房问题

meanings.meaning_en: the way in which a language or a particular word is pronounced
meanings.example: She gave the word its French pronunciation.
meanings.example_cn: 她给出了这个单词的法语发音。

meanings.meaning_en: a photograph
meanings.example: Can you take a photo of me and Rachel?
meanings.example_cn: 你能给我和雷切尔拍张照吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a job or profession
meanings.example: Please state your name, address and occupation.
meanings.example_cn: 请写明你的姓名、地址和职业。

meanings.meaning_en: an official paper or book that gives information about sth, or that can be used as evidence or proof of sth
meanings.example: She produces legal documents for a downtown Seattle law firm.
meanings.example_cn: 她为西雅图市区的一家法律事务所撰写法律文件。

meanings.meaning_en: liked by a lot of people
meanings.example: Hilary was popular at school.
meanings.example_cn: 希拉里在学校里很受欢迎。

meanings.meaning_en: if you resume an activity, or if it resumes , it begins again or continues after an interruptio
meanings.example: Peace talks will resume tomorrow.
meanings.example_cn: 和平谈判明天重新启动。

meanings.meaning_en: your ability to see
meanings.example: He had a problem with his eyesight.
meanings.example_cn: 他的视力有问题。

meanings.meaning_en: a long passage dug into the ground and filled with water, either for boats to travel along, or to take water to a place
meanings.example: We walked along by the side of the canal.
meanings.example_cn: 我们沿着运河边往前走。

meanings.meaning_en: used to mean that a fact can easily be noticed or understood
meanings.example: We’re obviously going to need more help.
meanings.example_cn: 显然我们将需要更多的帮助。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone happy or satisfied
meanings.example: a business that wants to please its customers
meanings.example_cn: 希望让顾客满意的一家公司

meanings.meaning_en: a gentle wind
meanings.example: flowers waving in the breeze
meanings.example_cn: 在微风中摇曳的花儿

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is skilled at repairing motor vehicles and machinery
meanings.example: a garage mechanic
meanings.example_cn: 汽车修理厂的技工

meanings.meaning_en: next to or very close to the side of someone or something
meanings.example: Wendy came up and sat beside me.
meanings.example_cn: 温迪走过来，坐在我身边。

meanings.meaning_en: a cover for the open part of a pot, box, or other container
meanings.example: She lifted the lid of the box and displayed the contents.
meanings.example_cn: 她把盒盖掀起，展示了里边的东西。

meanings.meaning_en: one part in every hundred
meanings.example: Poor families spend about 80 to 90 percent of their income on food.
meanings.example_cn: 贫困家庭大约花费收入的80%到90%购买食物。

meanings.meaning_en: a man from England
meanings.example: He was the only Englishman present.
meanings.example_cn: 他是在场的唯一一名英国人。

meanings.meaning_en: someone, especially a child or young person, who is mature behaves in a sensible and reasonable way, as you would expect an adult to behave
meanings.example: Laura is very mature for her age.
meanings.example_cn: 相对她的年龄来说劳拉是很成熟的。

meanings.meaning_en: to become fully grown or developed
meanings.example: We’re mature enough to disagree on this issue but still respect each other.
meanings.example_cn: 我们都很成熟，尽管我们对此事意见不同，但还是彼此尊重。

meanings.meaning_en: a game played indoors between two teams of five players, in which each team tries to win points by throwing a ball through a net
meanings.example: We love playing basketball.
meanings.example_cn: 我们爱打篮球。

meanings.meaning_en: the curved path travelled by an object which is moving around another much larger object such as the Earth, the Sun etc
meanings.example: The satellite orbits the Earth every 48 hours.
meanings.example_cn: 这颗人造卫星每48小时绕地球运行一周。

meanings.meaning_en: to travel in a curved path around a much larger object such as the Earth, the Sun etc
meanings.example: Mars and Earth have orbits which change with time.
meanings.example_cn: 火星和地球的轨道随着时间而发生改变。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially and legally control a country and make all the decisions about taxes, laws, public services etc
meanings.example: the leaders who govern the country
meanings.example_cn: 治理这个国家的领导人

meanings.meaning_en: to show something that is usually covered or hidden
meanings.example: He lifted his T-shirt to expose a jagged scar across his chest.
meanings.example_cn: 他撩起T恤衫，露出横贯胸部的锯齿状伤疤。

meanings.meaning_en: to move your head up and down, especially in order to show agreement or understanding
meanings.example: I asked her if she was ready to go, and she nodded.
meanings.example_cn: 我问她是否已准备好出发，她点了点头。

meanings.meaning_en: the soft grey powder that remains after something has been burned
meanings.example: cigarette ash
meanings.example_cn: 香烟灰

meanings.meaning_en: a special advantage that is given only to one person or group of people
meanings.example: He had no special privileges and was treated just like every other prisoner.
meanings.example_cn: 他不享受特权，待遇和任何其他犯人一样。

meanings.meaning_en: a person who owns, manages or works in a shop/store selling food and other things used in the home
meanings.example: The cook and the grocer haggled over the price of eggs.
meanings.example_cn: 厨师和杂货商为蛋价计较个没完。

meanings.meaning_en: many
meanings.example: Numerous attempts have been made to hide the truth.
meanings.example_cn: 为掩盖事实作了很多尝试。

meanings.meaning_en: happening or done quickly and immediately
meanings.example: My letter received a swift reply.
meanings.example_cn: 我的信很快就得到了回复

meanings.meaning_en: if a problem or difficult situation arises, it begins to happen
meanings.example: A crisis has arisen in the Foreign Office.
meanings.example_cn: 外交部出现了危机。

meanings.meaning_en: in a leading position among a group of people or things
meanings.example: Economic concerns are foremost on many voters’ minds.
meanings.example_cn: 经济是许多选民关心的首要问题。

meanings.meaning_en: to be involved in a war against someone, or a fight against something
meanings.example: The police are waging war on drug pushers in the city.
meanings.example_cn: 警方正在市内开展一场打击毒贩的斗争。

meanings.meaning_en: a suggestion that is not made directly but that people are expected to understand or accept
meanings.example: They are called ‘Supertrams’, the implication being that (= which is meant to suggest that ) they are more advanced than earlier models.
meanings.example_cn: 它们被称作“超级电车”，这是暗指它们比先前的型号更先进。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or typical of a child
meanings.example: a high childish laugh
meanings.example_cn: 孩子气的高声大笑

meanings.meaning_en: what someone is called
meanings.example: Her name is Mandy Wilson.
meanings.example_cn: 她的名字是曼迪•威尔逊。

meanings.meaning_en: to say what the name of someone or something is, especially officially
meanings.example: What’s your name?
meanings.example_cn: 你叫什么名字？

meanings.meaning_en: to like someone or something more than someone or something else, so that you would choose it if you could
meanings.example: She prefers her coffee black.
meanings.example_cn: 她更喜欢喝黑咖啡。

meanings.meaning_en: completely correct in every detail
meanings.example: Police are still investigating the exact cause of the accident.
meanings.example_cn: 警方还在调查这起事故的确切原因。

meanings.meaning_en: if something happens often, it happens regularly or many times
meanings.example: She often works at the weekend.
meanings.example_cn: 她周末经常要上班。

meanings.meaning_en: the state of living in a place
meanings.example: Rome was his main place of residence.
meanings.example_cn: 罗马是他的主要居住地。

meanings.meaning_en: a very large amount of water that covers an area that is usually dry
meanings.example: The village was cut off by floods.
meanings.example_cn: 那个村子因洪水而与外界中断了联系。

meanings.meaning_en: to cover a place with water, or to become covered with water
meanings.example: the worst floods for over fifty years
meanings.example_cn: 五十多年来最严重的水灾

meanings.meaning_en: all people of about the same age
meanings.example: Like most of my generation, I had never known a war.
meanings.example_cn: 和我们这一代的大多数人一样，我并没有经历过战争。

meanings.meaning_en: continuing to exist for a long time or for all the time in the future
meanings.example: He gave up a permanent job in order to freelance.
meanings.example_cn: 他放弃了固定工作，为的是当一名自由职业者。

meanings.meaning_en: a very high level of intelligence, mental skill, or ability, which only a few people have
meanings.example: The film reveals Fellini’s genius.
meanings.example_cn: 这部影片展现了费里尼的天赋。

meanings.meaning_en: a large area of land where it is always very dry, and there is a lot of sand
meanings.example: the Sahara Desert
meanings.example_cn: 撒哈拉沙漠

meanings.meaning_en: to leave someone or something and no longer help or support them
meanings.example: This area of the country is mostly desert.
meanings.example_cn: 该国的这一地区大部分是沙漠。

meanings.meaning_en: nerves are parts inside your body which look like threads and carry messages between the brain and other parts of the body
meanings.example: a condition which affects the nerves in the back
meanings.example_cn: 影响背部神经的疾病

meanings.meaning_en: in or from the north of a country or area
meanings.example: a man with a northern accent
meanings.example_cn: 带有北方口音的男子

meanings.meaning_en: to limit all or most of your study, business etc to a particular subject or activity
meanings.example: Simmons specialized in contract law.
meanings.example_cn: 西蒙斯专攻合同法。

meanings.meaning_en: an unexpected and dangerous situation that must be dealt with immediately
meanings.example: Lifeguards are trained to deal with emergencies.
meanings.example_cn: 救生员接受过应对紧急情况的训练。

meanings.meaning_en: an adult female chicken
meanings.example: The chickens gathered under the hen.
meanings.example_cn: 小鸡聚集在母鸡翅膀下面。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something in a particular way or for a particular reason
meanings.example: The company acted correctly in sacking him.
meanings.example_cn: 公司解雇他做得对。

meanings.meaning_en: one thing that you do
meanings.example: The jury decided that Walker had acted in self-defence.
meanings.example_cn: 陪审团裁定沃克的行为属于自卫。

meanings.meaning_en: the number 1
meanings.example: They had one daughter.
meanings.example_cn: 他们有一个女儿。

meanings.meaning_en: used to refer to a member of a group or pair of people or things
meanings.example: one hundred and twenty-one pounds
meanings.example_cn: 121英镑

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which two or more people disagree, often angrily
meanings.example: She had a big argument with her husband.
meanings.example_cn: 她和丈夫大吵了一架。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who paints pictures
meanings.example: Gerry’s ambition was to become a portrait painter.
meanings.example_cn: 格里的志向是成为一名肖像画家。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of separating something into two or more different parts, or the way these parts are separated or shared
meanings.example: the traditional division of labour (= the way that particular tasks are shared ) between husband and wife
meanings.example_cn: 夫妻之间传统的分工

meanings.meaning_en: if something bursts, or if you burst it, it breaks open or apart suddenly and violently so that its contents come out
meanings.example: The pipes had burst and the house was under two feet of water.
meanings.example_cn: 水管爆裂，房子被水淹了两英尺。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of something bursting or the place where it has burst
meanings.example: a sudden burst of activity/energy/anger/enthusiasm
meanings.example_cn: 活动 / 能量 / 怒火 / 热情的迸发

meanings.meaning_en: to a very great degree
meanings.example: The successful applicant will be working closely with our international staff.
meanings.example_cn: 被录用者将与我们的国际员工紧密合作。

meanings.meaning_en: a building where Christians go to worship
meanings.example: a short church service
meanings.example_cn: 简短的教堂礼拜仪式

meanings.meaning_en: marks left by a person, an animal or a moving vehicle
meanings.example: The tracks, which looked like a fox’s, led into the woods.
meanings.example_cn: 这些足迹看着像是狐狸留下的，一直通向树林里。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of following someone or something quickly in order to catch them
meanings.example: a high-speed car chase
meanings.example_cn: 高速汽车追逐

meanings.meaning_en: something that you write down to remind you of something
meanings.example: Dave made a note of her address and phone number.
meanings.example_cn: 戴夫记下了她的地址和电话号码。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone interested in something, or make them want to take part in something
meanings.example: What attracted me most to the job was the chance to travel.
meanings.example_cn: 这份工作最吸引我的地方是有机会旅行。

meanings.meaning_en: used to talk about two people, things etc together, and emphasize that each is included
meanings.example: Both Helen’s parents are doctors.
meanings.example_cn: 海伦的父母都是医生。

meanings.meaning_en: brilliant light or colour is very bright and strong
meanings.example: She closed her eyes against the brilliant light.
meanings.example_cn: 强烈的光线下，她闭起了眼睛。

meanings.meaning_en: to use time, energy, goods etc
meanings.example: Only 27% of the paper we consume is recycled.
meanings.example_cn: 我们消耗的纸张只有 27% 得到回收利用。

meanings.meaning_en: the imaginary line around which a large round object, such as the Earth, turns
meanings.example: The Earth rotates on an axis between the north and south poles.
meanings.example_cn: 地球绕着南北两极之间的地轴自转。

meanings.meaning_en: a plastic substance can be formed into many different shapes and keeps the shape it is formed into until someone changes it
meanings.example: Clay is a plastic substance.
meanings.example_cn: 黏土是可塑物质。

meanings.meaning_en: a light strong material that is produced by a chemical process, and which can be made into different shapes when it is soft
meanings.example: the plastics industry
meanings.example_cn: 塑料工业

meanings.meaning_en: the way in which two people, groups or countries behave towards each other or deal with each other
meanings.example: diplomatic/international/foreign relations
meanings.example_cn: 外交 / 国际 / 对外关系

meanings.meaning_en: a number of people or things that follow each other in time or order
meanings.example: She won the championship four times in succession.
meanings.example_cn: 她连续四次夺得冠军。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone or something less powerful or less important, or to become less powerful
meanings.example: Over the last two years the president’s position has weakened.
meanings.example_cn: 过去两年来，总统的地位被削弱了。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is in a position in an organization or the government
meanings.example: a former Cabinet officer
meanings.example_cn: 前内阁官员

meanings.meaning_en: to stay in a particular state, condition, or position, or to make someone or something do this
meanings.example: The noise kept him awake.
meanings.example_cn: 噪音使他一直醒着。

meanings.meaning_en: the study or industry of making equipment, such as computers and televisions, that work electronically
meanings.example: an electronics engineer
meanings.example_cn: 电子工程师

meanings.meaning_en: believing that good things will happen in the future
meanings.example: Andrew took a more optimistic view.
meanings.example_cn: 安德鲁抱有更为乐观的想法。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of allowing sb to do sth, especially when this is done by sb in a position of authority
meanings.example: He asked permission to leave the room.
meanings.example_cn: 他请求离开房间的许可。

meanings.meaning_en: a hard block of baked clay used for building walls, houses etc
meanings.example: a brick wall
meanings.example_cn: 砖墙

meanings.meaning_en: not firmly fastened in place
meanings.example: a loose floorboard
meanings.example_cn: 松动的地板

meanings.meaning_en: someone’s welfare is their health and happiness
meanings.example: Our only concern is the children’s welfare.
meanings.example_cn: 我们唯一关心的是孩子们的幸福。

meanings.meaning_en: material in the form of thin sheets that is used for writing on, wrapping things etc
meanings.example: I’ll get you a piece of paper so you can write the number down.
meanings.example_cn: 我给你找张纸，你好把号码写下来。

meanings.meaning_en: happening or existing before, but not now
meanings.example: the former Soviet Union
meanings.example_cn: 前苏联

meanings.meaning_en: the first of two people or things that you have just mentioned
meanings.example: Their farm has been reduced to half its former size.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的农场已缩小到以前的一半。

meanings.meaning_en: the true facts about something, rather than what is untrue, imagined, or guessed
meanings.example: How do we know you’re telling us the truth?
meanings.example_cn: 我们怎么知道你告诉我们的是真话？

meanings.meaning_en: If you impose your opinions or beliefs on other people, you try and make people accept them as a rule or as a model to copy
meanings.example: Parents should beware of imposing their own tastes on their children.
meanings.example_cn: 父母应该提防把自己的兴趣强加给孩子。

meanings.meaning_en: to fail to look after someone or something properly
meanings.example: She smoked and drank, neglected the children, and left the clothes unmended.
meanings.example_cn: 她抽烟喝酒，既不照顾孩子，也不缝补衣服。

meanings.meaning_en: damage, injury, or trouble caused by someone’s actions or by an event
meanings.example: The scandal did his career a lot of harm.
meanings.example_cn: 丑闻对他的职业生涯造成很大损害。

meanings.meaning_en: to have a bad effect on something
meanings.example: Our children deserve protection from harm.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的儿童理应得到保护免受伤害。

meanings.meaning_en: fruit baked inside a  pastry  covering
meanings.example: Would you like another piece of apple pie?
meanings.example_cn: 想再来一块苹果派吗？

meanings.meaning_en: one of the first people to travel to a new country or area and begin living there, farming etc
meanings.example: the early pioneers of the Dakota territory
meanings.example_cn: 达科他地区的早期拓荒者

meanings.meaning_en: an event, situation etc that people do not understand or cannot explain because they do not know enough about it
meanings.example: Twenty years after the event, his death remains a mystery .
meanings.example_cn: 事情过去二十年了，他的死仍然是个谜。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of trying to do something even when it is difficult
meanings.example: his dogged determination (= very strong determination ) to succeed
meanings.example_cn: 他想要成功的坚定决心

meanings.meaning_en: to answer someone by saying or writing something
meanings.example: I asked Clive where he was going, but he didn’t reply.
meanings.example_cn: 我问克莱夫到哪儿去，但他没有回答。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is said, written, or done as a way of replying
meanings.example: Sorry it took me so long to reply.
meanings.example_cn: 抱歉，我过了这么久才回复。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the groups of people who work together in a particular part of a large organization such as a hospital, university, company, or government
meanings.example: the personnel department
meanings.example_cn: 人事部

meanings.meaning_en: a soft sweet food made by baking a mixture of flour, butter, sugar, and eggs
meanings.example: We had cake and ice cream.
meanings.example_cn: 我们吃了蛋糕和冰激凌。

meanings.meaning_en: an object that has been wrapped in paper or put in a special envelope, especially so that it can be sent by post
meanings.example: The parcel was delivered last week.
meanings.example_cn: 那个邮包上周送到了。

meanings.meaning_en: the official legal position or condition of a person, group, country etc
meanings.example: These documents have no legal status in Britain.
meanings.example_cn: 这些文件在英国并无法律效力。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of an object that is furthest from its centre
meanings.example: Put the eggs in the centre of the dish, with the vegetables and herbs around the edge.
meanings.example_cn: 把鸡蛋放在盘子中间，盘边一圈放些蔬菜和香草。

meanings.meaning_en: when you say firmly that you will not do, give, or accept something
meanings.example: Her country suffered through her refusal to accept change.
meanings.example_cn: 她的国家因为她拒绝接受变革而受了害。

meanings.meaning_en: a container with a lid, a handle, and a spout,used for boiling and pouring water
meanings.example: She filled the kettle and switched it on.
meanings.example_cn: 她把水壶灌满，打开了开关。

meanings.meaning_en: if you are positive about things, you are hopeful and confident, and think about what is good in a situation rather than what is bad
meanings.example: the power of positive thinking
meanings.example_cn: 正向思考的力量

meanings.meaning_en: to look at someone or something for a long time, giving it all your attention, often without realizing you are doing so
meanings.example: Patrick sat gazing into space  (= looking straight in front, not at any particular person or thing ).
meanings.example_cn: 帕特里克坐着，茫然地看着前方。

meanings.meaning_en: to shut something in order to cover an opening, or to become shut in this way
meanings.example: Would you mind if I closed the window?
meanings.example_cn: 我把窗户关上你不介意吧？

meanings.meaning_en: when someone or something is present in a particular place
meanings.example: Your presence is requested at the club meeting on Friday.
meanings.example_cn: 敬请出席于周五举行的俱乐部会议。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of making or growing things to be sold, especially in large quantities
meanings.example: That model won't go into production before late 2007.
meanings.example_cn: 那种型号要到2007年底才会投入生产。

meanings.meaning_en: a foolish action, remark etc is stupid and shows that someone is not thinking sensibly
meanings.example: I’ve never heard anything so foolish in all my life.
meanings.example_cn: 我这辈子从没听到过这么愚蠢的话。

meanings.meaning_en: to start something such as an organization, company, school, or city, often by providing the necessary money
meanings.example: Founded in 1935 in Ohio, Alcoholics Anonymous is now a world-wide organization.
meanings.example_cn: 嗜酒者互诫协会1935年创立于俄亥俄州，现在是一个世界性的组织。

meanings.meaning_en: to speak or say something very quietly, using your breath rather than your voice
meanings.example: You don’t have to whisper, no one can hear us.
meanings.example_cn: 你不必轻声轻语，没人听得到我们说话。

meanings.meaning_en: to come together and form a group, or to make people do this
meanings.example: A crowd gathered to watch the fight.
meanings.example_cn: 一群人聚拢来围观打架。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is kept as a prisoner, especially in a war
meanings.example: He described the difficulties of surviving for four months as a captive.
meanings.example_cn: 他讲述了沦为阶下囚的4个月中生存的种种不易。

meanings.meaning_en: a high rank in the army, Marines, or the US air force, or someone who has this rank
meanings.example: This particular place was run by an ex-Army colonel.
meanings.example_cn: 这个特别的地方归一位前陆军上校掌管。

meanings.meaning_en: very bad, unpleasant, or unkind
meanings.example: It was all the fault of that hateful man!
meanings.example_cn: 都是那个可恶的人造的孽！

meanings.meaning_en: the usual order in which you do things, or the things you regularly do
meanings.example: John’s departure had upset their daily routine .
meanings.example_cn: 约翰的离去打乱了他们的日常生活。

meanings.meaning_en: happening as a normal part of a job or process
meanings.example: Try to get into a routine (= develop a fixed order of doing things ) .
meanings.example_cn: 尽量养成一套习惯。

meanings.meaning_en: if there is a mess somewhere or a place is a mess, things there are dirty or not neatly arranged
meanings.example: What a mess!
meanings.example_cn: 太乱了！

meanings.meaning_en: to make the sound of a letter, word etc, especially in the correct way
meanings.example: How do you pronounce your name?
meanings.example_cn: 你的名字怎么念？

meanings.meaning_en: if two things or ideas correspond, the parts or information in one relate to the parts or information in the other
meanings.example: The two halves of the document did not correspond.
meanings.example_cn: 这份文件的前后两部分不相符。

meanings.meaning_en: without any writing, print, or recorded sound
meanings.example: Leave the last page blank.
meanings.example_cn: 最后一页留空。

meanings.meaning_en: an empty space on a piece of paper, where you are supposed to write a word or letter
meanings.example: a blank cassette
meanings.example_cn: 一盒空白磁带

meanings.meaning_en: something that happens as a result of a particular action or set of conditions
meanings.example: Her lawyer said she understood the consequences of her actions and was prepared to go to jail.
meanings.example_cn: 她的律师说她明白自己行为的后果并准备去坐牢。

meanings.meaning_en: used as a greeting when you see or meet someone
meanings.example: Hello, John! How are you?
meanings.example_cn: 喂，约翰！你好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a long straight narrow cut or hole
meanings.example: light shining through a slit in the door
meanings.example_cn: 透过门缝照进来的光线

meanings.meaning_en: to make a straight narrow cut in cloth, paper, skin etc
meanings.example: a skirt with a slit up the side
meanings.example_cn: 侧边开衩的裙子

meanings.meaning_en: soft white or grey rock formed a long time ago from the shells of small sea animals
meanings.example: chalk cliffs
meanings.example_cn: 白垩质峭壁

meanings.meaning_en: the middle of the day, at or around 12 o’clock
meanings.example: We stopped off in Colchester for our midday meal.
meanings.example_cn: 我们中途在科尔切斯特停留吃了午饭。

meanings.meaning_en: to dislike and have a low opinion of someone or something
meanings.example: She despised her neighbours.
meanings.example_cn: 她看不起她的邻居。

meanings.meaning_en: the ability or tendency to think that things are funny, or funny things you say that show you have this ability
meanings.example: his humour and charm
meanings.example_cn: 他的幽默感和魅力

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring the force of an electric current
meanings.example: That is one electron volt.
meanings.example_cn: 就是一单位的电子伏特。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment consisting of a tube-shaped piece of wood, metal etc that rolls over and over, used for painting, crushing, making things smoother etc
meanings.example: a paint roller
meanings.example_cn: 刷漆滚筒

meanings.meaning_en: the science or job of planning which way you need to go when you are travelling from one place to another
meanings.example: compasses and other instruments of navigation
meanings.example_cn: 罗盘及其他导航仪器

meanings.meaning_en: the act of starting an organization, relationship, or system
meanings.example: The establishment of the regional government in 1980 did not end terrorism.
meanings.example_cn: 1980年地区政府的成立并没有结束恐怖主义。

meanings.meaning_en: a small thin piece of steel, with a point at one end and a hole in the other, used for sewing
meanings.example: a needle and thread
meanings.example_cn: 针和线

meanings.meaning_en: a small electric lamp that you carry in your hand
meanings.example: We shone our torches around the cavern.
meanings.example_cn: 我们用手电筒照着山洞。

meanings.meaning_en: not the same thing, person etc, but a different one
meanings.example: They must have returned by another route.
meanings.example_cn: 他们肯定是从另一条路线回来的。

meanings.meaning_en: a ball of air or gas in liquid
meanings.example: When water boils, bubbles rise to the surface.
meanings.example_cn: 水烧开时，水面会冒泡泡。

meanings.meaning_en: to produce bubbles
meanings.example: soap bubbles
meanings.example_cn: 肥皂泡

meanings.meaning_en: to change something to make it different
meanings.example: My doctor said I should vary my diet more.
meanings.example_cn: 医生说我应该使日常饮食更加多样化。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the four long thin parts on your hand, not including your thumb
meanings.example: The woman had a ring on her finger, so I assumed she was married.
meanings.example_cn: 那女人手指上戴着戒指，因此我猜想她已经结婚了。

meanings.meaning_en: very pleasing or attractive
meanings.example: a charming little Italian restaurant
meanings.example_cn: 一家有吸引力的意大利小餐厅

meanings.meaning_en: based on general ideas or principles rather than specific examples or real events
meanings.example: By the age of seven, children are capable of thinking in abstract terms.
meanings.example_cn: 儿童到了七岁就具有抽象思维的能力。

meanings.meaning_en: a short written statement containing only the most important ideas in a speech, article etc
meanings.example: Human beings are the only creatures capable of abstract thought (=  thinking about ideas  ) .
meanings.example_cn: 人类是唯一具有抽象思维能力的动物。

meanings.meaning_en: very large in amount, size, or number
meanings.example: an endless stream of visitors
meanings.example_cn: 川流不息的游客

meanings.meaning_en: moving or able to move quickly
meanings.example: a fast car
meanings.example_cn: 速度很快的汽车

meanings.meaning_en: moving quickly
meanings.example: That can’t be the time - my watch must be fast.
meanings.example_cn: 不可能是这个时间——一定是我的表快了。

meanings.meaning_en: causing physical pain
meanings.example: a painful blow on the head
meanings.example_cn: 头部遭到的疼痛一击

meanings.meaning_en: a product that is brought from one country into another so that it can be sold there, or the business of doing this
meanings.example: a ban on beef imports
meanings.example_cn: 禁止进口牛肉

meanings.meaning_en: to bring a product from one country into another so that it can be sold there
meanings.example: In 2001, Britain exported more cars than it imported.
meanings.example_cn: 2001年英国的汽车出口量大于进口。

meanings.meaning_en: more than what was agreed or expected
meanings.example: Additional information can be obtained from the centre.
meanings.example_cn: 可以从中心获取更多信息。

meanings.meaning_en: to stop living and become dead
meanings.example: He died in 1985 at the age of 76.
meanings.example_cn: 他1985年去世，终年76岁。

meanings.meaning_en: very different from usual in a way that seems strange, worrying, wrong, or dangerous
meanings.example: abnormal behaviour
meanings.example_cn: 反常行为

meanings.meaning_en: a poor farmer who owns or rents a small amount of land, either in past times or in poor countries
meanings.example: Most villagers are peasant farmers.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数村民是农民。

meanings.meaning_en: a colourless gas that is the lightest of all gases, forms water when it combines with oxygen, and is used to produce ammonia and other chemicals. It is a chemical element
meanings.example: Water contains hydrogen and oxygen.
meanings.example_cn: 水含有氢和氧。

meanings.meaning_cn: 脚后跟，踵；中文释义: 后跟
meanings.meaning_en: the curved back part of your foot
meanings.example: He had an operation on his heel last week.
meanings.example_cn: 他上星期脚后跟做了手术。

meanings.meaning_en: the lowest part or surface of something
meanings.example: a frozen dessert with a biscuit base
meanings.example_cn: 一个以脆饼作底的冻甜品

meanings.meaning_en: to remove the cover from something
meanings.example: When the seedlings sprout, uncover the tray.
meanings.example_cn: 幼苗发芽后，揭开盘上的遮盖物。

meanings.meaning_en: inside or indoors
meanings.example: The interior walls are all painted white.
meanings.example_cn: 室内墙壁都粉刷成了白色。

meanings.meaning_en: the inner part or inside of something
meanings.example: The interior of the church was dark.
meanings.example_cn: 教堂里很暗。

meanings.meaning_en: a series of metal rings which are joined together in a line and used for fastening things, supporting weights, decoration etc
meanings.example: She had a gold chain around her neck.
meanings.example_cn: 她脖子上戴了条金项链。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is slippery is difficult to hold, walk on etc because it is wet or  greasy
meanings.example: In places, the path can be wet and slippery.
meanings.example_cn: 路上有些地方可能又湿又滑。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the past
meanings.example: places of historical interest
meanings.example_cn: 历史名胜

meanings.meaning_en: Without thought or spontaneity; automatically
meanings.example: Never copy foreign things blindly or mechanically.
meanings.example_cn: 不要盲目地或机械地照搬外国的东西。

meanings.meaning_en: used by the person speaking or writing to show that they are affected by their own action
meanings.example: I blame myself for what has happened.
meanings.example_cn: 发生这一切都怪我自己。

meanings.meaning_en: a sound or action that you make in order to give information to someone or tell them to do something
meanings.example: At a prearranged signal the lights went out.
meanings.example_cn: 预定的信号一发出，灯就全灭了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a sound or action in order to give information or tell someone to do something
meanings.example: She signalled, and the waiter brought the bill.
meanings.example_cn: 她打了个手势，侍者就拿来了账单。

meanings.meaning_en: always thinking of the things you can do to make people happy or comfortable
meanings.example: Paul is very thoughtful.
meanings.example_cn: 保罗非常体贴人。

meanings.meaning_en: a way of training someone so that they learn to control their behaviour and obey rules
meanings.example: Martial arts teach respect, discipline, and cooperation.
meanings.example_cn: 武术能教人尊重他人、遵守纪律并且相互合作。

meanings.meaning_en: to teach someone to obey rules and control their behaviour
meanings.example: Learning poetry is a good discipline for the memory.
meanings.example_cn: 背诗是训练记忆力的一种好方法。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of writing or a plan that is not yet in its finished form
meanings.example: the rough draft of his new novel
meanings.example_cn: 他的新小说的草稿

meanings.meaning_en: to write a plan, letter, report etc that will need to be changed before it is in its finished form
meanings.example: I read the first draft and thought it was very good.
meanings.example_cn: 我读了第一稿，觉得非常好。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone performs a play or a piece of music
meanings.example: This evening’s performance will begin at 8.00 pm.
meanings.example_cn: 今晚的演出8点开始。

meanings.meaning_en: a room or building where tools and machines are used for making or repairing things
meanings.example: a modestly equipped workshop.
meanings.example_cn: 一个装备普通的车间。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who listens to the radio
meanings.example: a new programme for younger listeners
meanings.example_cn: 针对年轻听众的新节目

meanings.meaning_en: to put paint on a surface
meanings.example: The ceiling needs painting.
meanings.example_cn: 天花板需要粉刷了。

meanings.meaning_en: to produce heat, electricity, or another form of energy
meanings.example: Wind turbines generate electricity for the local community.
meanings.example_cn: 风力机为当地社区发电。

meanings.meaning_en: to refuse to accept sth and try to stop it from happening
meanings.example: to resist change
meanings.example_cn: 抵制变革

meanings.meaning_en: easily upset or offended by events or things that people say
meanings.example: a very sensitive child
meanings.example_cn: 一个很敏感的小孩

meanings.meaning_en: to do something to entertain people, for example by acting a play or playing a piece of music
meanings.example: Chenier and the band are performing at the Silver Palace tomorrow.
meanings.example_cn: 车尼尔和乐队明天将在银宫演出。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance that is put on the soil to make plants grow
meanings.example: farming without any purchased chemical, fertilizer or pesticide
meanings.example_cn: 不使用任何购买的化学品、肥料或杀虫剂的耕作

meanings.meaning_en: to give support to an opinion, idea, or feeling, and make it stronger
meanings.example: I hope this will reinforce Indonesian determination to deal with this kind of threat.
meanings.example_cn: 我希望这会加强印度尼西亚对付这类威胁的决心。

meanings.meaning_en: to know who someone is or what something is, because you have seen, heard, experienced, or learned about them in the past
meanings.example: I didn’t recognize you in your uniform.
meanings.example_cn: 你穿上制服我认不出你了。

meanings.meaning_en: You can say "Okay" to show that you agree to something.
meanings.example: "Just tell him I would like to talk to him."—"OK."
meanings.example_cn: “你就告诉他我想跟他谈谈。” — “行。”

meanings.meaning_en: the people who work for an official organization whose job is to catch criminals and make sure that people obey the law
meanings.example: Police surrounded the courthouse.
meanings.example_cn: 警察围在法院大楼四周。

meanings.meaning_en: going out from a place or point, and moving forwards or outwards
meanings.example: The house was still burning, pouring forth thick black smoke.
meanings.example_cn: 房子仍在燃烧，冒出浓浓的黑烟。

meanings.meaning_en: if an animal or plant reproduces, or reproduces itself, it produces young plants or animals
meanings.example: The turtles return to the coast to reproduce.
meanings.example_cn: 海龟回到岸上繁殖。

meanings.meaning_en: the main supporting parts of a building, vehicle, or object
meanings.example: the metal framework of the roof
meanings.example_cn: 屋顶的金属框架

meanings.meaning_en: behaving in a polite, kind, and generous way, especially to people of a lower rank
meanings.example: Sibyl was the most gracious, helpful, and generous person to work with.
meanings.example_cn: 西比尔非常和蔼，乐于助人，而且为人慷慨，和她共事最愉快。

meanings.meaning_en: a thin pointed piece of metal that you push and turn in order to fasten pieces of metal or wood together
meanings.example: Fix the frame in position and tighten the screws.
meanings.example_cn: 把框子固定在正确位置上，拧紧螺丝。

meanings.meaning_en: to fasten or close something by turning it, or to be fastened in this way
meanings.example: The lens screws onto the front of the camera.
meanings.example_cn: 镜头旋扣在照相机正面。

meanings.meaning_en: a short time during which someone stops speaking or doing something before starting again
meanings.example: There was a pause while Alice changed the tape.
meanings.example_cn: 艾丽斯换磁带的时候出现了短暂的停顿。

meanings.meaning_en: to stop speaking or doing something for a short time before starting again
meanings.example: She paused for a moment.
meanings.example_cn: 她停顿了一下。

meanings.meaning_en: a solid food made from milk, which is usually yellow or white in colour, and can be soft or hard
meanings.example: half a kilo of cheese
meanings.example_cn: 半公斤干酪

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a piece of clothing that covers all or part of your arm
meanings.example: a dress with long sleeves
meanings.example_cn: 长袖连衣裙

meanings.meaning_en: a grey or brown animal like a horse, but smaller and with long ears
a vacant seat, building, room or piece of land is empty and available for someone to use
meanings.example: Only a few apartments were still vacant.
meanings.example_cn: 只有几套公寓仍然空着。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of money that you spend on something
meanings.example: He borrowed £150,000 and used the money for legal expenses.
meanings.example_cn: 他借了15万英镑用于支付律师费。

meanings.meaning_en: a chemical element. Lead is a heavy soft grey metal, used especially in the past for water pipes or to cover roofs.
meanings.example: drinking water supplied by old-fashioned lead pipes
meanings.example_cn: 由老式铅管输送的饮用水

meanings.meaning_en: a relationship between friends
meanings.example: her close friendship with her aunt
meanings.example_cn: 她与姑母的亲密友谊

meanings.meaning_en: not covered by clothes
meanings.example: a ragged child with bare feet
meanings.example_cn: 一个衣衫褴褛、光着脚的小孩

meanings.meaning_en: someone who competes in sports competitions, especially running, jumping, and throwing
meanings.example: a professional athlete
meanings.example_cn: 一位专业运动员

meanings.meaning_en: a word used especially in letters or speeches to introduce the subject you are writing or talking about
meanings.example: Regarding your recent inquiry, I have enclosed a copy of our new brochure.
meanings.example_cn: 关于你最近的咨询，我随信附上一本我们最新的手册。

meanings.meaning_en: usually or by most people
meanings.example: Sodium chloride is more commonly known as salt.
meanings.example_cn: 氯化钠通常都称为盐。

meanings.meaning_en: the power to make impossible things happen by saying special words or doing special actions
meanings.example: Do you believe in magic?
meanings.example_cn: 你相信魔法吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to prepare food for eating by using heat
meanings.example: Where did you learn to cook?
meanings.example_cn: 你在哪里学烹调的？

meanings.meaning_en: to have a plan, result or purpose in your mind when you do sth
meanings.example: I fully intended (= definitely intended) to pay for the damage.
meanings.example_cn: 我确实诚心想赔偿损失。

meanings.meaning_en: Powder consists of many tiny particles of a solid substance.
meanings.example: curry powder
meanings.example_cn: 咖喱粉

meanings.meaning_en: a black, sticky substance that is used on roofs, the bottoms of ships etc to stop water coming through
meanings.example: The night was as black as pitch (= very dark ) .
meanings.example_cn: 夜晚一片漆黑。

meanings.meaning_en: coming after eight other things in a series
meanings.example: In that region, Chile went from ninth to first, overall, as Chilean mobile web use increased by 3200% over the past year.
meanings.example_cn: 智利从这一地区的第九跃升到第一位，因为智利的移动网络用户在过去一年增长了 3200% 。

meanings.meaning_en: one of nine equal parts of something
meanings.example: The dollar rose by a ninth of a cent.
meanings.example_cn: 美元升值了1/9美分

meanings.meaning_en: to remove unwanted substances from water, air etc by passing it through a special substance or piece of equipment
meanings.example: The water in the tank is constantly filtered.
meanings.example_cn: 鱼缸里的水在不停地被过滤。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you pass water, air etc through in order to remove unwanted substances and make it clean or suitable to use
meanings.example: The ozone layer filters harmful UV rays from the sun.
meanings.example_cn: 臭氧层过滤掉有害的太阳紫外线。

meanings.meaning_en: an agreement or arrangement, especially in business or politics, that helps both sides involved
meanings.example: They made a deal to sell the land to a property developer.
meanings.example_cn: 他们达成了协议把这块地卖给房地产开发商。

meanings.meaning_en: to get things of the same type from different places and bring them together
meanings.example: After 25 years of collecting recipes, she has compiled them into a cookbook.
meanings.example_cn: 她搜集了25年食谱，把它们编成一本烹饪书。

meanings.meaning_en: a combination of events, etc., that causes a particular result
meanings.example: The conjunction of low inflation and low unemployment came as a very pleasant surprise.
meanings.example_cn: 低通货膨胀与低失业的同时出现是一大惊喜。

meanings.meaning_en: an official document promising that a government or company will pay back money that it has borrowed, often with interest
meanings.example: My father put all his money into stock market bonds.
meanings.example_cn: 我父亲把他所有的钱都投在上市债券上。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where criminals are kept as part of their punishment, or where people who have been charged with a crime are kept before they are judged in a law court
meanings.example: He’s been in jail for three months already.
meanings.example_cn: 他已经入狱三个月。

meanings.meaning_en: to put someone in jail
meanings.example: Watson was jailed for tax evasion.
meanings.example_cn: 沃森因逃税入狱。

meanings.meaning_en: plans and preparations that you must make so that something can happen
meanings.example: Have you made all your travel arrangements?
meanings.example_cn: 你的旅行都安排好了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: having enough skill or knowledge to do something to a satisfactory standard
meanings.example: A competent mechanic should be able to fix the problem.
meanings.example_cn: 一名合格的机修工应该能够解决这个问题。

meanings.meaning_en: a very thin flat piece that is cut from skin, a plant etc to be looked at under a microscope
meanings.example: to examine a section from the kidney
meanings.example_cn: 观察肾脏切片

meanings.meaning_en: a very confusing situation, that usually has a lot of noise and action, so that it is difficult for someone to understand it or control it
meanings.example: a scene of indescribable confusion
meanings.example_cn: 难以形容的混乱场面

meanings.meaning_en: if someone shows mercy, they choose to forgive or to be kind to someone who they have the power to hurt or punish
meanings.example: He showed no mercy to his enemies.
meanings.example_cn: 他对敌人毫不仁慈。

meanings.meaning_en: coming or following one after the other
meanings.example: The team has had five successive victories.
meanings.example_cn: 这支球队已经连胜五场了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a liquid or other substance flow out of or into a container by holding it at an angle
meanings.example: She poured coffee for everyone.
meanings.example_cn: 她为每个人都倒了咖啡。

meanings.meaning_en: two people who are married or having a sexual or romantic relationship
meanings.example: a newly married couple
meanings.example_cn: 一对新婚夫妇

meanings.meaning_en: to talk or write about something or someone, usually quickly and without saying very much or giving details
meanings.example: Was my name mentioned at all?
meanings.example_cn: 我的名字被提到过吗？

meanings.meaning_en: when someone mentions something or someone in a conversation, piece of writing etc
meanings.example: Some of the problems were mentioned in his report.
meanings.example_cn: 其中的一些问题在他的报告里提到了。

meanings.meaning_en: money that you risk as the result of a horse race, card game etc
meanings.example: For a dollar stake, you can win up to $1,000,000.
meanings.example_cn: 押一美元赌注，最多可赢一百万美元。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a choice or judgment about something, especially after considering all the possibilities or arguments
meanings.example: Has anything been decided yet?
meanings.example_cn: 已经作出什么决定了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: noticing or realizing something
meanings.example: I became conscious of someone watching me.
meanings.example_cn: 我察觉到有人在监视我。

meanings.meaning_en: someone you spend a lot of time with, especially a friend
meanings.example: For ten years he had been her constant companion .
meanings.example_cn: 十年来他一直陪伴她左右。

meanings.meaning_en: a game played by two teams of eleven players who try to kick a round ball into the other team’s  goal
meanings.example: Which football team do you support?
meanings.example_cn: 你支持哪个球队？

meanings.meaning_en: giving a lot of attention to details
meanings.example: Any school trip requires careful planning.
meanings.example_cn: 学校的任何出游活动都需要周密的安排。

meanings.meaning_en: to be given something
meanings.example: All the children will receive a small gift.
meanings.example_cn: 每个孩子都会收到一份小礼物。

meanings.meaning_en: not in any place or to any place
meanings.example: Nowhere is drug abuse more of a problem than in the US.
meanings.example_cn: 没有什么地方的吸毒问题比美国更严重。

meanings.meaning_en: to decide or arrange sth finally
meanings.example: Albert settled himself on the sofa.
meanings.example_cn: 阿尔伯特在沙发安坐下来。

meanings.meaning_en: a mark or shape that has a particular meaning
meanings.example: the dollar sign
meanings.example_cn: 美元符号

meanings.meaning_en: to write your signature on something to show that you wrote it, agree with it, or were present
meanings.example: a minus sign
meanings.example_cn: 减号

meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately put or keep something or someone in a place where they cannot easily be seen or found
meanings.example: She keeps a bottle of gin hidden behind a stack of books.
meanings.example_cn: 她在一堆书的后面藏了一瓶杜松子酒。

meanings.meaning_en: the style and design of a building or buildings
meanings.example: modern/classical/medieval etc architecture
meanings.example_cn: 现代/古典/中世纪等的建筑风格

meanings.meaning_en: the light produced by the sun during the day
meanings.example: The park is open to the public during daylight hours .
meanings.example_cn: 公园白天对公众开放。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone the official right to do or have something
meanings.example: Full-time employees are entitled to receive health insurance.
meanings.example_cn: 全职雇员都有资格享受健康保险。

meanings.meaning_en: an old, well-known story, often about brave people, adventures, or magical events
meanings.example: Local legend has it that (= says that ) the island was the original Garden of Eden.
meanings.example_cn: 当地传说这个岛就是伊甸园的原型。

meanings.meaning_en: correct or suitable for a particular time, situation, or purpose
meanings.example: The timing of the announcement was particularly appropriate .
meanings.example_cn: 通告发布的时机很合适。

meanings.meaning_en: the hard brown outer surface of bread
meanings.example: sandwiches with the crusts cut off
meanings.example_cn: 切去边皮的三明治

meanings.meaning_en: the state of existing
meanings.example: Scientists have many theories about how the universe first came into existence (= started to exist ).
meanings.example_cn: 关于宇宙的起源，科学家有多种理论。

meanings.meaning_en: land that is owned or controlled by a particular country, ruler, or military force
meanings.example: Hong Kong is a Chinese territory.
meanings.example_cn: 香港是中国的领土。

meanings.meaning_en: a pipe or hole through which something such as a liquid or gas can flow out
meanings.example: a waste water outlet
meanings.example_cn: 污水排放口

meanings.meaning_en: to consider two or more things or people, in order to show how they are similar or different
meanings.example: The report compares the different types of home computer available.
meanings.example_cn: 这份报告比较了市场上不同类型的家用计算机。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to your feelings or how you control them
meanings.example: She provided emotional support at a very distressing time for me.
meanings.example_cn: 在我非常痛苦的时候，她是我的情感支柱。

meanings.meaning_en: to take a number or an amount from a larger number or amount
meanings.example: Mandy subtracted the date of birth from the date of death.
meanings.example_cn: 曼迪从死亡的日期减去了出生的日期。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to Italy, its people, or its language
meanings.example: I watch Italian football a lot.
meanings.example_cn: 我常看意大利足球。

meanings.meaning_en: someone from Italy
meanings.example: The Italian way is to round off a meal with an ice-cream.
meanings.example_cn: 意大利人总是在用餐结束时来份冰激凌。

meanings.meaning_cn: 密集，稠密；密度；〔物质的〕密度
meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being dense ;the degree to which an area is filled with people or things
meanings.example: areas of high population density
meanings.example_cn: 人口密度高的地区

meanings.meaning_en: unable to control your behaviour, speech etc because you have drunk too much alcohol
meanings.example: You’re drunk.
meanings.example_cn: 你喝醉了。

meanings.meaning_en: a large thin book with a paper cover that contains news stories, articles, photographs etc, and is sold weekly or monthly
meanings.example: a magazine article
meanings.example_cn: 杂志中的文章

meanings.meaning_en: the ability to stay calm and accept a delay or sth annoying without complaining
meanings.example: He doesn't have the patience to wait.
meanings.example_cn: 他没有耐心等。

meanings.meaning_en: the way something or someone moves, faces, or is aimed
meanings.example: Which direction did they go in?
meanings.example_cn: 他们朝哪个方向走了？

meanings.meaning_en: the regular paid work that you do for an employer
meanings.example: Do you enjoy your job?
meanings.example_cn: 你喜欢自己的工作吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to do an activity, often regularly, in order to improve your skill or to prepare for a test
meanings.example: They moved the furniture back to practise their dance routine.
meanings.example_cn: 他们把家具往后挪以便练习舞蹈动作。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of ground or a surface that slopes
meanings.example: a steep slope
meanings.example_cn: 陡坡

meanings.meaning_en: if the ground or a surface slopes, it is higher at one end than the other
meanings.example: a gentle
meanings.example_cn: 缓坡

meanings.meaning_en: the joint between your foot and your leg
meanings.example: slender ankles
meanings.example_cn: 纤细的脚踝

meanings.meaning_en: no longer alive
meanings.example: Her mother had been dead for ten years.
meanings.example_cn: 她母亲去世十年了。

meanings.meaning_en: a ball shape
meanings.example: Because the earth spins, it is not a perfect sphere.
meanings.example_cn: 因为地球旋转，所以它不是个完完全全的球体。

meanings.meaning_en: used by the person speaking or writing to refer to himself or herself
meanings.example: Stop, you’re hurting me.
meanings.example_cn: 住手，你弄疼我了。

meanings.meaning_en: to gradually grow or become bigger, more advanced, stronger, etc.; to make sth do this
meanings.example: Knowledge in the field of genetics has been developing very rapidly.
meanings.example_cn: 遗传学领域的知识发展非常迅速。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely large
meanings.example: People who travel by rail still read an immense amount.
meanings.example_cn: 人们坐火车旅行时仍然会读很多书。

meanings.meaning_en: a small animal with long ears and soft fur, that lives in a hole in the ground
meanings.example: The rabbit disappeared in the bushes.
meanings.example_cn: 那只兔子消失在树丛中。

meanings.meaning_en: at or from the beginning of an event or process
meanings.example: It was clear from the outset that there were going to be problems.
meanings.example_cn: 从一开始就很清楚会有问题出现的。

meanings.meaning_en: to hide sth or change it, so that it cannot be recognized
meanings.example: He made no attempt to disguise his agitation.
meanings.example_cn: 他无意掩饰他的不安。

meanings.meaning_en: the art of changing your appearance so that people do not recognize you
meanings.example: He is a master of disguise.
meanings.example_cn: 他是伪装高手。

meanings.meaning_en: quick and full of energy
meanings.example: a brisk walk
meanings.example_cn: 轻快的行走

meanings.meaning_en: a board with buttons marked with letters or numbers that are pressed to put information into a computer or other machine
meanings.example: a computer keyboard
meanings.example_cn: 计算机键盘

meanings.meaning_en: a round white vegetable with a brown, red, or white skin and many layers. Onions have a strong taste and smell.
meanings.example: Chop the onions finely.
meanings.example_cn: 把洋葱切碎。

meanings.meaning_en: the physical and mental strength that makes you able to do things
meanings.example: Where do those kids get their energy from?
meanings.example_cn: 那些孩子哪来这么多精力？

meanings.meaning_en: to make a very high loud sound, especially because you are afraid, angry, excited, or in pain
meanings.example: They were dragged from their homes, shrieking and weeping.
meanings.example_cn: 他们哭喊着被人从家里拖出去。

meanings.meaning_en: a loud high sound made because you are frightened, excited, angry etc
meanings.example: He shrieked in agony.
meanings.example_cn: 他痛苦地尖叫起来。

meanings.meaning_en: having a lot of small parts or details put together in a complicated way
meanings.example: pure silks embroidered with elaborate patterns
meanings.example_cn: 绣有精美图案的真丝衣服

meanings.meaning_en: a large strong animal that people ride and use for pulling heavy things
meanings.example: a horse and cart
meanings.example_cn: 一辆马车

meanings.meaning_en: something that someone needs or asks for
meanings.example: The refugees’ main requirements are food and shelter.
meanings.example_cn: 难民的主要需求是食物和住所。

meanings.meaning_en: the small hard seeds of food plants such as wheat , rice, etc.; a single seed of such a plant
meanings.example: There were crumbs and grains of sugar on the table.
meanings.example_cn: 桌子上有面包屑和糖粒。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular point in time
meanings.example: It was one of the most exciting moments in his life.
meanings.example_cn: 这是他一生中最激动人心的时刻之一。

meanings.meaning_en: the fact of something happening
meanings.example: The greatest occurrence of coronary heart disease is in those over 65.
meanings.example_cn: 冠心病的最高发病率在65岁以上的人群中。

meanings.meaning_en: something someone does, especially something that is very good or very bad
meanings.example: After the morning’s good deeds he deserved a rest.
meanings.example_cn: 上午做了好事之后，他理应休息一下。

meanings.meaning_en: a bird with large eyes that hunts at night
meanings.example: Some of the more extreme contacts give you "cat eyes" or how about "owl eyes"?
meanings.example_cn: 一些更酷的隐形眼镜可以给你一双"猫眼"或者是"猫头鹰的眼睛"。

meanings.meaning_en: to separate one person, group, or thing from other people or things
meanings.example: The town was isolated by the floods.
meanings.example_cn: 洪水使该镇与外界隔绝。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of objects, often of the same sort, that have been collected
meanings.example: a stamp collection
meanings.example_cn: 一批邮票收藏品

meanings.meaning_en: something such as a box or bowl that you use to keep things in
meanings.example: ice cream in plastic containers
meanings.example_cn: 塑料容器里的冰激凌

meanings.meaning_en: a metal blade fixed into a handle, used for cutting or as a weapon
meanings.example: a knife and fork
meanings.example_cn: 一副刀叉

meanings.meaning_en: to behave as if you had not heard or seen someone or something
meanings.example: The phone rang, but she ignored it.
meanings.example_cn: 电话铃响了，但她只当没听见。

meanings.meaning_en: as much as is needed for a particular purpose
meanings.example: We can only prosecute if there is sufficient evidence.
meanings.example_cn: 有了足够的证据，我们才能提出起诉。

meanings.meaning_en: a plan or suggestion which is made formally to an official person or group, or the act of making it
meanings.example: The president is to put forward new proposals for resolving the country's constitutional crisis.
meanings.example_cn: 总统将提出解决国家宪法危机的新议案。

meanings.meaning_en: a white liquid produced by cows or goats that is drunk by people
meanings.example: a bottle of milk
meanings.example_cn: 一瓶奶

meanings.meaning_en: to take milk from a cow or goat
meanings.example: Would you like some milk in your tea?
meanings.example_cn: 你茶里要加点奶吗？

meanings.meaning_en: physical activities that you do in order to stay healthy and become stronger
meanings.example: Try to fit some regular exercise into your daily routine.
meanings.example_cn: 尽量在日常生活中安排一些经常性的锻炼。

meanings.meaning_en: to do sports or other physical activities in order to stay healthy or become stronger; to make an animal do this
meanings.example: Working in an office, I don’t get much exercise.
meanings.example_cn: 由于在办公室工作，我很少运动。

meanings.meaning_en: soon
meanings.example: Ms Jones will be back shortly.
meanings.example_cn: 琼斯女士很快就会回来。

meanings.meaning_en: to stop working, usually because you have reached a certain age
meanings.example: At the age when most people retire, he is ready to face a new career.
meanings.example_cn: 在大多数人退休的年纪，他准备要面对一项新事业。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is a member of a political party that supports communism, or who believes in communism
meanings.example: Without the communists in France, the resistance might not have succeeded in World War II.
meanings.example_cn: 如果没有法国的共产主义者，二战中的抵抗运动可能不会成功。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you add to something else to improve it or make it complete
meanings.example: vitamins and other dietary supplements
meanings.example_cn: 各种维生素和其他膳食补充剂

meanings.meaning_en: to add something, especially to what you earn or eat, in order to increase it to an acceptable level
meanings.example: Kia supplements her regular salary by tutoring in the evenings.
meanings.example_cn: 基亚晚上做家庭教师来帮补固定的薪水。

meanings.meaning_en: to be disloyal to someone who trusts you, so that they are harmed or upset
meanings.example: He felt that she had betrayed him.
meanings.example_cn: 他感觉她背叛了自己。

meanings.meaning_en: an occasion when you eat food, for example breakfast or dinner, or the food that you eat on that occasion
meanings.example: We must have a meal together some time.
meanings.example_cn: 我们一定要找个时间一起吃顿饭。

meanings.meaning_en: the eighth month of the year, between July and September
meanings.example: The world premiere took place in August 1956.
meanings.example_cn: 全球首映是在1956年8月。

meanings.meaning_en: from the beginning to the end of a period of time
meanings.example: During the summer she worked as a lifeguard.
meanings.example_cn: 夏天她当过救生员。

meanings.meaning_en: continuing for a short time
meanings.example: We stopped by Alice’s house for a brief visit.
meanings.example_cn: 我们顺路在艾丽斯家小坐片刻。

meanings.meaning_en: to surprise someone very much
meanings.example: Her reply astonished me.
meanings.example_cn: 她的回答让我大吃一惊。

meanings.meaning_en: things that are done to keep a person, building, or country safe from danger or crime
meanings.example: terrorist activity that is a threat to national security
meanings.example_cn: 威胁国家安全的恐怖活动

meanings.meaning_en: to shake slightly in a way that you cannot control, especially because you are upset or frightened
meanings.example: His lip started to tremble and then he started to cry.
meanings.example_cn: 他的嘴唇开始颤抖，接着就哭了起来。

meanings.meaning_en: not good, or not as good as someone or something else
meanings.example: I felt very inferior among all those academics.
meanings.example_cn: 与那些大学教师在一起，我自惭形秽。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of hard rock that becomes smooth when it is polished, and is used for making buildings,  statue s  etc
meanings.example: The columns were of white marble.
meanings.example_cn: 柱子是白色的大理石。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has invented something, or whose job is to invent things
meanings.example: Alexander Graham Bell, the inventor of the telephone
meanings.example_cn: 亚历山大·格雷厄姆·贝尔，电话的发明者

meanings.meaning_en: a hard, usually shiny substance such as iron, gold, or steel
meanings.example: The gate is made of metal.
meanings.example_cn: 这扇大门是用金属做成的。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of doing something well and effectively, without wasting time, money, or energy
meanings.example: considerable advancements in energy efficiency
meanings.example_cn: 能源效率的显著提高

meanings.meaning_en: measuring a long distance from the bottom to the top
meanings.example: This is the highest mountain in Japan.
meanings.example_cn: 这是日本最高的山。

meanings.meaning_en: at or to a level high above the ground, the floor etc
meanings.example: The camp was surrounded by a high fence.
meanings.example_cn: 营地四周围着高高的栅栏。

meanings.meaning_en: having a natural ability or skill for a particular activity or job
meanings.example: a born athlete/writer/leader
meanings.example_cn: 天生的运动员 / 作家 / 领袖

meanings.meaning_en: to damage something so badly that it no longer exists or cannot be used or repaired
meanings.example: companies that are polluting and destroying the environment
meanings.example_cn: 污染和破坏环境的公司

meanings.meaning_en: the process of heating a building or room, considered especially from the point of view of how much this costs
meanings.example: We wanted to reduce the cost of heating and air-conditioning.
meanings.example_cn: 我们想减少供暖与空调的开支。

meanings.meaning_en: to consist of particular parts, groups etc
meanings.example: The house comprises two bedrooms, a kitchen, and a living room.
meanings.example_cn: 这座房子有两间卧室、一间厨房和一间起居室。

meanings.meaning_en: lack of difficulty
meanings.example: She lived a life of ease.
meanings.example_cn: 她过着悠闲自在的生活。

meanings.meaning_en: to become or to make sth less unpleasant, painful, severe, etc.
meanings.example: The plan should ease traffic congestion in the town.
meanings.example_cn: 这项计划对城里的交通拥挤状况应该有所缓解。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of liberating someone or something
meanings.example: They pant after liberation.
meanings.example_cn: 他们渴望解放。

meanings.meaning_en: completely
meanings.example: a wholly satisfactory solution
meanings.example_cn: 完全令人满意的解决办法

meanings.meaning_en: If something splits or if you split it, it is divided into two or more parts
meanings.example: The branch split under their weight.
meanings.example_cn: 树枝承受不住他们的重量断裂了。

meanings.meaning_en: a round container attached to the wall in a bathroom, where you wash your hands and face
meanings.example: a wash basin
meanings.example_cn: 洗脸盆

meanings.meaning_en: a wild plant growing where it is not wanted that prevents crops or garden flowers from growing properly
meanings.example: the constant battle against weeds
meanings.example_cn: 对付杂草的长期斗争

meanings.meaning_en: to remove unwanted plants from a garden or other place
meanings.example: I've been weeding the flower beds.
meanings.example_cn: 我一直在除花坛里的杂草。

meanings.meaning_en: relaxed and quiet, not angry, nervous, or upset
meanings.example: Glen was calm and composed at the funeral.
meanings.example_cn: 格伦在葬礼上表现得平静而镇定。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of warm wool or cotton clothing with long sleeves, which covers the top half of your body
meanings.example: She wore a thick tartan skirt and a red cashmere sweater.
meanings.example_cn: 她穿了一条厚厚的格子呢裙和一件红色羊绒衫。

meanings.meaning_en: to cut the wool off a sheep;to cut off someone’s hair
meanings.example: Competitors have six minutes to shear four sheep.
meanings.example_cn: 参赛者们有6分钟的时间来给4只羊剪毛。

meanings.meaning_en: a small black and white bird that comes to northern countries in the summer
meanings.example: The swallow shaved the top of a tree.
meanings.example_cn: 燕子擦着树梢飞过.

meanings.meaning_en: to say hello to someone or welcome them
meanings.example: Belinda greeted her warmly.
meanings.example_cn: 贝琳达热情地招呼她。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to real situations and events rather than ideas, emotions etc
meanings.example: Candidates should have training and practical experience in basic electronics.
meanings.example_cn: 应征者应该具备基础电子学方面的培训和实践经验。

meanings.meaning_en: used to emphasize the most important reason or fact about something, or a simple explanation of something
meanings.example: Basically, I’m just lazy.
meanings.example_cn: 说穿了，我就是懒。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to collect payments from passengers on a bus
meanings.example: He showed his ticket to the conductor and got on.
meanings.example_cn: 他向检票员出示了车票，然后上了车。

meanings.meaning_en: in a way that you would expect
meanings.example: After a while, we naturally started talking about the children.
meanings.example_cn: 过了一会儿，我们自然而然地谈起了孩子。

meanings.meaning_en: to make yourself responsible for sth and start doing it
meanings.example: University professors both teach and undertake research.
meanings.example_cn: 大学教授既要教学又要从事研究工作。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling that you have no hope at all
meanings.example: To the despair of the workers, the company announced the closure of the factory.
meanings.example_cn: 令工人们感到绝望的是，公司宣布关闭工厂了。

meanings.meaning_en: to feel that there is no hope at all
meanings.example: Despite his illness, Ron never despaired.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管疾病缠身，罗恩却从不绝望。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a person’s or animal’s face used for smelling or breathing
meanings.example: Someone punched him on the nose.
meanings.example_cn: 有人一拳打在他的鼻子上。

meanings.meaning_en: the early part of the day, from when the sun rises until 12 o’clock in the middle of the day
meanings.example: I hated those cold winter mornings.
meanings.example_cn: 我讨厌冬天里寒冷的早晨。

meanings.meaning_en: a mild person has a gentle character and does not easily get angry
meanings.example: His voice was soft and mild.
meanings.example_cn: 他的声音轻柔温和。

meanings.meaning_en: to stop someone from continuing what they are saying or doing by suddenly speaking to them, making a noise etc
meanings.example: Will you stop interrupting me!
meanings.example_cn: 别打断我的话！

meanings.meaning_en: a particular length of time with a beginning and an end
meanings.example: Tomorrow’s weather will be dry with sunny periods.
meanings.example_cn: 明天天气干燥，间或晴朗。

meanings.meaning_en: bread that is shaped and baked in one piece and can be cut into slices
meanings.example: a loaf of bread
meanings.example_cn: 一条面包

meanings.meaning_en: fighting against someone who is attacking you
meanings.example: Rebel gunmen have put up strong resistance.
meanings.example_cn: 持枪的叛乱分子负隅顽抗。

meanings.meaning_en: to make people obey a rule or law
meanings.example: Parking restrictions will be strictly enforced.
meanings.example_cn: 停车限制将会严格执行。

meanings.meaning_en: without any doubt
meanings.example: ‘Do you reckon Margot will be there?’ ‘ Definitely not .’
meanings.example_cn: “你估计玛戈会在那里吗？” “肯定不会。”

meanings.meaning_en: a smooth steady movement of liquid, gas, or electricity
meanings.example: It's here that the river flows down into the ocean.
meanings.example_cn: 这条河就在这里汇入海洋。

meanings.meaning_en: to become bigger, taller etc over a period of time in the process of becoming an adult
meanings.example: Support for Mr Thompson is growing.
meanings.example_cn: 汤普森先生的支持率在上升。

meanings.meaning_en: a federal country or system of government consists of a group of states which control their own affairs, but which are also controlled by a single national government which makes decisions on foreign affairs, defence etc
meanings.example: Switzerland is a federal republic.
meanings.example_cn: 瑞士是一个联邦共和国。

meanings.meaning_en: a person or company that represents another person or company, especially in business
meanings.example: Our agent in Rio deals with all our Brazilian business.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在里约热内卢的业务代表处理我们在巴西的全部业务。

meanings.meaning_en: full of life and energy; active and enthusiastic
meanings.example: a lively child
meanings.example_cn: 精力充沛的孩子

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being useful, or the degree to which something is useful
meanings.example: Belief in the utility of higher education is shared by students nationwide.
meanings.example_cn: 全国的学生都相信高等教育是有用的。

meanings.meaning_en: to start a company, organization, system, etc that is intended to exist or continue for a long time
meanings.example: The city of Boerne was established by German settlers in the 1840s.
meanings.example_cn: 博恩市是德国移民于19世纪40年代建立的。

meanings.meaning_en: clearly different or belonging to a different type
meanings.example: two entirely distinct languages
meanings.example_cn: 两种完全不同的语言

meanings.meaning_en: the period of time between two events, activities etc
meanings.example: He left the room, returning after a short interval with a message.
meanings.example_cn: 他离开房间，过了一会儿就带回来一条消息。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a machine that makes it work or move, by changing power, especially electrical power, into movement
meanings.example: an electric motor
meanings.example_cn: 电动马达

meanings.meaning_en: a man who treats people in an unkind, cruel way
meanings.example: He is an unfeeling brute.
meanings.example_cn: 他是个无情的畜生.

meanings.meaning_en: a written or spoken description of sth that has happened
meanings.example: She gave the police a full account of the incident.
meanings.example_cn: 她向警方详尽地叙述了所发生的事情。

meanings.meaning_en: the basic unit for measuring weight in the metric system
meanings.example: A few twentieths of a gramme can be critical.
meanings.example_cn: 即使重量仅有1克的二十分之几都可能是关键性的。

meanings.meaning_en: when you are not in the place where people expect you to be, or the time that you are away
meanings.example: Her work involved repeated absences from home.
meanings.example_cn: 她的工作使她经常不在家。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of cutting into someone’s body to repair or remove a part that is damaged
meanings.example: She’s going to need an operation on her ankle.
meanings.example_cn: 她需要接受脚踝手术。

meanings.meaning_en: to have an accident in a car, plane etc by violently hitting something else
meanings.example: The jet crashed after take-off.
meanings.example_cn: 这架喷气式飞机起飞后就坠毁了。

meanings.meaning_en: an accident in which a vehicle violently hits something else
meanings.example: Forty-one people were killed in the plane crash.
meanings.example_cn: 这次飞机失事有41人遇难。

meanings.meaning_en: the meat from a cow
meanings.example: roast beef
meanings.example_cn: 烤牛肉

meanings.meaning_en: a large untidy pile of things
meanings.example: a rubbish heap
meanings.example_cn: 垃圾堆

meanings.meaning_en: to leave a layer of a substance on the surface of something, especially gradually
meanings.example: As the river slows down, it deposits a layer of soil.
meanings.example_cn: 河水流速变慢时，一层泥土便沉积下来。

meanings.meaning_en: to make sb feel upset, annoyed or not satisfied
meanings.example: Are you displeased with my work?
meanings.example_cn: 你对我的工作不满意吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to choose someone for a position or a job
meanings.example: officials appointed by the government
meanings.example_cn: 政府任命的官员

meanings.meaning_en: to be very likely to do or feel a particular thing
meanings.example: Don’t lie to her. She’s bound to find out.
meanings.example_cn: 别骗她，她肯定会发现的。

meanings.meaning_en: used to emphasize how small or unimportant something or someone is
meanings.example: He’s merely a boy – you can’t expect him to understand.
meanings.example_cn: 他只是个孩子——你不要指望他能理解。

meanings.meaning_en: used when adding another reason
meanings.example: I need the money. And besides, when I agree to do something, I do it.
meanings.example_cn: 我需要这笔钱，而且，我一旦答应做什么事情就会做到。

meanings.meaning_en: a large open area with grass and trees, especially in a town, where people can walk, play games etc
meanings.example: Let’s go for a walk in the park.
meanings.example_cn: 我们去公园散步吧。

meanings.meaning_en: the number 19
meanings.example: It was nineteen minutes past seven.
meanings.example_cn: 当时是7点19分。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel very unhappy
meanings.example: The thought of taking the exam again depressed him.
meanings.example_cn: 想到要补考，他就心情沮丧。

meanings.meaning_en: to produce tears from your eyes, usually because you are unhappy or hurt
meanings.example: Don’t cry, Laura. It’ll be OK.
meanings.example_cn: 不要哭，劳拉，没事的。

meanings.meaning_en: to the inside or inner part of a container, place, area etc
meanings.example: Come into the office.
meanings.example_cn: 到办公室里来。

meanings.meaning_en: mathematics
meanings.example: the new maths teacher
meanings.example_cn: 新来的数学老师

meanings.meaning_en: the importance of sth, especially when this has an effect on what happens in the future
meanings.example: a decision of major political significance
meanings.example_cn: 具有重大政治意义的决定

meanings.meaning_en: the amount that a bag will hold
meanings.example: She left the hotel carrying a shopping bag.
meanings.example_cn: 她拎着一个购物袋离开了宾馆。

meanings.meaning_en: a very narrow space between two things or two parts of something
meanings.example: She opened the door a crack and peeped into the room.
meanings.example_cn: 她把门打开一条缝，往房间里偷看。

meanings.meaning_en: to break or to make something break, either so that it gets lines on its surface, or so that it breaks into pieces
meanings.example: Don’t put boiling water in the glass or it will crack.
meanings.example_cn: 不要把沸水倒进这个玻璃杯里，否则它会破裂的。

meanings.meaning_en: the state of being certain
meanings.example: He usually does quite well, but it’s not a certainty.
meanings.example_cn: 通常他都做得相当好，但也并不一定。

meanings.meaning_en: not liking work and physical activity, or not making any effort to do anything
meanings.example: the laziest boy in the class
meanings.example_cn: 班上最懒的男孩

meanings.meaning_en: a change that is caused by an event, action etc
meanings.example: the long-term effects of the drug
meanings.example_cn: 这种毒品的长期影响

meanings.meaning_en: to injure yourself or someone else
meanings.example: Was anyone hurt in the accident?
meanings.example_cn: 事故中有人受伤吗？

meanings.meaning_en: the distance along a city street from where one street crosses it to the next
meanings.example: Head for 44th Street, a few blocks east of Sixth Avenue.
meanings.example_cn: 往44号街走，从第六大街往东走几个街区就是。

meanings.meaning_en: to prevent anything moving through a space by being or placing something across it or in it
meanings.example: The church is down the block.
meanings.example_cn: 教堂就在这个街区那头。

meanings.meaning_en: the sloping side of a hill
meanings.example: The airplane crashed on a hillside.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机在山坡上坠毁。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who knows a lot about a particular subject, or is very skilled at it
meanings.example: an attorney who is a specialist in banking law
meanings.example_cn: 一名专攻银行法的律师

meanings.meaning_en: a long thin creature with no bones and no legs that lives in soil
meanings.example: The worm burrowed its way under the earth.
meanings.example_cn: 蠕虫在泥土下掘通道。

meanings.meaning_en: a book that gives a list of words in alphabetical order and explains their meanings in the same language, or another language
meanings.example: a German-English dictionary
meanings.example_cn: 一本德英词典

meanings.meaning_en: a large round vegetable with thick green or purple leaves
meanings.example: I hate eating cabbage.
meanings.example_cn: 我讨厌吃卷心菜。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular day of the month or year, especially shown by a number
meanings.example: The date on the letter was 30th August 1962.
meanings.example_cn: 信上的日期是1962年8月30日。

meanings.meaning_en: to write or print the date on something
meanings.example: What’s today’s date?
meanings.example_cn: 今天几号？

meanings.meaning_en: the heat something produces, or when you feel warm
meanings.example: the warmth of the summer sun
meanings.example_cn: 夏天太阳的暖意

meanings.meaning_en: being the second of two people or things, or the last in a list just mentioned
meanings.example: In the latter case, buyers pay a 15% commission.
meanings.example_cn: 在后一种情况下，买家付15%的佣金。

meanings.meaning_en: into or inside a building
meanings.example: Let’s go indoors and have something to eat.
meanings.example_cn: 我们进屋吃点东西吧。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of aircraft with large metal blades on top which turn around very quickly to make it fly
meanings.example: The helicopter is staying over our heads.
meanings.example_cn: 那架直升机就在我们头顶的上方。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the long parts of your body that your feet are joined to, or a similar part on an animal or insect
meanings.example: a young boy with skinny legs
meanings.example_cn: 双腿干瘦的小男孩

meanings.meaning_en: how good or bad something is
meanings.example: Much of the land was of poor quality.
meanings.example_cn: 很多地的土质很差。

meanings.meaning_en: (of sb in a position of authority) to tell sb to do sth
meanings.example: He commanded his men to retreat.
meanings.example_cn: 他命令手下撤退。

meanings.meaning_en: if you have a preference for something, you like it more than another thing and will choose it if you can
meanings.example: Do you have a colour preference ?
meanings.example_cn: 你有什么颜色上的偏好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: used to add new information to what you have just said, to give your opinion, or to start a new conversation
meanings.example: I’ve known Barbara for years. Since we were babies, actually.
meanings.example_cn: 我认识芭芭拉很多年了，实际上我们从小就认识。

meanings.meaning_en: not as important as something else
meanings.example: the novel’s secondary characters
meanings.example_cn: 这本小说中的次要人物

meanings.meaning_en: a college where students are taught a particular subject or skill
meanings.example: a military academy
meanings.example_cn: 军事学院

meanings.meaning_en: to tell someone about what has been happening, or what you are doing as part of your job
meanings.example: I’ve asked him to come back next week and report on his progress.
meanings.example_cn: 我要求他下星期回来汇报工作进展情况。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of iron or steel that can stick to metal or make other metal objects move towards itself
meanings.example: It's possible to hang a nail from a magnet and then use that nail to pick up another nail.
meanings.example_cn: 把一颗钉子挂在一个磁体上再用这颗钉子去吸起另一颗钉子是可能的。

meanings.meaning_en: not any amount of something or not one of a group of people or things
meanings.example: I wish I could offer you some cake but there’s none left.
meanings.example_cn: 我真想能请你吃些蛋糕，但一点也没剩的了。

meanings.meaning_en: not at all
meanings.example: Although these were good students, none had a score above 60.
meanings.example_cn: 虽然这些都是好学生，但是没有一个考到60分以上。

meanings.meaning_en: big in size, amount, or number
meanings.example: Los Angeles is the second largest city in the US.
meanings.example_cn: 洛杉矶是美国的第二大城市。

meanings.meaning_en: a big company, or a group of companies acting together as a single organization
meanings.example: He works for a large American corporation.
meanings.example_cn: 他在一家美国大公司工作。

meanings.meaning_en: including every possible detail
meanings.example: The doctor gave him a thorough check-up.
meanings.example_cn: 医生给他做了一次全面的体检。

meanings.meaning_en: the front part of your face below your mouth
meanings.example: He rubbed his chin thoughtfully.
meanings.example_cn: 他若有所思地抚摸着下巴。

meanings.meaning_en: not far away
meanings.example: Lucy was staying in the nearby town of Hamilton.
meanings.example_cn: 露西当时住在附近的汉密尔顿镇。

meanings.meaning_en: a short distance from sb/sth; not far away
meanings.example: He might easily have been seen by someone who lived nearby.
meanings.example_cn: 他可能很容易被住在附近的人看到。

meanings.meaning_en: to behave in a particular way or show a particular emotion because of something that has happened or been said
meanings.example: He reacted angrily to the suggestion that he had lied.
meanings.example_cn: 说他撒谎，他非常生气。

meanings.meaning_en: a drawing of a particular area, for example a city or country, which shows its main features, such as its roads, rivers, mountains etc
meanings.example: According to the map we should turn left.
meanings.example_cn: 从地图上看，我们应该左拐。

meanings.meaning_en: a sour-tasting liquid made from malt or wine that is used to improve the taste of food or to preserve it
meanings.example: The  sugared  vinegar is  refined from the sugarcane and  pine.
meanings.example_cn: 加糖的醋是从甘蔗和松木中精炼出来的.

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of writing about a particular subject in a newspaper or magazine
