meanings.example: The paper’s leading article (=  the main article  ) described the government as weak.
meanings.example_cn: 该报社论称政府软弱。

meanings.meaning_en: the space between two straight lines or surfaces that join each other, measured in degrees
meanings.example: You didn’t measure the angle accurately.
meanings.example_cn: 你没有量准角度。

meanings.meaning_en: a large area that is different from other areas around it in some way
meanings.example: San Francisco and Tokyo are both located in earthquake zones.
meanings.example_cn: 旧金山和东京都位于地震带。

meanings.meaning_en: a bar that you use to hang things on
meanings.example: a towel rail
meanings.example_cn: 毛巾杆

meanings.meaning_en: connected with God and religion
meanings.example: the holy city of Varanasi
meanings.example_cn: 圣城瓦拉纳西

meanings.meaning_en: something that is made to be exactly like another thing
meanings.example: back-up copies of your files
meanings.example_cn: 你的文档的备份

meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately make or produce something that is exactly like another thing
meanings.example: Could you copy this letter and send it out, please?
meanings.example_cn: 你能把这封信复印一份发出去吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a very large grey animal with four legs, two tusks and a trunk that it can use to pick things up
meanings.example: A trunk distinguishes the elephant.
meanings.example_cn: 长鼻是象的特征。

meanings.meaning_en: to make sth happen sooner or more quickly
meanings.example: News of the scandal certainly hastened his departure from office.
meanings.example_cn: 这一丑闻肯定加速了他的离任。

meanings.meaning_en: unable to look after yourself or to do anything to help yourself
meanings.example: He began to feel depressed and helpless.
meanings.example_cn: 他开始觉得沮丧、无助。

meanings.meaning_en: to speak in a low voice, especially because you are annoyed about something, or you do not want people to hear you
meanings.example: Elsie muttered something I couldn’t catch and walked off.
meanings.example_cn: 埃尔茜咕哝了一句什么，我也没有听懂，她就走掉了。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to music or consisting of music
meanings.example: a musical version of the fairy tale ‘Cinderella’
meanings.example_cn: 童话故事《灰姑娘》的音乐剧版

meanings.meaning_en: a thin smooth soft cloth made from very thin thread which is produced by a silkworm
meanings.example: a beautiful dress in raw silk
meanings.example_cn: 生丝面料的漂亮连衣裙

meanings.meaning_en: a business that provides a particular service for people or organizations
meanings.example: a local housing agency
meanings.example_cn: 一家当地房屋中介

meanings.meaning_en: a state of disagreement or argument between people, groups, countries etc
meanings.example: the threat of industrial conflict in the coalfields
meanings.example_cn: 煤田发生劳资纠纷的风险

meanings.meaning_en: any thing, event, situation etc, when it is not important to say exactly which
meanings.example: You can buy anything you want.
meanings.example_cn: 你想要什么都可以买。

meanings.meaning_en: a part of the city far removed from the center
meanings.example: The hotel is situated in the outskirt of the city.
meanings.example_cn: 这个酒店位于城市的郊区,是全城最好的酒店之一。

meanings.meaning_en: if something is peculiar to a particular person, place, or situation, it is a feature that only belongs to that person or only exists in that place or situation
meanings.example: The problem of racism is not peculiar to this country.
meanings.example_cn: 种族歧视问题并非只有这个国家才有。

meanings.meaning_en: a list of names or topics that are referred to in a book, etc., usually arranged at the end of a book in alphabetical order or listed in a separate file or book
meanings.example: Look it up in the index.
meanings.example_cn: 在索引中查找。

meanings.meaning_en: causing anxiety; showing anxiety
meanings.example: She gave me an anxious look.
meanings.example_cn: 她焦急地看了我一眼。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is likely will probably happen or is probably true
meanings.example: Snow showers are likely tomorrow.
meanings.example_cn: 明天可能有阵雪。

meanings.meaning_en: probably
meanings.example: the most likely cause of the problem
meanings.example_cn: 造成这个问题最有可能的原因

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of thick rough material which covers part of a floor
meanings.example: Wipe your feet on the mat.
meanings.example_cn: 在地垫上蹭蹭你的鞋底。

meanings.meaning_en: a cloth bag filled with soft material that you put on a chair or the floor to make it more comfortable
meanings.example: a velvet cushion
meanings.example_cn: 天鹅绒垫子

meanings.meaning_en: a group of sheep, goats, or birds
meanings.example: They kept a small flock of sheep.
meanings.example_cn: 他们养了一小群绵羊。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone believe something that is not true by giving them information that is false or not complete
meanings.example: Don’t be misled by appearances, he’s a good worker.
meanings.example_cn: 不要被表象迷惑，他工作干得挺不错的。

meanings.meaning_en: not having a clear shape or form
meanings.example: The vague shape of a figure loomed through the mist.
meanings.example_cn: 薄雾中隐隐出现了一个模糊的人影。

meanings.meaning_en: a machine that produces electricity
meanings.example: an emergency generator
meanings.example_cn: 应急发电机

meanings.meaning_en: a substance used for building that is made by mixing sand, small stones,  cement  , and water
meanings.example: The posts have to be set in concrete.
meanings.example_cn: 这些柱子必须固定在混凝土中。

meanings.meaning_en: to throw or drop things in different directions so that they cover an area of ground
meanings.example: Scatter the grass seed over the lawn.
meanings.example_cn: 把草籽撒到草坪上。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment that makes a vehicle go more slowly or stop
meanings.example: Test your brakes after driving through water.
meanings.example_cn: 车子涉水之后要检验一下刹车。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a vehicle or bicycle go more slowly or stop by using its brake
meanings.example: I managed to put the brakes on just in time.
meanings.example_cn: 我最终及时刹了车。

meanings.meaning_en: the organ inside your head that controls how you think, feel, and move
meanings.example: Messages from the brain are carried by the central nervous system.
meanings.example_cn: 大脑发出的信息是通过中枢神经系统传递的。

meanings.meaning_en: an officer of any rank who is in charge of a group of soldiers or a particular military activity
meanings.example: the American Commander, General Otis
meanings.example_cn: 美军指挥官奥蒂斯将军

meanings.meaning_en: if the police arrest someone, the person is taken to a  police station  because the police think they have done something illegal
meanings.example: He was arrested and charged with murder.
meanings.example_cn: 他遭到逮捕并被指控谋杀。

meanings.meaning_en: an arm or leg
meanings.example: She would be able to stretch out her cramped limbs and rest for a few hours.
meanings.example_cn: 她将可以伸开蜷缩的四肢，休息几个小时。

meanings.meaning_en: a wide main road that joins one town to another
meanings.example: Interstate Highway 75
meanings.example_cn: 75号州际公路

meanings.meaning_en: completely
meanings.example: I’m sorry. That’s quite impossible.
meanings.example_cn: 我很抱歉，那是完全不可能的。

meanings.meaning_en: when you get rid of something
meanings.example: bomb disposal experts
meanings.example_cn: 拆弹专家

meanings.meaning_en: to examine the nature or structure of sth, especially by separating it into its parts, in order to understand or explain it
meanings.example: She still needs to analyse the data.
meanings.example_cn: 她仍需要分析这些数据。

meanings.meaning_en: a journey in a plane or space vehicle, or the plane or vehicle that is making the journey
meanings.example: He immediately booked a flight to Toulouse.
meanings.example_cn: 他当即就订了去图卢兹的航班。

meanings.meaning_en: always behaving in the same way or having the same attitudes, standards etc – usually used to show approval
meanings.example: She’s the team’s most consistent player.
meanings.example_cn: 她是该队中表现最为稳定的选手。

meanings.meaning_en: doing or saying the same thing many times
meanings.example: Children used to learn by repetition.
meanings.example_cn: 过去小孩子是通过背诵来学习的。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially tell someone about something or give them information
meanings.example: They decided to inform the police.
meanings.example_cn: 他们决定通知警察。

meanings.meaning_en: smooth and level, without raised or hollow areas, and not sloping or curving
meanings.example: houses with flat roofs
meanings.example_cn: 平顶房

meanings.meaning_en: a plan or suggestion for a possible course of action, especially one that you think of suddenly
meanings.example: You should talk to Ken – he's always full of good ideas.
meanings.example_cn: 你应该和肯谈谈，他总是满脑子好主意。

meanings.meaning_en: having the colour of the sky or the sea on a fine day
meanings.example: the blue waters of the lake
meanings.example_cn: 蓝蓝的湖水

meanings.meaning_en: the colour of the sky or the sea on a fine day
meanings.example: She nearly always dresses in blue.
meanings.example_cn: 她几乎总是穿蓝色的衣服。

meanings.meaning_en: having a husband or a wife
meanings.example: Are you married or single?
meanings.example_cn: 你是已婚还是单身？

meanings.meaning_en: the room where you prepare and cook food
meanings.example: Sam went into the kitchen to make a pot of tea.
meanings.example_cn: 萨姆走进厨房去沏一壶茶。

meanings.meaning_en: a structure built over a river, road etc that allows people or vehicles to cross from one side to the other
meanings.example: He walked back over the railway bridge.
meanings.example_cn: 他从铁路桥上走了回去。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something such as time, money, or workers available for someone, especially when this is difficult for you to do
meanings.example: Sorry, I can’t spare the time.
meanings.example_cn: 对不起，我抽不出时间。

meanings.meaning_en: not being used or not needed at the present time
meanings.example: Have you got any spare boxes?
meanings.example_cn: 你有没有多余的盒子？

meanings.meaning_en: to become deeper; to make sth deeper
meanings.example: The water deepened gradually.
meanings.example_cn: 水渐渐变深了。

meanings.meaning_en: used to refer to any person, when it is not important to say exactly who
meanings.example: Anyone could win tonight.
meanings.example_cn: 今晚任何人都可能赢。

meanings.meaning_en: a thin paper cover in which you put and send a letter
meanings.example: envelopes and stamps
meanings.example_cn: 信封和邮票

meanings.meaning_en: to look angrily at someone for a long time
meanings.example: She glared at him accusingly.
meanings.example_cn: 她用责备的目光瞪着他。

meanings.meaning_en: a long angry look
meanings.example: She gave him a hostile glare.
meanings.example_cn: 她狠狠地瞪了他一眼。

meanings.meaning_en: a bad or weak part of someone’s character
meanings.example: His worst fault is his arrogance.
meanings.example_cn: 他最大的缺点是傲慢。

meanings.meaning_en: the act or process of using numbers to find out an amount
meanings.example: Cathy did a rough calculation.
meanings.example_cn: 凯茜作了一个粗略的计算。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who drives a car, bus etc
meanings.example: a taxi driver
meanings.example_cn: 出租车司机

meanings.meaning_en: a place where planes take off and land, with buildings for passengers to wait in
meanings.example: The plane landed at Heathrow Airport.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机降落在希思罗机场。

meanings.meaning_en: having more than a basic knowledge of sth but not yet advanced
meanings.example: an intermediate coursebook
meanings.example_cn: 中级课本

meanings.meaning_en: a particular place, especially in relation to other areas, buildings etc
meanings.example: His apartment is in a really good location.
meanings.example_cn: 他的公寓地段很好。

meanings.meaning_en: not alike
meanings.example: They are both teachers. Otherwise they are quite unlike.
meanings.example_cn: 他们两位都是教师；除此之外他们迥然不同。

meanings.meaning_en: completely different from a particular person or thing
meanings.example: Music is quite unlike any other art form.
meanings.example_cn: 音乐与其他艺术形式迥然不同。

meanings.meaning_en: to notice or discover something, especially something that is not easy to see, hear etc
meanings.example: Many forms of cancer can be cured if detected early.
meanings.example_cn: 如果发现得早，许多种癌症都可以治愈。

meanings.meaning_en: adding to or replacing something
meanings.example: I’ll just make some fresh coffee.
meanings.example_cn: 我来重新煮点咖啡。

meanings.meaning_en: a time or situation which you can use to do something that you want to do
meanings.example: If someone invited me over to Florida, I’d jump at the chance (= use the opportunity eagerly ) .
meanings.example_cn: 如果有人邀请我去佛罗里达，我会赶紧抓住这个机会。

meanings.meaning_en: a grey powder made from  lime  and clay that becomes hard when it is mixed with water and allowed to dry, and that is used in building
meanings.example: a bag of cement
meanings.example_cn: 一袋水泥

meanings.meaning_en: to join two things together using cement , glue, etc.
meanings.example: Most artificial joints are cemented into place.
meanings.example_cn: 绝大部分人造关节是被黏结复位的。

meanings.meaning_en: to let someone go free, after having kept them somewhere
meanings.example: Police arrested several men, who were later released.
meanings.example_cn: 警察逮捕了几个人，后来都释放了。

meanings.meaning_en: more of something, in addition to the usual or standard amount or number
meanings.example: Could you get an extra loaf of bread?
meanings.example_cn: 你能多拿一条面包吗？

meanings.meaning_en: used to emphasize an adjective or adverb
meanings.example: Allow extra time for your journey.
meanings.example_cn: 要给你的旅程多留出点时间。

meanings.meaning_en: a tool or machine used for making holes in something
meanings.example: an electric drill
meanings.example_cn: 电钻

meanings.meaning_en: to make a hole in something using a drill
meanings.example: rifle drill
meanings.example_cn: 步枪操练

meanings.meaning_en: someone who helps a criminal, especially by helping them hide from the police
meanings.example: an accessary to murder
meanings.example_cn: 谋杀案的帮凶

meanings.meaning_en: a house, apartment etc where people live
meanings.example: Some 3,500 new dwellings are planned for the area.
meanings.example_cn: 大约三千五百套新住宅计划在这个地区新建。

meanings.meaning_en: almost not
meanings.example: My parents divorced when I was six, and I hardly knew my father.
meanings.example_cn: 我六岁时父母离婚，我对父亲几乎一无所知。

meanings.meaning_en: to move your body to the sound and rhythm of music
meanings.example: Come on, let’s dance.
meanings.example_cn: 来吧，我们跳舞吧。

meanings.meaning_en: a special set of movements performed to a particular type of music
meanings.example: The words danced before her tired eyes.
meanings.example_cn: 这些字在她疲乏的眼前晃动。

meanings.meaning_en: connected with atoms or an atom
meanings.example: atomic structure
meanings.example_cn: 原子结构

meanings.meaning_en: to not include someone or something, either deliberately or because you forget to do it
meanings.example: Please don’t omit any details, no matter how trivial they may seem.
meanings.example_cn: 请不要忽略任何细节，不管它多细小。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of your body that joins your head to your shoulders, or the same part of an animal or bird
meanings.example: Mike rubbed the back of his neck.
meanings.example_cn: 迈克揉了揉后颈。

meanings.meaning_en: used as the title of the wife or daughter of a British noblemanor the wife of a knight
meanings.example: Lady Spencer
meanings.example_cn: 斯宾塞夫人

meanings.meaning_en: someone who reads news or information on the television or radio
meanings.example: The radio announcer said it was nine o'clock.
meanings.example_cn: 电台播音员报了9点。

meanings.meaning_en: the activity of applying scientific knowledge to the design, building and control of machines, roads, bridges, electrical equipment, etc.
meanings.example: The bridge is a triumph of modern engineering.
meanings.example_cn: 这座桥是现代工程的一大成就。

meanings.meaning_en: a series of numbers or letters that represent a mathematical or scientific rule
meanings.example: the formula for calculating distance
meanings.example_cn: 计算距离的公式

meanings.meaning_en: the whole system of rules that people in a particular country or area must obey
meanings.example: Elected officials ought to obey the law.
meanings.example_cn: 民选官员理应遵守法律。

meanings.meaning_en: a fairly low rank in the armed forces, or an officer of this rank
meanings.example: He was preferred to lieutenant.
meanings.example_cn: 他被晋升为陆军中尉。

meanings.meaning_en: needing someone or something in order to exist, be successful, be healthy etc
meanings.example: Jan’s mother was dependent on her for physical care.
meanings.example_cn: 简的母亲要靠简来照顾。

meanings.meaning_en: greatest; most extreme
meanings.example: It is a matter of the utmost urgency to find out what has happened to these people.
meanings.example_cn: 当务之急是弄清楚这些人出了什么事。

meanings.meaning_en: the most that can be done
meanings.example: Security matters are treated with the utmost seriousness.
meanings.example_cn: 安全问题受到极为严肃的对待。

meanings.meaning_en: to start doing something
meanings.example: As everybody’s here, let’s begin.
meanings.example_cn: 大家都到齐了，我们就开始吧。

meanings.meaning_en: to work with someone else to achieve something that you both want
meanings.example: They agreed to co-operate with Brazil on a programme to protect the rain forests.
meanings.example_cn: 他们同意和巴西合作进行一个保护热带雨林的项目。

meanings.meaning_en: to move very quickly, especially because you need to be somewhere very soon
meanings.example: A small girl rushed past her.
meanings.example_cn: 一个小女孩从她身边匆匆经过。

meanings.meaning_en: to feel extremely sad, especially because someone you love has died
meanings.example: People need time to grieve after the death of a loved one.
meanings.example_cn: 人们在所爱之人去世后会有一段悲伤期。

meanings.meaning_en: a  gym
meanings.example: I have found a new gymnasium.
meanings.example_cn: 我找到一个新的健身房。

meanings.meaning_en: the top edge of a container
meanings.example: She filled each glass to the brim.
meanings.example_cn: 她把每个杯子都斟得满满的。

meanings.meaning_en: the differences within a group, set of actions etc that make it interesting
meanings.example: I really like the variety the store has to offer.
meanings.example_cn: 我很喜欢这家商店商品的丰富多样。

meanings.meaning_en: to build something such as a house, bridge, road etc
meanings.example: There are plans to construct a new road bridge across the river.
meanings.example_cn: 有计划要建造一条新的跨河公路桥。

meanings.meaning_en: a small insect that lives in large groups
meanings.example: Ants swarmed up out of the ground and covered her shoes and legs.
meanings.example_cn: 蚂蚁从地里成群地爬出来，爬满了她的鞋和腿。

meanings.meaning_en: beautiful or attractive
meanings.example: She had a lovely face.
meanings.example_cn: 她有一张漂亮的脸蛋。

meanings.meaning_en: the basic idea that a plan or system is based on
meanings.example: The general principle is that education should be available to all children up to the age of 16.
meanings.example_cn: 总的原则是，16 岁以下儿童都应该能接受教育。

meanings.meaning_en: protection from danger or from wind, rain, hot sun etc
meanings.example: The men took shelter in a bombed-out farmhouse.
meanings.example_cn: 那些男人躲在一间被炸毁的农舍里。

meanings.meaning_en: being the same in all its parts or among all its members
meanings.example: Grade A eggs must be of uniform size.
meanings.example_cn: A 级鸡蛋必须大小相同。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular type of clothing worn by all the members of a group or organization such as the police, the army etc
meanings.example: He was still wearing his school uniform.
meanings.example_cn: 他仍然穿着校服。

meanings.meaning_en: a statement that you will definitely do or provide something or that something will definitely happen
meanings.example: If you make a promise, you should keep it.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你许下一个诺言，你就应该遵守它。

meanings.meaning_en: to tell someone that you will definitely do or provide something or that something will happen
meanings.example: Last night the headmaster promised a full investigation.
meanings.example_cn: 校长昨晚允诺进行全面调查。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of cloth that you use for drying your nose or eyes
meanings.example: He flicked at spot with handkerchief.
meanings.example_cn: 他轻轻地用手帕拂拭污点。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or involving more than one nation
meanings.example: the response of the international community
meanings.example_cn: 国际社会的反响

meanings.meaning_en: slight darkness or shelter from the direct light of the sun made by something blocking it
meanings.example: She was sitting in the shade of a large oak tree.
meanings.example_cn: 她坐在一棵大橡树的树荫下。

meanings.meaning_en: to protect something from direct light
meanings.example: The shade on the lamp was slightly crooked.
meanings.example_cn: 灯罩稍有些歪。

meanings.meaning_en: an area of land that is controlled by its own government, president, king etc
meanings.example: the Scandinavian countries
meanings.example_cn: 斯堪的纳维亚国家

meanings.meaning_en: arriving, happening, or being done at exactly the time that has been arranged
meanings.example: She’s always very punctual for appointments.
meanings.example_cn: 她一向准时赴约。

meanings.meaning_en: to push or press something so that it is no longer flat or straight
meanings.example: You need a special tool to bend the steel.
meanings.example_cn: 你要用特殊的工具才能把这钢条弄弯。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is diligent works hard and is careful and thorough
meanings.example: a diligent student
meanings.example_cn: 勤勉的学生

meanings.meaning_en: a learned person has a lot of knowledge because they have read and studied a lot
meanings.example: a learned professor
meanings.example_cn: 一位博学的教授

meanings.meaning_en: to say what medicine or treatment a sick person should have
meanings.example: The physician examines the patient then diagnoses the disease and prescribes medication.
meanings.example_cn: 内科医生检查了病人，然后对疾病作出诊断，并开出药方。

meanings.meaning_en: (chewing gum)a sweet/candy that you chew but do not swallow
meanings.example: I do not chew gum in public.
meanings.example_cn: 我不在公共场合嚼口香糖。

meanings.meaning_en: a thing that keeps a door, drawer etc fastened and is usually opened with a key or by moving a small metal bar
meanings.example: I’m sorry, there isn’t a lock on the bathroom door.
meanings.example_cn: 对不起，浴室门上没有锁。

meanings.meaning_en: to fasten something, usually with a key, so that other people cannot open it, or to be fastened like this
meanings.example: The key turned stiffly in the lock.
meanings.example_cn: 这把钥匙开锁不灵活。

meanings.meaning_en: the relationship in physics between time, space, and movement according to Einstein’s theory
meanings.example: Einstein formulated the Theory of Relativity in 1905.
meanings.example_cn: 爱因斯坦于1905年创立了相对论。

meanings.meaning_en: the round object that you can see shining in the sky at night, and that moves around the Earth every 28 days
meanings.example: the craters on the surface of the moon
meanings.example_cn: 月球表面的环形山

meanings.meaning_en: within a particular country
meanings.example: We have no interest in interfering in the internal affairs of other countries.
meanings.example_cn: 我们对干涉其他国家内政不感兴趣。

meanings.meaning_en: a story about exciting imaginary events
meanings.example: a book of old Japanese folk tales
meanings.example_cn: 日本古老民间故事书

meanings.meaning_en: the way someone pronounces the words of a language, showing which country or which part of a country they come from
meanings.example: He had a strong Irish accent
meanings.example_cn: 他有浓重的爱尔兰口音。

meanings.meaning_en: used when suggesting or supposing that something might happen or be true
meanings.example: If we put out, say, twenty chairs, would that be enough?
meanings.example_cn: 如果我们搬出去比方说20把椅子，够不够?

meanings.meaning_en: a strong alcoholic drink made from wine, or a glass of this drink
meanings.example: After a couple of brandies Michael started telling me his life story.
meanings.example_cn: 几杯白兰地酒过后,迈克尔开始向我讲述他的人生故事。

meanings.meaning_en: the thing or idea that a word, expression, or sign represents
meanings.example: What’s the meaning of this? I asked you to be here an hour ago!
meanings.example_cn: 这是什么意思？我让你一小时之前就要到的！

meanings.meaning_en: a peaceful time, place, or situation is quiet and calm without any worry or excitement
meanings.example: We had a peaceful afternoon without the children.
meanings.example_cn: 孩子们不在，我们度过了一个宁静的下午。

meanings.meaning_en: a weapon made of material that will explode
meanings.example: The bomb went off at 9.30 in the morning.
meanings.example_cn: 炸弹在早上9点半爆炸。

meanings.meaning_en: to attack a place by leaving a bomb there, or by dropping bombs on it from a plane
meanings.example: Enemy planes dropped over 200 bombs during the raid.
meanings.example_cn: 袭击中敌机投下了两百多枚炸弹。

meanings.meaning_en: to cook something in hot fat or oil, or to be cooked in hot fat or oil
meanings.example: Fry the potatoes, covered, for about 20 minutes.
meanings.example_cn: 盖上盖，将马铃薯煎20分钟左右。

meanings.meaning_en: to become smaller in size, importance, or value, or make something do this
meanings.example: Gradually her anxiety lessened.
meanings.example_cn: 她的焦虑慢慢减轻了。

meanings.meaning_en: the management of money by governments, large organizations etc
meanings.example: leasing and other forms of business finance
meanings.example_cn: 租赁及其他商业金融形式

meanings.meaning_en: the repairs, painting etc that are necessary to keep something in good condition
meanings.example: the cost of repairs and maintenance
meanings.example_cn: 维修保养费

meanings.meaning_en: to press something firmly together with your fingers or hand
meanings.example: She smiled as he squeezed her hand.
meanings.example_cn: 他捏了捏她的手，她笑了。

meanings.meaning_en: an area of land that is higher than the land around it, like a mountain but smaller
meanings.example: Their house is on a hill overlooking the sea.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的房子建在可以俯视大海的小山上。

meanings.meaning_en: any of the forms of a verb that show the time, continuance, or completion of an action or state that is expressed by the verb. ‘I am’ is in the present tense, ‘I was’ is past tense, and ‘I will be’ is future tense.
meanings.example: It was as though Corinne was already dead: they were speaking of her in the past tense.
meanings.example_cn: 就好像科琳已经死了似的：他们当时在用过去时态谈起她。

meanings.meaning_en: the price you pay to travel somewhere by bus, train, plane etc
meanings.example: He could barely afford the fare.
meanings.example_cn: 他几乎付不起车费。

meanings.meaning_en: to look after someone or something
meanings.example: Sofia was in the bedroom tending to her son.
meanings.example_cn: 索菲娅在卧室里照料她的儿子。

meanings.meaning_cn: 强烈的情感，激情；强烈的爱好，热爱
meanings.meaning_en: a very strong belief or feeling about something
meanings.example: The issue arouses strong passions.
meanings.example_cn: 那件事激起了人们强烈的情绪。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of product made by a particular company, that has a particular name or design
meanings.example: Winston is a brand of cigarette.
meanings.example_cn: 云斯顿是一种香烟品牌。

meanings.meaning_en: to burn a mark onto something, especially a farm animal, in order to show who it belongs to
meanings.example: A brand was a mark of ownership burned into the hide of an animal with a hot iron.
meanings.example_cn: 烙印是用烙铁烧在牲畜皮上的所有权标记。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong desire to have or do something even though you know you should not
meanings.example: Resist the temptation to buy the item until you’re certain you need it.
meanings.example_cn: 要抵挡住购买的诱惑，除非你确有需要。

meanings.meaning_en: a change made in something in order to make it right or better
meanings.example: I just need to make a few corrections , and then we can send it to the printer.
meanings.example_cn: 我只要修改几个地方，然后就可以把它发送到打印机。

meanings.meaning_en: to stop doing something or stop happening
meanings.example: The things people will do for charity never cease to amaze me (= I am always surprised by them ) .
meanings.example_cn: 人们的慈善义举总是让我感到惊讶。

meanings.meaning_en: (it is a noun only in the phrase `without cease') end
meanings.example: The rain ceased and the sky cleared.
meanings.example_cn: 雨过天晴。

meanings.meaning_en: if you shed tears, you cry
meanings.example: She shed no tears when she heard he was dead.
meanings.example_cn: 她听到他的死讯时没流一滴眼泪。

meanings.meaning_en: a name commonly used for the US
meanings.example: I may go to America or I may not,it all depends.
meanings.example_cn: 我也许去美国，也许不去，要视情况而定。

meanings.meaning_en: with no other person, action, process etc between
meanings.example: The new property tax law won’t directly affect us.
meanings.example_cn: 新的财产税法不会直接影响到我们。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment used to take photographs or make films or television programmes
meanings.example: Her grandmother lent her a camera for a school trip to Venice and Egypt.
meanings.example_cn: 她的祖母借给她一部相机，让她在学校组织的到威尼斯和埃及的旅行中使用。

meanings.meaning_en: a careful examination of something in order to understand it better
meanings.example: Further analysis of the data is needed.
meanings.example_cn: 这些数据需要做进一步分析。

meanings.meaning_en: done deliberately and usually intended to cause harm
meanings.example: I did trip him, but it wasn’t intentional.
meanings.example_cn: 我的确把他绊倒了，但不是故意的。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of music that has a strong beat and parts for performers to play alone
meanings.example: a jazz band
meanings.example_cn: 爵士乐队

meanings.meaning_en: when a group of people or countries agree or are joined together
meanings.example: economic unity
meanings.example_cn: 经济统一

meanings.meaning_en: a legal process in which a judge and often a  jury  in a court of law examine information to decide whether someone is guilty of a crime
meanings.example: The trial is due to start next week.
meanings.example_cn: 审理定于下周开始。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who lives by asking people for food and money
meanings.example: the beggars on the streets
meanings.example_cn: 街头乞丐

meanings.meaning_en: in or through the middle of a group of people or things
meanings.example: He decided no assassin would chance a shot from amongst that crowd.
meanings.example_cn: 他认定，没有刺客会冒险混在人群里开枪。

meanings.meaning_en: a country or area that is under the political control of a more powerful country, usually one that is far away
meanings.example: Algeria was formerly a French colony.
meanings.example_cn: 阿尔及利亚以前是法国的殖民地。

meanings.meaning_en: the direction that is at the top of a map of the world, above the Equator. It is on the left if you are facing the rising sun
meanings.example: Which way is north?
meanings.example_cn: 哪边是北？

meanings.meaning_en: in the north or facing the north
meanings.example: He lives in North Wales.
meanings.example_cn: 他住在威尔士北部。

meanings.meaning_en: produced by combining different artificial substances, rather than being naturally produced
meanings.example: synthetic chemicals
meanings.example_cn: 合成化学品

meanings.meaning_en: to pull hard at something or push hard against something
meanings.example: Buddy’s huge gut strained against the buttons on his shirt.
meanings.example_cn: 巴迪的大肚子把衬衫纽扣绷得紧紧的。

meanings.meaning_en: making you laugh
meanings.example: the funniest man in Britain
meanings.example_cn: 英国最滑稽的男人

meanings.meaning_en: a place where people stay in tents, shelters etc for a short time, usually in the mountains, a forest etc
meanings.example: Let’s go back to camp – it’s getting dark.
meanings.example_cn: 我们回营地吧，天快黑了。

meanings.meaning_en: a path that forms a circle around an area, or a journey along this path
meanings.example: We did a circuit of the old city.
meanings.example_cn: 我们绕着老城走了一圈。

meanings.meaning_en: to organize or make plans for something such as a meeting, party, or trip
meanings.example: Contact your local branch to arrange an appointment.
meanings.example_cn: 请联络当地分部安排预约。

meanings.meaning_en: a small round flat object on your shirt, coat etc that you pass through a hole to fasten it
meanings.example: small pearl buttons
meanings.example_cn: 小的珍珠纽扣

meanings.meaning_en: to fasten clothes with buttons, or to be fastened with buttons
meanings.example: Press the pause button.
meanings.example_cn: 按暂停键。

meanings.meaning_en: belonging to a traditional style or set of ideas
meanings.example: the classical theory of relativity
meanings.example_cn: 经典相对论

meanings.meaning_en: as a result
meanings.example: Most computer users have never received any formal keyboard training. Consequently, their keyboard skills are inefficient.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数的电脑使用者都没有经过正规的键盘操作训练，因此他们的键盘技巧不够熟练。

meanings.meaning_en: a lake, especially an artificial one, where water is stored before it is supplied to people’s houses
meanings.example: This reservoir was formed by damming the River Blith.
meanings.example_cn: 这个水库是通过在布莱斯河上筑坝形成的。

meanings.meaning_en: the ability to see
meanings.example: She suffered temporary loss of vision after being struck on the head.
meanings.example_cn: 她头部受撞击以后出现暂时性失明。

meanings.meaning_en: the day between Thursday and Saturday
meanings.example: Diane won’t be here Friday.
meanings.example_cn: 星期五黛安娜不来这里。

meanings.meaning_en: the title of a newspaper report, which is printed in large letters above the report
meanings.example: a paper carrying the front-page headline: ‘Space Aliens meet with President’
meanings.example_cn: 头版报道题为“天外来客会见总统”的报纸

meanings.meaning_en: something that is grown or made in a factory in large quantities, usually in order to be sold
meanings.example: The London factory assembles the finished product .
meanings.example_cn: 伦敦工厂组装成品。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is flexible can bend or be bent easily
meanings.example: shoes with flexible rubber soles
meanings.example_cn: 带弹性橡胶底的鞋

meanings.meaning_en: a long area of high land, especially at the top of a mountain
meanings.example: We made our way carefully along the ridge.
meanings.example_cn: 我们沿着山脊小心前行。

meanings.meaning_en: a reason that you have for opposing or disapproving of something, or something you say that expresses this
meanings.example: Her objection was that he was too young.
meanings.example_cn: 她反对的理由是他太小。

meanings.meaning_en: an open container with a handle, used for carrying and holding things, especially liquids
meanings.example: He let down a bucket into the well to draw water.
meanings.example_cn: 他把吊桶放进井里打水。

meanings.meaning_en: to have to have something or someone, because you cannot do something without them, or because you cannot continue or cannot exist without them
meanings.example: You don’t really need a car.
meanings.example_cn: 你其实并不需要一辆车。

meanings.meaning_en: to be more than a particular number or amount
meanings.example: Working hours must not exceed 42 hours a week.
meanings.example_cn: 工作时间每周不得超过42小时。

meanings.meaning_en: approved of or done by someone in authority, especially the government
meanings.example: an official investigation into the causes of the explosion
meanings.example_cn: 对此次爆炸事件原因的官方调查

meanings.meaning_en: easy to notice or understand
meanings.example: The obvious way of reducing pollution is to use cars less.
meanings.example_cn: 减少污染显而易见的办法就是少用汽车。

meanings.meaning_en: to go away from a place or a person
meanings.example: My baby gets upset when I leave the room.
meanings.example_cn: 我一离开房间宝宝就会不安。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of your body where your hand joins your arm
meanings.example: He broke his wrist climbing rocks for a cigarette ad.
meanings.example_cn: 他为了一个香烟广告攀岩折断了手腕。

meanings.meaning_en: for this reason
meanings.example: The cost of transport is a major expense for an industry. Hence factory location is an important consideration.
meanings.example_cn: 运输成本是企业的一大支出，因此工厂选址是重要的考虑因素。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who writes news reports for newspapers, magazines, television, or radio
meanings.example: a well-known journalist and broadcaster
meanings.example_cn: 一位著名的新闻记者兼播音员

meanings.meaning_en: money that you gain by selling things or doing business, after your costs have been paid
meanings.example: The shop’s daily profit is usually around $500.
meanings.example_cn: 这家商店每天的利润一般在500美元左右。

meanings.meaning_en: to get money from doing something
meanings.example: She sold the business and bought a farm with the profits.
meanings.example_cn: 她卖了公司，用所得利润买下了一座农场。

meanings.meaning_en: to force someone to do something
meanings.example: The law will compel employers to provide health insurance.
meanings.example_cn: 这项法律将强制雇主提供健康保险。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the sea and the creatures that live there
meanings.example: the enormous variety of marine life
meanings.example_cn: 海洋生物繁多的种类

meanings.meaning_en: a thick strong metal rope used on ships, to support bridges etc
meanings.example: The miners rode a conveyance attached to a cable made of braided steel wire.
meanings.example_cn: 矿工们乘坐连着钢索的缆车。

meanings.meaning_en: a small specially shaped piece of metal that you put into a lock and turn in order to lock or unlock a door, start a car etc
meanings.example: A bunch of keys hung from his belt.
meanings.example_cn: 他的皮带上挂着一串钥匙。

meanings.meaning_en: the back part of an object, vehicle, or building, or a position at the back of an object or area
meanings.example: Carole was left to bring up the rear.
meanings.example_cn: 屋后的花园

meanings.meaning_en: the time when a baby comes out of its mother’s body
meanings.example: Congratulations on the birth of your daughter!
meanings.example_cn: 恭喜你生了个女儿！

meanings.meaning_en: by a great amount
meanings.example: The day ended much as it began.
meanings.example_cn: 这一天结束时还像开始时一样。

meanings.meaning_en: a large amount of something
meanings.example: I don’t have much money with me.
meanings.example_cn: 我身上没带很多钱。

meanings.meaning_en: the action of forgiving sb for sth
meanings.example: to ask/grant/receive a pardon
meanings.example_cn: 请求 / 准予 / 获得赦免

meanings.meaning_en: to forgive someone for behaving badly
meanings.example: He asked her pardon for having deceived her.
meanings.example_cn: 他欺骗了她，向她请求原谅。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of words without a finite verb, especially when they are used to form part of a sentence, such as ‘walking along the road’ and ‘a bar of soap’
meanings.example: It is impossible to hypnotise someone simply by saying a particular word or phrase.
meanings.example_cn: 不可能仅通过说某个词或短语就能把人催眠。

meanings.meaning_en: a round metal container that you use for cooking, usually with one long handle and a lid
meanings.example: a frying pan
meanings.example_cn: 炒锅

meanings.meaning_en: a valuable stone, such as a diamond
meanings.example: a golden box containing precious jewels
meanings.example_cn: 一个装着贵重宝石的金盒子

meanings.meaning_en: almost the same
meanings.example: We have similar tastes in music.
meanings.example_cn: 我们对音乐的品位相近。

meanings.meaning_en: a weapon with a long pointed blade and a handle
meanings.example: He girded his sword on.
meanings.example_cn: 他佩带上他的剑。

meanings.meaning_en: to walk slowly across or around an area, usually without a clear direction or purpose
meanings.example: She wandered aimlessly around the streets.
meanings.example_cn: 她在大街上漫无目的地到处游荡。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel afraid
meanings.example: Don’t stand so near the edge! You’re frightening me.
meanings.example_cn: 别站得那么靠边！你要把我吓坏了。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who lives in a particular town, country, or state
meanings.example: We need our schools to teach students to be good citizens.
meanings.example_cn: 我们需要学校把学生培养为好公民。

meanings.meaning_en: used by the person speaking or writing to refer to himself or herself
meanings.example: I moved to this city six years ago.
meanings.example_cn: 六年前我搬到了这个城市。

meanings.meaning_en: a fault in someone’s character or in a system, organization, design etc
meanings.example: The legislation has a fundamental weakness.
meanings.example_cn: 这项立法有一个根本性缺陷。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone something and receive the same kind of thing from them at the same time
meanings.example: We exchange gifts at Christmas.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在圣诞节时交换礼物。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of giving someone something and receiving something else from them
meanings.example: It’s a place where people can chat and exchange ideas.
meanings.example_cn: 在这个地方人们可以聊天和交流想法。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who appears in a court of law to say what they know about a crime or other event
meanings.example: The defence is expected to call them as witnesses.
meanings.example_cn: 预计辩方会传召他们作为证人。

meanings.meaning_en: to see something happen, especially a crime or accident
meanings.example: Several residents claim to have witnessed the attack.
meanings.example_cn: 几位居民称目击了袭击事件。

meanings.example: We set sail from China for Japan.
meanings.example_cn: 我们从中国启航驶往日本。

meanings.meaning_en: shapes, lines etc painted or drawn on a surface, showing what someone or something looks like
meanings.example: The room had several pictures on the walls.
meanings.example_cn: 那个房间墙上有几幅画。

meanings.meaning_en: to show someone or something in a photograph, painting, or drawing
meanings.example: a book with pictures in it
meanings.example_cn: 带插图的书

meanings.meaning_en: a small house, especially one built of wood in an area of forest or mountains
meanings.example: a log cabin
meanings.example_cn: 原木小屋

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring time. There are 60 minutes in one hour
meanings.example: It takes me ten minutes to walk to work.
meanings.example_cn: 我步行上班要用十分钟。

meanings.meaning_en: to successfully complete something or get a good result, especially by working hard
meanings.example: Frances achieved very good exam results.
meanings.example_cn: 弗朗西丝考试取得了优异成绩。

meanings.meaning_en: very typical of a particular thing or of someone’s character
meanings.example: the highly characteristic (= very typical ) flint walls of the local houses
meanings.example_cn: 当地房子非常有特色的燧石墙

meanings.meaning_en: a quality or feature of something or someone that is typical of them and easy to recognize
meanings.example: Violent images are a defining characteristic of his work.
meanings.example_cn: 暴力形象是他作品的一个鲜明特征。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance, such as silicon, that allows some electric currents to pass through it, and is used in electronic equipment
meanings.example: In semiconductor receivers transistors take the place of vacuum tubes.
meanings.example_cn: 在半导体收音机中晶体管代替了真空管。

meanings.meaning_cn: 负面的；使显得有缺陷的
meanings.meaning_en: used to talk about a disadvantage of a thing or situation
meanings.example: ‘Any minus points ?’ ‘Well, the engine is rather noisy.’
meanings.example_cn: “有什么毛病吗？”“嗯，发动机噪音很大。”

meanings.meaning_en: used to show that one number or quantity is being subtracted  from another
meanings.example: On the minus side, there is no free back-up service if things go wrong.
meanings.example_cn: 不足之处是出了问题没有免费的技术支持服务。

meanings.meaning_en: not sensible, or showing bad judgment
meanings.example: Stop asking silly questions.
meanings.example_cn: 别再问傻问题了。

meanings.meaning_en: wanting to eat something
meanings.example: I was cold, tired, and hungry.
meanings.example_cn: 我又冷，又累，又饿。

meanings.meaning_en: a number that cannot be divided exactly by two, for example 1, 3, 5, 7 etc
meanings.example: The odd numbers are on the left as you walk up the street.
meanings.example_cn: 你沿这条街走时，单号在左边。

meanings.meaning_en: the vehicles moving along a road or street
meanings.example: There wasn’t much traffic on the roads.
meanings.example_cn: 路上车辆不多。

meanings.meaning_en: unable to see, move, feel etc in the normal way because you are not conscious
meanings.example: She was found alive but unconscious.
meanings.example_cn: 她被找到时还活着，但已不省人事。

meanings.meaning_en: the activity or skill of understanding written words
meanings.example: She loves reading.
meanings.example_cn: 她喜欢看书。

meanings.meaning_en: a chemical substance that exists in a pure form as diamonds, graphite etc, or in an impure form as coal, petrol etc. It is a chemical element : symbol C
meanings.example: I dread to think what the carbon footprint must be like of moving that coal but we have no choice.
meanings.example_cn: 我都不敢想象为了运这些煤产生了多少碳足迹，但我们没有选择。

meanings.meaning_en: the smaller and more important of the two parts of the government with the power to make laws, in countries such as the US, Australia, and France
meanings.example: The Senate approved the bill.
meanings.example_cn: 参议院批准了这项议案。

meanings.meaning_en: a doctor
meanings.example: your family physician
meanings.example_cn: 你的家庭医生

meanings.meaning_en: something that is proportional to something else is in the correct or most suitable relationship to it in size, amount, importance etc
meanings.example: The fee charged by the realtor is directly proportional to the price of the property.
meanings.example_cn: 房产代理人收取的费用和房产价格是成正比的。

meanings.meaning_en: the speed at which someone walks, runs, or moves
meanings.example: He quickened his pace , longing to be home.
meanings.example_cn: 他加快步伐，盼望着早点回到家中。

meanings.meaning_en: to walk first in one direction and then in another many times, especially because you are nervous
meanings.example: Traffic slowed to a walking pace.
meanings.example_cn: 车流速度减缓，犹如步行。

meanings.meaning_en: to control and use the natural force or power of something
meanings.example: We can harness the power of the wind to generate electricity.
meanings.example_cn: 我们可以利用风力发电。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of leather bands used to control a horse or to attach it to a vehicle it is pulling
meanings.example: The vet had improvised a harness.
meanings.example_cn: 兽医临时凑成了一副马具。

meanings.meaning_en: to think that something is probably true, especially something bad
meanings.example: She strongly suspected he was lying to her.
meanings.example_cn: 她非常怀疑他在对她撒谎。

meanings.meaning_en: an official document giving you permission to own or do something for a period of time
meanings.example: No special license will be regranted to anyone from now on.
meanings.example_cn: 特殊许可证今后不得向任何人再行发放。

meanings.meaning_en: to give official permission for someone to do or produce something, or for an activity to take place
meanings.example: Remind me to renew the driver's license.It will lapse next month.
meanings.example_cn: 提醒我更换驾驶执照，它下个月就失效了。

meanings.meaning_en: small in size
meanings.example: a little house
meanings.example_cn: 小屋

meanings.meaning_en: if a process accelerates or if something accelerates it, it happens faster than usual or sooner than you expect
meanings.example: measures to accelerate the rate of economic growth
meanings.example_cn: 加快经济增长速度的措施

meanings.meaning_en: a road, hill etc that is steep slopes at a high angle
meanings.example: The road became rocky and steep.
meanings.example_cn: 路变得崎岖陡峭起来。

meanings.meaning_en: the second largest continent; located south of Europe and bordered to the west by the South Atlantic and to the east by the Indian Ocean
meanings.example: The giraffe ranges in Africa.
meanings.example_cn: 长颈鹿生长在非洲。

meanings.meaning_en: an animal, plant, human, or any other living thing
meanings.example: All living organisms have to adapt to changes in environmental conditions.
meanings.example_cn: 一切生物都要适应环境条件的变化。

meanings.meaning_en: an area of a state or country that has its own government to deal with local matters
meanings.example: Fairfax County, Virginia
meanings.example_cn: 弗吉尼亚州费尔法克斯县

meanings.meaning_en: the world
meanings.example: Three large globes stand on the floor.
meanings.example_cn: 3个巨大的地球仪立在地板上。

meanings.meaning_cn: 食物，食品；养料，精神食粮
meanings.meaning_en: things that people and animals eat, such as vege-tables or meat
meanings.example: The restaurant serves good food at affordable prices.
meanings.example_cn: 那家餐厅物美价廉。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment with moving parts that uses power such as electricity to do a particular job
meanings.example: Could you get me a coffee from the drinks machine ?
meanings.example_cn: 给我从自动饮料机里买一罐咖啡好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel bored, especially by talking too much about something they are not interested in
meanings.example: He’s the sort of person who bores you at parties.
meanings.example_cn: 他这人会在派对上烦你。

meanings.meaning_en: to find the size, length, or amount of something, using standard units such as  inch es , metres etc
meanings.example: The rainfall was measured over a three-month period.
meanings.example_cn: 对三个月内的降雨量进行了测量。

meanings.meaning_en: to know what someone’s strengths and weaknesses are, so that you are able to deal with them or defeat them
meanings.example: She soon got the measure of her opponent.
meanings.example_cn: 她很快就掂出了对手的分量。

meanings.meaning_en: to improve a system, law, organization etc by making a lot of changes to it, so that it operates in a fairer or more effective way
meanings.example: plans to radically reform the tax system
meanings.example_cn: 彻底改革税收制度的计划

meanings.meaning_en: a change or changes made to a system or organization in order to improve it
meanings.example: Reforms were made to revive the economy.
meanings.example_cn: 为复苏经济而进行了改革。

meanings.meaning_en: the distance from the centre to the edge of a circle, or a line drawn from the centre to the edge
meanings.example: The shock of the explosion was felt over a radius of forty miles.
meanings.example_cn: 爆炸引起的剧烈震动在方圆40英里内都能感觉得到。

meanings.meaning_en: the hand when it is tightly closed, so that the fingers are curled in towards the  palm . People close their hand in a fist when they are angry or are going to hit someone.
meanings.example: She held the money tightly in her fist.
meanings.example_cn: 她把钱紧紧地攥在手中。

meanings.meaning_en: a person, thing, or situation that annoys you or causes problems
meanings.example: He could be a bit of a nuisance when he was drunk.
meanings.example_cn: 他喝醉时会是一个有点令人讨厌的人。

meanings.meaning_en: a clear difference or separation between two similar things
meanings.example: the distinction between formal and informal language
meanings.example_cn: 正式与非正式语言之间的差别

meanings.meaning_en: a small flying insect that sucks the blood of people and animals, sometimes spreading the disease  malaria
meanings.example: The male mosquito never stings.
meanings.example_cn: 雄蚊不叮。

meanings.meaning_en: a machine with keys that you press in order to print letters of the alphabet onto paper
meanings.example: She tapped out a letter on the typewriter.
meanings.example_cn: 她用打字机打出了一封信。

meanings.meaning_en: according to a rule, system etc
meanings.example: Article 47 may only be used in accordance with international law.
meanings.example_cn: 第47条只能按照国际法来施行。

meanings.meaning_en: used to show that one number or amount is added to another
meanings.example: Three plus six equals nine (3+6=9).
meanings.example_cn: 3 加6等于9。

meanings.meaning_en: more than zero – used especially when talking about temperatures
meanings.example: The total cost was $10,000, plus 14% interest.
meanings.example_cn: 全部费用是1万美元，外加14%的利息。

meanings.meaning_en: a male police officer
meanings.example: He tried to corrupt the policeman with money.
meanings.example_cn: 他设法用金钱向警察行贿。

meanings.meaning_en: the period of time around December 25th, the day when Christians celebrate the birth of Christ
meanings.example: Are you going home for Christmas?
meanings.example_cn: 你回家过圣诞节吗？

meanings.meaning_en: the feeling that you have when you want to know or learn more about sb/sth
meanings.example: I watched the first few episodes, but soon lost interest.
meanings.example_cn: 我看了前几集，但很快就失去了兴趣。

meanings.meaning_en: a glass building used for growing plants that need warmth, light, and protection
meanings.example: My small greenhouse gets very hot when the sun is shining.
meanings.example_cn: 我的小温室在太阳照耀下会被烤得炙热。

meanings.meaning_en: goodbye
meanings.example: “Farewell bright sun，” she cried.
meanings.example_cn: “再会吧，您，光明的太阳！” 她说着。

meanings.meaning_en: the action of saying goodbye
meanings.example: Mourners gathered to bid farewell to the victims of the plane tragedy.
meanings.example_cn: 哀悼者来向空难受害者告别。

meanings.meaning_en: used to refer to a man, boy, or male animal that has already been mentioned or is already known about
meanings.example: Are you in love with him?
meanings.example_cn: 你爱上他了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a long flat narrow board attached to a wall or in a frame or cupboard, used for putting things on
meanings.example: shelves of books
meanings.example_cn: 一层层书架的书

meanings.meaning_en: after the time you are talking about or after the present time
meanings.example: I’m going out for a bit – I’ll see you later.
meanings.example_cn: 我出去一会儿——回头见。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is popular or thought to be good at a particular time
meanings.example: Their music will never go out of fashion (= stop being fashionable ) .
meanings.example_cn: 他们的音乐永不过时。

meanings.meaning_en: happening or done every day
meanings.example: daily flights to Miami
meanings.example_cn: 每日飞往迈阿密的航班

meanings.meaning_en: a newspaper that is printed and sold every day, or every day except Sunday
meanings.example: China Daily receives dispatches from all parts of the world.
meanings.example_cn: 《中国日报》收到世界各地发来的电讯。

meanings.meaning_en: the part or surface of something that is furthest from the centre
meanings.example: The outside of the house was painted white.
meanings.example_cn: 这房子的外墙刷成了白色。

meanings.meaning_en: involving people who do not belong to the same group or organization as you
meanings.example: Outside observers said the election was free and fair.
meanings.example_cn: 外部观察员说此次选举自由而公正。

meanings.meaning_en: most important
meanings.example: His principal reason for making the journey was to visit his family.
meanings.example_cn: 他那次旅程的首要目的是探访家人。

meanings.meaning_en: the main person in a business or organization, who can make important business decisions and is legally responsible for them
meanings.example: Teaching is her principal source of income.
meanings.example_cn: 教书是她主要的收入来源。

meanings.meaning_en: used by the person speaking or writing to refer to something that belongs to or is connected with himself or herself
meanings.example: It was Glen’s idea, not mine.
meanings.example_cn: 这是格伦的主意，不是我的。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who owns or manages a farm
meanings.example: I have subleased a plot from the farmer.
meanings.example_cn: 我从农民那里租下了一小块地。

meanings.meaning_en: to change, or to make someone or something change
meanings.example: Her face hadn’t altered much over the years.
meanings.example_cn: 过了这么多年，她的容貌并没有多大改变。

meanings.meaning_en: the largest continent with 60% of the earth's population; it is joined to Europe on the west to form Eurasia; it is the site of some of the world's earliest civilizations
meanings.example: The European powers extended their authority in Asia.
meanings.example_cn: 欧洲列强在亚洲扩大他们的管辖权。

meanings.meaning_en: to bend or turn something, such as wire, hair, or cloth, into a particular shape
meanings.example: Her hands began to twist the handles of the bag she carried.
meanings.example_cn: 她的双手开始拧她拎着的那个包的拎柄。

meanings.meaning_en: a twisting action or movement
meanings.example: He smiled, a slow cynical twist of his lips.
meanings.example_cn: 他笑了，嘴巴慢慢一歪，带着嘲笑的意味。

meanings.meaning_en: an area for children to play, especially at a school or in a park, that often has special equipment for climbing on, riding on etc
meanings.example: children shouting and running in the playground
meanings.example_cn: 在操场上叫嚷奔跑的孩子们

meanings.meaning_en: help and advice that is given to someone about their work, education, or personal life
meanings.example: I went to a counselor for guidance on my career.
meanings.example_cn: 我去找了一位顾问给我作职业指导。

meanings.meaning_en: if a liquid evaporates, or if heat evaporates it, it changes into a gas
meanings.example: Most of the water had evaporated.
meanings.example_cn: 大部分的水都蒸发了。

meanings.meaning_en: placed in a vertical position
meanings.example: Your seat should be in the upright position when the plane is landing.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机降落时应调直座椅靠背。

meanings.meaning_en: something that makes you feel very proud
meanings.example: Over 100 players competed for the honour of representing the county in the National Finals.
meanings.example_cn: 100多位选手为争取代表郡参加全国总决赛的荣誉进行角逐。

meanings.meaning_en: to save someone or something from a situation of danger or harm
meanings.example: Survivors of the crash were rescued by helicopter.
meanings.example_cn: 空难的生还者被直升机救了出来。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone or something is rescued from danger
meanings.example: a daring rescue at sea
meanings.example_cn: 英勇的海上营救行动

meanings.meaning_en: the scientific idea that plants and animals develop and change gradually over a long period of time
meanings.example: the theory of evolution
meanings.example_cn: 进化论

meanings.meaning_en: a thin close-fitting piece of clothing that covers a woman’s leg and foot
meanings.example: I want you stuffed in my stocking.
meanings.example_cn: 我只要你塞在我的袜子里。

meanings.meaning_en: a small tool used in work such as science or medicine
meanings.example: surgical instruments
meanings.example_cn: 外科(手术)器械

meanings.meaning_en: pleasant, attractive, or enjoyable
meanings.example: They’ve got a very nice house.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的房子真漂亮。

meanings.meaning_en: a department or group of related departments within a university
meanings.example: the Engineering Faculty
meanings.example_cn: 工程学院

meanings.meaning_en: a car
meanings.example: imported autos
meanings.example_cn: 进口汽车

meanings.meaning_en: a telephone
meanings.example: Much of his work is done by phone .
meanings.example_cn: 他的工作大部分是通过电话进行的。

meanings.meaning_en: to save something or someone from being harmed or destroyed
meanings.example: We must encourage the planting of new trees and preserve our existing woodlands.
meanings.example_cn: 我们必须鼓励栽种新树木，同时也要保护现有的林地。

meanings.meaning_en: to open something that is tied, fastened or wrapped
meanings.example: The screws can be undone by hand.
meanings.example_cn: 这些螺丝可以用手拧开。

meanings.meaning_en: a large organ in your body that produces bile and cleans your blood
meanings.example: Three weeks ago, it was discovered the cancer had spread to his liver.
meanings.example_cn: 三周前，发现癌已扩散到了他的肝脏。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of space between two places or things
meanings.example: Measure the distance between the two points.
meanings.example_cn: 量出两点之间的距离。

meanings.meaning_en: expected to happen or arrive at a particular time
meanings.example: The team are due to fly to Italy next month.
meanings.example_cn: 该球队预定下个月飞往意大利。

meanings.meaning_en: a small animal with four legs that people often keep as a pet
meanings.example: The police played an elaborate game of cat and mouse to trap him.
meanings.example_cn: 警方跟他玩了一场精心布局的猫捉老鼠游戏，诱他落网。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of space a container, room etc has to hold things or people
meanings.example: The room had seating capacity for about 80.
meanings.example_cn: 这房间能坐80个人左右。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask someone if they would like to have something, or to hold something out to them so that they can take it
meanings.example: Can I offer you something to drink?
meanings.example_cn: 我给你拿点喝的好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a statement saying that you are willing to do something for someone or give them something
meanings.example: I can’t turn down the offer of a free trip to Milan!
meanings.example_cn: 我怎能拒绝免费去米兰旅行的机会！

meanings.meaning_en: a large formal meeting where a lot of people discuss important matters such as business, politics, or science, especially for several days
meanings.example: Representatives from over 100 countries attended the International Peace Conference in Geneva.
meanings.example_cn: 来自一百多个国家的代表出席了在日内瓦举行的国际和平大会。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel ashamed, nervous, or uncomfortable, especially in front of other people
meanings.example: He didn’t want to embarrass her by asking questions.
meanings.example_cn: 他不想提问让她尴尬。

meanings.meaning_en: the physical structure of a person or animal
meanings.example: the human body
meanings.example_cn: 人体

meanings.meaning_en: a time of rest from work, school etc
meanings.example: The school holidays start tomorrow.
meanings.example_cn: 学校假期从明天开始。

meanings.meaning_en: a transparent solid substance used for making windows, bottles etc
meanings.example: a glass bowl
meanings.example_cn: 玻璃碗

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or belonging to a king or queen
meanings.example: the royal palace
meanings.example_cn: 王宫

meanings.meaning_en: a line of raised water that moves across the surface of the sea
meanings.example: Dee watched the waves breaking on the shore.
meanings.example_cn: 迪伊凝视着拍岸的波涛。

meanings.meaning_en: if you wave something, or if it waves, it moves from side to side
meanings.example: The ship tipped over, and finally vanished beneath the waves.
meanings.example_cn: 船倾覆了，最终沉没在海浪之下。

meanings.meaning_en: not like sb/sth else
meanings.example: American English is significantly different from British English.
meanings.example_cn: 美国英语与英国英语有很大差异。

meanings.meaning_en: to divide something or separate something from its main part, using scissors, a knife etc
meanings.example: Do you want me to cut the cake?
meanings.example_cn: 要我切蛋糕吗？

meanings.meaning_en: words that you say or write in order to praise someone or something
meanings.example: It’s important to give children plenty of praise and encouragement.
meanings.example_cn: 对小孩子多加表扬和鼓励是很重要的。

meanings.meaning_en: to say that you admire and approve of someone or something, especially publicly
meanings.example: Her teacher was full of praise for her work.
meanings.example_cn: 老师对她的作业赞不绝口。

meanings.meaning_en: a child who has been chosen to help a teacher in some way in class
meanings.example: He was elected monitor.
meanings.example_cn: 他当选为班长。

meanings.meaning_en: the time at the beginning of the day when light first appears
meanings.example: When dawn broke (= the first light of the day appeared ) , we were still 50 miles from Calcutta.
meanings.example_cn: 破晓的时候，我们离加尔各答还有50英里。

meanings.meaning_en: if day or morning dawns, it begins
meanings.example: I was up at the crack of dawn (= very early in the morning ) to get the plane.
meanings.example_cn: 我一大早就起来赶飞机。

meanings.meaning_en: a long pole with a wide flat blade at one end, used for rowing a boat
meanings.example: He pulled as hard as he could on the oars.
meanings.example_cn: 他拼命地划桨。

meanings.meaning_en: to be in or move into a position where your body is resting on your knees
meanings.example: Tom knelt down and patted the dog.
meanings.example_cn: 汤姆跪下来轻轻拍了拍那只狗。

meanings.meaning_en: average, common, or usual, not different or special
meanings.example: It’s just an ordinary camera.
meanings.example_cn: 这只是普通的相机。

meanings.meaning_en: the money charged for sending a letter, package etc by post
meanings.example: How much is the postage for a postcard?
meanings.example_cn: 寄一张明信片的邮资是多少？

meanings.meaning_en: one of several parts that together make up a whole machine, system etc
meanings.example: companies that make electronic components for computer products
meanings.example_cn: 为计算机产品生产电子零件的公司

meanings.meaning_en: to touch someone or something quickly and hard with your hand, a stick etc
meanings.example: He raised the hammer and hit the bell.
meanings.example_cn: 他举起钟锤敲钟。

meanings.meaning_en: an occasion when something that is aimed at something else touches it, reaches it, or damages it
meanings.example: He was hit by a car.
meanings.example_cn: 他被汽车撞了。

meanings.meaning_en: to shout as a way of showing happiness, praise, approval, or support of someone or something
meanings.example: Everybody cheered when the firemen arrived.
meanings.example_cn: 消防员到达时，大家都欢呼起来。

meanings.meaning_en: to come up to a particular place, person, or object and go past them
meanings.example: The crowd parted to let the truck pass.
meanings.example_cn: 人群分开让卡车通过。

meanings.meaning_en: the height of something in relation to the ground or to another object
meanings.example: Your arms should be at the same level as your desk.
meanings.example_cn: 手臂应该与桌子齐平。

meanings.meaning_en: flat and not sloping in any direction
meanings.example: The floors in the old house were not completely level.
meanings.example_cn: 老房子的地面不是完全平整的。

meanings.meaning_en: in or to any place
meanings.example: I haven't got anywhere to live.
meanings.example_cn: 我没有任何地方住。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something that produces an effect or change in something or in someone’s situation
meanings.example: the areas affected by the hurricane
meanings.example_cn: 受飓风影响的地区

meanings.meaning_en: a large wild animal that can run very fast, eats grass, and has horns
meanings.example: The hunter wounded the deer.
meanings.example_cn: 猎人打伤了鹿。

meanings.meaning_en: used with singular nouns to refer to all the members of a group of things or people
meanings.example: His every utterance will be scrutinized.
meanings.example_cn: 他说的每句话都会被细查。

meanings.meaning_en: used to show that you are talking about someone or something that has not been mentioned before, or that your listener does not know about
meanings.example: We have a problem.
meanings.example_cn: 我们遇到了一个麻烦。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the rooms inside a pub
meanings.example: The public bar was crowded.
meanings.example_cn: 大众酒吧间里人很多。

meanings.meaning_en: a large quantity that is enough or more than enough
meanings.example: There’s plenty to do and see in New York.
meanings.example_cn: 在纽约有很多事可做，很多东西可看。

meanings.meaning_en: the cases, bags, boxes etc carried by someone who is travelling
meanings.example: Check your baggage in at the desk.
meanings.example_cn: 在服务台托运行李。

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring an amount of liquid, especially beer or milk. In Britain a pint is equal to 0.568 litres, and in the US it is equal to 0.473 litres.
meanings.example: Add two pints of water to the mixture.
meanings.example_cn: 在混合物中加入两品脱的水。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask for a seat, table, room, etc. to be available for you or sb else at a future time
meanings.example: I'd like to reserve a table for three for eight o'clock.
meanings.example_cn: 我想预订八点钟供三人用餐的桌位。

meanings.meaning_en: a small flying insect with two wings
meanings.example: There were flies buzzing all around us.
meanings.example_cn: 苍蝇嗡嗡地在我们周围飞来飞去。

meanings.meaning_en: if a plane, spacecraft etc flies, it moves through the air
meanings.example: The plane was attacked as it flew over restricted airspace.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机在飞越空中禁区时遭到了攻击。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who you know and like very much and enjoy spending time with
meanings.example: Jerry, this is my friend Sue.
meanings.example_cn: 杰里，这是我的朋友休。

meanings.meaning_en: some or even the smallest amount or number
meanings.example: Have you got any money?
meanings.example_cn: 你身上有没有钱？

meanings.meaning_en: to become larger in size, number, or amount, or to make something become larger
meanings.example: Water expands as it freezes.
meanings.example_cn: 水结冰时会膨胀。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to look after people who are ill or injured, usually in a hospital
meanings.example: The nurse is coming to give you an injection.
meanings.example_cn: 护士会来给你打针。

meanings.meaning_en: to look after someone who is ill or injured
meanings.example: The school nurse sent Sara home.
meanings.example_cn: 学校的护士送萨拉回家。

meanings.meaning_en: a room or building containing a toilet
meanings.example: public toilets
meanings.example_cn: 公共厕所

meanings.meaning_en: if something such as an insect, small animal, or car creeps, it moves slowly and quietly
meanings.example: a caterpillar creeping down my arm
meanings.example_cn: 顺着我的胳膊慢慢爬下的毛虫

meanings.meaning_en: done quickly, immediately, or at the right time
meanings.example: Prompt action must be taken.
meanings.example_cn: 必须立即采取行动。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone decide to do something
meanings.example: Prompt payment is requested.
meanings.example_cn: 请立即付款。

meanings.meaning_en: things which are carried by road, train etc
meanings.example: a goods train
meanings.example_cn: 一列货车

meanings.meaning_en: the series of jobs that a person has in a particular area of work, usually involving more responsibility as time passes
meanings.example: a teaching career
meanings.example_cn: 教学事业

meanings.meaning_en: a building where important  cultural, historical, or scientific objects are kept and shown to the public
meanings.example: the Museum of Modern Art
meanings.example_cn: 现代艺术博物馆

meanings.meaning_en: the area where the land meets the sea
meanings.example: We drove along the Pacific coast to Seattle.
meanings.example_cn: 我们沿着太平洋海岸驾车前往西雅图。

meanings.meaning_en: a clear, very hard valuable stone, used in jewellery and in industry
meanings.example: a diamond engagement ring
meanings.example_cn: 订婚钻戒

meanings.meaning_en: more and more all the time
meanings.example: Marketing techniques are becoming increasingly sophisticated.
meanings.example_cn: 市场营销技巧越来越巧妙。

meanings.meaning_en: if you spill a liquid, or if it spills, it accidentally flows over the edge of a container
meanings.example: Katie almost spilled her milk.
meanings.example_cn: 凯蒂差点把牛奶洒出来。

meanings.meaning_en: the ability to understand something
meanings.example: Why you let her talk you into doing such a foolish thing is beyond my comprehension (= impossible for me to understand ) .
meanings.example_cn: 你怎么会被她说服去做这种蠢事，我实在是无法理解。

meanings.meaning_en: your mind and your thoughts
meanings.example: The painful memories eventually faded from her consciousness.
meanings.example_cn: 那些痛苦的回忆最终从她的意识中淡去了。

meanings.meaning_en: the front part of your body between your neck and your stomach
meanings.example: Her heart was pounding in her chest.
meanings.example_cn: 她的心在胸口怦怦直跳。

meanings.meaning_en: used to state what the result would be if sth did not happen or if the situation were different
meanings.example: You’ll have to go now, otherwise you’ll miss your bus.
meanings.example_cn: 你现在就得走，要不然就赶不上公共汽车了。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone or something changes position or moves from one place to another
meanings.example: the dancer’s graceful movements
meanings.example_cn: 舞蹈演员优美的动作

meanings.meaning_en: a wide round container that is open at the top, used to hold liquids, food, flowers etc
meanings.example: Mix all the ingredients thoroughly in a large bowl.
meanings.example_cn: 将所有配料放在大碗里搅拌均匀。

meanings.meaning_en: a long wooden stick with a special shape that is used in some sports and games
meanings.example: a baseball bat
meanings.example_cn: 一只棒球棒

meanings.meaning_en: more than a little but not very
meanings.example: Things have changed somewhat since then.
meanings.example_cn: 从那时候起，情况就有些不一样了。

meanings.meaning_en: a member of your family who lived a long time ago
meanings.example: My ancestors were French.
meanings.example_cn: 我的祖先是法国人。

meanings.meaning_en: willing to understand and respect other people’s ideas, opinions, and feelings
meanings.example: I had quite liberal parents.
meanings.example_cn: 我的父母思想很开明。

meanings.meaning_en: a long distance away
meanings.example: We can walk to my house from here. It isn’t far.
meanings.example_cn: 我们可以从这里步行去我家，不远。

meanings.meaning_en: a long distance
meanings.example: You could see the mountains in the far distance.
meanings.example_cn: 你可以看到远处的群山。

meanings.meaning_en: a fight between opposing armies, groups of ships, groups of people etc, especially one that is part of a larger war
meanings.example: the Battle of Trafalgar
meanings.example_cn: 特拉法尔加战役

meanings.meaning_en: to take part in a fight or war
meanings.example: a pitched battle (=  a long and serious battle  ) between police and drug gangs
meanings.example_cn: 警方和贩毒团伙之间的一场激战

meanings.meaning_en: coming from or existing in the hottest parts of the world
meanings.example: the tropical rain forests
meanings.example_cn: 热带雨林

meanings.meaning_en: the smallest unit into which any substance can be divided without losing its own chemical nature, usually consisting of two or more atoms
meanings.example: The molecules of oxygen gas contain just two atoms.
meanings.example_cn: 氧分子中只有两个原子。

meanings.meaning_en: affecting all or most people, places or things
meanings.example: There has been a general decline in standards.
meanings.example_cn: 道德水准普遍下降。

meanings.meaning_en: an officer of very high rank in the army or air force
meanings.example: ways to improve your general health
meanings.example_cn: 全面提高身体素质的方法

meanings.meaning_en: kind and careful in the way you behave or do things, so that you do not hurt or damage anyone or anything
meanings.example: Arthur was a very gentle, caring person.
meanings.example_cn: 阿瑟是一个非常温柔体贴的人。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of moving or the way that someone or something moves
meanings.example: Newton’s first law of motion
meanings.example_cn: 牛顿第一运动定律

meanings.meaning_en: used when you are adding a fact or piece of information that seems surprising, or seems very different from what you have just said
meanings.example: This is a cheap and simple process. However, there are dangers.
meanings.example_cn: 这是个花钱少而又简单的方法，不过有危险。

meanings.meaning_en: to stay or move on the surface of a liquid without sinking
meanings.example: A plastic bag was floating in the water.
meanings.example_cn: 一个塑料袋在水中漂浮。

meanings.meaning_en: to change or move something slightly to improve it or make it more suitable for a particular purpose
meanings.example: Check and adjust the brakes regularly.
meanings.example_cn: 经常检查并调节刹车装置。

meanings.meaning_en: plays considered as a form of literature
meanings.example: the great traditions of ancient Greek drama
meanings.example_cn: 古希腊戏剧的伟大传统

meanings.meaning_en: shaped like a circle
meanings.example: a circular table
meanings.example_cn: 圆桌

meanings.meaning_en: relating to money or the management of money
meanings.example: financial transactions
meanings.example_cn: 财务往来

meanings.meaning_en: in a higher position than something else
meanings.example: He lived in a flat above the shop.
meanings.example_cn: 他住在那商店上面的一套房间里。

meanings.meaning_en: feeling or showing a lot of interest and excitement about something
meanings.example: an enthusiastic supporter of reform
meanings.example_cn: 改革的热心支持者

meanings.meaning_en: a man who rents a room, building, or piece of land to someone
meanings.example: His landlord doubled the rent.
meanings.example_cn: 他的房东把房租提高了一倍。

meanings.meaning_en: a mountain with a large hole at the top, through which lava is sometimes forced out
meanings.example: Pompeii was destroyed when the volcano erupted in 79 AD.
meanings.example_cn: 庞贝城于公元79年在火山爆发中毁灭。

meanings.meaning_en: to take or carry something from one place to another
meanings.example: Your luggage will be conveyed to the hotel by taxi.
meanings.example_cn: 你的行李将由出租车送到酒店。

meanings.meaning_en: firm, stiff, and difficult to press down, break, or cut
meanings.example: a hard wooden chair
meanings.example_cn: 一把硬木椅

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment that you speak into to record your voice or make it louder when you are speaking or performing in public
meanings.example: She spoke confidently into the microphone.
meanings.example_cn: 她自信地对着麦克风说话。

meanings.meaning_cn: 骄傲的；自负的〔含贬义〕；自豪的
meanings.meaning_en: thinking that you are more important, skilful etc than you really are – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: a proud man who would not admit his mistakes
meanings.example_cn: 自以为是、不愿认错的男子

meanings.meaning_en: in a gentle way
meanings.example: ‘You go back to bed now,’ he said gently.
meanings.example_cn: “你回去睡觉吧。”他温柔地说道。

meanings.meaning_en: the ability of your hair to form curls
meanings.example: Use a diffuser to maximise the volume and curl of your hair.
meanings.example_cn: 使用电吹风罩把头发吹得蓬松卷曲。

meanings.meaning_en: to form a twisted or curved shape, or to make something do this
meanings.example: Decorate the cake with chocolate curls.
meanings.example_cn: 用巧克力圈装饰蛋糕。

meanings.meaning_en: dark, especially in a way that makes you feel sad
meanings.example: It was a gloomy room with one small window.
meanings.example_cn: 房间里阴森森的，只有一扇小窗。

meanings.meaning_en: the particular taste of a food or drink
meanings.example: Which flavour do you want - chocolate or vanilla?
meanings.example_cn: 你要哪种味道的，巧克力还是香草？

meanings.meaning_en: making a lot of noise
meanings.example: The book fell to the floor with a loud bang.
meanings.example_cn: 书砰的一声掉落到地上。

meanings.meaning_en: the way in which something is done or happens
meanings.example: He felt some guilt over the manner of her death.
meanings.example_cn: 她以这种方式死去，他心里有些内疚。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the way that your mind works and the way that this affects your behaviour
meanings.example: Sleep disorders are a serious psychological problem .
meanings.example_cn: 睡眠障碍是严重的心理疾病。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is passive tends to accept things that happen to them or things that people say to them, without taking any action
meanings.example: Kathy seems to take a very passive role in the relationship.
meanings.example_cn: 凯茜在这一关系中似乎扮演着十分被动的角色。

meanings.meaning_en: tender food is easy to cut and eat, especially because it has been well cooked
meanings.example: Continue cooking until the meat is tender.
meanings.example_cn: 把肉一直烧到松软为止。

meanings.meaning_en: without water or liquid inside or on the surface
meanings.example: I need to change into some dry clothes .
meanings.example_cn: 我要换上干衣服。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is mute does not speak, or refuses to speak
meanings.example: Billy continued to stand there, mute and defiant.
meanings.example_cn: 比利还是站在那儿一声不吭，一副不服气的样子。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who cannot speak
a  dormitory
meanings.example: But I had no food in my dorm, so I had to go to canteen.
meanings.example_cn: 但是我在宿舍没有东西可吃，所以我只能去餐厅了。

meanings.meaning_en: to get rid of something
meanings.example: Discard any old cleaning materials.
meanings.example_cn: 把所有旧清洁用品都扔掉。

meanings.meaning_en: the process or result of something or someone becoming different
meanings.example: I find it hard to cope with change.
meanings.example_cn: 我觉得很难适应变化。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely good
meanings.example: an outstanding example of a 13th-century castle
meanings.example_cn: 13世纪城堡的杰出典范

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of extreme unhappiness
meanings.example: Luke’s behaviour caused his parents great distress.
meanings.example_cn: 卢克的行为使他的父母深感忧虑。

meanings.meaning_en: to become thinner or weaker after continuous use, or to make something do this
meanings.example: The cushions are starting to wear a little.
meanings.example_cn: 这些靠垫开始有点磨破了。

meanings.meaning_en: if you relate two different things, you show how they are connected
meanings.example: The report seeks to relate the rise in crime to an increase in unemployment.
meanings.example_cn: 报告试图把犯罪率上升和失业增加联系起来。

meanings.meaning_en: if you undergo a change, an unpleasant experience etc, it happens to you or is done to you
meanings.example: The country has undergone massive changes recently.
meanings.example_cn: 这个国家最近经历了巨大的变化。

meanings.meaning_en: a radioactive substance is dangerous because it contains  radiation
meanings.example: the problem of how to dispose of radioactive waste
meanings.example_cn: 如何处理放射性废物的问题

meanings.meaning_en: the study of the countries, oceans, rivers, mountains, cities etc of the world
meanings.example: a geography lesson
meanings.example_cn: 地理课

meanings.meaning_en: of or belonging to him
meanings.example: He took my hand in his.
meanings.example_cn: 他握住我的手。

meanings.meaning_en: likely to exist, happen, or be true
meanings.example: The probable cause of the fire was faulty wiring.
meanings.example_cn: 起火的原因很可能是电路故障。

meanings.meaning_en: knowing or realizing sth
meanings.example: I don't think people are really aware of just how much it costs.
meanings.example_cn: 我认为人们并不真正明白这要花多少钱。

meanings.meaning_en: in the middle of an area or an object
meanings.example: He lives in central London.
meanings.example_cn: 他住在伦敦市中心。

meanings.meaning_en: the fact of owning something
meanings.example: a dispute over the ownership of the land
meanings.example_cn: 关于土地所有权的纠纷

meanings.meaning_en: all the people living together in a house
meanings.example: Most households now own at least one car.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数家庭现在至少有一辆汽车。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where something important or interesting happened
meanings.example: an archaeological site
meanings.example_cn: 考古现场

meanings.meaning_en: the number 9
meanings.example: He’s only been in this job for nine months.
meanings.example_cn: 他干这份工作才九个月。

meanings.meaning_en: a long journey in a ship or spacecraft
meanings.example: The voyage from England to India used to take six months.
meanings.example_cn: 过去从英格兰到印度要航行六个月。

meanings.meaning_en: to travel to a place, especially by ship
meanings.example: the Titanic’s maiden voyage
meanings.example_cn: “泰坦尼克”号的首航
