meanings.meaning_en: costing a lot of money
meanings.example: the most expensive restaurant in town
meanings.example_cn: 城里最贵的餐馆

meanings.meaning_en: to give something to someone or make it available to them, because they need it or want it
meanings.example: Tea and biscuits will be provided.
meanings.example_cn: 有茶水和饼干供应。

meanings.meaning_en: earlier than something or someone
meanings.example: The new road should be completed before the end of the year.
meanings.example_cn: 这条新公路应该在年底前完工。

meanings.meaning_en: having nothing inside
meanings.example: an empty box
meanings.example_cn: 空盒子

meanings.meaning_en: warmth or the quality of being hot
meanings.example: Ice needs heat to melt.
meanings.example_cn: 冰需要热才能融化。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something become warm or hot
meanings.example: Insulating the attic is a good way to reduce heat loss.
meanings.example_cn: 为阁楼安装隔热层是减少热量流失的好方法。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to a job that needs special education and training
meanings.example: What professional qualifications does he have?
meanings.example_cn: 他有哪些专业资格？

meanings.meaning_en: someone who works in a job that needs special education and training, such as a doctor, lawyer, or architect
meanings.example: You may need to seek professional help.
meanings.example_cn: 你可能需要寻求专业帮助。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to Canada or its people
meanings.example: What about the Canadian policy?
meanings.example_cn: 那么加拿大的政策呢？

meanings.meaning_en: a long heavy piece of wood or metal used in building houses, bridges etc
meanings.example: The cottage had exposed oak beams.
meanings.example_cn: 小屋的橡木梁裸露着。

meanings.meaning_en: happening or existing at the end, with no others after
meanings.example: I didn’t read the last chapter of the book.
meanings.example_cn: 我没有看这本书的最后一章。

meanings.meaning_en: after everything or everyone else
meanings.example: Add the flour last.
meanings.example_cn: 最后加面粉。

meanings.meaning_en: a person, event, or thing that makes something happen
meanings.example: It’s our job to establish the cause of the fire.
meanings.example_cn: 查明起火原因是我们的责任。

meanings.meaning_en: hesitating before doing sth because you do not want to do it or because you are not sure that it is the right thing to do
meanings.example: She gave a reluctant smile.
meanings.example_cn: 她勉强笑了笑。

meanings.meaning_en: to say something suddenly and loudly because you are surprised, angry, or excited
meanings.example: ‘No!’ she exclaimed in shock.
meanings.example_cn: “不！”她惊呼道。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of animal that is kept as a pet or on a farm
meanings.example: Spaniels are my favourite breed of dog.
meanings.example_cn: 西班牙猎犬是我最喜欢的犬种。

meanings.meaning_en: if animals breed, they  mate in order to have babies
meanings.example: Eagles breed during the cooler months of the year.
meanings.example_cn: 鹰在一年中较凉爽的季节交配繁殖。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who looks after animals
meanings.example: a beekeeper
meanings.example_cn: 养蜂人

meanings.meaning_en: the part of your face which you put food into, or which you use for speaking
meanings.example: He lifted his glass to his mouth.
meanings.example_cn: 他把玻璃杯举到嘴边。

meanings.meaning_en: a large desert animal with a long neck and either one or two shumps on its back
meanings.example: When fresh food and water are not available,the camel can feed off its hump.
meanings.example_cn: 在没有新食物和水供应时，骆驼从它的驼峰中获取能量。

meanings.meaning_en: the place where the souls of bad people are believed to be punished after death, especially in the Christian and Muslim religions
meanings.example: War is hell.
meanings.example_cn: 战争是人间地狱。

meanings.meaning_en: the fourth thing in a series
meanings.example: the fourth of July
meanings.example_cn: 7月4日

meanings.meaning_en: ¼; one of four equal parts
meanings.example: one-fourth/three-fourths

meanings.meaning_en: the third month of the year, between February and April
meanings.example: She started work here last March.
meanings.example_cn: 她去年3月开始在这儿工作。

meanings.meaning_en: a door, gate etc that you go through to enter a place
meanings.example: the station entrance
meanings.example_cn: 车站的入口处

meanings.meaning_en: extremely important and necessary
meanings.example: Window locks are fairly cheap and absolutely essential.
meanings.example_cn: 窗锁相当便宜，绝对有必要安装。

meanings.meaning_en: to think about something carefully, especially before making a choice or decision
meanings.example: We will have to consider your offer carefully.
meanings.example_cn: 我们得仔细考虑你的提议。

meanings.meaning_en: to press something or make it smaller so that it takes up less space, or to become smaller
meanings.example: Light silk is best for parachutes, as it compresses well and then expands rapidly.
meanings.example_cn: 轻质丝绸最适合制作降落伞，因为这种面料便于压缩，而且展开迅速。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of your face above your eyes and below your hair
meanings.example: He wiped his brow with the back of his hand.
meanings.example_cn: 他用手背擦了擦额头。

meanings.meaning_en: physically or mentally healthy
meanings.example: of sound mind (=not mentally ill)
meanings.example_cn: 心智健全的

meanings.meaning_en: to remember a particular fact, event, or situation from the past
meanings.example: You don’t happen to recall his name, do you?
meanings.example_cn: 你不会恰巧还想得起他的名字吧？

meanings.meaning_en: almost not or almost none at all
meanings.example: The city had scarcely changed in 20 years.
meanings.example_cn: 这座城市20年中几乎没有什么改变。

meanings.meaning_en: feeling happy and confident about yourself or a particular situation
meanings.example: At last they were able to feel secure about the future.
meanings.example_cn: 他们终于觉得不必为将来而担忧了。

meanings.meaning_en: the person who has been elected to lead the government of a town or city
meanings.example: the election of the London mayor
meanings.example_cn: 选举伦敦市长

meanings.meaning_en: a larger amount or number than anyone or anything else
meanings.example: Which class has the most children in it?
meanings.example_cn: 哪个班级孩子最多？

meanings.meaning_en: having the greatest amount of a particular quality
meanings.example: She’s one of the most experienced teachers in the district.
meanings.example_cn: 她是该地区最有经验的教师之一。

meanings.meaning_en: the way in which two facts, ideas, events etc are related to each other, and one is affected or caused by the other
meanings.example: Police have so far failed to establish a connection between the two murders.
meanings.example_cn: 到目前为止警方尚未确定两宗凶杀案之间有关联。

meanings.meaning_en: everything in the physical world that is not controlled by humans, such as wild plants and animals, earth and rocks, and the weather
meanings.example: We grew up in the countryside, surrounded by the beauties of nature.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在乡村长大，周围是美丽的大自然。

meanings.meaning_en: if you are alone in a place, there is no one with you
meanings.example: She lives alone.
meanings.example_cn: 她一个人生活。

meanings.meaning_en: without any help from other people
meanings.example: You shouldn’t leave a child alone in the house.
meanings.example_cn: 你不应该把小孩独自留在家里。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely good, enjoyable, impressive etc
meanings.example: ‘How was your holiday?’ ‘Marvellous!’
meanings.example_cn: “假期过得好吗？”“好极了！”

meanings.meaning_en: to carry sth; to have sb/sth in your hand, arms, etc.
meanings.example: She was holding a large box.
meanings.example_cn: 她提着一只大箱子。

meanings.meaning_en: to enjoy something or think that it is nice or good
meanings.example: I like your jacket.
meanings.example_cn: 我喜欢你这件上衣。

meanings.meaning_en: to behave towards someone or something in a particular way
meanings.example: She treats me like one of the family.
meanings.example_cn: 她把我当作家人看待。

meanings.meaning_en: something special that you give someone or do for them because you know they will enjoy it
meanings.example: sewage treated so that it can be used as fertilizer
meanings.example_cn: 经过处理可用作肥料的污水

meanings.meaning_en: to ask for something in an anxious or urgent way, because you want it very much
meanings.example: She begged and pleaded with them until they finally agreed.
meanings.example_cn: 她一再恳求，后来他们终于同意了。

meanings.meaning_en: the sound each step makes when someone is walking
meanings.example: He heard someone’s footsteps in the hall.
meanings.example_cn: 他听见门厅里有脚步声。

meanings.meaning_en: used when the man or boy who performs an action is also affected by it
meanings.example: He introduced himself.
meanings.example_cn: 他作了自我介绍。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a person or an animal healthy again after an illness
meanings.example: Will you be able to cure him, Doctor?
meanings.example_cn: 医生，你能把他治好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: the act of making someone well again after an illness
meanings.example: The new treatment effected a miraculous cure.
meanings.example_cn: 这种新疗法产生了奇迹般的疗效。

meanings.meaning_en: a main branch on a tree
meanings.example: I rested my fishing rod against a pine bough.
meanings.example_cn: 我把我的鱼竿靠在松树的一个大树枝上。

meanings.meaning_en: a black and yellow flying insect that makes  honey  and can sting you
meanings.example: a swarm of bees
meanings.example_cn: 一群蜜蜂

meanings.meaning_en: a formal written agreement between two or more countries or governments
meanings.example: Both sides have agreed to sign the treaty .
meanings.example_cn: 双方都同意签署该条约。

meanings.meaning_en: a creature with wings and feathers that can usually fly. Many birds sing and build nests, and female birds lay eggs
meanings.example: wild birds
meanings.example_cn: 野鸟

meanings.meaning_en: a type of insect that has large wings, often with beautiful colours
meanings.example: Butterflies and moths are attracted to the wild flowers.
meanings.example_cn: 蝴蝶和飞蛾为野花所吸引。

meanings.meaning_en: to put something inside or into something else
meanings.example: He took a small key from his pocket and slowly inserted it into the lock.
meanings.example_cn: 他从衣袋里掏出一把小钥匙，然后缓缓地将其插入锁孔里。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the stages of a process of development or change
meanings.example: a new drug that is in the experimental phase
meanings.example_cn: 处于试验阶段的一种新药

meanings.meaning_en: having a shape, surface, pattern etc that is not even, smooth, or balanced
meanings.example: a jagged, irregular coastline
meanings.example_cn: 锯齿状不规则的海岸线

meanings.meaning_en: in a way that cannot be different or be avoided
meanings.example: The care of old people necessarily involves quite a lot of heavy lifting.
meanings.example_cn: 照顾老年人必定要干很多搬重物的活儿。

meanings.meaning_en: material used for making things such as clothes
meanings.example: woollen/cotton cloth
meanings.example_cn: 毛料；棉布料

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of wood, glass, etc. that is opened and closed so that people can get in and out of a room, building, car, etc.; a similar thing in a cupboard/closet
meanings.example: Could you open the door for me?
meanings.example_cn: 请你帮我开门好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of writing or speech that gives details about what someone or something is like
meanings.example: The booklet gives a brief description of each place.
meanings.example_cn: 这本小册子对每一个地方都作了简短的介绍。

meanings.meaning_en: if you marry someone, you become their husband or wife
meanings.example: He married Bea in 1925.
meanings.example_cn: 他在1925年娶了贝亚。

meanings.meaning_en: to hit sb/sth many times, usually very hard
meanings.example: Somebody was beating at the door.
meanings.example_cn: 有人在打门。

meanings.meaning_en: the people who live in the same area, town etc
meanings.example: The new arts centre will serve the whole community.
meanings.example_cn: 这座新的艺术中心将为整个社区服务。

meanings.meaning_en: to make regular movements forwards and backwards or from one side to another while hanging from a particular point, or to make something do this
meanings.example: Let your arms swing as you walk.
meanings.example_cn: 边走边摆动双臂。

meanings.meaning_en: a swinging movement or rhythm
meanings.example: a sign swinging in the wind
meanings.example_cn: 在风中摇摆的指示牌

meanings.meaning_en: a part of a tree that grows out from the trunk and that has leaves, fruit, or smaller branches growing from it
meanings.example: After the storm, the ground was littered with twigs and branches.
meanings.example_cn: 暴风雨过后，满地都是大大小小的树枝。

meanings.meaning_en: to encourage or help an activity to begin or develop further
meanings.example: the President’s plan to stimulate economic growth
meanings.example_cn: 总统刺激经济增长的计划

meanings.meaning_en: worried or slightly afraid because you think that something bad might happen
meanings.example: She eventually fell into an uneasy sleep.
meanings.example_cn: 她终于睡着了，但睡得并不踏实。

meanings.meaning_cn: 严肃的，庄重的；庄严的；隆重的
meanings.meaning_en: very serious and not happy, for example because something bad has happened or because you are at an important occasion
meanings.example: a solemn expression
meanings.example_cn: 严肃的表情

meanings.meaning_en: to use a needle and thread to make or repair clothes or to fasten something such as a button to them
meanings.example: I learned to sew at school.
meanings.example_cn: 我在学校学会了缝纫。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who travels and works in a spacecraft
meanings.example: The rocket boosts the astronaut into space.
meanings.example_cn: 这火箭能把宇航员送入太空.

meanings.meaning_en: done or made in order to remind people of someone who has died
meanings.example: A memorial service will be held at 7 pm on Saturday.
meanings.example_cn: 周六晚上七时将举行追悼仪式。

meanings.meaning_en: to get rid of sb/sth that you do not want or cannot keep
meanings.example: the difficulties of disposing of nuclear waste
meanings.example_cn: 处理核废料的困难

meanings.meaning_en: to become or make sth lighter or brighter in colour
meanings.example: Use blonde highlights to brighten your hair.
meanings.example_cn: 用点金色的挑染，让你的发色明亮起来。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is added to something else, often in order to improve it
meanings.example: the latest addition to our range of cars
meanings.example_cn: 我们汽车系列新增加的款式

meanings.meaning_en: (sulphur)a common light yellow chemical substance that burns with a very strong unpleasant smell, and is used in drugs, explosives, and industry. It is a chemical element :symbol S
meanings.example: The air reeks of sulfur.
meanings.example_cn: 空气中散发着硫黄味儿。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has just started to do or learn something
meanings.example: an absolute beginner
meanings.example_cn: 不折不扣的初学者

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel admiration and respect
meanings.example: Steve borrowed his dad’s sports car to impress his girlfriend.
meanings.example_cn: 史蒂夫借来他爸爸的跑车向女友炫耀。

meanings.meaning_en: to produce many printed copies of a book, newspaper etc
meanings.example: Over five million copies of the paper are printed every day.
meanings.example_cn: 这份报纸每日印量超过五百万。

meanings.meaning_en: writing that has been printed, for example in books or newspapers
meanings.example: When the book was first written no publisher would print it.
meanings.example_cn: 这本书刚写成时没有出版商愿意出版。

meanings.meaning_en: to be the right shape and size for sb/sth
meanings.example: The sash, kimono, and other garments were made to fit a child.
meanings.example_cn: 这些腰带、和服和其他衣服都做得适合孩子穿。

meanings.meaning_en: to put sb/sth in a particular position, especially when it is done gently or carefully
meanings.example: She laid the baby down gently on the bed.
meanings.example_cn: 她把婴儿轻轻地放在床上。

meanings.meaning_en: to make air, water, soil etc dangerously dirty and not suitable for people to use
meanings.example: beaches polluted by raw sewage
meanings.example_cn: 受未经处理的污水污染的海滩

meanings.meaning_en: based on new ideas, forms or methods that are used to find out what effect they have
meanings.example: experimental teaching methods
meanings.example_cn: 试验性教学方法

meanings.meaning_en: to fasten or connect one object to another
meanings.example: Attach a recent photograph to your application form.
meanings.example_cn: 申请表上贴近照一张。

meanings.meaning_en: to give attention, effort, etc. to one particular subject, situation or person rather than another
meanings.example: She tried to focus her mind on her work.
meanings.example_cn: 她试图集中精神干活。

meanings.meaning_en: the thing, person, situation etc that people pay special attention to
meanings.example: He focused his blue eyes on her.
meanings.example_cn: 他那蓝色的眼睛注视着她。

meanings.meaning_en: an occasion when people chase animals in order to kill or catch them
meanings.example: lion/rhino/stag etc hunt
meanings.example_cn: 猎狮/犀牛/雄鹿等

meanings.meaning_en: to chase animals and birds in order to kill or catch them
meanings.example: the hunt for the missing child
meanings.example_cn: 搜寻失踪儿童

meanings.meaning_en: having a desire to cause pain and suffering
meanings.example: Her eyes were cruel and hard.
meanings.example_cn: 她目光冷酷。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of furniture like a table, usually with drawers in it, that you sit at to write and work
meanings.example: Marie was sitting at her desk.
meanings.example_cn: 玛丽正坐在书桌前。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of money that you have to pay in order to buy, do, or produce something
meanings.example: I offered to pay the cost of the taxi.
meanings.example_cn: 我提出支付出租车费。

meanings.meaning_en: to shut, or to make sth shut, with a lot of force, making a loud noise
meanings.example: We heard a car door slam.
meanings.example_cn: 我们听到有车门砰的一声关上了。

meanings.meaning_en: to be slowly destroyed by a natural chemical process, or to make something do this
meanings.example: Her body was already starting to decay.
meanings.example_cn: 她的尸体已经开始腐烂。

meanings.meaning_en: the natural chemical change that causes the slow destruction of something
meanings.example: Most archaeological finds are broken, damaged, or decayed.
meanings.example_cn: 大部分考古发现物都已破裂、损坏或腐烂。

meanings.meaning_en: a musical play in which all of the words are sung
meanings.example: We go to the opera (= go to a performance of opera ) regularly.
meanings.example_cn: 我们常去听歌剧。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of cloth that you use for drying your skin or for drying things such as dishes
meanings.example: Have you got a clean towel I could use?
meanings.example_cn: 你有没有干净毛巾给我用？

meanings.meaning_en: a large group of people who have gathered together to do something, for example to watch something or protest about something
meanings.example: A vast crowd gathered in the main square.
meanings.example_cn: 主广场上聚集了一大群人。

meanings.meaning_en: a period of 10 years
meanings.example: the last decade of the nineteenth century
meanings.example_cn: 19世纪的最后10年

meanings.meaning_en: the act of formally telling two people each other’s names when they first meet
meanings.example: Pete, are you going to make the introductions?
meanings.example_cn: 皮特，你来作一下介绍吧。

meanings.meaning_en: a vehicle with four wheels and an engine, that can carry a small number of passengers
meanings.example: Dan got out of the car and locked the door.
meanings.example_cn: 丹下了车，锁上车门。

meanings.meaning_en: most important
meanings.example: Smoking is the prime cause of lung disease.
meanings.example_cn: 抽烟是引发肺部疾病的首要原因。

meanings.meaning_en: the time in your life when you are strongest and most active
meanings.example: Our prime concern is providing jobs for all young school leavers.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的头等大事是为所有的年轻毕业生提供工作。

meanings.meaning_en: to feel a continuous dull pain
meanings.example: His feet were aching from standing so long.
meanings.example_cn: 他站了那么久，双脚隐隐作痛。

meanings.meaning_en: a continuous pain that is not sharp or very strong
meanings.example: Mummy, I've got a tummy ache.
meanings.example_cn: 妈妈，我肚子疼。

meanings.meaning_en: big and very impressive
meanings.example: a grand country house
meanings.example_cn: 豪华的乡间大宅

meanings.meaning_en: to receive a particular amount of money for the work that you do
meanings.example: He earns nearly £20,000 a year.
meanings.example_cn: 他每年挣近20,000英镑。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being good
meanings.example: He retains a faith in human goodness.
meanings.example_cn: 他依然相信人性的善。

meanings.meaning_en: an explosive substance used in bombs and  fireworks
meanings.example: Gunpowder was used in China as far back as the 11 th century.
meanings.example_cn: 远在公元11世纪,中国已使用火药.

meanings.meaning_en: water in very small drops that is blown from the sea etc or sent up by vehicles on a wet road
meanings.example: spray from the waves
meanings.example_cn: 海浪溅起的水雾

meanings.meaning_en: to force liquid out of a container so that it comes out in a stream of very small drops and covers an area
meanings.example: a new hair styling spray
meanings.example_cn: 一种新的定型喷发剂

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to take tourists to a place and show them around
meanings.example: a tour guide
meanings.example_cn: 导游

meanings.meaning_en: to show sb the way to a place, often by going with them
meanings.example: an experienced mountain guide
meanings.example_cn: 一位有经验的登山向导

meanings.meaning_en: a group of several things of the same type that are put on top of each other
meanings.example: He balanced the plate on the top of a pile of books.
meanings.example_cn: 他把盘子在一摞书上放稳。

meanings.meaning_en: to arrange things in a pile
meanings.example: Ma stacked the cups and piled the plates.
meanings.example_cn: 妈妈把杯盘堆叠起来。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask God to protect someone or something
meanings.example: The couple later had their marriage blessed in their local parish church.
meanings.example_cn: 那对夫妇后来在他们当地教区的教堂里领受了婚姻祝福。

meanings.meaning_en: a line of things or people next to each other
meanings.example: a row of houses
meanings.example_cn: 一排房子

meanings.meaning_en: something you do in order to deceive someone
meanings.example: Pretending he doesn’t remember is an old trick of his.
meanings.example_cn: 假装不记得是他的老花招了。

meanings.meaning_en: to deceive someone in order to get something from them or to make them do something
meanings.example: He didn’t really lose his wallet - that’s just a trick.
meanings.example_cn: 他并没有真的丢了钱包——这只是一个骗局。

meanings.meaning_en: the second month of the year, between January and March
meanings.example: He joined the Army in February 1943.
meanings.example_cn: 他1943年2月参军。

meanings.meaning_en: the smallest part of a living thing that can exist independently
meanings.example: cancer cells
meanings.example_cn: 癌细胞

meanings.meaning_en: to the greatest degree possible
meanings.example: I completely forgot that it’s his birthday today.
meanings.example_cn: 我完全忘了今天是他的生日。

meanings.meaning_en: to go past a moving vehicle or person because you are going faster than them and want to get in front of them
meanings.example: He pulled out to overtake the van.
meanings.example_cn: 他把车驶出所在车道想超过那辆小货车。

meanings.meaning_en: to continue for a longer period of time, or to make something last longer
meanings.example: Management have agreed to extend the deadline.
meanings.example_cn: 管理层已同意延长最后期限。

meanings.meaning_en: two things of the same type that are used together
meanings.example: earrings, £5 a pair
meanings.example_cn: 耳环，5英镑一副

meanings.meaning_en: to put people or things into groups of two, or to form groups of two
meanings.example: We were each paired with a newcomer to help with training.
meanings.example_cn: 我们每个人都和一名新手组对，帮助他们训练。

meanings.meaning_en: a way of doing something that has been officially agreed and chosen by a political party, a business, or another organization
meanings.example: US policy towards China
meanings.example_cn: 美国的对华政策

meanings.meaning_en: caring and feeling sorry about someone’s problems
meanings.example: a sympathetic friend
meanings.example_cn: 一个有同情心的朋友

meanings.meaning_en: a large amount of a substance that does not have a definite shape or form
meanings.example: The food had congealed into a sticky mass.
meanings.example_cn: 那食物结成了黏糊糊的一团。

meanings.meaning_en: willing to do anything to change a very bad situation, and not caring about danger
meanings.example: I had no money left and was desperate.
meanings.example_cn: 我身无分文，已经走投无路了。

meanings.meaning_en: happening at the beginning
meanings.example: an initial investment of £5,000
meanings.example_cn: 5,000英镑的初始投资

meanings.meaning_en: having the colour of blood
meanings.example: We painted the door bright red .
meanings.example_cn: 我们把门漆成鲜红色。

meanings.meaning_en: the colour of blood
meanings.example: a red balloon
meanings.example_cn: 一个红气球

meanings.meaning_en: something such as a prize or money given to someone to reward them for something they have done
meanings.example: The movie has won a number of awards.
meanings.example_cn: 该片获得了多个奖项。

meanings.meaning_en: to move earth, snow etc, or to make a hole in the ground, using a spade or your hands
meanings.example: Dig down about 6 inches.
meanings.example_cn: 往下挖大约六英寸深。

meanings.meaning_en: a very small piece of matter with a negative electrical charge that moves around the nucleus of an atom
meanings.example: Most things are balanced - with equal numbers of electrons and protons.
meanings.example_cn: 大部分物体都是电荷平衡的——含等量的电子和质子。

meanings.meaning_en: making you feel physically relaxed, without any pain or without being too hot, cold etc
meanings.example: The bed wasn’t particularly comfortable.
meanings.example_cn: 这床不大舒服。

meanings.meaning_en: an organization that consists of a group of people who have the same aims, do the same kind of work etc
meanings.example: the Association of Master Builders
meanings.example_cn: 建筑师协会

meanings.meaning_en: work, especially physical work
meanings.example: The garage charges £30 an hour for labour.
meanings.example_cn: 汽车修理厂收取每小时30英镑的人工费。

meanings.meaning_en: a simple drawing or plan that shows exactly where something is, what something looks like, or how something works
meanings.example: a diagram of the heating system
meanings.example_cn: 供热系统示意图

meanings.meaning_en: an official plan that is intended to help people in some way, for example by providing education or training
meanings.example: The money will be used for teacher training schemes.
meanings.example_cn: 这笔钱将用于教师培训计划。

meanings.meaning_en: usual
meanings.example: The pans were in their accustomed places.
meanings.example_cn: 那些锅在老地方。

meanings.meaning_en: large and strongly made
meanings.example: a substantial piece of furniture
meanings.example_cn: 一件又大又结实的家具

meanings.meaning_en: not sleeping
meanings.example: I hope he’s awake now.
meanings.example_cn: 我希望他现在醒着。

meanings.meaning_en: to wake up, or to make someone wake up
meanings.example: She was still only half awake when I brought her a cup of coffee.
meanings.example_cn: 我给她端去咖啡的时候，她还是半睡半醒的样子。

meanings.meaning_en: a door, gate or passage where you enter a building; an entrance hall
meanings.example: You can leave your umbrella in the entry.
meanings.example_cn: 你可以把伞放在入口处。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who helps someone else in their work, especially by doing the less important jobs
meanings.example: a clerical assistant
meanings.example_cn: 文书助理

meanings.meaning_en: a type of small bag in or on a coat, trousers etc that you can put money, keys etc in
meanings.example: Luke came in with his hands in his pockets.
meanings.example_cn: 卢克走了进来，双手插在口袋里。

meanings.meaning_en: small enough to be carried in your pocket
meanings.example: The policeman told me to turn out my pockets (= take everything out of them ) .
meanings.example_cn: 警察让我把口袋里的东西都掏出来。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of rules, laws, or principles that tell people how to behave
meanings.example: The Torah is the basis for all the Jewish laws and their moral code.
meanings.example_cn: 《托拉》是所有犹太法律和道德规范的基础。

meanings.meaning_en: a white substance obtained by burning limestone, used for making cement, marking sports fields etc
meanings.example: The lime has turned to powder.
meanings.example_cn: 石灰已经粉了。

meanings.meaning_en: a musical instrument made of skin stretched over a circular frame, played by hitting it with your hand or a stick
meanings.example: a big bass drum
meanings.example_cn: 一面低音大鼓

meanings.meaning_en: a singular noun, verb, form etc is used when writing or speaking about one person or thing
meanings.example: the singular form of the noun
meanings.example_cn: 该名词的单数形式

meanings.meaning_en: to point or direct a weapon, a shot, a kick, etc. at sb/sth
meanings.example: Denver aimed his gun but did not shoot.
meanings.example_cn: 丹佛举枪瞄准，但是没有射击。

meanings.meaning_en: the place where you pay or are served in a shop, bank, restaurant etc
meanings.example: He wondered if the girl behind the counter recognised him.
meanings.example_cn: 他在想柜台后面的那个女孩是否认出了他。

meanings.meaning_en: used when you are giving the reason for something
meanings.example: We didn’t enjoy the day because the weather was so awful.
meanings.example_cn: 那天我们很不尽兴，因为天气实在太糟。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to religion in general or to a particular religion
meanings.example: I don’t share her religious beliefs.
meanings.example_cn: 她的宗教信仰和我的不同。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone decide to do something, especially by giving them reasons why they should do it, or asking them many times to do it
meanings.example: I’m trying to persuade your dad to buy some shares.
meanings.example_cn: 我正在尽力说服你爸爸买些股票。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of energy, oil, electricity etc that is used
meanings.example: Vigorous exercise increases oxygen consumption.
meanings.example_cn: 剧烈运动增加氧的消耗。

meanings.meaning_en: when people live or work together without fighting or disagreeing with each other
meanings.example: the harmony of sea and sky
meanings.example_cn: 海天一色

meanings.meaning_en: the act of improving something or the state of being improved
meanings.example: Our results have shown some improvement this month.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的成绩这个月有所提高。

meanings.meaning_en: the round part of a clock, watch, machine etc that has numbers that show you the time or a measurement
meanings.example: The lighted dial of her watch said 1.20.
meanings.example_cn: 她手表上的夜光表面显示时间为1点20分。

meanings.meaning_en: to press the buttons or turn the dial on a telephone in order to make a telephone call
meanings.example: I think I dialed the wrong number.
meanings.example_cn: 我想我拨错号码了。

meanings.meaning_en: if someone or something is efficient, they work well without wasting time, money, or energy
meanings.example: a very efficient secretary
meanings.example_cn: 效率高的秘书

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment used to make sounds louder
meanings.example: The loudspeaker announced the arrival of the train.
meanings.example_cn: 广播说火车进站了。

meanings.meaning_en: a secretary whose main job is to  type  letters
meanings.example: The publishing firm was advertising for a typist.
meanings.example_cn: 这家出版公司正在登广告招聘一名打字员。

meanings.meaning_en: to gradually get more and more money, possessions, knowledge etc over a period of time
meanings.example: It is unjust that a privileged few should continue to accumulate wealth.
meanings.example_cn: 少数特权阶级继续积聚财富，这是不公平的。

meanings.meaning_en: to take and hold something firmly
meanings.example: I grasped his arm firmly and led him away.
meanings.example_cn: 我紧紧抓住他的胳膊把他带走。

meanings.meaning_en: the way you hold something or your ability to hold it
meanings.example: Alan grasped the handle and pulled it.
meanings.example_cn: 艾伦抓住手柄一拉。

meanings.meaning_en: if you have a picnic, you take food and eat it outdoors, especially in the country
meanings.example: We decided to have a picnic down by the lake.
meanings.example_cn: 我们决定在湖边野餐。

meanings.meaning_en: to have a picnic
meanings.example: a picnic table
meanings.example_cn: 野餐桌

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which there are a lot of problems that must be dealt with quickly so that the situation does not get worse or more dangerous
meanings.example: The country now faces an economic crisis .
meanings.example_cn: 该国目前正面临一场经济危机。

meanings.meaning_en: directly under another object or covered by it
meanings.example: He got out of the car and looked underneath.
meanings.example_cn: 他下车往底下看了看。

meanings.meaning_en: if something such as a bag, box, or place contains something, that thing is inside it
meanings.example: The thieves stole a purse containing bank-notes.
meanings.example_cn: 小偷们偷到了一个里面有钞票的钱包。

meanings.meaning_en: to move in a particular way, or to do something as you are moving
meanings.example: The plate went crashing to the floor.
meanings.example_cn: 盘子哗啦一声掉在地板上。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of remaining faithful to your friends, principles, country etc
meanings.example: Elizabeth understood her husband’s loyalty to his sister.
meanings.example_cn: 伊丽莎白理解丈夫对他姐姐的一片忠心。

meanings.meaning_en: to surprise someone very much
meanings.example: Dave amazed his friends by suddenly getting married.
meanings.example_cn: 戴夫突然结婚，令朋友们非常吃惊。

meanings.meaning_en: a soft reddish-brown metal that allows electricity and heat to pass through it easily, and is used to make electrical wires, water pipes etc. It is a chemical element: symbol Cu
meanings.example: Chile is the world's largest producer of copper.
meanings.example_cn: 智利是世界上最大的产铜国。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of bringing goods, letters etc to a particular person or place, or the things that are brought
meanings.example: Most Indian restaurants offer free delivery.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数印度餐馆提供免费外送服务。

meanings.meaning_en: an organization that has a particular purpose such as scientific or educational work, or the building where this organization is based
meanings.example: research institutes
meanings.example_cn: 研究所

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone a particular job or make them responsible for a particular person or thing
meanings.example: I’ve been assigned the task of looking after the new students.
meanings.example_cn: 指派给我的工作是照顾新来的学生。

meanings.meaning_en: the ability to learn, understand, and think about things
meanings.example: To be good at the game, you need a reasonable level of intelligence.
meanings.example_cn: 要想把这种游戏玩好，需要一定的智力水平。

meanings.meaning_en: if a container or place fills, or if you fill it, enough of something goes into it to make it full
meanings.example: He poured her a drink, then filled his own glass.
meanings.example_cn: 他给她倒了一杯，然后将自己的杯子斟满。

meanings.meaning_en: above your head; raised above the ground
meanings.example: overhead power lines
meanings.example_cn: 高架输电线

meanings.meaning_en: the part of your mind that tells you whether what you are doing is morally right or wrong
meanings.example: Well, at least I can face them all with a clear conscience (= the knowledge that you have done nothing wrong ) .
meanings.example_cn: 好吧，至少我可以问心无愧地面对他们所有人。

meanings.meaning_en: used to refer to something that belongs to or is connected with us
meanings.example: I’ll show you to your room. Ours is next door.
meanings.example_cn: 我带你去你的房间，我们的房间在你的隔壁。

meanings.meaning_en: to use something that belongs to someone else and that you must give back to them later
meanings.example: Can I borrow your pen for a minute?
meanings.example_cn: 我可以借你的笔用一下吗？

meanings.meaning_en: the action of bringing an aircraft down to the ground after being in the air
meanings.example: take-off and landing procedures
meanings.example_cn: 起降程序

meanings.meaning_en: very important and needing to be dealt with immediately
meanings.example: He was in urgent need of medical attention.
meanings.example_cn: 他急需治疗。

meanings.meaning_en: a member of the ancient Roman republic or empire
meanings.example: When they conquered Britain, the Romans brought this custom with them.
meanings.example_cn: 当古罗马人征服不列颠时，他们把这一习俗也带了过去。

meanings.meaning_en: connected with the modern city of Rome
meanings.example: Roman vessels used to sail with the tide from Boulogne to Richborough.
meanings.example_cn: 罗马的船只过去经常乘着潮汐从布洛涅航行到里奇伯勒。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone remember something that they must do
meanings.example: Yes, I’ll be there. Thanks for reminding me.
meanings.example_cn: 是的，我会去那里的。 谢谢提醒。

meanings.meaning_en: the ability or right to control people or events
meanings.example: It is not within my power (= I am unable or not in a position) to help you.
meanings.example_cn: 我是爱莫能助啊。

meanings.meaning_en: a  pickaxe
meanings.example: The Roman Swiss Army knife has a knife, spoon, fork, spike, spatula, and small pick.
meanings.example_cn: 这种古罗马瑞士军刀包含了刀，勺，叉，长钉，抹刀和小鹤嘴锄。

meanings.meaning_en: 英文释义:to have or own something
meanings.example: Neither of them possessed a credit card.
meanings.example_cn: 他们两人都没有信用卡。

meanings.meaning_en: in or into the space separating two or more points, objects, people, etc.
meanings.example: Q comes between P and R in the English alphabet.
meanings.example_cn: 英语字母表中，Q在P和R之间。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where you can buy drinks and simple meals. Alcohol is not usually served in British or American cafes.
meanings.example: We went to a cafe and lazed the whole afternoon away there.
meanings.example_cn: 我们去了一间咖啡馆，在那儿消磨了整个下午。

meanings.meaning_en: hard or firm, with a fixed shape, and not a liquid or gas
meanings.example: The lake was frozen solid .
meanings.example_cn: 湖水冻得结结实实。

meanings.meaning_en: a firm object or substance that has a fixed shape, not a gas or liquid
meanings.example: It was good to be back on solid ground again.
meanings.example_cn: 又能踏上坚实的土地感觉真好。

meanings.meaning_en: in an unsatisfactory or unsuccessful way
meanings.example: The company has been very badly managed.
meanings.example_cn: 这家公司的管理非常差。

meanings.meaning_en: used between two words or phrases to show that either of two things is possible, or used before the last in a list of possibilities or choices
meanings.example: Shall we go out to the cinema or stay at home?
meanings.example_cn: 我们是出去看电影还是待在家里？

meanings.meaning_en: considered separately from other people or things in the same group
meanings.example: Each individual leaf on the tree is different.
meanings.example_cn: 树上每片叶子都不相同。

meanings.meaning_en: the main building or offices used by a large company or organization
meanings.example: the headquarters of the United Nations
meanings.example_cn: 联合国总部

meanings.meaning_en: a flat piece of metal, usually shaped like a coin, that is given to someone who has won a competition or who has done something brave
meanings.example: She won a gold medal at the last Olympics.
meanings.example_cn: 她在上届奥运会上赢得一枚金牌。

meanings.meaning_en: to spend time with someone, especially someone that other people disapprove of
meanings.example: I don’t like these layabouts you’re associating with.
meanings.example_cn: 我不喜欢你结交的这些游手好闲的人。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who you work or do business with
meanings.example: one of his business associates
meanings.example_cn: 他的一个生意伙伴

meanings.meaning_en: a strong upright piece of wood, metal etc that is fixed into the ground, especially to support something
meanings.example: a fence post
meanings.example_cn: 篱笆桩

meanings.meaning_en: to put up a public notice about something on a wall or notice board
meanings.example: The exam results were posted on the bulletin board yesterday.
meanings.example_cn: 考试成绩昨天在布告板上贴出来了。

meanings.meaning_en: making you feel embarrassed so that you are not sure what to do or say
meanings.example: I hoped he would stop asking awkward questions .
meanings.example_cn: 我希望他不要再问令人难堪的问题。

meanings.meaning_en: used to introduce a statement that is true in most cases but not always
meanings.example: Generally speaking, the more expensive the stereo, the better it is.
meanings.example_cn: 一般说来，立体声音响越贵的越好。

meanings.meaning_en: to fall suddenly onto the ground or into something
meanings.example: Your button has dropped off.
meanings.example_cn: 你的纽扣掉了。

meanings.meaning_en: good
meanings.example: fine clothes/wines/workmanship
meanings.example_cn: 漂亮的衣服；美酒；精湛的工艺

meanings.meaning_en: used to refer to something that belongs to or is connected with a thing, animal, baby etc that has already been mentioned
meanings.example: He emphasized its importance to me.
meanings.example_cn: 他向我强调它的重要性。

meanings.meaning_en: to have something with you in your pocket, on your belt, in your bag etc everywhere you go
meanings.example: All the soldiers carried rifles.
meanings.example_cn: 所有的士兵都背着步枪。

meanings.meaning_en: a written list showing how much you have to pay for services you have received, work that has been done etc
meanings.example: Have you paid the phone bill?
meanings.example_cn: 电话费你付了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a man whose job is to cut men’s hair and sometimes to  shave  them
meanings.example: My father marched me over to Otto, the local barber, to have my hair cut short.
meanings.example_cn: 爸爸把我拽到当地理发师奥托跟前，让他把我的头发剪短。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of paying for something
meanings.example: She demanded payment in advance.
meanings.example_cn: 她要求预先付款。

meanings.meaning_en: a tall narrow building either built on its own or forming part of a castle, church etc
meanings.example: the Eiffel Tower
meanings.example_cn: 埃菲尔铁塔

meanings.meaning_en: to be much taller than the people or things around you
meanings.example: a castle with tall towers
meanings.example_cn: 有高高的塔楼的城堡

meanings.meaning_en: the cases, bags etc that you carry when you are travelling
meanings.example: They searched his luggage for illegal drugs.
meanings.example_cn: 他们搜查他的行李看是否藏有毒品。

meanings.meaning_en: an important event, decision, problem etc has a big effect or influence on people’s lives or on events in the future
meanings.example: a very important meeting
meanings.example_cn: 很重要的会议

meanings.meaning_en: to burn brightly, but usually for only a short time or not steadily
meanings.example: The match flared and went out.
meanings.example_cn: 火柴闪亮了一下就熄了。

meanings.meaning_en: away from a place
meanings.example: He got into his car and drove off.
meanings.example_cn: 他上了车，随即开车走了。

meanings.meaning_en: used before someone’s name or title to begin a letter
meanings.example: Dear Sir or Madam, ...
meanings.example_cn: 尊敬的先生或女士，…

meanings.meaning_en: used to show that you are surprised, upset, or annoyed because something bad has happened
meanings.example: Dear Mrs. Wilson, ...
meanings.example_cn: 尊敬的威尔逊夫人，…

meanings.meaning_en: happening regularly or all the time
meanings.example: There was a constant stream of visitors to the house.
meanings.example_cn: 参观这幢房子的游客川流不息。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular way or style of behaving, living or doing something
meanings.example: the most efficient mode of transport
meanings.example_cn: 最高效的运输方式

meanings.meaning_en: a hard black mineral which is dug out of the ground and burnt to produce heat
meanings.example: Put some coal on the fire.
meanings.example_cn: 往火里加点煤。

meanings.meaning_en: an approximate number, amount, or time is close to the exact number, amount etc, but could be a little bit more or less than it
meanings.example: What is the approximate number of students in each class?
meanings.example_cn: 每个班大致有多少学生？

meanings.meaning_en: to be close to a particular number
meanings.example: This figure approximates to a quarter of the UK’s annual consumption.
meanings.example_cn: 这个数字接近英国年消耗量的四分之一。

meanings.meaning_en: a fault or a lack of something that means that something or someone is not perfect
meanings.example: All the cars are tested for defects before they leave the factory.
meanings.example_cn: 所有汽车在出厂前都经过品质检验。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of the day after the morning and before the evening
meanings.example: There’s a meeting on Thursday afternoon .
meanings.example_cn: 星期四下午有个会议。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is worthless has no value, importance, or use
meanings.example: The house was full of worthless junk.
meanings.example_cn: 这房子里堆满了没有用的东西。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone a disease
meanings.example: People with the virus may feel perfectly well, but they can still infect others.
meanings.example_cn: 带有这种病毒的人可能毫无症状，却仍可能传染他人。

meanings.meaning_en: the ultimate result of a long process is what happens at the end of it
meanings.example: The ultimate outcome of the experiment cannot be predicted.
meanings.example_cn: 试验的最后结果无法预测。

meanings.meaning_en: cloth made from the flax plant, used to make high quality clothes, home decorations etc
meanings.example: a linen jacket
meanings.example_cn: 亚麻布夹克

meanings.meaning_en: slightly wet, especially in a way that is pleasant or suitable
meanings.example: Make sure the soil is moist before planting the seeds.
meanings.example_cn: 播种之前要确保土壤湿润。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong feeling of wanting to hurt or criticize someone because they have done something bad to you or been unkind to you
meanings.example: There is growing anger among the people against the government.
meanings.example_cn: 民众对政府越来越不满。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone angry
meanings.example: What angered me most was his total lack of remorse.
meanings.example_cn: 最让我生气的是他居然毫无悔意。

meanings.meaning_en: the fourth month of the year, between March and May
meanings.example: The changes will be introduced in April.
meanings.example_cn: 这些变更将于4月实施。

meanings.meaning_en: a power that is believed to control what happens in people’s lives
meanings.example: Fate plays cruel tricks sometimes.
meanings.example_cn: 有时命运的捉弄很残酷。

meanings.meaning_en: an organized sports event between two teams or people
meanings.example: It’s our last match of the season.
meanings.example_cn: 这是我们本赛季最后一场比赛。

meanings.meaning_en: a liquid obtained from petroleum, used mainly for producing power in the engines of cars, trucks etc
meanings.example: I fill up the tank with gasoline about once a week.
meanings.example_cn: 大约每个星期我加满一箱汽油。

meanings.meaning_en: used to ask or talk about the way in which something happens or is done
meanings.example: How do you spell your name?
meanings.example_cn: 你的名字怎么拼写？

meanings.meaning_en: able to wait calmly for a long time or to accept difficulties, people’s annoying behaviour etc without becoming angry
meanings.example: You’ll just have to be patient and wait till I’m off the phone.
meanings.example_cn: 你只能耐心点，等我打完电话。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is receiving medical treatment from a doctor or in a hospital
meanings.example: She was tough but wonderful with her patients.
meanings.example_cn: 她很严厉，但对病人很好。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is cunning is clever and good at deceiving people in order to get what they want
meanings.example: a cunning opponent
meanings.example_cn: 狡猾的对手

meanings.meaning_en: part of a piece of writing which starts on a new line and contains at least one sentence
meanings.example: the opening paragraphs of the novel
meanings.example_cn: 小说开篇的几个段落

meanings.meaning_en: something you can choose to do or use instead of something else
meanings.example: If payment is not received legal action will be our only alternative .
meanings.example_cn: 如果收不到付款，我们只能采取法律行动。

meanings.meaning_en: dry powder consisting of extremely small bits of dirt that is in buildings on furniture, floors etc if they are not kept clean
meanings.example: All the furniture was covered in dust .
meanings.example_cn: 所有的家具都蒙上了灰尘。

meanings.meaning_en: an injury to your body that is made by a weapon such as a knife or a bullet
meanings.example: A nurse cleaned and bandaged the wound.
meanings.example_cn: 护士把伤口清洗包扎好。

meanings.meaning_en: to injure someone with a knife, gun etc
meanings.example: It took several months for his wounds to heal .
meanings.example_cn: 他的伤口几个月后才愈合。

meanings.meaning_en: to say what level of a quality something has, or what standard it is
meanings.example: Pencils are graded according to softness.
meanings.example_cn: 铅笔按软硬度分级。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular level of quality that a product, material etc has
meanings.example: The best grades of tea are expensive.
meanings.example_cn: 最上等的茶叶价格很贵。

meanings.meaning_en: modern music that is popular, especially with young people, and usually consists of simple tunes with a strong beat
meanings.example: a new pop record
meanings.example_cn: 新的流行音乐唱片

meanings.meaning_en: the science or practice of flying in aircraft
meanings.example: civil/military aviation
meanings.example_cn: 民用 / 军用航空

meanings.meaning_en: extremely large
meanings.example: The refugees come across the border in vast numbers.
meanings.example_cn: 大量难民涌过边境。

meanings.meaning_en: very different from each other
meanings.example: subjects as diverse as pop music and archaeology
meanings.example_cn: 像流行音乐和考古学这样各不相同的学科

meanings.meaning_en: to get pleasure from something
meanings.example: We thoroughly enjoyed our time in New York.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在纽约的时间过得十分快活。

meanings.meaning_en: likely to develop into a particular type of person or thing in the future
meanings.example: The company has identified 60 potential customers.
meanings.example_cn: 该公司已确定了60位潜在的客户。

meanings.meaning_en: the possibility that something will develop in a particular way, or have a particular effect
meanings.example: The company certainly has the potential for growth.
meanings.example_cn: 那家公司肯定有发展潜力。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone believe something that is not true
meanings.example: He had been deceived by a young man claiming to be the son of a millionaire.
meanings.example_cn: 他被一个自称是百万富翁之子的年轻人骗了。

meanings.meaning_en: electrical force measured in volts
meanings.example: The systems are getting smaller and using lower voltages.
meanings.example_cn: 这些系统正变得更小而且使用更低的电压。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to write about news events for a newspaper, or to tell people about them on television or on the radio
meanings.example: a news reporter
meanings.example_cn: 新闻记者

meanings.meaning_en: a conversation in a book, play, or film
meanings.example: a boring movie full of bad dialog
meanings.example_cn: 充满差劲对白的乏味电影

meanings.meaning_en: the mixture of gases around the Earth, that we breathe
meanings.example: Let’s go outside and get some fresh air.
meanings.example_cn: 我们出去呼吸些新鲜空气吧。

meanings.meaning_en: to move around within a system, or to make something do this
meanings.example: Swimming helps to get the blood circulating through the muscles.
meanings.example_cn: 游泳有助于肌肉的血液循环。

meanings.meaning_en: piece of land next to or around your house where you can grow flowers, fruit, vegetables, etc., usually with an area of grass(called a lawn )
meanings.example: He’s outside in the garden.
meanings.example_cn: 他在外面花园里。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone discovers something
meanings.example: the discovery of oil in Alaska
meanings.example_cn: 在阿拉斯加发现石油

meanings.meaning_en: to draw a line under a word to show that it is important
meanings.example: Underline the following that apply to you.
meanings.example_cn: 在以下适用于你的部分下面划线。

meanings.meaning_en: an idea of how something is, or how something should be done
meanings.example: a new concept in business travel
meanings.example_cn: 商务旅行的新理念

meanings.meaning_en: to turn your eyes towards something, so that you can see it
meanings.example: We sneaked out while Jessie’s mom wasn’t looking.
meanings.example_cn: 我们趁杰茜的妈妈没有看到，偷偷地溜了出去。

meanings.meaning_en: an act of looking at something
meanings.example: If you look carefully you can see that the painting represents a human figure.
meanings.example_cn: 如果仔细看，就会看出画上是一个人形。

meanings.meaning_en: for all future time
meanings.example: I wanted that moment to last forever.
meanings.example_cn: 我希望那一刻成为永远。

meanings.meaning_cn: 礼拜；崇拜；崇拜: 爱慕：崇敬
meanings.meaning_en: the activity of praying or singing in a religious building in order to show respect and love for a god
meanings.example: The ceremony must take place in a recognized place of worship.
meanings.example_cn: 该仪式必须在获得认可的敬拜场所举行。

meanings.meaning_en: to admire and love someone very much
meanings.example: He absolutely worships her.
meanings.example_cn: 他太崇拜她了。

meanings.meaning_en: used to emphasize that something has been done completely or has finished completely
meanings.example: an old custom that has vanished altogether
meanings.example_cn: 一个彻底消亡的古老习俗

meanings.meaning_en: strong enough to deal successfully with difficult conditions or situations
meanings.example: The men who work on the oil rigs are a tough bunch.
meanings.example_cn: 在石油钻塔上工作的都是吃苦耐劳的人。

meanings.meaning_en: to see someone or something for a moment without getting a complete view of them
meanings.example: I glimpsed a figure at the window.
meanings.example_cn: 我瞥见窗前有个身影。

meanings.meaning_en: a quick look at someone or something that does not allow you to see them clearly
meanings.example: They caught a glimpse of a dark green car.
meanings.example_cn: 他们瞥见一辆深绿色的汽车。

meanings.meaning_en: a form of a language which is spoken only in one area, with words or grammar that are slightly different from other forms of the same language
meanings.example: the local dialect
meanings.example_cn: 当地方言

meanings.meaning_en: pointing up in a line that forms an angle of 90˚ with a flat surface
meanings.example: a vertical line
meanings.example_cn: 垂直线

meanings.meaning_en: criminal activities that involve sex or drugs
meanings.example: the fight against vice on the streets
meanings.example_cn: 打击街头犯罪

meanings.meaning_en: showing strong feelings of love
meanings.example: ‘Tom always sends me red roses on my birthday.’ ‘How romantic!’
meanings.example_cn: “我过生日时汤姆总是给我送红玫瑰。”“多浪漫啊！”

meanings.meaning_en: to say words for someone else to write down
meanings.example: She’s dictating a letter to her secretary right now.
meanings.example_cn: 她现在正在给秘书口授一封信。

meanings.meaning_en: the general condition of your body and how healthy you are
meanings.example: I’m worried about my husband’s health.
meanings.example_cn: 我担心我丈夫的健康状况。

meanings.meaning_en: very bad or unpleasant
meanings.example: The weather was awful.
meanings.example_cn: 天气很糟糕。

meanings.meaning_en: a plural word or form shows you are talking about more than one thing, person etc. For example, ‘we’ is a plural  pronoun  .
meanings.example: The letter “s” terminates most plural nouns.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数复数名词以字母“S”结尾。

meanings.meaning_en: a form of a word that shows you are talking about more than one thing, person etc. For example, ‘dogs’ is the plural of ‘dog’
meanings.example: What’s the plural of ‘mouse’?
meanings.example_cn: ‘mouse’的复数形式是什么？

meanings.meaning_en: having a lot of influence and therefore changing the way people think and behave
meanings.example: He had influential friends.
meanings.example_cn: 他有一些有影响力的朋友。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of something that has been separated from the main part
meanings.example: Cut off a piece of wood 5 cm in length.
meanings.example_cn: 截下一段五厘米长的木头。

meanings.meaning_en: to put all the separate parts of sth together to make a complete whole
meanings.example: His trousers were held up with a piece of string.
meanings.example_cn: 他的裤子靠一根细绳系着。

meanings.meaning_en: not held, tied up, or kept somewhere as a prisoner
meanings.example: He knew he could be free in as little as three years.
meanings.example_cn: 他知道只要再过三年他就能自由了。

meanings.meaning_en: a machine that can move and do some of the work of a person, and is usually controlled by a computer
meanings.example: cars built by robots
meanings.example_cn: 机器人制造的汽车

meanings.meaning_en: that can be said to be true in the case of sb/sth
meanings.example: What is a reasonable standard for one family is not applicable for another.
meanings.example_cn: 对一个家庭合理的标准对于另一个家庭并不适用。

meanings.meaning_en: to show or prove something clearly
meanings.example: The study demonstrates the link between poverty and malnutrition.
meanings.example_cn: 这项研究证明了贫困与营养不良之间的联系。

meanings.meaning_en: no one
meanings.example: I knocked on the door but nobody answered.
meanings.example_cn: 我敲了敲门，但没人应门。

meanings.meaning_en: to remove a load from a vehicle, ship etc
meanings.example: The driver unloaded some boxes from the back of the truck.
meanings.example_cn: 司机从卡车后部卸下了一些箱子。

meanings.meaning_en: to tell someone that you are sorry that you have done something wrong
meanings.example: I’m so sorry, I do apologize.
meanings.example_cn: 非常对不起，我真心道歉。

meanings.meaning_en: consisting of many different parts and often difficult to understand
meanings.example: a complex system of highways
meanings.example_cn: 复杂的公路网

meanings.meaning_en: the feeling of being very worried about something
meanings.example: his feelings of anxiety
meanings.example_cn: 他焦虑的心情

meanings.meaning_en: to pull something along the ground, often because it is too heavy to carry
meanings.example: Inge managed to drag the table into the kitchen.
meanings.example_cn: 英奇费了很大劲把桌子拖进厨房里。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of heavy sticky earth that can be used for making pots, bricks etc
meanings.example: As the wheel turned, the potter shaped and squeezed the lump of clay into a graceful shape.
meanings.example_cn: 随着陶轮的转动，制陶工人缓慢挤压陶泥块，塑出优美的造型。

meanings.meaning_en: the group of people who govern a country or state
meanings.example: The Government are planning further cuts in public spending.
meanings.example_cn: 政府正计划进一步削减公共支出。

meanings.meaning_en: a coloured or white part that a plant or tree produces before fruit or seeds
meanings.example: a lovely rose bush with delicate pink flowers
meanings.example_cn: 一簇开着娇嫩的粉红色花朵的美丽蔷薇

meanings.meaning_en: happening by chance without being planned
meanings.example: a casual encounter/meeting
meanings.example_cn: 不期而遇；邂逅

meanings.meaning_en: towards the outside or away from the centre of something
meanings.example: The door opens outwards.
meanings.example_cn: 这门是朝外开的。

meanings.meaning_en: to defend yourself successfully against people who attack, criticize, or oppose you
meanings.example: The Chancellor has withstood the criticism and held firm.
meanings.example_cn: 总理顶住批评，坚持立场。

meanings.meaning_en: to stop being angry with someone and stop blaming them, although they have done something wrong
meanings.example: He didn’t look the sort of man to forgive and forget (= forgive someone and no longer think about it ) .
meanings.example_cn: 他看上去不是那种不记仇的人。

meanings.meaning_en: the night or day before an important day
meanings.example: We’re arriving on Christmas Eve.
meanings.example_cn: 我们将在平安夜到达。

meanings.meaning_en: to tie sb/sth with rope, string, etc. so that they cannot move or are held together firmly
meanings.example: Bind the ends of the cord together with thread.
meanings.example_cn: 把细绳的两端用线系在一起。

meanings.meaning_en: a tall upright round post used as a support for a roof or bridge
meanings.example: Eight massive stone pillars supported the roof.
meanings.example_cn: 八根巨大的石柱支撑起房顶。

meanings.meaning_en: using or connected with the metric system of weights and measures
meanings.example: a metric tonne
meanings.example_cn: 一公吨

meanings.meaning_en: a tall tree with long hard sharp leaves that do not fall off in winter
meanings.example: an ancient pine forest
meanings.example_cn: 一片古老的松树林

meanings.meaning_en: to travel around an area in order to find out about it
meanings.example: Venice is a wonderful city to explore.
meanings.example_cn: 威尼斯是一个美妙的城市，值得好好探究一番。

meanings.meaning_en: a job that needs a high level of education and training
meanings.example: nurses, social workers, and other people in the caring professions
meanings.example_cn: 护士、社工和其他从事护理行业的人

meanings.meaning_en: the number 18
meanings.example: At least eighteen bullets were fired.
meanings.example_cn: 至少射出了18颗子弹。

meanings.meaning_en: the air that you take into your lungs and send out again
meanings.example: Slow down, I need to catch my breath.
meanings.example_cn: 慢一点，我要喘口气。

meanings.meaning_en: an organized group of criminals
meanings.example: Several gangs were operating in the area.
meanings.example_cn: 有好几个犯罪团伙在这个地区活动。

meanings.meaning_en: the physical or mental energy that you need to do sth; sth that takes a lot of energy
meanings.example: Lou lifted the box easily, without using much effort.
meanings.example_cn: 卢没费多大力气就把箱子搬了起来。

meanings.meaning_en: something that makes your life difficult or unpleasant, especially a lack of money, or the condition of having a difficult life
meanings.example: an economic policy that caused great hardship for many people
meanings.example_cn: 造成许多人贫困的经济政策

meanings.meaning_en: at a short distance away
meanings.example: A bomb exploded somewhere near.
meanings.example_cn: 一颗炸弹在附近爆炸。

meanings.meaning_en: a short distance away
meanings.example: Visitors came from near and far.
meanings.example_cn: 游客来自四面八方。

meanings.meaning_en: a short period of rain
meanings.example: More heavy showers are forecast for tonight.
meanings.example_cn: 预报今晚还有强阵雨。

meanings.meaning_en: still living and not dead
meanings.example: It was a bad accident – they’re lucky to be alive.
meanings.example_cn: 这是一宗严重事故——他们能活着实属幸运。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to India or its people
meanings.example: the Indian government
meanings.example_cn: 印度政府

meanings.meaning_en: someone from India
to help the customers in a shop, especially by bringing them the things that they want
meanings.example: There was only one girl serving customers.
meanings.example_cn: 只有一个女孩在接待顾客。

meanings.meaning_en: looking or facing in the direction that is behind you
meanings.example: She went without a backward glance.
meanings.example_cn: 她头也不回地走了。

meanings.meaning_en: the feeling you get when you are afraid or worried that something bad is going to happen
meanings.example: a fear of flying
meanings.example_cn: 害怕坐飞机

meanings.meaning_en: to feel afraid or worried that something bad may happen
meanings.example: Fearing violence, the group asked for police protection.
meanings.example_cn: 该团体担心发生暴力事件，所以请求警方保护。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the operation of a business, government etc
meanings.example: operational activities/costs/difficulties
meanings.example_cn: 营运上的活动 / 成本 / 困难

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone or something late
meanings.example: The flight was badly delayed because of fog.
meanings.example_cn: 该航班因雾而长时间延误。

meanings.meaning_en: the type of mathematics that deals with the adding, multiplying, etc. of numbers
meanings.example: He's not very good at arithmetic.
meanings.example_cn: 他不太擅长算术。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of money that something is worth
meanings.example: The alterations doubled the value of the house.
meanings.example_cn: 经改建后这所房子增值了一倍。

meanings.meaning_en: to decide how much money something is worth, by comparing it with similar things
meanings.example: We decided to get the house valued.
meanings.example_cn: 我们决定给房子估一估价。

meanings.meaning_en: used to address a woman in a polite way, especially a customer in a shop
meanings.example: Are you being served, Madam?
meanings.example_cn: 有人接待您吗，夫人？

meanings.meaning_en: able or likely to harm or kill you
meanings.example: laws about dangerous dogs
meanings.example_cn: 有关危险犬类的法律

meanings.meaning_en: used when talking about something that might happen or be true, or might have happened
meanings.example: We’ll stay at home if it rains.
meanings.example_cn: 如果下雨，我们就待在家里。

meanings.meaning_en: for each
meanings.example: How much does it cost per kilo?
meanings.example_cn: 每公斤多少钱？

meanings.meaning_en: the fact of no longer having something, or of having less of it than you used to have, or the process by which this happens
meanings.example: The company is closing down two of its factories, leading to 430 job losses .
meanings.example_cn: 公司要关闭其中的两家工厂，这将造成430人失业。

meanings.meaning_en: slightly wet, often in an unpleasant way
meanings.example: Wipe the leather with a damp cloth.
meanings.example_cn: 用湿布擦拭皮面。

meanings.meaning_en: the number of years someone has lived or something has existed
meanings.example: Francis is the same age as me.
meanings.example_cn: 弗朗西斯和我同年岁。

meanings.meaning_en: to start looking older or to make someone or something look older
meanings.example: Experts disagree over the age of the drawings.
meanings.example_cn: 专家对这些画作的年代意见不统一。

meanings.meaning_en: to send a weapon or spacecraft into the sky or into space
meanings.example: A test satellite was launched from Cape Canaveral.
meanings.example_cn: 一颗实验人造卫星从卡纳维拉尔角发射升空。

meanings.meaning_en: to accidentally make a mark on something, especially one that cannot be removed, or to be marked in this way
meanings.example: Be careful you don’t stain the carpet.
meanings.example_cn: 当心别把地毯弄脏了。

meanings.meaning_en: without success in spite of your efforts
meanings.example: Police searched in vain for the missing gunman.
meanings.example_cn: 警方搜寻失踪的持枪歹徒，但毫无结果。

meanings.meaning_en: the feeling of being grateful and wanting to express your thanks
meanings.example: He smiled at them with gratitude.
meanings.example_cn: 他向他们笑了笑表示谢意。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of work that is given to someone as part of their job
meanings.example: She’s gone to Italy on a special assignment.
meanings.example_cn: 她去意大利执行一项特殊任务。

meanings.meaning_en: a round object with a hard surface, that contains a baby bird, snake, insect etc and which is produced by a female bird, snake, insect etc
meanings.example: Blackbirds lay their eggs in March.
meanings.example_cn: 乌鸫在3月产蛋。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to make men’s clothes, that are measured to fit each customer perfectly
meanings.example: In his youth his father bound him out to a tailor.
meanings.example_cn: 他年轻时他父亲叫他去给一个裁缝当学徒。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something so that it is exactly right for someone’s particular needs or for a particular purpose
meanings.example: Treatment is tailored to the needs of each patient.
meanings.example_cn: 治疗方案是针对各个病人的需要而制订的。

meanings.meaning_en: someone or something that is reliable can be trusted or depended on
meanings.example: Miller was a quiet and reliable man.
meanings.example_cn: 米勒是个话不多且可靠的人。

meanings.meaning_en: a long stick or post usually made of wood or metal, often set upright in the ground to support something
meanings.example: a telephone pole
meanings.example_cn: 电话线杆

meanings.meaning_en: a road, river, or part of someone’s body etc that is broad is wide
meanings.example: We went along a broad passage.
meanings.example_cn: 我们走在一条宽阔的走廊上。

meanings.meaning_en: the sixth month of the year, between May and July
meanings.example: He spent two and a half weeks with us in June 1986.
meanings.example_cn: 1986年6月，他和我们呆了两个半星期。

meanings.meaning_en: in a way that is appropriate to what has been done or said in a particular situation
meanings.example: We have to discover his plans and act accordingly.
meanings.example_cn: 我们得找出他的计划，照着办。

meanings.meaning_en: not paying enough attention to what you are doing, so that you make mistakes, damage things etc
meanings.example: It was careless of him to leave the door unlocked.
meanings.example_cn: 他忘了锁门，真是粗心大意。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of being physically relaxed and satisfied, so that nothing is hurting you, making you feel too hot or cold etc
meanings.example: I dress for comfort, not fashion.
meanings.example_cn: 我穿衣服只讲舒服，不追求时髦。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel less worried, unhappy, or upset, for example by saying kind things to them or touching them
meanings.example: Alan was very reluctant to leave the warmth and comfort of the fire.
meanings.example_cn: 艾伦很不情愿离开暖和舒适的火堆。

meanings.meaning_en: buildings, services, equipment, etc. that are provided for a particular purpose
meanings.example: sports/leisure facilities
meanings.example_cn: 体育 / 消闲设施

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is paid to work for someone else
meanings.example: a government employee
meanings.example_cn: 政府雇员

meanings.meaning_en: having the usual features or qualities of a particular group or thing
meanings.example: typical British weather
meanings.example_cn: 典型的英国天气

meanings.meaning_en: the central part of an atom, made up of neutrons, protons, and other elementary particles
meanings.example: Neutrons and protons are bound together in the nucleus of an atom.
meanings.example_cn: 在一个原子的核内，中子和质子聚合在一起。

meanings.meaning_en: the whole of an amount, thing, or type of thing
meanings.example: There is built-in storage space in all bedrooms.
meanings.example_cn: 所有卧室里都有内置储藏空间。

meanings.meaning_en: the whole of a particular group or thing or to everyone or everything of a particular kind
meanings.example: the restaurant that Hugh and all his friends go to
meanings.example_cn: 休和他所有的朋友们去的那家饭馆

meanings.meaning_en: saying or meaning ‘no’
meanings.example: He gave a negative answer without any explanation.
meanings.example_cn: 他给了一个否定的回答，没有作任何解释。

meanings.meaning_en: a republic in the Asian subcontinent in southern Asia; second most populous country in the world; achieved independence from the United Kingdom in 1947
meanings.example: Burma borders on India.
meanings.example_cn: 缅甸与印度毗邻。

meanings.meaning_en: very modern
meanings.example: advanced weapon systems
meanings.example_cn: 先进的武器系统

meanings.meaning_en: a small house in the country
meanings.example: a country cottage
meanings.example_cn: 乡间小屋

meanings.meaning_en: to force sb to do sth, by law, because it is a duty, etc.
meanings.example: The minister was obliged to report at least once every six months.
meanings.example_cn: 这位大臣必须至少每六个月作一次汇报。

meanings.meaning_en: to judge how good, useful, or successful something is
meanings.example: You should be able to evaluate your own work.
meanings.example_cn: 你应该能够评估自己的工作。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is skilled has the training and experience that is needed to do something well
meanings.example: Skilled craftsmen, such as carpenters, are in great demand.
meanings.example_cn: 对木工之类的熟练工匠需求量很大。

meanings.meaning_en: a small hotel or pub, especially an old one in the countryside
meanings.example: We’re staying at the Holiday Inn.
meanings.example_cn: 我们住在假日酒店。

meanings.meaning_en: not moving, changing, or developing
meanings.example: Economists predict that house prices will remain static for a long period.
meanings.example_cn: 经济学家预测，房价将长期保持稳定。

meanings.meaning_en: the number 40
meanings.example: The place was built as a casino in the forties.
meanings.example_cn: 这个地方建于20世纪40年代，起初是一座赌场。

meanings.meaning_en: punishing sb in an extreme way when they break a particular set of rules
meanings.example: Drug smugglers can expect severe penalties.
meanings.example_cn: 毒品贩子会受到重判。

meanings.meaning_en: a painting, drawing, or photograph of a person
meanings.example: a family portrait
meanings.example_cn: 全家福

meanings.meaning_en: to get something, especially an advantage or a pleasant feeling, from something
meanings.example: Medically, we will derive great benefit from this technique.
meanings.example_cn: 从医学的角度来讲，这一技术将使我们受益匪浅。

meanings.meaning_en: not complete
meanings.example: The exhibition was only a partial success.
meanings.example_cn: 那次展会只获得部分成功。

meanings.meaning_en: happening or appearing every year or once a year
meanings.example: Salary levels are reviewed on a yearly basis.
meanings.example_cn: 工资水平每年都要审查。

meanings.meaning_en: the dried stems of wheat or similar plants that animals sleep on, and that are used for making things such as baskets, hats etc
meanings.example: a mattress filled with straw
meanings.example_cn: 稻草填充的垫子

meanings.meaning_en: to put something into a liquid and lift it out again
meanings.example: Dip each apple in the syrup until thickly coated.
meanings.example_cn: 把每个苹果在糖浆里蘸一下，直到被厚厚地裹上糖浆。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask someone to come to a party, wedding, meal etc
meanings.example: I’m afraid I wasn’t invited.
meanings.example_cn: 恐怕我没有受到邀请。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of thick string or thin rope
meanings.example: The robe was held at the waist by a cord.
meanings.example_cn: 在袍子腰处束了根细绳。

meanings.meaning_en: when the army of one country enters another country by force, in order to take control of it
meanings.example: the invasion of Normandy
meanings.example_cn: 对诺曼底的入侵

meanings.meaning_en: the people who watch or listen to a particular programme, or who see or hear a particular artist’s, writer’s etc work
meanings.example: The show attracts a regular audience of about 20 million.
meanings.example_cn: 这个节目吸引了大约两千万固定观众收看。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance containing atoms from two or more elements
meanings.example: man-made organic compounds
meanings.example_cn: 人造有机化合物

meanings.meaning_en: the possibility that something bad, unpleasant, or dangerous may happen
meanings.example: Skiers always face the risk of serious injury.
meanings.example_cn: 滑雪者始终面临着受重伤的风险。

meanings.meaning_en: nearly, but not completely or not quite
meanings.example: Have you almost finished?
meanings.example_cn: 你差不多完成了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to make something less tight or less firmly fastened, or to become less tight or less firmly fastened
meanings.example: You’ll need a spanner to loosen that bolt.
meanings.example_cn: 你需要扳手来拧开那个螺栓。

meanings.meaning_en: if a country or an area is industrialized or if it industrializes , industries are developed there
meanings.example: The southern part of the country was slow to industrialize.
meanings.example_cn: 这个国家的南部工业化进程缓慢。

meanings.meaning_en: having or deserving great fame, praise, and honour
meanings.example: a truly glorious future
meanings.example_cn: 无比美好的将来

meanings.meaning_en: usually
meanings.example: The journey normally takes about two hours.
meanings.example_cn: 这段旅程通常需要大约两小时。

meanings.meaning_en: more than a particular amount
meanings.example: The car reached speeds in excess of 100 miles per hour.
meanings.example_cn: 这辆汽车的时速超过了100英里。

meanings.meaning_en: very silly or unreasonable
meanings.example: That’s a ridiculous idea!
meanings.example_cn: 那主意很荒唐！

meanings.meaning_en: an object made of brightly coloured thin rubber, that is filled with air and used as a toy or decoration for parties
meanings.example: Can you help me blow up these balloons?
meanings.example_cn: 你帮我把这些气球吹起来好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: used with the name of a container, place, or area to say where someone or something is
meanings.example: There’s some sugar in the cupboard.
meanings.example_cn: 碗橱里有一些糖。

meanings.meaning_en: ordinary, usual, or happening every day
meanings.example: the problems of everyday life
meanings.example_cn: 日常生活中的问题

meanings.meaning_en: to make something seem better, larger, worse etc than it really is
meanings.example: I couldn’t sleep for three days – I’m not exaggerating.
meanings.example_cn: 我三天没睡觉了——一点不夸张。

meanings.meaning_en: in addition to what has already been said
meanings.example: He is old and unpopular. Furthermore, he has at best only two years of political life ahead of him.
meanings.example_cn: 他年纪已老，又不得人心，而且他最多也只有两年的政治生命了。

meanings.meaning_en: to move from one place, school, job etc to another, or to make someone do this, especially within the same organization
meanings.example: Swod transferred from MI6 to the Security Service.
meanings.example_cn: 斯沃德从军情六处调到了安全局。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is involved in illegal activities or has been proved guilty of a crime
meanings.example: Police have described the man as a violent and dangerous criminal.
meanings.example_cn: 警方形容那名男子是个凶暴而危险的罪犯。

meanings.meaning_en: a person who believes in the ideas taught by Jesus Christ
meanings.example: He was a devout Christian.
meanings.example_cn: 他曾是一个虔诚的基督教徒。

meanings.meaning_en: the goods that are being carried in a ship or plane
meanings.example: a cargo plane
meanings.example_cn: 货机

meanings.meaning_en: a large area of land in a hot country, where crops such as tea, cotton, and sugar are grown
meanings.example: a rubber plantation
meanings.example_cn: 橡胶园

meanings.meaning_en: being the total amount of sth before anything is taken away
meanings.example: a gross profit of 5 million
meanings.example_cn: 500万美元的毛利

meanings.meaning_en: happening slowly over a long period of time
meanings.example: There has been a gradual change in climate.
meanings.example_cn: 气候渐渐发生了变化。

meanings.meaning_en: the beliefs, way of life, art, and customs that are shared and accepted by people in a particular society
meanings.example: We speak Danish at home so that the boys don’t lose touch with their language and culture.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在家说丹麦语，这样男孩子们就不会脱离他们的语言和文化。

meanings.meaning_en: the way someone is standing, sitting, or lying
meanings.example: Lie in a comfortable position .
meanings.example_cn: 以一个舒服的姿势躺下。

meanings.meaning_en: the number 4
meanings.example: She is married with four children.
meanings.example_cn: 她已婚，有四个孩子。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who enters another country to live there permanently
meanings.example: an illegal immigrant
meanings.example_cn: 非法移民

meanings.meaning_en: a general tendency in the way a situation is changing or developing
meanings.example: He characterized briefly the main trend in the world today.
meanings.example_cn: 他简单扼要地描述了当前世界的主要倾向。

meanings.meaning_en: if the weather is humid, you feel uncomfortable because the air is very wet and usually hot
meanings.example: Tokyo is extremely humid in mid-summer.
meanings.example_cn: 仲夏的东京十分潮湿。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of preparing something or preparing for something
meanings.example: This dish is good for dinner parties because much of the preparation can be done ahead of time.
meanings.example_cn: 这道菜适合宴会，因为很多准备工作可以事先做好。

meanings.meaning_en: concerning or produced by  magnetism
meanings.example: magnetic forces
meanings.example_cn: 磁力

meanings.meaning_en: the 11th month of the year, between October and December
meanings.example: And again in November.
meanings.example_cn: 在十一月又一次。

meanings.meaning_en: the things that people wear to cover their body or keep warm
meanings.example: What sort of clothes was he wearing?
meanings.example_cn: 他穿着什么样的衣服？

meanings.meaning_en: a soft steady light
meanings.example: the glow from the dying fire
meanings.example_cn: 快要熄灭的火光

meanings.meaning_en: to produce or reflect a soft steady light
meanings.example: The bedside lamp glowed dimly.
meanings.example_cn: 床头灯发出暗淡的光。

meanings.meaning_en: a thick flat object made of cloth or rubber, used to protect or clean something, or to make something more comfortable
meanings.example: Use an abrasive pad for stubborn stains.
meanings.example_cn: 用百洁布擦洗顽固污渍。

meanings.meaning_en: to put a layer of soft material in or on sth in order to protect it, make it thicker or change its shape
meanings.example: Keep a telephone pad and a pen to hand.
meanings.example_cn: 手边准备一本电话记事簿和一支笔。

meanings.meaning_en: the time before it gets dark when the sky is becoming less bright
meanings.example: The street lights go on at dusk.
meanings.example_cn: 街灯在黄昏时亮起来。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone do something they do not want to do
meanings.example: Due to the high cost of borrowing, many companies have been forced to close.
meanings.example_cn: 由于借贷成本高，许多公司被迫关门。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of physical power with which something moves or hits another thing
meanings.example: The force of the explosion blew out all the windows.
meanings.example_cn: 爆炸的冲力把所有的窗子都震碎了。

meanings.meaning_en: a rainy period of time is one when it rains a lot
meanings.example: a cold rainy day in October
meanings.example_cn: 十月里一个寒冷的雨天

meanings.meaning_en: not afraid of people, and used to living with them
meanings.example: tame elephants
meanings.example_cn: 驯养的大象

meanings.meaning_en: made or done officially or publicly
meanings.example: formal recognition of the reformed church
meanings.example_cn: 改革后的教会所获得的官方承认

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment that starts or stops the flow of electricity to a machine, light etc when you push it
meanings.example: Where’s the light switch ?
meanings.example_cn: 电灯开关在哪儿？

meanings.meaning_en: to change from doing or using one thing to doing or using another
meanings.example: an on-off switch
meanings.example_cn: 开关键

meanings.meaning_en: something that grows on a plant, tree, or bush, can be eaten as a food, contains seeds or a stone, and is usually sweet
meanings.example: Try to eat plenty of fresh fruit .
meanings.example_cn: 尽量多吃新鲜水果。

meanings.meaning_en: a statement in mathematics that shows that two amounts or totals are equal
meanings.example: In the equation 2x + 1 = 7, what is x?
meanings.example_cn: 在方程式2x+1=7中，x的值为多少？

meanings.meaning_en: the conditions that affect a situation, action, event etc
meanings.example: The Soviet Union had been forced by circumstances to sign a pact with Nazi Germany.
meanings.example_cn: 苏联为形势所迫同纳粹德国签订了一项条约。

meanings.meaning_en: the number 80
meanings.example: The band was incredibly successful in the eighties.
meanings.example_cn: 这支乐队在80年代红透半边天。
