meanings.example: Sarah rejected her brother’s offer of help.
meanings.example_cn: 萨拉拒绝了她弟弟的帮助。

meanings.meaning_en: used to indicate that a statement explains or supports a previous statement
meanings.example: I know I'll be confronted with difficulties, but I will squeak by anyway.
meanings.example_cn: 我知道我会遇到许多困难，可我无论如何总能应付过去。

meanings.meaning_en: to paint the inside of a room, put special paper on the walls etc
meanings.example: The bathroom is decorated in green and yellow.
meanings.example_cn: 浴室里是用绿色和黄色装潢的。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong thread made of several threads twisted together, used for tying or fastening things
meanings.example: Her key hung on a string around her neck.
meanings.example_cn: 她的钥匙穿了根绳子挂在脖子上。

meanings.meaning_en: small amounts of water that are present in the air, in a substance, or on a surface
meanings.example: When the soil is dry, more moisture is lost from the plant.
meanings.example_cn: 土壤干燥时，植物就会失去更多的水分。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you remember from the past about a person, place, or experience
meanings.example: He has lots of happy memories of his stay in Japan.
meanings.example_cn: 他对在日本逗留的那段时光有许多美好的回忆。

meanings.meaning_en: to take something that someone offers you, or to agree to do something that someone asks you to do
meanings.example: Rick accepted her offer of coffee.
meanings.example_cn: 她请里克喝咖啡，他接受了。

meanings.meaning_en: at or towards the back of a thing or person
meanings.example: I turned to speak to the person standing behind me.
meanings.example_cn: 我转身和站在我后面的那人说话。

meanings.meaning_en: the use of money to get a profit or to make a business activity successful, or the money that is used
meanings.example: We plan to buy some property as an investment.
meanings.example_cn: 我们打算买些房地产作为投资。

meanings.meaning_en: a statement, story etc that is false is completely untrue
meanings.example: false accusations
meanings.example_cn: 不实的指责

meanings.meaning_en: to become or to make sth greater in amount, number, value, etc.
meanings.example: The population increased dramatically in the first half of the century.
meanings.example_cn: 该世纪上半叶，人口大幅度增加。

meanings.meaning_en: a rise in the amount, number or value of sth
meanings.example: political tensions that might increase the likelihood of war
meanings.example_cn: 或许会增加战争爆发可能性的紧张政治局面

meanings.meaning_en: a person that you have invited to your house or to a particular event that you are paying for
meanings.example: We have guests staying this weekend.
meanings.example_cn: 这周末我家有客人来住。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of basic laws and principles that a country or organization is governed by
meanings.example: The right to speak freely is written into the Constitution of the United States.
meanings.example_cn: 言论自由的权利被写入美国宪法。

meanings.meaning_en: not allowed by the law
meanings.example: illegal drugs
meanings.example_cn: 违禁药品

meanings.meaning_en: a vehicle with wheels that is pulled by a horse, used in the past
meanings.example: The president-elect followed in an open carriage drawn by six beautiful grey horses.
meanings.example_cn: 新当选的总统紧随其后，坐着6匹灰色骏马开道的敞篷马车。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a short statement giving only the main information and not the details of a plan, event, report etc
meanings.example: The authors summarize their views in the introduction.
meanings.example_cn: 作者在序言里概述了他们的观点。

meanings.meaning_en: not cooked
meanings.example: raw meat
meanings.example_cn: 生肉

meanings.meaning_en: a part which is connected to a piece of equipment in order to make it reach something further away
meanings.example: Some of the best extensions are made from sections of rod tube or drainpipe.
meanings.example_cn: 最好的延长管中有些是用杆管或排水管制成的。

meanings.meaning_en: behaving or speaking in a way that is correct for the social situation you are in, and showing that you are careful to consider other people’s needs and feelings
meanings.example: She’s always very polite.
meanings.example_cn: 她总是很有礼貌。

meanings.meaning_en: a large brush with a long handle, used for sweeping floors
meanings.example: The lobby is empty but for the postman and his broom.
meanings.example_cn: 大厅里除了邮差和他的扫帚以外别无他人。

meanings.meaning_en: with the result that something else happens
meanings.example: Our bodies can sweat, thereby losing heat by evaporation.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的身体会流汗，由此能通过蒸发散热。

meanings.meaning_en: a statement in which you tell someone that you will cause them harm or trouble if they do not do what you want
meanings.example: Your threats don’t scare me.
meanings.example_cn: 你的那些威胁吓不倒我。

meanings.meaning_en: to show that sb/sth is right or reasonable
meanings.example: How can they justify paying such huge salaries?
meanings.example_cn: 他们怎能证明付这么大笔薪金是正当的呢？

meanings.meaning_en: the skill of planning the movements of armies in a war, or an example of this
meanings.example: military strategies
meanings.example_cn: 军事战略

meanings.meaning_en: a container for putting things in, especially one with four stiff straight sides
meanings.example: a strong cardboard box
meanings.example_cn: 一只结实的纸板箱

meanings.meaning_en: to make something easier or less complicated
meanings.example: an attempt to simplify the tax system
meanings.example_cn: 简化税制的尝试

meanings.meaning_en: the degree to which something is used or the way in which it is used
meanings.example: land usage
meanings.example_cn: 土地的利用

meanings.meaning_en: in a voice that other people can hear
meanings.example: The teacher listened to the children reading aloud.
meanings.example_cn: 老师听着孩子们朗读。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of great pleasure and satisfaction
meanings.example: The kids were screaming with delight.
meanings.example_cn: 孩子们在高兴地尖叫。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone great satisfaction and enjoyment
meanings.example: He is delighting audiences with his wit and humour.
meanings.example_cn: 他在用自己的智慧和幽默娱乐观众。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is unable to walk properly because their legs are damaged or injured - now considered offensive
meanings.example: She has gone from being a healthy, fit, and sporty young woman to being a cripple.
meanings.example_cn: 她从一个健康、强壮、爱好体育运动的年轻姑娘变成了一个残疾人。

meanings.meaning_en: (cigarette)a thin tube of paper filled with finely cut tobacco that people smoke
meanings.example: a packet of cigaret
meanings.example_cn: 一包香烟

meanings.meaning_en: a shape with four straight equal sides with 90˚ angles at the corners
meanings.example: First of all, draw a square.
meanings.example_cn: 首先，画一个正方形。

meanings.meaning_en: to speak to God in order to ask for help or give thanks
meanings.example: They went to the mosque to pray.
meanings.example_cn: 他们去清真寺祷告。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of liking sb, especially sexually
meanings.example: Sexual attraction is a large part of falling in love.
meanings.example_cn: 堕入爱河很大部分是由于性吸引。

meanings.meaning_en: the opinion that people have about someone or something because of what has happened in the past
meanings.example: In her last job she gained a reputation as a hard worker.
meanings.example_cn: 她做上一份工作时赢得了勤奋的好口碑。

meanings.meaning_en: to become less or go down to a lower level, or to make something do this
meanings.example: The number of people who have the disease has decreased significantly in recent years.
meanings.example_cn: 近年来，这种病的患者人数明显下降。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of becoming less, or the amount by which something becomes less
meanings.example: They want to decrease their reliance on oil.
meanings.example_cn: 他们想减少对石油的依赖。

meanings.meaning_en: a large natural hole in the side of a cliff or hill, or under the ground
meanings.example: the entrance to a cave
meanings.example_cn: 洞穴的入口

meanings.meaning_en: a long curved tropical fruit with a yellow skin
meanings.example: a bunch of bananas
meanings.example_cn: 一串香蕉

meanings.meaning_en: not known about
meanings.example: The murderer’s identity remains unknown.
meanings.example_cn: 杀人凶手身份仍然不明。

meanings.meaning_en: used to say that something happens or is true even though something else might have prevented it
meanings.example: Despite all our efforts to save the school, the authorities decided to close it.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管我们竭力想保住这所学校，当局还是决定把它关闭。

meanings.meaning_en: the process or business of taking goods from one place to another
meanings.example: the transportation of dangerous chemicals by road
meanings.example_cn: 危险化学品的陆路运输

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a shirt, coat etc that fits around your neck, and is usually folded over
meanings.example: He grabbed me by the collar.
meanings.example_cn: 他抓住我的衣领。

meanings.meaning_en: to move or bend your body in a particular direction
meanings.example: They were leaning forward, facing each other.
meanings.example_cn: 他们面对面身体前倾。

meanings.meaning_en: a student at college or university, who is working for their first degree
meanings.example: second-year undergraduates
meanings.example_cn: 大学二年级学生

meanings.meaning_en: a solid substance such as wood, plastic, or metal
meanings.example: materials like wood or stone
meanings.example_cn: 木材或石头之类的材料

meanings.meaning_en: relating to your money, possessions, living conditions etc, rather than the needs of your mind or soul
meanings.example: harmful radioactive material
meanings.example_cn: 有害的放射性材料

meanings.meaning_en: not supporting any of the people or groups involved in an argument or disagreement
meanings.example: I always tried to remain neutral when they started arguing.
meanings.example_cn: 他们争论起来的时候我总是努力保持中立。

meanings.meaning_en: a male person or animal cannot have babies or lay eggs
meanings.example: Many women earn less than their male colleagues.
meanings.example_cn: 许多女性挣钱比她们的男性同事少。

meanings.meaning_en: a man
meanings.example: Police described her attacker as a white male aged about 25.
meanings.example_cn: 警方称袭击她的人是一名大约25岁的白人男子。

meanings.meaning_en: a completely round flat shape
meanings.example: Cut out two circles of paper.
meanings.example_cn: 剪出两个圆形纸片。

meanings.meaning_en: how thick something is
meanings.example: The thickness of the walls is 5 feet.
meanings.example_cn: 墙体厚度为5英尺。

meanings.meaning_en: reports of recent events in the newspapers or on the radio or television
meanings.example: a late evening news broadcast
meanings.example_cn: 晚间新闻节目

meanings.meaning_en: behaving in a way that is morally wrong
meanings.example: the wicked stepmother in ‘Hansel and Gretel’
meanings.example_cn: 《糖果屋》中那个恶毒的继母

meanings.meaning_en: thinking that someone might be guilty of doing something wrong or dishonest
meanings.example: His reluctance to answer my questions made me suspicious.
meanings.example_cn: 他不愿回答我的问题，这引起我的怀疑。

meanings.meaning_en: to fire bullets, etc.
meanings.example: This is just a toy gun─it doesn't shoot real bullets.
meanings.example_cn: 这只是一支玩具枪——不能射真子弹。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a plant that comes up above the ground when it is just beginning to grow, or a new part that grows on an existing plant
meanings.example: A man was shot in the leg.
meanings.example_cn: 一个人被射中腿部。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of printing a book, a magazine, etc. and making it available to the public; a book, a magazine, etc. that has been published
meanings.example: The guide is being translated into several languages for publication near Christmas.
meanings.example_cn: 这本指南正被翻译成好几种语言，准备在圣诞节前后出版。

meanings.meaning_en: the fact that sth might exist or happen, but is not certain to
meanings.example: There’s always a possibility that he might go back to Seattle.
meanings.example_cn: 他也许会回到西雅图去，这种可能性一直存在。

meanings.meaning_en: to be or put yourself in a flat or horizontal position so that you are not standing or sitting
meanings.example: to lie on your back/side/front
meanings.example_cn: 仰 / 侧 / 俯卧

meanings.meaning_en: an angry argument or disagreement
meanings.example: I had a terrible quarrel with my other brothers.
meanings.example_cn: 我和其他几个兄弟大吵了一架。

meanings.meaning_en: used after a verb or preposition to mean ‘in, at or to this position or place ’
meanings.example: What are you doing here?
meanings.example_cn: 你们在这里干什么？

meanings.meaning_en: to remove something from a surface using the edge of a knife, a stick etc
meanings.example: Scrape the carrots and slice them thinly.
meanings.example_cn: 把这些胡萝卜去皮切成薄片。

meanings.meaning_en: the action of one thing rubbing roughly against another
meanings.example: The two of them scraped their dishes clean.
meanings.example_cn: 他们两个把盘子擦得干干净净。

meanings.meaning_en: something such as an object, a fact or a situation that shows, explains or supports what you say
meanings.example: Many countries, for example Mexico and Japan, have a lot of earthquakes.
meanings.example_cn: 许多国家，例如墨西哥和日本，经常发生地震。

meanings.meaning_en: the holy book of the Christian religion, consisting of the Old Testament and the New Testament
meanings.example: a publisher of bibles and hymn books
meanings.example_cn: 一家《圣经》册本和圣歌集出版商

meanings.meaning_en: the condition of being steady and not changing
meanings.example: a period of relative stability
meanings.example_cn: 相对稳定的一段时期

meanings.meaning_en: to provide a person or place with the things that are needed for a particular kind of activity or work
meanings.example: They try to equip their vehicles with gadgets to deal with every possible contingency.
meanings.example_cn: 他们尽量给他们的车辆配备各种小装置以应付任何可能的突发状况。

meanings.meaning_en: a large area of land that is covered with trees
meanings.example: a tropical forest
meanings.example_cn: 热带森林

meanings.meaning_en: fair and sensible
meanings.example: a reasonable request
meanings.example_cn: 合情合理的要求

meanings.meaning_en: to leave a job, school etc, especially without finishing it completely
meanings.example: He quit his job after an argument with a colleague.
meanings.example_cn: 他和一个同事争吵后就辞职了。

meanings.meaning_en: smaller in number or amount
meanings.example: Temperatures will be lower over the weekend.
meanings.example_cn: 周末气温会下降。

meanings.meaning_en: to let or make sth/sb go down
meanings.example: She lowered her newspaper and looked around.
meanings.example_cn: 她放低报纸往四下看了看。

meanings.meaning_en: in or to a lower position than something, or directly under something
meanings.example: Jo enjoyed feeling the warm sand beneath her feet.
meanings.example_cn: 乔很喜欢脚下踩着温暖沙子的感觉。

meanings.meaning_en: To transform something into something else means to change or convert it into that thing
meanings.example: Your metabolic rate is the speed at which your body transforms food into energy.
meanings.example_cn: 你的新陈代谢率就是你身体将食物转换成能量的速度。

meanings.meaning_en: a person who plays a musical instrument or writes music, especially as a job
meanings.example: a talented young musician
meanings.example_cn: 有天赋的年轻音乐家

meanings.meaning_en: to believe or say that a situation or event is caused by something
meanings.example: She attributes her success to hard work and a little luck.
meanings.example_cn: 她认为她的成功来自勤劳和一点运气。

meanings.meaning_en: a quality or feature, especially one that is considered to be good or useful
meanings.example: What attributes should a good manager possess?
meanings.example_cn: 一名优秀的经理应该具备哪些素质？

meanings.meaning_en: a leather seat that you sit on when you ride a horse
meanings.example: It looks like a saddle.
meanings.example_cn: 它看起来像一个马鞍。

meanings.meaning_en: the thick central woody stem of a tree
meanings.example: He left his bicycle leaning against a tree trunk.
meanings.example_cn: 他把他的自行车斜靠在树干上。

meanings.meaning_en: to agree to obey someone or something or to go through a process, especially when you have no choice
meanings.example: Derek has agreed to submit to questioning.
meanings.example_cn: 德雷克同意接受讯问。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who buys goods or services from a shop, company etc
meanings.example: We aim to offer good value and service to all our customers.
meanings.example_cn: 我们力求为所有的客户提供物有所值的商品和服务。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of watching sb/sth carefully for a period of time, especially to learn sth
meanings.example: He spent two nights under close observation in hospital.
meanings.example_cn: 他在医院接受了两个晚上的严密观察。

meanings.meaning_en: having opinions or beliefs, especially about politics, that are not extreme and that most people consider reasonable
meanings.example: the more moderate members of the party
meanings.example_cn: 党内观点较为温和的党员

meanings.meaning_en: to succeed in dealing with a difficult problem or situation
meanings.example: Sometimes I find it hard to cope.
meanings.example_cn: 有时候我觉得很难应付。

meanings.meaning_en: a man who rules a country because he is from a royal family
meanings.example: On 2 December Henry VI was crowned king (= made the king at an official ceremony ).
meanings.example_cn: 12月2日，亨利六世加冕为王。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you feel or do because of something that has happened or been said
meanings.example: What was Jeff’s reaction when you told him about the job?
meanings.example_cn: 你告诉杰夫这个工作时，他是什么反应？

meanings.meaning_en: your general attitude to life and the world
meanings.example: Exercise will improve your looks and your outlook.
meanings.example_cn: 运动将会改善你的外在形象和人生态度。

meanings.meaning_en: a person or country that belongs to a group or organization
meanings.example: The majority of union members voted in favour of a strike.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数工会成员投票赞成罢工。

meanings.meaning_en: a small official document that you get from your government, that proves who you are, and which you need in order to leave your country and enter other countries
meanings.example: I have an Irish passport.
meanings.example_cn: 我持爱尔兰护照。

meanings.meaning_en: a decrease in the size, price, or amount of something, or the act of decreasing something
meanings.example: strategies for noise reduction
meanings.example_cn: 减少噪音的对策

meanings.meaning_en: the period of time when you are a child
meanings.example: I had a very happy childhood.
meanings.example_cn: 我的童年很快乐。

meanings.meaning_en: the point at which two lines or edges meet
meanings.example: He pulled a dirty handkerchief out by its corner and waved it at me.
meanings.example_cn: 他拽出一块脏手帕，捏着一角向我挥动。

meanings.meaning_en: the mother of your mother or father
meanings.example: My grandmothers are both widows.
meanings.example_cn: 我的祖母和外祖母都是寡妇。

meanings.meaning_en: a powerful flash of light in the sky caused by electricity and usually followed by thunder
meanings.example: Two farmworkers were struck by lightning (= hit by lightning ).
meanings.example_cn: 两个农民遭闪电击中。

meanings.meaning_en: used to show what a part belongs to or comes from
meanings.example: the back of the house
meanings.example_cn: 房子的后部

meanings.meaning_en: the act or process of putting people or things into a group or class
meanings.example: the classification of wines according to quality
meanings.example_cn: 葡萄酒按品质的分类

meanings.meaning_en: a nervous worried feeling that makes it impossible for you to relax
meanings.example: The tension was becoming unbearable, and I wanted to scream.
meanings.example_cn: 这种紧张变得难以忍受，我真想大声尖叫。

meanings.meaning_en: to remove something that is covering the surface of something else
meanings.example: Strip the beds and wash the sheets.
meanings.example_cn: 把床单撤下来清洗。

meanings.meaning_en: a long narrow piece of paper, cloth etc
meanings.example: a strip of paper
meanings.example_cn: 一张纸条

meanings.meaning_en: the way in which someone explains or understands an event, information, someone’s actions etc
meanings.example: One possible interpretation is that they want you to resign.
meanings.example_cn: 一种可能的解释是，他们想要你辞职。

meanings.meaning_en: to say very strongly that you do not approve of something or someone, especially because you think it is morally wrong
meanings.example: Politicians were quick to condemn the bombing.
meanings.example_cn: 政治家们立即对爆炸事件进行了谴责。

meanings.meaning_en: having happened or existed before the event, time, or thing that you are talking about now
meanings.example: She has a teenage daughter from a previous marriage.
meanings.example_cn: 她有个出自前一次婚姻的十几岁的女儿。

meanings.meaning_en: making you believe that sth you want will happen; bringing hope
meanings.example: Things might get better, but it doesn’t look very hopeful right now.
meanings.example_cn: 情况也许会好转，但目前看来希望不大。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is invisible cannot be seen
meanings.example: The house was surrounded by trees, and invisible from the road.
meanings.example_cn: 这所房子树木环绕，从路上是看不见的。

meanings.meaning_en: an important social event or ceremony
meanings.example: I’m saving this bottle of champagne for a special occasion.
meanings.example_cn: 我要把这瓶香槟酒留到特别的日子喝。

meanings.meaning_en: a word or group of words that represent a person (such as ‘Michael’, ‘teacher’ or ‘police officer’), a place (such as ‘France’ or ‘school’), a thing or activity (such as ‘coffee’ or ‘football’), or a quality or idea (such as ‘danger’ or ‘happiness’). Nouns can be used as the subject or object of a verb (as in ‘The teacher arrived’ or ‘We like the teacher’) or as the object of a preposition (as in ‘good at football’).
meanings.example: An adjective must agree with  its noun in mumber and case.
meanings.example_cn: 形容词在数和格方面必须符合其所修饰的名词。

meanings.meaning_en: to thoroughly mix together soft or liquid substances to form a single smooth substance
meanings.example: Blend the sugar, eggs, and flour.
meanings.example_cn: 把糖、鸡蛋和面粉掺在一起。

meanings.meaning_en: a mixture of different types of the same thing
meanings.example: a blend of tea
meanings.example_cn: 混合茶叶

meanings.meaning_en: someone you work with – used especially by professional people
meanings.example: a colleague of mine from the bank
meanings.example_cn: 我在银行的一位同事

meanings.meaning_en: having or using many small parts, such as microchips , that control and direct a small electric current
meanings.example: electronic games
meanings.example_cn: 电子游戏

meanings.meaning_en: uncontrolled flames, light, and heat that destroy and damage things
meanings.example: The warehouse was completely destroyed by fire.
meanings.example_cn: 仓库全给烧毁了。

meanings.meaning_en: to shoot bullets or bombs
meanings.example: Thirty people died in a fire in downtown Chicago.
meanings.example_cn: 30人死于芝加哥市中心的一场火灾。

meanings.meaning_en: a quantity or thickness of sth that lies over a surface or between surfaces
meanings.example: A thin layer of dust covered everything.
meanings.example_cn: 所有的物品上都积了薄薄的一层灰尘。

meanings.meaning_en: to gradually disappear
meanings.example: Hopes of a peace settlement are beginning to fade.
meanings.example_cn: 达成和平协议的希望日渐渺茫。

meanings.meaning_en: further forward in space or time; in front
meanings.example: He kept his gaze fixed on the car ahead.
meanings.example_cn: 他的目光一直盯着前面的那辆汽车。

meanings.meaning_en: to cut something into smaller pieces
meanings.example: He went outside to chop some more wood for the fire.
meanings.example_cn: 他出去再砍些木材来生火。

meanings.meaning_en: a large area of sea partly enclosed by land
meanings.example: the Gulf of Mexico
meanings.example_cn: 墨西哥湾

meanings.meaning_en: useful to you because it saves you time, or does not spoil your plans or cause you problems
meanings.example: Mail-order catalogs are a convenient way to shop.
meanings.example_cn: 使用邮购目录是一种方便的购物方式。

meanings.meaning_en: the number
meanings.example: She was sent to jail for eleven months.
meanings.example_cn: 她被判入狱11个月。

meanings.meaning_en: beside or near something
meanings.example: She stood by the window.
meanings.example_cn: 她站在窗边。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to Australia or its people
meanings.example: She went solo backpacking for eight months in the Australian outback.
meanings.example_cn: 她在澳大利亚内陆独自背包旅行了八个月。

meanings.meaning_en: larger or more important than all other things, ideas etc of the same kind
meanings.example: The main reason for living in Spain is the weather.
meanings.example_cn: 居住在西班牙的主要原因是天气。

meanings.meaning_en: a sweet food made from sugar
meanings.example: a box of candies
meanings.example_cn: 一盒糖果

meanings.meaning_en: very small living things, some of which cause illness or disease
meanings.example: Is it possible to multiply bacteria in the laboratory?
meanings.example_cn: 有可能在实验室繁殖细菌吗?

meanings.meaning_en: many times
meanings.example: Graham was repeatedly warned not to work so hard.
meanings.example_cn: 格雷厄姆一再被提醒工作不要这么拼命。

meanings.meaning_en: a statement, fact, or situation that tells you why sth happened; a reason given for sth
meanings.example: She told the court she would give a full explanation of the prosecution's decision on Monday.
meanings.example_cn: 她告诉法庭她将在星期一就控方的决定做出详尽的解释。

meanings.meaning_en: the effect or influence that an event, situation etc has on someone or something
meanings.example: We need to assess the impact on climate change.
meanings.example_cn: 我们需要评估对气候变化的影响。

meanings.meaning_en: used to mention the main part or cause of something, the main reason for something etc
meanings.example: Her illness was caused mainly by stress.
meanings.example_cn: 她的病主要是由精神压力引起的。

meanings.meaning_en: (also British English,informal admin) the activities that are done in order to plan, organize and run a business, school or other institution
meanings.example: We’re looking for someone with experience in administration.
meanings.example_cn: 我们正在寻找一个有管理经验的人。

meanings.meaning_en: (<英>skilful)good at doing something, especially something that needs special ability or training
meanings.example: a skillful footballer
meanings.example_cn: 技巧娴熟的足球运动员

meanings.meaning_en: information or facts
meanings.example: The research involves collecting data from two random samples.
meanings.example_cn: 该项研究需要从两个随机样本里收集资料。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of making air, water, soil etc dangerously dirty and not suitable for people to use, or the state of being dangerously dirty
meanings.example: California’s tough anti-pollution laws
meanings.example_cn: 加利福尼亚州严厉的反污染法

meanings.meaning_en: the state of having or owning sth
meanings.example: That information is not in our possession.
meanings.example_cn: 那则信息不归我们所有。

meanings.meaning_en: having qualities that people expect and admire in a man, such as being brave and strong
meanings.example: a deep manly voice
meanings.example_cn: 低沉雄浑的嗓音

meanings.meaning_en: to change something, such as a decision, judgment, or process so that it is the opposite of what it was before
meanings.example: to reverse a procedure/process/trend
meanings.example_cn: 彻底改变程序 / 过程 / 趋势

meanings.meaning_en: the less important side or the back of an object that has two sides
meanings.example: Reverse the paper in the printer.
meanings.example_cn: 把打印机中的纸翻过来。

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring liquids, equal to eight pints. In Britain this is 4.55 litres, and in the US it is 3.79 litres.
meanings.example: a 20 gallon fish tank
meanings.example_cn: 一个20加仑的鱼缸

meanings.meaning_cn: （与过去分词连用构成完成时）
meanings.meaning_en: used with past participles to form perfect tenses
meanings.example: Our guests have arrived.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的客人到了。

meanings.meaning_en: used to say that someone owns something or that it is available for them to use
meanings.example: Has anyone phoned?
meanings.example_cn: 有人打过电话来吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a male child, or a male person in general
meanings.example: The boys wanted to play football.
meanings.example_cn: 男孩子们想踢足球。

meanings.meaning_en: Men are sometimes addressed as mister, especially by children and especially when the person talking to them does not know their name
meanings.example: Look, Mister, we know our job, so don't try to tell us what to do.
meanings.example_cn: 哎，先生，我们了解自己的工作，所以你不必告诉我们该干什么。

meanings.meaning_en: to move along on your hands and knees with your body close to the ground
meanings.example: The baby crawled across the floor.
meanings.example_cn: 宝宝爬过地板。

meanings.meaning_en: the condition of having a paid job
meanings.example: She was offered employment in the sales office.
meanings.example_cn: 她获聘在销售部工作。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong fear of something that is going to happen or may happen
meanings.example: The prospect of flying filled me with dread .
meanings.example_cn: 想到要乘飞机我充满了恐惧。

meanings.meaning_en: to feel anxious or worried about something that is going to happen or may happen
meanings.example: She lives in dread of (= is continuously very afraid of ) the disease returning.
meanings.example_cn: 她整天担心着会旧病复发。

meanings.meaning_en: hard to do, understand, or deal with
meanings.example: a difficult question
meanings.example_cn: 难解的问题

meanings.meaning_en: angry, and behaving in a threatening way; ready to attack
meanings.example: Jim’s voice became aggressive.
meanings.example_cn: 吉姆的声音凶了起来。

meanings.meaning_en: the elder of two people, especially brothers and sisters, is the one who was born first
meanings.example: Sarah is the elder of the two.
meanings.example_cn: 两人当中萨拉年纪较长。

meanings.meaning_en: a member of a tribe or other social group who is important and respected because they are old
meanings.example: a meeting of the village elders
meanings.example_cn: 村里长辈们的集会

meanings.meaning_en: used to describe one of two children who are twins
meanings.example: I always confounded him with his twin brother.
meanings.example_cn: 我总分不清他和他的孪生兄弟。

meanings.meaning_en: one of two children born at the same time to the same mother
meanings.example: The twins are now eight months old.
meanings.example_cn: 这对双胞胎现在已经八个月大了。

meanings.meaning_en: a large container for a very hot fire, used to produce power, heat, or liquid metal
meanings.example: It's like a furnace (= very hot) in here!
meanings.example_cn: 这里热得像火炉！

meanings.meaning_en: connected with the state, government or public affairs
meanings.example: a monarch without political power
meanings.example_cn: 没有政治权力的君主

meanings.meaning_en: an image of a person or animal that is made in solid material such as stone or metal and is usually large
meanings.example: Churchill’s statue stands outside the parliament building.
meanings.example_cn: 丘吉尔的塑像矗立在议会大厦外。

meanings.meaning_en: the study in  mathematics  of the angles and shapes formed by the relationships of lines, surfaces, and solid objects in space
meanings.example: the very ordered way in which mathematics and geometry describe nature
meanings.example_cn: 数学和几何学描述自然的条理性

meanings.meaning_en: used in the names of some clubs or organizations
meanings.example: the British Golf Union
meanings.example_cn: 英国高尔夫球协会

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone or something special attention or a particular type of treatment
meanings.example: You will not be accorded any special treatment.
meanings.example_cn: 你不会得到任何特殊待遇。

meanings.meaning_en: at the end of sth
meanings.example: a terminal branch of a tree
meanings.example_cn: 树顶枝条

meanings.meaning_cn: 〔飞机、公共汽车、轮船客运或货物运输的〕集散站，终点站
meanings.meaning_en: a big building where people wait to get onto planes, buses, or ships, or where goods are loaded
meanings.example: terminal examinations (= at the end of a course, etc.)
meanings.example_cn: 期终考试

meanings.meaning_en: oil that is obtained from below the surface of the Earth and is used to make petrol,  paraffin  , and various chemical substances
meanings.example: petroleum-based products
meanings.example_cn: 石油产品

meanings.meaning_en: the direction that is exactly between north and west
meanings.example: four miles to the northwest
meanings.example_cn: 西北方向4英里

meanings.meaning_en: in the northwest of a place
meanings.example: the northwest suburbs of the city
meanings.example_cn: 城市西北部的郊区

meanings.meaning_en: the soft thick hair that sheep and some goats have on their body
meanings.example: a wool overcoat
meanings.example_cn: 羊毛大衣

meanings.meaning_en: having an empty space inside
meanings.example: a hollow tree
meanings.example_cn: 空心树

meanings.meaning_en: an important job that involves travelling somewhere, done by a member of the air force, army etc, or by a spacecraft
meanings.example: He was sent on over 200 missions before being killed in action.
meanings.example_cn: 在阵亡之前他奉命执行过200多次军事任务。

meanings.meaning_en: a lamp that you can carry, consisting of a metal container with glass sides that surrounds a flame or light
meanings.example: Light the lantern, take it and go down stairs.
meanings.example_cn: 你把这灯笼点起来，带着它下楼去。

meanings.meaning_en: very serious and sincere
meanings.example: a rather earnest young man
meanings.example_cn: 相当认真的一个年轻人

meanings.meaning_en: a toilet or the room a toilet is in
meanings.example: the ladies' lavatory
meanings.example_cn: 女厕所

meanings.meaning_en: used to emphasize one
meanings.example: One likes to do it oneself.
meanings.example_cn: 人都喜欢亲自去做。

meanings.meaning_en: someone or something that is familiar is well-known to you and easy to recognize
meanings.example: a familiar tune
meanings.example_cn: 熟悉的曲调

meanings.meaning_en: a vehicle used for travelling or carrying things into space, which is shaped like a big tube
meanings.example: The rocket was launched from a space research base.
meanings.example_cn: 火箭从一个太空研究基地发射升空。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has been a soldier, sailor etc in a war
meanings.example: a Vietnam veteran
meanings.example_cn: 越战老兵

meanings.meaning_en: to state sth firmly and clearly
meanings.example: He declared that he was in love with her.
meanings.example_cn: 他声称他已爱上她。

meanings.meaning_en: the length of time that sth lasts or is able to continue
meanings.example: I worked with him over a span of six years.
meanings.example_cn: 我和他共事达六年之久。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of things that are fastened, held, or growing together
meanings.example: I’ll send her a bunch of flowers.
meanings.example_cn: 我会给她送去一束鲜花。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially accept a plan, proposal etc
meanings.example: The conference approved a proposal for a referendum.
meanings.example_cn: 会议通过了举行全民公决的提议。

meanings.meaning_en: an activity that you enjoy doing in your free time
meanings.example: What are your hobbies?
meanings.example_cn: 你有些什么爱好？

meanings.meaning_en: a round green seed that is cooked and eaten as a vegetable, or the plant on which these seeds grow
meanings.example: roast chicken with peas and carrots
meanings.example_cn: 烤鸡配豌豆胡萝卜

meanings.meaning_en: to fall down or fall in suddenly, often after breaking apart
meanings.example: Uncle Ted’s chair collapsed under his weight.
meanings.example_cn: 椅子承受不了特德叔叔的重量，塌架了。

meanings.meaning_en: a small creature such as a fly or ant, that has six legs, and sometimes wings
meanings.example: an insect bite
meanings.example_cn: 昆虫的叮咬

meanings.meaning_en: used to refer to a man, boy, or male animal that has already been mentioned or is already known about
meanings.example: ‘Where’s Paul?’ ‘He’s gone to the cinema.’
meanings.example_cn: “保罗在哪儿？”“他去看电影了。”

meanings.meaning_en: to put food in your mouth and chew and swallow it
meanings.example: Felix chatted cheerfully as he ate.
meanings.example_cn: 费利克斯一边吃一边兴奋地聊天。

meanings.meaning_en: to put something with something else or with a group of other things
meanings.example: If the mixture seems dry, add water.
meanings.example_cn: 如果混合物看上去干，加点水。

meanings.meaning_en: an increase in amount, number, or size
meanings.example: measures to stimulate economic growth
meanings.example_cn: 刺激经济增长的措施

meanings.meaning_en: not familiar because you have not been there before or met the person before
meanings.example: a strange city
meanings.example_cn: 陌生的城市

meanings.meaning_cn: 发明，创造；捏造， 假话
meanings.meaning_en: the act of inventing something
meanings.example: The invention of the computer has revolutionized the business world.
meanings.example_cn: 电脑的发明使商界发生了根本变化。

meanings.meaning_en: an animal that belongs to the sex that can have babies or produce eggs
meanings.example: As a group, females performed better on the test than males.
meanings.example_cn: 整体来说，女性在这次测试中胜过男性。

meanings.meaning_en: a sudden event such as a flood, storm, or accident which causes great damage or suffering
meanings.example: One hundred and twenty people died in China’s worst air disaster .
meanings.example_cn: 有120人在中国这起最惨烈的空难事故中丧生。

meanings.meaning_en: a pain in your head
meanings.example: If you have a headache, you should take some aspirin.
meanings.example_cn: 要是头痛，你该吃点阿司匹林。

meanings.meaning_en: an opinion that you express about someone or something
meanings.example: Have you any comment to make about the cause of the disaster?
meanings.example_cn: 你对发生灾难的原因有何评论？

meanings.meaning_en: to cause physical harm to something or to part of someone’s body
meanings.example: insects that damage crops
meanings.example_cn: 破坏庄稼的昆虫

meanings.meaning_en: physical harm that is done to something or to a part of someone’s body, so that it is broken or injured
meanings.example: There may be permanent brain damage.
meanings.example_cn: 可能有永久性脑损伤。

meanings.meaning_en: to tell someone that something will definitely happen or is definitely true so that they are less worried
meanings.example: The document is genuine, I can assure you .
meanings.example_cn: 我能向你保证，这文件是真的。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where goods are sold to the public. In British English, a store is large and sells many different things, but in American English, a store can be large or small, and sell many things or only one type of thing.
meanings.example: At Christmas the stores stay open late.
meanings.example_cn: 在圣诞节期间，商店营业到很晚。

meanings.meaning_en: to move back or away from a place or situation; to make sb/sth do this
meanings.example: Both powers withdrew their forces from the region.
meanings.example_cn: 两个大国都把部队撤离了这个地区。

meanings.meaning_en: the way someone behaves, especially in public, in their job etc
meanings.example: The Senator’s conduct is being investigated by the Ethics Committee.
meanings.example_cn: 该参议员的行为正受到道德委员会的调查。

meanings.meaning_en: the glass part of an electric light, that the light shines from
meanings.example: a 100-watt bulb
meanings.example_cn: 一个100瓦的灯泡

meanings.meaning_en: the chemical substance in alcoholic drinks that can make you drunk, which is also used in other types of products
meanings.example: low alcohol drinks
meanings.example_cn: 低度酒

meanings.meaning_en: making you feel very unhappy and upset
meanings.example: His photo stirred up bitter memories.
meanings.example_cn: 他的照片勾起了痛苦的回忆。

meanings.meaning_en: to say or write something as a reply
meanings.example: He responded that he didn’t want to see anyone.
meanings.example_cn: 他回答说不想见任何人。

meanings.meaning_en: not wearing any clothes or not covered by clothes
meanings.example: The children ran naked through the yard.
meanings.example_cn: 孩子们光着身子跑过院子。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment that uses radio waves to find the position of things and watch their movement
meanings.example: The coastline can now be monitored by radar.
meanings.example_cn: 现在能用雷达监测海岸线了。

meanings.meaning_en: the day in each year which is the same date as the one on which you were born
meanings.example: It’s my birthday on Monday.
meanings.example_cn: 星期一是我的生日。

meanings.meaning_en: clear and accurate
meanings.example: precise sales figures
meanings.example_cn: 准确的销售数据

meanings.meaning_en: to appear or come out from somewhere
meanings.example: The flowers emerge in the spring.
meanings.example_cn: 花儿在春天开放。

meanings.meaning_en: what actually happens or is true, not what is imagined or thought
meanings.example: the distinction between fantasy and reality
meanings.example_cn: 幻想和现实之间的区别

meanings.meaning_en: oone of the parts of the body of a bird, insect or bat that it uses for flying
meanings.example: The bird flapped its wings furiously.
meanings.example_cn: 那只鸟使劲地拍打着翅膀。

meanings.meaning_en: to measure or calculate something by using a particular instrument or method
meanings.example: The thermostat will gauge the temperature and control the heat.
meanings.example_cn: 恒温器可测量温度并控制热量。

meanings.meaning_en: an instrument for measuring the size or amount of something
meanings.example: The petrol gauge is still on full.
meanings.example_cn: 汽油表显示油箱依然是满的。

meanings.meaning_en: used with a noun to describe a particular action, giving the same meaning as the related verb
meanings.example: She gave a shrug of her shoulders (= she shrugged ) .
meanings.example_cn: 她停下工作抬起头来打了个哈欠。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a place or object that is furthest from its beginning or centre
meanings.example: He wore spectacles perched on the very end of his nose.
meanings.example_cn: 他的眼镜架在鼻尖上。

meanings.meaning_en: to finish; to make sth finish
meanings.example: The end of the pencil snapped.
meanings.example_cn: 铅笔的笔尖啪的一声断了。

meanings.meaning_en: the reddish-brown substance that forms on iron or steel when it gets wet
meanings.example: There were large patches of rust on the car.
meanings.example_cn: 车上有大片锈斑。

meanings.meaning_en: to become covered with rust, or to make something become covered in rust
meanings.example: The metal had begun to rust.
meanings.example_cn: 金属开始生锈。

meanings.meaning_en: to have or express a different opinion from someone else
meanings.example: Barr strongly disagreed with Kronfeld’s statement.
meanings.example_cn: 巴尔强烈反对克龙费尔德的说法。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to design or build roads, bridges, machines etc
meanings.example: He trained as a civil engineer (= one who designs and builds roads, bridges etc ).
meanings.example_cn: 他接受过土木工程师培训。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has a special skill or special knowledge of a subject, gained as a result of training or experience
meanings.example: He’s a world expert on marine mammals.
meanings.example_cn: 他是研究海洋哺乳动物的世界权威。

meanings.meaning_en: done with, having or involving great knowledge or skill
meanings.example: an expert driver
meanings.example_cn: 技术高超的驾驶员

meanings.meaning_en: a large area of flat dry land
meanings.example: The grassy plain gave way to an extensive swamp.
meanings.example_cn: 青草覆盖的平原被广阔的沼泽地所取代。

meanings.meaning_en: very clear, and easy to understand or recognize
meanings.example: the vast plains of central China
meanings.example_cn: 华中地区的广阔平原

meanings.meaning_en: someone who studies and develops ideas about the nature and meaning of existence, truth, good and evil etc
meanings.example: Plato, Aristotle, and other Greek philosophers
meanings.example_cn: 柏拉图、亚里士多德和其他希腊哲学家

meanings.meaning_en: in or from the east of a country or area
meanings.example: the eastern shore of the island
meanings.example_cn: 岛的东岸

meanings.meaning_en: a car
meanings.example: the automobile industry
meanings.example_cn: 汽车工业

meanings.meaning_en: 12 o’clock in the daytime
meanings.example: We met at 12 noon.
meanings.example_cn: 我们中午12点见了面。

meanings.meaning_en: a large area of a country or of the world, usually without exact limits
meanings.example: efforts to bring peace to the region
meanings.example_cn: 给这个地区带来和平的努力

meanings.meaning_en: a complete change in someone or something
meanings.example: In recent years, the movie industry has undergone a dramatic transformation .
meanings.example_cn: 近些年，电影业经历了巨大的变革。

meanings.meaning_en: an advantage, improvement, or help that you get from something
meanings.example: I hope that the decision taken today will be to the benefit of the whole nation.
meanings.example_cn: 我希望今天所作的决定将惠及我们整个国家。

meanings.meaning_en: smallest in size, amount, degree, etc.
meanings.example: He's the best teacher, even though he has the least experience.
meanings.example_cn: 他虽然经验最少，却是最出色的老师。

meanings.meaning_en: less than anything or anyone else
meanings.example: He’s my least favourite member of staff.
meanings.example_cn: 他是最不讨我喜欢的员工。

meanings.meaning_en: to break something such as corn or coffee beans into small pieces or powder, either in a machine or between two hard surfaces
meanings.example: freshly ground peppe
meanings.example_cn: 现磨的胡椒粉

meanings.meaning_cn: （用于实义动词前构成否定句和疑问句）
meanings.meaning_en: used before a full verb to form negative sentences and questions
meanings.example: I don't like fish.
meanings.example_cn: 我不喜欢鱼。

meanings.meaning_en: to perform an action or activity
meanings.example: Does she speak French?
meanings.example_cn: 她会说法语吗？

meanings.meaning_en: connected with a particular nation; shared by a whole nation
meanings.example: national and local newspapers
meanings.example_cn: 全国性的和地方的报纸

meanings.meaning_en: a short journey made for pleasure, especially one that has been organized for a group of people
meanings.example: They've gone on an excursion to York.
meanings.example_cn: 他们到约克旅游去了。

meanings.meaning_en: great speed in doing something, especially because you do not have enough time
meanings.example: I soon regretted my haste.
meanings.example_cn: 我很快就对自己的仓促感到后悔。

meanings.meaning_en: a problem or complaint that a person or company brings to a court of law to be settled
meanings.example: Johnson has filed suit against her.
meanings.example_cn: 约翰逊对她提起了诉讼。

meanings.meaning_en: to be acceptable, suitable, or  convenient  for a particular person or in a particular situation
meanings.example: a civil suit
meanings.example_cn: 民事诉讼

meanings.meaning_en: a supply of goods that is available for sale in a shop/store
meanings.example: When a nearby shop burned down, our stock was ruined by smoke.
meanings.example_cn: 附近一家商店被烧成灰烬，我们的存货也被浓烟熏坏了。

meanings.meaning_en: needless troubles, suffering, loss etc are unnecessary because they could easily have been avoided
meanings.example: The report caused needless anxiety to women who have attended the clinic.
meanings.example_cn: 那份报告让去那家诊所就诊过的妇女产生了不必要的忧虑。

meanings.meaning_en: a beam of light produced by a laser
meanings.example: laser surgery
meanings.example_cn: 激光(外科)手术

meanings.meaning_en: a type of shoe that covers your whole foot and the lower part of your leg
meanings.example: hiking boots
meanings.example_cn: 远足靴

meanings.meaning_en: the feeling you have when part of your body hurts
meanings.example: The pain is getting worse.
meanings.example_cn: 疼得越来越厉害了。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is stale has been said or done too many times before and is no longer interesting or exciting
meanings.example: stale jokes
meanings.example_cn: 老掉牙的笑话

meanings.meaning_en: usual or typical of someone
meanings.example: James took his habitual morning walk around the garden.
meanings.example_cn: 詹姆斯又像往常习惯的那样绕花园作晨间散步去了。

meanings.meaning_en: to build something such as a building or wall
meanings.example: an imposing town hall, erected in 1892
meanings.example_cn: 一座气势宏伟的市政厅，建于1892年

meanings.meaning_en: easy to notice
meanings.example: Alcohol has a noticeable effect on the body.
meanings.example_cn: 酒精对身体有明显的影响。

meanings.meaning_en: to dislike something very much
meanings.example: It’s the kind of movie you either love or hate.
meanings.example_cn: 这是那种你要么喜欢要么讨厌的电影。

meanings.meaning_en: arranged or organized in a sensible or neat way
meanings.example: She needs to organize her ideas in a more orderly way.
meanings.example_cn: 她需要把自己的想法组织得更有条理些。

meanings.meaning_en: a list of all the kinds of food that are available for a meal, especially in a restaurant
meanings.example: Could we have the menu, please?
meanings.example_cn: 请把菜单给我们，好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: treating everyone in a way that is right or equal
meanings.example: Life isn’t always fair.
meanings.example_cn: 生活并非总是公平的。

meanings.meaning_en: a mark or unit on a scale of measurement
meanings.example: The party's share of the vote fell by ten percentage points.
meanings.example_cn: 该党的得票率下跌了十个百分点。

meanings.meaning_en: to have your home in a particular place
meanings.example: He lives just across the street from me.
meanings.example_cn: 他就住在我街对面。

meanings.meaning_en: living; not dead
meanings.example: We live only a few miles from the coast.
meanings.example_cn: 我们住的地方离海边只有几英里远。

meanings.meaning_en: the height of an object or place above the sea
meanings.example: The aircraft had reached its cruising altitude of about 39,000 feet.
meanings.example_cn: 那架飞机已经达到了大约三万九千英尺的巡航高度。

meanings.meaning_en: the line far away where the land or sea seems to meet the sky
meanings.example: In the distance, the dot of a boat appeared on the horizon.
meanings.example_cn: 远处小黑点般的一条小船出现在地平线上。

meanings.meaning_en: in a similar way
meanings.example: The first letter she wrote me was less than a page long, and her second letter was similarly brief.
meanings.example_cn: 她写给我的第一封信不到一页，第二封信也一样简短。

meanings.meaning_en: one of several natural substances that exist in food such as meat, eggs, and beans, and which your body needs in order to grow and remain strong and healthy
meanings.example: Where do you get your protein?
meanings.example_cn: 你从哪里获得蛋白质？

meanings.meaning_en: extremely unhappy, for example because you feel lonely, cold, or badly treated
meanings.example: I’ve been so miserable since Pat left me.
meanings.example_cn: 自从帕特离我而去后，我十分痛苦。

meanings.meaning_en: the power to affect the way someone or something develops, behaves, or thinks, without using direct force or orders
meanings.example: As a scientist, his influence was immense.
meanings.example_cn: 身为一名科学家，他的影响力极大。

meanings.meaning_en: to affect the way someone or something develops, behaves, thinks etc without directly forcing or ordering them
meanings.example: Marx was strongly influenced by the historian Niebuhr.
meanings.example_cn: 马克思深受历史学家尼布尔的影响。

meanings.meaning_en: the seventh month of the year, between June and August
meanings.example: Laura came over to England last July.
meanings.example_cn: 去年7月劳拉来到英格兰。

meanings.meaning_en: in order to help, improve, or please someone or something
meanings.example: He moved to the seaside for the sake of his health.
meanings.example_cn: 他为了健康而迁居海滨。

meanings.meaning_en: if sb/sth has a particular tendency , they are likely to behave or act in a particular way
meanings.example: children with aggressive or anti-social tendencies
meanings.example_cn: 具有攻击性倾向或反社会倾向的儿童

meanings.meaning_cn: 〔儿童故事中的〕巨人；巨人；巨物
meanings.meaning_en: an extremely tall strong man, who is often bad and cruel, in children’s stories
meanings.example: a Nordic saga of giants
meanings.example_cn: 一部关于巨人的北欧传奇

meanings.meaning_en: a male parent
meanings.example: Ask your father to help you.
meanings.example_cn: 叫你父亲帮你。

meanings.meaning_en: a small amount or piece that is taken from something, so that it can be tested or examined
meanings.example: a blood specimen
meanings.example_cn: 血样

meanings.meaning_en: increasing to a higher level
meanings.example: upward pressure on bank interest rates
meanings.example_cn: 针对银行利率的越来越大的压力

meanings.meaning_en: fully prepared for what you are going to do
meanings.example: Come on. Aren’t you ready yet?
meanings.example_cn: 快点，你还没准备好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a track that has been made deliberately or made by many people walking over the same ground
meanings.example: I walked nervously up the garden path towards the front door.
meanings.example_cn: 我提心吊胆地沿着花园的小道向前门走去。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong hard hat that soldiers,  motorcycle  riders, the police etc wear to protect their heads
meanings.example: The Sword split the Knight's helmet and bit him fatally.
meanings.example_cn: 剑劈开了骑士的头盔并致命地刺进他。

meanings.meaning_en: a word that adds to the meaning of a verb, an adjective, another adverb, or a whole sentence, such as ‘slowly’ in ‘He ran slowly’, ‘very’ in ‘It’s very hot’, or ‘naturally’ in ‘Naturally, we want you to come.’
meanings.example: Will you please compare the adverb “well”?
meanings.example_cn: 请你说出副词“well”的原级、比较级和最高级好吗?

meanings.meaning_en: facts or details that tell you something about a situation, person, event etc
meanings.example: I need more information.
meanings.example_cn: 我需要更多信息。

meanings.meaning_en: on the outside of something
meanings.example: The exterior walls need a new coat of paint.
meanings.example_cn: 外墙需要刷新漆了。

meanings.meaning_en: the place where something is or where something happens, and the general environment
meanings.example: I’ve worked with children in various settings, mainly in secondary school.
meanings.example_cn: 我在许多地方教过孩子，主要是在中学。

meanings.meaning_en: a room, house, desk etc that is tidy is neatly arranged with everything in the right place
meanings.example: a tidy desk
meanings.example_cn: 整洁的书桌

meanings.meaning_en: a very large strong bird with a beak like a hook that eats small animals, birds etc
meanings.example: The eagle drooped its wings.
meanings.example_cn: 那只鹰收拢双翅做俯冲。

meanings.meaning_en: likely to change often
meanings.example: Expect variable cloudiness and fog tomorrow.
meanings.example_cn: 预计明天多云有雾，天气多变。

meanings.meaning_en: a mathematical quantity which can represent several different amounts
meanings.example: Interest rates can be highly variable.
meanings.example_cn: 利率有时会大幅波动。

meanings.meaning_en: a band of leather, cloth etc that you wear around your waist to hold up your clothes or for decoration
meanings.example: He unbuckled his leather belt.
meanings.example_cn: 他解开皮带。

meanings.meaning_en: not closed, so that things, people, air etc can go in and out or be put in and out
meanings.example: He threw the door open and ran down the stairs.
meanings.example_cn: 他猛地打开门，往楼下跑去。

meanings.meaning_en: to move a door, window etc so that people, things, air etc can pass through, or to be moved in this way
meanings.example: an open window
meanings.example_cn: 打开的窗户

meanings.meaning_en: connected with a particular subject
meanings.example: facts relative to this issue
meanings.example_cn: 与这个问题有关的事实

meanings.meaning_en: a structure made of wires or bars in which birds or animals can be kept
meanings.example: I hate to see birds in cages.
meanings.example_cn: 我不喜欢看到鸟在笼子里。

meanings.meaning_en: a refusal to accept someone’s authority or obey rules or laws
meanings.example: The prime minister is now facing a revolt by members of his own party.
meanings.example_cn: 首相现在面临着党内倒戈。

meanings.meaning_en: to refuse to accept someone’s authority or obey rules or laws
meanings.example: the Polish revolt of 1863
meanings.example_cn: 1863年的波兰起义

meanings.meaning_en: to be present in a place or situation
meanings.example: The custom of arranged marriages still exists in many countries.
meanings.example_cn: 许多国家仍存在包办婚姻的习俗。

meanings.meaning_en: the distance from one side of something to the other
meanings.example: What’s the width of the desk?
meanings.example_cn: 这张书桌的宽度是多少？

meanings.meaning_en: to disagree with someone in words, often in an angry way
meanings.example: We could hear the neighbours arguing.
meanings.example_cn: 我们听到邻居在争吵。

meanings.meaning_en: used when the woman or girl who performs an action is also affected by it
meanings.example: She hurt herself.
meanings.example_cn: 她弄伤了自己。

meanings.meaning_en: a round white vegetable with a brown, red, or pale yellow skin, that grows under the ground
meanings.example: Marie stood at the sink, peeling potatoes (= cutting off the skin ) .
meanings.example_cn: 玛丽站在洗涤槽边削土豆皮。

meanings.meaning_en: one part of a situation, idea, plan etc that has many parts
meanings.example: The book aims to cover all aspects of city life.
meanings.example_cn: 这本书旨在涵盖城市生活的各个方面。

meanings.meaning_en: fertile land or soil is able to produce good crops
meanings.example: 800 acres of fertile cropland
meanings.example_cn: 800英亩的肥沃耕地

meanings.meaning_cn: 〔人体内或某些机器中的〕室，腔；会议室；房间
meanings.meaning_en: an enclosed space, especially in your body or inside a machine
meanings.example: a combustion chamber
meanings.example_cn: 燃烧室

meanings.meaning_en: turning in a circle around a fixed point, like a wheel
meanings.example: the rotary movement of the helicopter blades
meanings.example_cn: 直升机螺旋桨叶的转动

meanings.meaning_en: the joint between the upper and lower parts of the arm where it bends in the middle
meanings.example: He slipped and fell, badly bruising an elbow.
meanings.example_cn: 他滑倒了，严重挫伤了一只胳膊肘。

meanings.meaning_en: to give something a different colour using a dye
meanings.example: The women prepared, spun, and dyed the wool.
meanings.example_cn: 妇女们将羊毛预备、纺线并染色。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance you use to change the colour of your clothes, hair etc
meanings.example: hair dye
meanings.example_cn: 染发剂

meanings.meaning_en: the state that something is in, especially how good or bad its physical state is
meanings.example: Profits increased by £1.5m, despite the difficult economic conditions.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管经济形势不佳，利润还是增长了150万英镑。

meanings.meaning_en: physically unable to hear anything or unable to hear well
meanings.example: communication between deaf and hearing people
meanings.example_cn: 失聪者和听力正常者之间的交流

meanings.meaning_en: something that is given to someone who is successful in a competition, race, game of chance etc
meanings.example: In this month’s competition you could win a prize worth £3,000.
meanings.example_cn: 在本月的竞赛中您可以赢得价值3,000英镑的奖品。

meanings.meaning_en: to think that someone or something is very important or valuable
meanings.example: The first prize has gone to Dr John Gentle.
meanings.example_cn: 获得一等奖的是约翰·金特尔博士。

meanings.meaning_en: to make clothing out of wool, using two knitting needles
meanings.example: I had endless hours to knit and sew.
meanings.example_cn: 我有无数的时间来缝缝织织。

meanings.meaning_en: not one or the other of two people or things
meanings.example: ‘Would you like tea or coffee?’‘Neither, thanks.’
meanings.example_cn: “你要喝茶还是喝咖啡？”“都不要，谢谢。”

meanings.meaning_en: an official list of names of people, companies etc, or a book that has this list
meanings.example: Have you signed the hotel register ?
meanings.example_cn: 你在酒店登记簿上签名了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to put someone’s or something’s name on an official list
meanings.example: Police want a national register of DNA samples.
meanings.example_cn: 警方想要一个全国范围的DNA样本登记册。

meanings.meaning_en: a common illness that makes you feel very tired and weak, gives you a sore throat, and makes you cough and have to clear your nose a lot
meanings.example: Steven’s still in bed with flu .
meanings.example_cn: 史蒂文患了流感，仍卧病在床。

meanings.meaning_en: a liquid obtained from  petroleum that is used to supply power to the engine of cars and other vehicles
meanings.example: unleaded petrol
meanings.example_cn: 无铅汽油

meanings.meaning_en: a large mass of land surrounded by sea
meanings.example: the continents of Asia and Africa
meanings.example_cn: 亚洲及非洲大陆

meanings.meaning_en: a sound that you hear again after a loud noise, because it was made near something such as a wall
meanings.example: Her scream was followed by a loud echo.
meanings.example_cn: 她的尖叫声过后是响亮的回声。

meanings.meaning_en: to repeat what someone else has just said
meanings.example: ‘He's gone! ’ Viv echoed.
meanings.example_cn: “他去了！”维夫重复道。

meanings.meaning_en: when a liquid boils or when you boil it, it is heated to the point where it forms bubbles and turns to steam or vapour
meanings.example: Put the spaghetti into plenty of boiling salted water.
meanings.example_cn: 把意大利面放入大量煮沸的盐水中。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which someone is injured or something is damaged without anyone intending them to be
meanings.example: Ken had an accident at work and had to go to hospital.
meanings.example_cn: 肯在工作中出了事故，不得不去医院。

meanings.meaning_en: a thick piece of wood from a tree
meanings.example: a roaring log fire
meanings.example_cn: 原木燃烧的熊熊大火

meanings.meaning_en: to trick sb or make them believe sth which is not true
meanings.example: The company engaged in a deliberate effort to cheat them out of their pensions.
meanings.example_cn: 该公司曾蓄意诈取他们的养老金。

meanings.meaning_en: a common wild plant with narrow green leaves and stems that are eaten by cows, horses, sheep, etc.
meanings.example: a blade of grass
meanings.example_cn: 一片草叶

meanings.meaning_en: to want something very much
meanings.example: The hotel has everything you could possibly desire.
meanings.example_cn: 这家酒店里你想要的东西应有尽有。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong hope or wish
meanings.example: a strong desire to win
meanings.example_cn: 强烈的求胜欲望

meanings.meaning_en: containing a lot of people, things, plants, etc. with little space between them
meanings.example: a dense rurally-based population
meanings.example_cn: 居住在乡村的密集人口

meanings.meaning_en: a large container for holding liquid or gas
meanings.example: a hot water tank
meanings.example_cn: 热水箱

meanings.meaning_en: to limit or control the size, amount, or range of something
meanings.example: The new law restricts the sale of hand guns.
meanings.example_cn: 新法规限制手枪的销售。

meanings.meaning_en: 1st
meanings.example: These results are firsts in the history of women’s athletics.
meanings.example_cn: 这些成绩在女运动员历史上是第一次。

meanings.meaning_en: at the beginning
meanings.example: First I had to decide what to wear.
meanings.example_cn: 首先我得决定穿什么。

meanings.meaning_en: to take goods, letters, packages etc to a particular place or person
meanings.example: The morning mail has just been delivered.
meanings.example_cn: 早晨的邮件刚送到。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something smaller or less in size, amount, or price
meanings.example: The governor announced a new plan to reduce crime.
meanings.example_cn: 州长宣布了一项降低犯罪率的新计划。

meanings.meaning_en: a plane or other vehicle that can fly
meanings.example: The return flight of the aircraft was delayed.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机的返回航程被推迟了。

meanings.meaning_en: connected with one particular thing only
meanings.example: games suitable for specific age groups
meanings.example_cn: 适合特定年龄组的游戏

meanings.meaning_en: a soldier, plane etc that is sent to search the area in front of an army and get information about the enemy
meanings.example: He sent three scouts ahead to take a look at the bridge.
meanings.example_cn: 他派出三名侦察兵到前面侦察大桥的情况。

meanings.meaning_en: a moment
meanings.example: For an instant, Barney was tempted to flee.
meanings.example_cn: 那一瞬间，巴尼很想逃走。

meanings.meaning_en: happening or produced immediately
meanings.example: a system that provides instant access to client information
meanings.example_cn: 能立即查到客户信息的系统

meanings.meaning_en: If a situation or activity involves someone, they are taking part in it
meanings.example: If there was a cover-up, it involved people at the very highest levels of government.
meanings.example_cn: 如果有掩盖真相的行为，它就牵扯到了处于政府最高层的那些人。

meanings.meaning_en: the way in which something such as a town, garden, or building is arranged
meanings.example: All the flats in the building had the same layout.
meanings.example_cn: 大楼里所有的公寓布局都是一样的。

meanings.meaning_en: the activity of making money by producing or buying and selling goods, or providing services
meanings.example: Students on the course learn about all aspects of business.
meanings.example_cn: 这门课程的学生要学习商业活动的各个方面。

meanings.meaning_en: an act of deliberately hurting someone in order to force them to tell you something, to punish them, or to be cruel
meanings.example: He died after five days of excruciating torture.
meanings.example_cn: 遭受了五天的严刑拷打之后，他死了。

meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately hurt someone in order to force them to give you information, to punish them, or to be cruel
meanings.example: The waiting must be torture for you.
meanings.example_cn: 这样的等待对你来说肯定是一种煎熬。

meanings.meaning_en: to shake slightly because you are cold or frightened
meanings.example: Jake stood shivering in the cold air.
meanings.example_cn: 大冷天里，杰克站着冻得瑟瑟发抖。

meanings.meaning_en: a slight shaking movement of your body caused by cold or fear
meanings.example: A shiver ran through (= went through ) me.
meanings.example_cn: 我浑身一阵颤抖。

meanings.meaning_en: a difference between two statements, beliefs, or ideas about something that means they cannot both be true
meanings.example: apparent contradictions in the defendant’s testimony
meanings.example_cn: 被告证词中的明显矛盾

meanings.meaning_en: a picture obtained by using a camera and film that is sensitive to light
meanings.example: a colour photograph
meanings.example_cn: 彩色照片

meanings.meaning_en: having a lot of experience of the world and knowing about fashion, culture and other things that people think are socially important
meanings.example: These people are very sophisticated observers of the foreign policy scene.
meanings.example_cn: 这些人是观察外交政策领域动向的行家里手。

meanings.meaning_en: to treat someone unfairly by asking them to do things for you, but giving them very little in return – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: Homeworkers can easily be exploited by employers.
meanings.example_cn: 在家工作的人容易被雇主剥削。

meanings.meaning_en: in the same way
meanings.example: Nanny put on a shawl and told the girls to do likewise.
meanings.example_cn: 南妮披上披肩，并叫女孩们也这样做。

meanings.meaning_en: a relationship between two amounts, represented by a pair of numbers showing how much bigger one amount is than the other
any type of woven cloth that is made in large quantities, used especially by people in the business of making clothes etc
meanings.example: Their main exports are textiles, especially silk and cotton.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的主要出口商品是纺织品，尤其是丝绸和棉布。

meanings.meaning_en: a person, company, or organization that employs people
meanings.example: The shoe factory is the largest employer in this area.
meanings.example_cn: 这家制鞋厂是本地区最大的雇主。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who catches fish as a sport or as a job
meanings.example: The Algarve is a paradise for fishermen whether river anglers or deep-sea fishermen.
meanings.example_cn: 阿尔加维对河边的垂钓者或深海的渔民都是一个天堂。

meanings.meaning_en: to have a strong feeling of  affection  for someone, combined with sexual attraction
meanings.example: I love you, Tracy.
meanings.example_cn: 我爱你，特雷西。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong feeling of caring about someone, especially a member of your family or a close friend
meanings.example: He was the only man she had ever loved.
meanings.example_cn: 他是她唯一爱过的男人。

meanings.meaning_en: to get to the place you are going to
meanings.example: Give me a call to let me know you’ve arrived safely.
meanings.example_cn: 打个电话给我，告诉我你已平安到达。

meanings.meaning_en: better or more suitable
meanings.example: Anything was preferable to the tense atmosphere at home.
meanings.example_cn: 什么都比家里的紧张气氛好。

meanings.meaning_en: not at all interested in someone or something
meanings.example: People have become indifferent to the suffering of others.
meanings.example_cn: 人们已经变得对别人的痛苦漠不关心。

meanings.meaning_en: annoyed because of delays, someone else’s mistakes etc
meanings.example: The impatient drivers were beeping their horns.
meanings.example_cn: 不耐烦的司机们在按喇叭发嘟嘟声。

meanings.meaning_en: a mass of very small drops of a liquid which float in the air, for example because the liquid has been heated
meanings.example: water vapour
meanings.example_cn: 水蒸气

meanings.meaning_en: a scientist who has special knowledge and training in chemistry
meanings.example: She worked as a research chemist.
meanings.example_cn: 她是一名化学研究员。

meanings.meaning_en: a long written story in which the characters and events are usually imaginary
meanings.example: a novel by Jane Austen
meanings.example_cn: 简·奥斯丁的小说

meanings.meaning_en: not like anything known before, and unusual or interesting
meanings.example: What a novel idea!.
meanings.example_cn: 多么新奇的想法呀！

meanings.meaning_en: towards a place or position that is in front of you
meanings.example: He leaned forward , his elbows resting on the table.
meanings.example_cn: 他身体前倾，胳膊肘撑在桌子上。

meanings.meaning_en: to educate and improve a person or a society; to make sb's behaviour or manners better
meanings.example: Ellis was credited with civilizing the Texas prison system.
meanings.example_cn: 据信是埃利斯改良了得克萨斯州的监狱制度。

meanings.meaning_en: a thin pointed piece of metal with a flat top, which you hit into a surface with a hammer, for example to join things together or to hang something on
meanings.example: The key was hanging on a nail by the door.
meanings.example_cn: 钥匙挂在门边的一颗钉子上。

meanings.meaning_en: to fasten something to something else with nails
meanings.example: Stop biting your nails!
meanings.example_cn: 别咬指甲！

meanings.meaning_en: severe, cruel, or unkind
meanings.example: the harsh measures taken against the protesters
meanings.example_cn: 针对抗议者采取的严厉措施

meanings.meaning_en: to not succeed in achieving something
meanings.example: It looks likely that the peace talks will fail.
meanings.example_cn: 看来和平谈判可能会失败。

meanings.meaning_en: to interrupt someone so that they cannot continue what they are doing
meanings.example: Sorry to disturb you, but I have an urgent message.
meanings.example_cn: 对不起打扰一下，我有个紧急消息。

meanings.meaning_en: a favourable report, opinion, or reaction shows that you think that someone or something is good or that you agree with them
meanings.example: favourable film reviews
meanings.example_cn: 正面的影评

meanings.meaning_en: making you feel excited
meanings.example: an exciting discovery
meanings.example_cn: 激动人心的发现

meanings.meaning_en: to take hold of something suddenly and violently
meanings.example: Suddenly he seized my hand.
meanings.example_cn: 他突然抓住我的手。

meanings.meaning_en: a period of 24 hours
meanings.example: We spent three days in Paris.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在巴黎度过了三天。

meanings.meaning_en: used to say that someone or something moves to a position on a surface, area, or object
meanings.example: She watched him walk onto the platform.
meanings.example_cn: 她看着他走上站台。

meanings.meaning_en: the number 90
meanings.example: It was decided she had to stay another ninety days.
meanings.example_cn: 经决定，她必须再呆九十天。

meanings.meaning_en: a formal, usually written, request for something such as a job, place at university, or permission to do something
meanings.example: We receive hundreds of job applications each year.
meanings.example_cn: 我们每年收到数百封求职信。

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of land for building or growing things on
meanings.example: a two-acre plot of land
meanings.example_cn: 一块两英亩的土地

meanings.meaning_en: to make a secret plan to harm a person or organization, especially a political leader or government
meanings.example: They had plotted to blow up the White House.
meanings.example_cn: 他们曾密谋炸毁白宫。

meanings.meaning_en: a building where people pay to stay and eat meals
meanings.example: I’ve booked the flights and the hotel.
meanings.example_cn: 我已订好机票和酒店。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone the courage or confidence to do something
meanings.example: I want to thank everyone who has encouraged and supported me.
meanings.example_cn: 我要感谢每一位鼓励和支持过我的人。

meanings.meaning_en: to think very carefully about something that you are doing
meanings.example: Now please concentrate.
meanings.example_cn: 现在请集中注意力。

meanings.meaning_en: something important that you succeed in doing by your own efforts
meanings.example: His great achievement is to make all the players into a united team.
meanings.example_cn: 他的伟大成就在于把所有选手组织成一支团结的队伍。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of comparing two or more people or things
meanings.example: Her paintings invite comparison with those of the early Impressionists (= they remind you of them ) .
meanings.example_cn: 她的画作让人想起早期的印象派作品。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something, especially a building or something large
meanings.example: The purpose is to build new houses for local people.
meanings.example_cn: 目的是要为当地居民建造新的住宅。

meanings.meaning_en: the front part of a woman’s chest
meanings.example: She cradled the child to her bosom.
meanings.example_cn: 她把那孩子抱入怀中。

meanings.meaning_en: to annoy, worry or upset sb
meanings.example: Danny, don’t bother Ellen while she’s reading.
meanings.example_cn: 丹尼，埃伦看书的时候不要去打扰她 。

meanings.meaning_en: trouble or difficulty
meanings.example: You seem to have got yourself into a spot of bother.
meanings.example_cn: 你似乎让自己遇上了点麻烦。

meanings.meaning_cn: 〔电影、戏剧、音乐等的〕节，节庆，会演；节日
meanings.meaning_en: an occasion when there are performances of many films, plays, pieces of music etc, usually happening in the same place every year
meanings.example: the Swansea Festival of Music and the Arts
meanings.example_cn: 斯旺西音乐艺术节

meanings.meaning_en: to make certain that something will happen properly
meanings.example: facilities to ensure the safety of cyclists
meanings.example_cn: 确保骑车人安全的设施

meanings.meaning_en: the front part of your head, where your eyes, nose, and mouth are
meanings.example: She had a beautiful face.
meanings.example_cn: 她面容秀美。

meanings.meaning_en: easy to use or to do
meanings.example: a handy little tool
meanings.example_cn: 好用的小工具

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being honest
meanings.example: a politician of rare honesty and courage
meanings.example_cn: 具备少见的诚实及勇气的政治家

meanings.meaning_en: real; not artificial
meanings.example: ‘Did he really?’ Her surprise seemed genuine.
meanings.example_cn: “他真的这样？”她好像是真的惊讶。

meanings.meaning_en: a number of related events that happen again and again in the same order
meanings.example: a woman’s menstrual cycle
meanings.example_cn: 女性的月经周期

meanings.meaning_en: the father or mother of a person or animal
meanings.example: Children under 14 should be accompanied by a parent.
meanings.example_cn: 14 岁以下儿童须由一位家长陪同。

meanings.meaning_en: a drawing that uses a line or lines to show how two or more sets of measurements are related to each other
meanings.example: Martin showed me a graph of their recent sales.
meanings.example_cn: 马丁给我看了他们最近销售情况的图表。

meanings.meaning_en: a mark that has a special design and shows the legal or official authority of a person or organization
meanings.example: The document carried the seal of the governor’s office.
meanings.example_cn: 文件上盖有州长办公室的章。

meanings.meaning_en: to close an entrance or a container with something that stops air, water etc from coming in or out of it
meanings.example: He broke the wax seal and unrolled the paper.
meanings.example_cn: 他揭去封蜡，把纸卷展开。

meanings.meaning_en: to become stronger or make something stronger
meanings.example: Our friendship has steadily strengthened over the years.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的友谊逐年加深。

meanings.meaning_en: to say that something is not true, or that you do not believe something
meanings.example: The government denied the existence of poverty among 16- and 17-year-olds.
meanings.example_cn: 政府否认十六七岁的青少年当中存在贫困问题。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of countries that are all controlled by one ruler or government
meanings.example: the Roman empire
meanings.example_cn: 罗马帝国

meanings.meaning_en: medical treatment of injuries or diseases that involves cutting open a person's body and often removing or replacing some parts; the branch of medicine connected with this treatment
meanings.example: major/minor surgery
meanings.example_cn: 大 / 小手术

meanings.meaning_en: chance or luck, and the effect that it has on your life
meanings.example: I had the good fortune to work with a brilliant head of department.
meanings.example_cn: 我有幸与一位出色的部门主管共事。

meanings.meaning_en: attracting your attention because it is special, exciting or unusual
meanings.example: That’s an interesting question.
meanings.example_cn: 那是一个有趣的问题。

meanings.meaning_en: a carefully planned piece of work to get information about something, to build something, to improve something etc
meanings.example: The project aims to provide an analysis of children’s emotions.
meanings.example_cn: 该计划旨在对儿童情绪作出分析。

meanings.meaning_en: to stick out beyond an edge or surface
meanings.example: a three-year research project
meanings.example_cn: 一项为期三年的研究计划

meanings.meaning_en: one more time – used when something has happened or been done before
meanings.example: Can you say that again? I didn’t hear.
meanings.example_cn: 你能再说一遍吗？ 我没听见。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you do for someone in order to help them or be kind to them
meanings.example: Could you do me a favour and tell Kelly I can’t make it?
meanings.example_cn: 你帮个忙告诉凯莉说我来不了好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a group of ships, or all the ships in a navy
meanings.example: the US seventh fleet
meanings.example_cn: 美国第七舰队

meanings.meaning_en: all humans considered as a group
meanings.example: Since earliest times, mankind has been fascinated by fire.
meanings.example_cn: 人类自远古以来就对火很感兴趣。

meanings.meaning_en: (<英>litre)the basic unit for measuring liquid in the metric system
meanings.example: a liter of water
meanings.example_cn: 一升水

meanings.meaning_en: the science of movement and force
meanings.example: He has not studied mechanics or engineering.
meanings.example_cn: 他没有学习过力学或者工程学。

meanings.meaning_en: a plan of what someone is going to do and when they are going to do it
meanings.example: How can he fit everything into his busy schedule ?
meanings.example_cn: 他是怎么把所有的事情都排进自己忙碌的时间表的？

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of a substance with many even sides, that is formed naturally when the substance becomes solid
meanings.example: ice/salt crystals
meanings.example_cn: 冰 / 盐的结晶体

meanings.meaning_en: a written or printed message that is usually put in an envelope and sent by mail
meanings.example: I got a letter from Melanie today.
meanings.example_cn: 今天我收到梅拉妮的一封信。

meanings.meaning_en: successful, and working in the way that was intended
meanings.example: The cheaper drugs are just as effective in treating arthritis.
meanings.example_cn: 较便宜的药品对治疗关节炎同样有效。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the two parts of the body that you use to see with
meanings.example: He’s got beautiful eyes.
meanings.example_cn: 他有一双漂亮的眼睛。

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of plastic or paper containing information about a person or showing, for example, that they belong to a particular organization, club etc
meanings.example: Employees must show their identity cards at the gate.
meanings.example_cn: 雇员在大门口必须出示自己的身份卡。

meanings.meaning_en: a plant with many thin branches growing up from the ground
meanings.example: a rose bush
meanings.example_cn: 玫瑰丛

meanings.meaning_en: to wake someone who is sleeping deeply
meanings.example: His banging roused the neighbours.
meanings.example_cn: 他重重的关门声把邻居都吵醒了。

meanings.meaning_en: an image that you can see in a mirror, glass, or water
meanings.example: Can you see your reflexion in the glass?
meanings.example_cn: 中文例句: 你能看到玻璃里你的影像吗？

meanings.meaning_en: relating to Arabia or its people
meanings.example: ...the Arabian Peninsula.
meanings.example_cn: ...阿拉伯半岛。

meanings.meaning_en: to become wider, or to make something wider
meanings.example: They’re widening the road.
meanings.example_cn: 他们正在拓宽马路。

meanings.meaning_cn: 暴力的；强暴的；猛烈的；狂暴的
meanings.meaning_en: involving actions that are intended to injure or kill people, by hitting them, shooting them etc
meanings.example: the increase in violent crime
meanings.example_cn: 暴力犯罪的增多

meanings.meaning_en: forming the most important or most necessary part of something
meanings.example: the basic principles of chemistry
meanings.example_cn: 化学的基本原理

meanings.meaning_cn: 理事；导演；指导者；负责人
meanings.meaning_en: someone who controls or manages a company
meanings.example: The company is run by a board of directors (= a group of directors ) .
meanings.example_cn: 这家公司由董事会管理。

meanings.meaning_en: used to emphasize that something belongs to or is connected with a particular person or thing and not any other
meanings.example: Bring your own equipment.
meanings.example_cn: 带上你自己的装备。

meanings.meaning_en: to have something which belongs to you, especially because you have bought it, been given it etc and it is legally yours
meanings.example: Every dance has its own rhythm.
meanings.example_cn: 每一种舞蹈都有自己的节奏。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something wrong or illegal
meanings.example: Women commit fewer crimes than men.
meanings.example_cn: 女性犯罪比男性少。

meanings.meaning_en: a unit used for measuring electric current
meanings.example: And I prefer to an ampere meter being made of aluminum even though it has analog to another one.
meanings.example_cn: 我还想要一个铝制的安培表，虽然它与另一个类似。

meanings.meaning_en: an explosion, or the very strong movement of air that it causes
meanings.example: 250 people were killed in the blast.
meanings.example_cn: 250人在这次大爆炸中丧生。

meanings.meaning_en: to damage or destroy something, or to injure or kill someone, using a gun or a bomb
meanings.example: The first shot missed and blasted a hole in the far wall.
meanings.example_cn: 第一枪没有打中，在远处墙上射出一个洞。

meanings.meaning_en: used when saying that something is almost certain to happen or be true
meanings.example: Doubtless there would be lots of rumours.
meanings.example_cn: 无疑会谣言四起。

meanings.meaning_en: a warm piece of clothing like a coat without sleeves that hangs loosely from your shoulders
