meanings.example: The long cloak she was wearing enveloped her completely.
meanings.example_cn: 她穿着的斗篷把她全包裹起来了。

meanings.meaning_en: including all the necessary facts, details, or problems that need to be dealt with
meanings.example: We offer our customers a comprehensive range of financial products.
meanings.example_cn: 我们为客户提供全面的金融产品。

meanings.meaning_en: the female owner of a dog, horse etc
meanings.example: The maid looked nervously at her mistress.
meanings.example_cn: 女仆紧张地看着女主人。

meanings.meaning_en: the science of numbers and of shapes, including  algebra  ,  geometry  , and  arithmetic
meanings.example: ...a professor of mathematics at Boston College.
meanings.example_cn: …一位波士顿大学的数学教授。

meanings.meaning_en: a married woman who works at home doing the cooking, cleaning etc, but does not have a job outside the house
meanings.example: Married at nineteen, she was a traditional housewife and mother of four children.
meanings.example_cn: 她19岁就结婚了，是个传统的家庭主妇和4个孩子的母亲。

meanings.meaning_en: a male teacher who is in charge of a school
meanings.example: This headmaster is very modest.
meanings.example_cn: 这位校长很谦虚。

meanings.meaning_en: a large tree that is common in northern countries, or the hard wood of this tree
meanings.example: an oak door
meanings.example_cn: 橡木门

meanings.meaning_en: something that is available is able to be used or can easily be bought or found
meanings.example: Tickets are available from the box office.
meanings.example_cn: 售票处有票出售。

meanings.meaning_en: used to give a negative reply to a question, offer, or request
meanings.example: ‘Are you Italian?’ ‘No, I’m Spanish.’
meanings.example_cn: “你是意大利人吗？”“不，我是西班牙人。”

meanings.example: ‘Do you want any more?’ ‘No thanks.’
meanings.example_cn: “你还要再来点吗？”“不要了，谢谢。”

meanings.meaning_en: used to mean a person, when you do not know, or do not say who the person is
meanings.example: There’s somebody waiting to see you.
meanings.example_cn: 有人等着要见你。

meanings.meaning_en: when something turns with a circular movement around a central point
meanings.example: The blades spin at 100 rotations per minute.
meanings.example_cn: 叶片每分钟转100圈。

meanings.meaning_en: moral goodness of character and behaviour
meanings.example: Women have often been used as symbols of virtue.
meanings.example_cn: 女性常被用作美德的象征。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to towns and cities
meanings.example: unemployment in urban areas
meanings.example_cn: 城市地区的失业状况

meanings.meaning_en: computer machinery and equipment, as opposed to the programs that make computers work
meanings.example: 英文例句:To be totally secure, you need a piece of hardware that costs about $200.
meanings.example_cn: 为保证绝对安全，你需要一个花费约为两百美元的硬件。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel slightly angry and unhappy about something
meanings.example: What annoyed him most was that he had received no apology.
meanings.example_cn: 最令他生气的是没人向他道歉。

meanings.meaning_en: a scale for measuring temperature, in which water freezes at 0 degrees and boils at 100 degrees
meanings.example: This thermometer is calibrated by centigrade.
meanings.example_cn: 这种温度计是用摄氏百分度标定的。

meanings.meaning_en: a coloured liquid that you use for writing, printing or drawing
meanings.example: Please write in black ink.
meanings.example_cn: 请用黑色墨水书写。

meanings.meaning_en: two lines, paths etc that are parallel to each other are the same distance apart along their whole length
meanings.example: Lines AB and CD are parallel.
meanings.example_cn: AB线与CD线平行。

meanings.meaning_en: a naughty child does not obey adults and behaves badly
meanings.example: You’re a very naughty boy! Look what you’ve done!
meanings.example_cn: 你真是个淘气鬼！瞧你干了些什么！

meanings.meaning_en: a small flat plastic case containing  magnetic tape  , that can be used for playing or recording sound
meanings.example: His two albums released on cassette have sold 10 million copies.
meanings.example_cn: 他以磁带形式发行的两张专辑已售出1000万份。

meanings.meaning_en: one of five equal parts of something
meanings.example: a fifth of bourbon
meanings.example_cn: 五分之一加仑的波旁威士忌酒

meanings.meaning_en: one of five equal parts of something
a group such as a club or business that has formed for a particular purpose
meanings.example: The public expect high standards from any large organization.
meanings.example_cn: 公众对任何大型机构都期望很高。

meanings.meaning_en: the area just inside the door of a house or other building, that leads to other rooms
meanings.example: a huge tiled entrance hall
meanings.example_cn: 铺着地砖的大门厅

meanings.meaning_en: if a belief, custom, situation etc prevails, it exists among a group of people at a certain time
meanings.example: 英文编辑：the economic conditions which prevail in England and Wales
meanings.example_cn: 英格兰和威尔士普遍的经济状况

meanings.meaning_en: to not stop happening, existing, or doing something
meanings.example: He will be continuing his education in the US.
meanings.example_cn: 他将在美国继续求学。

meanings.meaning_en: a small computer
to continue to do something, although this is difficult, or other people oppose it
meanings.example: ‘I don’t think it’s right,’ John persisted.
meanings.example_cn: “我认为那不对。”约翰坚持说道。

meanings.meaning_en: used to say that something will happen or be true if something else does not happen or is not true
meanings.example: Unless some extra money is found, the theatre will close.
meanings.example_cn: 要是不能找到更多资金，剧院将要关闭。

meanings.meaning_cn: 管理；设法；成功应付，对付
meanings.meaning_en: to direct or control a business or department and the people, equipment, and money involved in it
meanings.example: He was asked to manage a new department.
meanings.example_cn: 他被要求去管理一个新的部门。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who owns something
meanings.example: He was now the proud owner of a bright red sports car.
meanings.example_cn: 他现在拥有了一辆亮红色跑车，很是自豪。

meanings.meaning_en: to cry, especially because you feel very sad
meanings.example: James broke down and wept.
meanings.example_cn: 詹姆斯控制不住感情，哭了起来。

meanings.meaning_en: a space that is completely empty of all gas, especially one from which all the air has been taken away
meanings.example: His presence should fill the power vacuum that has been developing over the past few days.
meanings.example_cn: 他的出现应该能填补过去几天中形成的权力空缺。

meanings.meaning_en: to know and understand something, or suddenly begin to understand it
meanings.example: It took us a while to realize the extent of the tragedy.
meanings.example_cn: 我们过了一段时间才意识到这场悲剧有多严重。

meanings.meaning_en: to say that something will happen, before it happens
meanings.example: Sales were five percent lower than predicted.
meanings.example_cn: 销售额比预期低5%。

meanings.meaning_en: able to be carried or moved easily
meanings.example: a portable radio
meanings.example_cn: 便携式收音机

meanings.meaning_en: a long narrow hole dug at the side of a field, road etc to hold or remove unwanted water
meanings.example: Both vehicles ended up in a ditch.
meanings.example_cn: 两辆车都掉进了沟里。

meanings.meaning_en: when something reduces someone’s pain or unhappy feelings
meanings.example: Marijuana can provide pain relief for some cancer patients.
meanings.example_cn: 大麻可以为一些癌症患者减轻疼痛。

meanings.meaning_cn: 容纳；供应，供给，提供住宿
meanings.meaning_en: if a room, building etc can accommodate a particular number of people or things, it has enough space for them
meanings.example: He bought a huge house to accommodate his library.
meanings.example_cn: 他买了一座大房子来放他的藏书。

meanings.meaning_en: a special room or building in which a scientist does tests or prepares substances
meanings.example: a research laboratory
meanings.example_cn: 研究实验室

meanings.meaning_en: an object that you use for cleaning, painting, making your hair tidy etc, made with a lot of hairs,  bristle s  , or thin pieces of plastic, fastened to a handle
meanings.example: a scrubbing brush
meanings.example_cn: 硬毛刷，板刷

meanings.meaning_en: a scientific instrument that makes extremely small things look larger
meanings.example: The slightest movement will defocus the microscope.
meanings.example_cn: 最轻微的运动都会使显微镜散焦。

meanings.meaning_en: the man who is the ruler of an empire
meanings.example: They  bowed before the emperor as he entered the court.
meanings.example_cn: 皇帝进入朝廷时他们都向他鞠躬致敬。

meanings.meaning_en: to cause someone or something to be in a particular condition
meanings.example: He was rendered almost speechless by the news.
meanings.example_cn: 听到这个消息他几乎说不出话来。

meanings.meaning_en: a round flat piece of rubber used for stopping the water flowing out of a bath or  sink
meanings.example: the bath plug
meanings.example_cn: 浴缸塞子

meanings.meaning_en: to fill or block a small hole
meanings.example: an electric plug
meanings.example_cn: 电源插头

meanings.meaning_en: to ask for information or advice from someone because it is their job to know something
meanings.example: If symptoms persist, consult a doctor without delay.
meanings.example_cn: 如果症状持续的话，马上咨询医生。

meanings.meaning_en: a stick of  wax  with a string through the middle, which you burn to give light
meanings.example: When the candle was only half an inch high it flickered out and the room became dark.
meanings.example_cn: 蜡烛只有半英寸长时，烛光忽闪忽闪地熄灭了，于是房间一片漆黑。

meanings.meaning_en: a number of people or things that are all different, but are all of the same general type
meanings.example: a range of services
meanings.example_cn: 一系列服务

meanings.meaning_en: a fully-grown person, or one who is considered to be legally responsible for their actions
meanings.example: Some children find it difficult to talk to adults.
meanings.example_cn: 一些孩子觉得与大人很难谈得来。

meanings.meaning_en: fully grown or developed
meanings.example: an adult lion
meanings.example_cn: 一头成年的狮子

meanings.meaning_en: to move towards or nearer to someone or something
meanings.example: As I approached the house, I noticed a light on upstairs.
meanings.example_cn: 我走近那幢房子的时候注意到楼上有灯光。

meanings.meaning_en: movement towards or near to something
meanings.example: Our approach frightened the birds.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的靠近吓了那些鸟。

meanings.meaning_en: after a long time, or after a lot of things have happened
meanings.example: He eventually escaped and made his way back to England.
meanings.example_cn: 他终于逃脱并返回英格兰。

meanings.meaning_en: pleased and happy about something
meanings.example: We’re so glad you came.
meanings.example_cn: 你来了我们真高兴。

meanings.meaning_en: to decide that something is true after considering all the information you have
meanings.example: The report concluded that the school should be closed immediately.
meanings.example_cn: 报告的结论是这所学校应该立刻关闭。

meanings.meaning_en: a form of energy that comes especially from nuclear reactions, which in large amounts is very harmful to living things
meanings.example: An accident at the power station could result in large amounts of radiation being released.
meanings.example_cn: 发电站事故会造成大量核辐射泄漏。

meanings.meaning_en: happening without being planned or intended
meanings.example: an accidental discharge of toxic waste
meanings.example_cn: 有毒废料的意外排放

meanings.meaning_en: a common animal with four legs, fur, and a tail. Dogs are kept as pets or trained to guard places, find drugs etc.
meanings.example: I could hear a dog barking .
meanings.example_cn: 我听到了狗吠声。

meanings.meaning_en: the use of computers and machines instead of people to do a job
meanings.example: They phrase in new machinery for increased automation.
meanings.example_cn: 他们逐步采用新机器以提高自动化程度。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely large in size, amount, or degree
meanings.example: a huge dog
meanings.example_cn: 一条大狗

meanings.meaning_en: not many or hardly any people or things
meanings.example: ...spending her few waking hours in front of the TV.
meanings.example_cn: …把她清醒的个把钟头花在电视机前。

meanings.meaning_cn: 天使；安琪儿，天使〔指仁慈、善良或美丽的人〕
meanings.meaning_en: a  spirit  who is God’s servant in heaven, and who is often shown as a person dressed in white with wings
meanings.example: the angel Gabriel
meanings.example_cn: 天使加百列

meanings.meaning_en: a man who is handsome looks attractive
meanings.example: an extremely handsome young man
meanings.example_cn: 一位特别英俊的年轻人

meanings.meaning_en: a group of students who are taught together
meanings.example: Gary came top of the class in English.
meanings.example_cn: 加里的英文是班里顶尖的。

meanings.meaning_en: a country, considered especially in relation to its people and its social or economic structure
meanings.example: the President’s radio broadcast to the nation
meanings.example_cn: 总统对全国的广播讲话

meanings.meaning_en: A complaint is a statement in which you express your dissatisfaction with a situation
meanings.example: There's been a record number of complaints about the standard of service.
meanings.example_cn: 已有对服务水准的创纪录数量的投诉。

meanings.meaning_en: a period of time in history that is known for a particular event, or for particular qualities
meanings.example: His death marked the end of an era.
meanings.example_cn: 他的去世标志着一个时代的终结。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where ships can be loaded and unloaded
meanings.example: Britain’s largest port
meanings.example_cn: 英国最大的港口城市

meanings.meaning_en: a tall solid upright stone post used to support a building or as a decoration
meanings.example: Seven massive columns rise up from a marble floor.
meanings.example_cn: 七根巨大的圆柱从大理石地面拔地而起。

meanings.meaning_cn: 信息，消息；启示，要旨，寓意
meanings.meaning_en: a spoken or written piece of information that you send to another person or leave for them
meanings.example: He left a message saying he would probably be a little late.
meanings.example_cn: 他留言说可能会晚一点来。

meanings.meaning_en: to put things into cases, bags etc ready for a trip somewhere
meanings.example: I forgot to pack my razor.
meanings.example_cn: 我忘记把剃须刀放入行李包了。

meanings.meaning_en: something wrapped in paper or packed in a box and then sent by post or taken somewhere
meanings.example: Hundreds of people packed into the mosque.
meanings.example_cn: 成百上千的人挤进了清真寺。

meanings.meaning_en: having the darkest colour, like coal or night
meanings.example: a black evening dress
meanings.example_cn: 黑色晚礼服

meanings.meaning_en: to examine an area carefully but quickly, often because you are looking for a particular person or thing
meanings.example: He scanned the horizon, but there was no sign of the ship.
meanings.example_cn: 他朝地平线处仔细眺望，但是找不到那艘船的踪影。

meanings.meaning_en: a difference between similar things, or a change from the usual amount or form of something
meanings.example: Most of his poems are variations on the theme of love.
meanings.example_cn: 他的大部分诗作都是有关爱情主题的形式不同的作品。

meanings.meaning_en: A planet is a large, round object in space that moves around a star. The Earth is a planet.
meanings.example: The picture shows six of the nine planets in the solar system.
meanings.example_cn: 这张图片展示太阳系9个行星中的6个行星。

meanings.meaning_en: to let someone borrow money or something that belongs to you for a short time
meanings.example: The hospital agreed to lend us a wheelchair.
meanings.example_cn: 医院同意借给我们一把轮椅。

meanings.meaning_en: an image that you can see in a mirror, glass, or water
meanings.example: Can you see your reflection in the glass?
meanings.example_cn: 你能看到玻璃里你的影像吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring area, equal to 4,840 square yards or 4,047 square metres
meanings.example: They own 200 acres of farmland.
meanings.example_cn: 他们拥有200英亩农田。

meanings.meaning_en: when something is taken away from, out of, or off the place where it is
meanings.example: the removal of rubbish
meanings.example_cn: 移除垃圾

meanings.meaning_en: a large piece of strong cloth fixed onto a boat, so that the wind will push the boat along
meanings.example: a yacht with white sails
meanings.example_cn: 扬着白帆的游艇

meanings.meaning_en: to travel on or across an area of water in a boat or ship
meanings.example: The trawler had sailed from the port of Zeebrugge.
meanings.example_cn: 那只拖网渔船已经从泽布吕赫港启航。

meanings.meaning_en: thinking that you are better than other people – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: She had that superior tone of voice.
meanings.example_cn: 她带着那种傲慢的语气。

meanings.meaning_en: a restaurant, often in a factory, college etc, where you choose from foods that have already been cooked and carry your own food to a table
meanings.example: the school cafeteria
meanings.example_cn: 学校餐厅

meanings.meaning_en: very expensive, especially wasting a lot of money
meanings.example: Such a database would be extremely costly to set up.
meanings.example_cn: 建立这样一个数据库要花很多钱。

meanings.meaning_en: the best or most suitable that something could possibly be
meanings.example: advice on how to reach your ideal weight
meanings.example_cn: 如何达到理想体重的建议

meanings.meaning_en: a small part or amount of something that is examined in order to find out something about the whole
meanings.example: They took a blood sample to test for hepatitis.
meanings.example_cn: 他们取了血样做肝炎化验。

meanings.meaning_en: continuing to happen or exist without stopping
meanings.example: continuous economic growth
meanings.example_cn: 持续的经济增长

meanings.meaning_en: great happiness and pleasure
meanings.example: the look of joy on her face
meanings.example_cn: 她脸上的喜悦表情

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a country’s military forces that fights at sea
meanings.example: the British Navy
meanings.example_cn: 英国海军

meanings.meaning_en: cloth used for making clothes, curtains etc
meanings.example: our new range of fabrics and wallpapers
meanings.example_cn: 我们新的织物和墙纸系列

meanings.meaning_en: When animals or plants evolve, they gradually change and develop into different forms
meanings.example: The bright plumage of many male birds was thought to have evolved to attract females.
meanings.example_cn: 许多雄鸟的鲜艳羽毛被认为是为吸引雌鸟而进化来的。

meanings.meaning_en: to completely get rid of something that is unnecessary or unwanted
meanings.example: a ruthless dictator who eliminated all his rivals
meanings.example_cn: 铲除所有异己的残酷独裁者

meanings.meaning_cn: 全体职员，员工；工作人员；参谋
meanings.meaning_en: the people who work for an organization
meanings.example: The staff were very good.
meanings.example_cn: 员工们都很棒。

meanings.meaning_en: to say or write something again
meanings.example: Can you repeat your question?
meanings.example_cn: 你能重复一遍你的问题吗？

meanings.meaning_en: an event that is very like something that happened before
meanings.example: Sorry - could you repeat that?
meanings.example_cn: 对不起——你能再说一遍吗？

meanings.meaning_en: measuring only a small distance from one side to the other, especially in relation to the length
meanings.example: The stairs were very narrow.
meanings.example_cn: 楼梯非常狭窄。

meanings.meaning_en: goods that are carried by ship, train, or aircraft, and the system of moving these goods
meanings.example: freight services
meanings.example_cn: 货运公司

meanings.meaning_en: to teach a child at a school, college, or university
meanings.example: The Ormerod School educates handicapped children.
meanings.example_cn: 奥默罗德学校的教育对象为残疾儿童。

meanings.meaning_en: a structure made of wood, metal etc that surrounds a piece of land
meanings.example: Villagers say the fence would restrict public access to the hills.
meanings.example_cn: 村民们说栅栏将限制公众进入山区。

meanings.meaning_en: to move your tongue across the surface of something in order to eat it, wet it, clean it etc
meanings.example: The dog jumped up and licked her face.
meanings.example_cn: 那只狗跳起来舔她的脸。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is necessary is what you need to have or need to do
meanings.example: The booklet provides all the necessary information about the college.
meanings.example_cn: 这本小册子提供了关于那所学院的所有必需信息。

meanings.meaning_en: belonging to a simple way of life that existed in the past and does not have modern industries and machines
meanings.example: a primitive society
meanings.example_cn: 原始社会

meanings.meaning_en: to look at written words and understand what they mean
meanings.example: I can’t read your writing.
meanings.example_cn: 我看不懂你写的东西。

meanings.meaning_en: used to join two words, phrases etc referring to things that are related in some way
meanings.example: He’s gone to get some fish and chips.
meanings.example_cn: 他去买炸鱼薯条了。

meanings.meaning_en: to say that you are annoyed, not satisfied, or unhappy about something or someone
meanings.example: Residents are complaining because traffic in the area has increased.
meanings.example_cn: 由于这个地区的交通流量有所增加，居民都在抱怨。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a sudden movement forward with a sword or knife
meanings.example: He skipped aside as his opponent thrust at him.
meanings.example_cn: 对手向他刺来，他闪身向旁边一躲。

meanings.meaning_en: a sudden strong movement in which you push something forward
meanings.example: He jumped back to avoid another thrust of the knife.
meanings.example_cn: 他往后一闪，躲避再次捅来的一刀。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to sport for young people below a particular age
meanings.example: the junior football club
meanings.example_cn: 青少年足球俱乐部

meanings.meaning_en: best, most important, or most successful
meanings.example: The army played a leading role in organizing the attempted coup.
meanings.example_cn: 军队在策划这场未遂政变的过程中起了最主要的作用。

meanings.meaning_en: a fact or event that makes you try harder to do something
meanings.example: The crowd’s reaction only acted as a spur.
meanings.example_cn: 人群的反应不过起了刺激作用。

meanings.meaning_en: to encourage someone or make them want to do something
meanings.example: The band were spurred on by the success of their last two singles.
meanings.example_cn: 乐队因最近两张单曲唱片的成功而深受鼓舞。

meanings.meaning_en: related to business and the buying and selling of goods and services
meanings.example: Our top priorities must be profit and commercial growth.
meanings.example_cn: 我们必须把利润和贸易增长作为我们的第一要务。

meanings.meaning_cn: 非同寻常的；特别的（会议）
meanings.meaning_en: very unusual or surprising
meanings.example: It took an extraordinary amount of work.
meanings.example_cn: 这费了相当多的功夫。

meanings.meaning_en: to encourage someone by making them feel confident and eager to do something
meanings.example: We need someone who can inspire the team.
meanings.example_cn: 我们需要一个能鼓舞团队士气的人。

meanings.meaning_en: the typical weather conditions in a particular area
meanings.example: Los Angeles’ warm dry climate
meanings.example_cn: 洛杉矶温暖干燥的气候

meanings.meaning_en: relating to how a person or situation seems to be, rather than how it really is
meanings.example: The economy and outward appearance of the area have changed considerably.
meanings.example_cn: 该地区的经济和面貌发生了很大的变化。

meanings.meaning_en: expecting that bad things will happen in the future or that something will have a bad result
meanings.example: a pessimistic view of life
meanings.example_cn: 对人生的悲观看法

meanings.meaning_en: very cold weather, when water freezes
meanings.example: the risk of frost damage to crops
meanings.example_cn: 庄稼遭受霜冻灾害的危险

meanings.meaning_en: a word or sentence used to ask God or a magical power to do something bad to someone or something
meanings.example: He believed that someone had put a curse on the house.
meanings.example_cn: 他相信有人对这房子下了诅咒。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely brave or determined, and admired by many people
meanings.example: her heroic efforts to save her family
meanings.example_cn: 她拯救家人的英勇行为

meanings.meaning_en: to jump into deep water with your head and arms going in first
meanings.example: Diving off the cliffs is dangerous.
meanings.example_cn: 从悬崖上跳水是很危险的。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask a large number of people questions in order to find out their attitudes or opinions
meanings.example: Of the 100 companies surveyed, 10% had a turnover of £50 m to £99 m.
meanings.example_cn: 被调查的 100 家公司中，10% 的公司营业额在 5,000 万到 9,900 万英镑之间。

meanings.meaning_en: if a container, pipe, roof etc leaks, or if it leaks gas, liquid etc, there is a small hole or crack in it that lets gas or liquid flow through
meanings.example: The roof is leaking.
meanings.example_cn: 屋顶在漏水。

meanings.meaning_en: a small hole that lets liquid or gas flow into or out of something
meanings.example: A tanker is leaking oil off the coast of Scotland.
meanings.example_cn: 苏格兰海岸附近有一艘油轮漏油。

meanings.meaning_en: controlled by representatives who are elected by the people of a country
meanings.example: a democratic government
meanings.example_cn: 民主政府

meanings.meaning_en: if things are apart, they are not close to each other or touching each other
meanings.example: They have offices in countries as far apart as India and Peru.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的办事处远至印度、秘鲁等国。

meanings.meaning_en: when you must use or depend on something because nothing better is available
meanings.example: His punishing work schedule had made him resort to drugs.
meanings.example_cn: 他那累人的工作日程已经使他不得不求助于毒品了。

meanings.meaning_en: The action of resorting to a course of action in a difficult situation
meanings.example: Congress has a responsibility to ensure that all peaceful options are exhausted before resort to war.
meanings.example_cn: 国会有责任确保在所有和平的手段用尽之后再诉诸武力。

meanings.meaning_en: complete – used especially to emphasize that something is very bad, or that a feeling is very strong
meanings.example: That’s utter nonsense!
meanings.example_cn: 真是一派胡言！

meanings.meaning_en: to enter something and pass or spread through it, especially when this is difficult
meanings.example: bullets that penetrate thick armour plating
meanings.example_cn: 穿过厚装甲的子弹

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is travelling in a vehicle, plane, boat etc, but is not driving it or working on it
meanings.example: Neither the driver nor the passengers were hurt.
meanings.example_cn: 司机和乘客均未受伤。

meanings.meaning_en: if one company or country competes with another, it tries to get people to buy its goods or servicesrather than those available from another company or country
meanings.example: They found themselves competing with foreign companies for a share of the market.
meanings.example_cn: 他们发现自己在与外国公司争夺市场份额。

meanings.meaning_en: to talk too proudly about your abilities, achievements, or possessions
meanings.example: ‘I wouldn’t be afraid,’ she boasted.
meanings.example_cn: “我才不怕呢。”她吹嘘道。

meanings.meaning_en: the distance from one side of something to the other
meanings.example: The boat measured 15 feet in length and 4 feet in breadth.
meanings.example_cn: 这条船长15英尺，宽4英尺。

meanings.meaning_en: being the only one of its kind
meanings.example: Each person’s fingerprints are unique.
meanings.example_cn: 每个人的指纹都是独一无二的。

meanings.meaning_en: a chance to do something or an occasion when it is easy for you to do something
meanings.example: There are fewer opportunities for new graduates this year.
meanings.example_cn: 今年新毕业的大学生就业机会较少。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is precious is valuable and important and should not be wasted or used without care
meanings.example: planes delivering precious supplies of medicine and food
meanings.example_cn: 运送药品、食品等宝贵物资的飞机

meanings.meaning_en: correct and true in every detail
meanings.example: The brochure tries to give a fair and accurate description of each hotel.
meanings.example_cn: 该手册尽量公正、准确地介绍每一家酒店。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely weak
meanings.example: She was too feeble to leave her room.
meanings.example_cn: 她身体虚弱，无法走出自己的房间。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the different types of a person or thing that belong to the same group
meanings.example: Get me a sandwich – any kind will do.
meanings.example_cn: 给我一份三明治，随便哪种都可以。

meanings.meaning_en: providing useful help in making a situation better or easier
meanings.example: Thank you for your advice; it’s been very helpful.
meanings.example_cn: 谢谢你的建议，它非常有用。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you say or write to show that you are sorry for doing something wrong
meanings.example: Edward can’t be here today, but he sends his apologies .
meanings.example_cn: 爱德华今天来不了，他向大家表示歉意。

meanings.meaning_en: to become brighter or less dark, or to make something brighter etc
meanings.example: As the sky lightened, we were able to see where we were.
meanings.example_cn: 天色渐亮，我们能看清楚身处何地了。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is hot has a high temperature - used about weather, places, food, drink, or objects
meanings.example: a hot day in July
meanings.example_cn: 7月炎热的一天

meanings.meaning_en: Done with excessive speed or urgency; hurried
meanings.example: He soon regretted his hasty decision.
meanings.example_cn: 他很快就对自己仓促作出的决定感到后悔了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 公民的；普通公民的；平民的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to the people who live in a country
meanings.example: civil war/disturbance/unrest etc (=fighting etc between different groups of people living in the same country)
meanings.example_cn: 内战/内乱/平民动乱等

meanings.meaning_en: to have the skill, strength, knowledge etc needed to do something
meanings.example: I’ve always wanted to be able to speak Japanese.
meanings.example_cn: 我一直想学会讲日语。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a car, truck, bus etc move along
meanings.example: Can you drive?
meanings.example_cn: 你会开车吗？

meanings.meaning_en: coming after ten other things in a series
meanings.example: in the eleventh century
meanings.example_cn: 在11世纪

meanings.meaning_en: disagreement, angry feelings, or unfriendliness between people
meanings.example: the usual frictions between parents and their teenage children
meanings.example_cn: 家长和十几岁的孩子之间常见的摩擦

meanings.meaning_en: what you think or hope will happen
meanings.example: Having raised expectations (= made people more hopeful ), he went on to help only a few people.
meanings.example_cn: 他唤起了大家的希望，但接着只是帮助了几个人。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of people who have been given the official job of finding out about something or controlling something
meanings.example: The Government set up a commission to investigate allegations of police violence.
meanings.example_cn: 政府成立了一个委员会调查对警察施暴行为的指控。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is old has lived for a very long time
meanings.example: an old man
meanings.example_cn: 一位老人

meanings.meaning_en: the dark part of each 24-hour period when the sun cannot be seen and when most people sleep
meanings.example: It was a cold moonlit night.
meanings.example_cn: 那是个寒冷的月夜。

meanings.meaning_en: very happy, or likely to make people very happy
meanings.example: A wedding is a joyful celebration of love.
meanings.example_cn: 婚礼是令人喜悦的爱情庆典。

meanings.meaning_en: very
meanings.example: Tom’s mother was highly critical of the school’s approach.
meanings.example_cn: 汤姆的母亲对学校的处理方法持强烈的批评态度。

meanings.meaning_en: containing as much or as many things or people as possible, so there is no space left
meanings.example: The train was completely full.
meanings.example_cn: 火车坐得满满的。

meanings.meaning_en: a small individual fact or item; a less important fact or item
meanings.example: Tell me the main points now; leave the details till later.
meanings.example_cn: 现在把要点告诉我，细节留到以后再说。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of your body that you stand on and walk on
meanings.example: My foot hurts.
meanings.example_cn: 我脚痛。

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of paper, cloth, plastic, etc. attached to sth to identify it or give information about it
meanings.example: Staff wore name tags and called inmates by their first names.
meanings.example_cn: 工作人员戴着姓名标签，对同僚直呼其名。

meanings.meaning_en: money in the form of coins or notes rather than cheques,  credit card s  etc
meanings.example: Cash was taken during a burglary of the apartment.
meanings.example_cn: 在一次公寓盗窃案中现金被盗。

meanings.meaning_en: to disappear suddenly, especially in a way that cannot be easily explained
meanings.example: My keys were here a minute ago but now they’ve vanished.
meanings.example_cn: 我的钥匙刚刚还在这里，现在却不翼而飞了。

meanings.meaning_en: a film made to be shown at the cinema or on television
meanings.example: It was like one of those old John Wayne movies.
meanings.example_cn: 这部电影有点像约翰•韦恩演的一部老片子。

meanings.meaning_en: to change something into a different form, or to change something so that it can be used for a different purpose or in a different way
meanings.example: a 19th-century converted barn
meanings.example_cn: 由19世纪谷仓改建的房子

meanings.meaning_en: used to introduce a statement that makes your main statement seem surprising or unlikely
meanings.example: Although in poor health, she continued to carry out her duties.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管身体不好，她仍继续执行任务。

meanings.meaning_en: to cover something completely with water or another liquid
meanings.example: The tunnel entrance was submerged by rising sea water.
meanings.example_cn: 隧道入口被涨起的海水淹没。

meanings.meaning_en: something that happens, especially something important, interesting or unusual
meanings.example: one of the most important events in the history of mankind
meanings.example_cn: 人类历史上最重大的事件之一

meanings.meaning_en: a thick sweet substance made from boiled fruit and sugar, eaten especially on bread
meanings.example: strawberry jam
meanings.example_cn: 草莓酱

meanings.meaning_en: to show something to people, or put it in a place where people can see it easily
meanings.example: shop windows displaying the latest fashions
meanings.example_cn: 展示最新时装的商店橱窗

meanings.meaning_en: the meat from a sheep
meanings.example: a leg of mutton
meanings.example_cn: 一条羊腿

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel extremely tired
meanings.example: A full day’s teaching exhausts me.
meanings.example_cn: 讲一整天课令我精疲力竭。

meanings.meaning_en: a deep round container used for cooking things in
meanings.example: pots and pans
meanings.example_cn: 锅碗瓢盆

meanings.meaning_en: the crime of deliberately killing someone
meanings.example: On the night the murder was committed , he was out of the country.
meanings.example_cn: 凶案发生当晚他不在国内。

meanings.meaning_en: to kill someone deliberately and illegally
meanings.example: The man accused of her murder will appear in court today.
meanings.example_cn: 被指控谋杀她的那名男子将于今天出庭。

meanings.meaning_en: a system of communication by written or spoken words, which is used by the people of a particular country or area
meanings.example: How many languages do you speak?
meanings.example_cn: 你能说几种语言？

meanings.meaning_en: thin metal in the form of a thread, or a piece of this
meanings.example: copper wire
meanings.example_cn: 铜丝

meanings.meaning_en: deserving respect and admiration
meanings.example: 长期而光荣的从政生涯
meanings.example_cn: 长期而光荣的从政生涯

meanings.meaning_en: the state of being legally a citizen of a particular country
meanings.example: people of the same nationality
meanings.example_cn: 同国籍的人

meanings.meaning_en: to take something away from, out of, or off the place where it is
meanings.example: Remove the old wallpaper and fill any holes in the walls.
meanings.example_cn: 撕下旧墙纸，把墙上的洞都填平。

meanings.meaning_en: a vehicle that is able to travel in space
meanings.example: the world's largest and most expensive unmanned spacecraft
meanings.example_cn: 世界上最大、最贵的无人航天器

meanings.meaning_en: an area of water that connects two larger areas of water
meanings.example: St George’s Channel
meanings.example_cn: 圣乔治海峡

meanings.meaning_en: a meal eaten in the middle of the day
meanings.example: What’s for lunch?
meanings.example_cn: 午饭吃什么？

meanings.meaning_en: the way something is or appears to be
meanings.example: We oppose racism in all its forms.
meanings.example_cn: 我们反对各种形式的种族主义。

meanings.meaning_en: to start to exist, or make something start to exist, especially as the result of a natural process
meanings.example: The female form is a thing of beauty.
meanings.example_cn: 女性形体是一种美。

meanings.meaning_en: to put sth in liquid for a time so that it becomes completely wet; to become completely wet in this wa
meanings.example: Soak the clothes in cold water.
meanings.example_cn: 把衣服浸泡在冷水里。

meanings.meaning_en: that is not fixed in one place and can be moved easily and quickly
meanings.example: mobile air-conditioners
meanings.example_cn: 移动式空调器

meanings.meaning_en: fairly dark or not giving much light, so that you cannot see well
meanings.example: in the dim light of the early dawn
meanings.example_cn: 在微弱的晨曦里

meanings.meaning_en: a creature that looks like a human  skeleton  , used in paintings, stories etc to represent the fact that people die
meanings.example: 1.5 million people are in immediate danger of death from starvation.
meanings.example_cn: 150万人正因饥饿而即将面临死亡的危险。

meanings.meaning_en: certain to happen and impossible to avoid
meanings.example: A further escalation of the crisis now seems inevitable.
meanings.example_cn: 危机的进一步升级现在看来已不可避免。

meanings.meaning_en: someone at a party, meal etc who has invited the guests and who provides the food, drink etc
meanings.example: Our host greeted us at the door.
meanings.example_cn: 主人在门口迎接我们。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or based on Marxism
meanings.example: a Marxist perspective
meanings.example_cn: 马克思主义思想观

meanings.meaning_en: the meat from pigs
meanings.example: pork chops
meanings.example_cn: 猪排

meanings.meaning_en: to think that something will happen because it seems likely or has been planned
meanings.example: He will be hard to beat. I fully expect (= am completely sure about ) that and I’m ready.
meanings.example_cn: 他很难击败。我确信这一点，不过我准备好了。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which a lot of people behave in an uncontrolled, noisy, or violent way in public
meanings.example: A number of stadiums were closed because of crowd disorder.
meanings.example_cn: 因发生群众骚乱，一些体育场被关闭了。

meanings.meaning_en: an important victory or success after a difficult struggle
meanings.example: Winning the championship is a great personal triumph .
meanings.example_cn: 赢得冠军是伟大的个人成就。

meanings.meaning_en: to be successful
meanings.example: All her life, Kelly had stuck with difficult tasks and challenges, and triumphed.
meanings.example_cn: 凯利在一生中遭遇了种种艰巨任务与挑战，但成功了。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the two bones that your teeth are in
meanings.example: a broken jaw
meanings.example_cn: 碎裂的颌骨

meanings.meaning_en: the sharply pointed top of a mountain
meanings.example: snow-capped mountain peaks
meanings.example_cn: 白雪覆盖的山顶

meanings.meaning_en: used to talk about the best, highest, or greatest level or amount of something
meanings.example: jagged peaks
meanings.example_cn: 嶙峋的山峰

meanings.meaning_en: almost
meanings.example: I’ve read practically all of his books.
meanings.example_cn: 我差不多读过他所有的书。

meanings.meaning_en: to refer to situations or activities that involve only the thing or things mentioned, and nothing else
meanings.example: Instruction in these subjects in undergraduate classes is almost exclusively by lecture.
meanings.example_cn: 本科生的这几门课程几乎完全是通过讲座教授的。

meanings.meaning_en: belonging to the nobility
meanings.example: a member of an ancient noble family
meanings.example_cn: 古老贵族家庭成员

meanings.meaning_en: the freedom and the right to do whatever you want without asking permission or being afraid of authority
meanings.example: the fight for liberty and equality
meanings.example_cn: 争取自由和平等的斗争

meanings.meaning_en: moving in a smooth and attractive way, or having an attractive shape or form
meanings.example: Her movements were graceful and elegant.
meanings.example_cn: 她举手投足优雅而高贵。

meanings.meaning_en: a part of your body that can bend because two bones meet there
meanings.example: a permanently damaged knee joint
meanings.example_cn: 永久性损伤的膝关节

meanings.meaning_en: to clean the dust, dirt etc from the floor or ground, using a brush with a long handle
meanings.example: Bert swept the path in front of the house.
meanings.example_cn: 伯特清扫了屋前的小路。

meanings.meaning_en: a period of time used for a particular activity, especially by a group of people
meanings.example: a training session for teachers about computers
meanings.example_cn: 给教师上的一节电脑培训课

meanings.meaning_en: land that is outside cities and towns
meanings.example: The house had lovely views over open countryside .
meanings.example_cn: 这房子望出去是开阔的乡村美景。

meanings.meaning_en: used in front of the family name of a woman who is not married to address her politely, to write to her, or to talk about her
meanings.example: I’d like to make an appointment with Miss Taylor.
meanings.example_cn: 我想约一下泰勒小姐。

meanings.meaning_en: the number 100
meanings.example: The tree was probably a hundred years old.
meanings.example_cn: 这棵树很可能已经有100年了。

meanings.meaning_en: a very large number of things or people
meanings.example: They’ve had this argument a hundred times before.
meanings.example_cn: 这个问题他们以前已经争论过无数次了。

meanings.meaning_en: a tube-shaped part inside your body
meanings.example: the bronchial tubes
meanings.example_cn: 支气管

meanings.meaning_en: a thick tropical forest with many large plants growing very close together
meanings.example: the Amazon jungle
meanings.example_cn: 亚马孙丛林

meanings.meaning_en: a stupid person or someone who has done something stupid
meanings.example: What a fool she had been to think that he would stay.
meanings.example_cn: 她竟然那么傻，以为他会留下来。

meanings.meaning_en: to trick someone into believing something that is not true
meanings.example: Like a fool, I accepted straight away.
meanings.example_cn: 我像个傻子，立刻就接受了。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to machines or processes which are concerned with light, images, or the way we see things
meanings.example: microscopes and other optical instruments
meanings.example_cn: 显微镜和其他光学仪器

meanings.meaning_en: listening to or watching someone carefully because you are interested
meanings.example: an attentive audience
meanings.example_cn: 聚精会神的听众

meanings.meaning_en: anyone
meanings.example: You should have a try, don't swallow anybody.
meanings.example_cn: 不要轻信任何人，你得亲自去试一试。

meanings.meaning_en: including all parts, details, facts etc and with nothing missing
meanings.example: a complete set of china
meanings.example_cn: 一整套瓷器

meanings.meaning_en: the distance from the top or surface to the bottom of sth
meanings.example: What's the depth of the water here?
meanings.example_cn: 这儿的水有多深？

meanings.meaning_en: to take part in an activity or event
meanings.example: Some members refused to participate.
meanings.example_cn: 有些会员拒绝参加。

meanings.meaning_en: to start to feel tired, or make someone feel tired
meanings.example: As we neared the summit, we were tiring fast.
meanings.example_cn: 接近山顶时，我们感到越来越累了。

meanings.meaning_en: (in some religions) a being or spirit who is believed to have power over a particular part of nature or who is believed to represent a particular quality
meanings.example: He believes in God.
meanings.example_cn: 他信奉上帝。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you do regularly or usually, often without thinking about it because you have done it so many times before
meanings.example: Regular exercise is a good habit.
meanings.example_cn: 经常锻炼是个好习惯。

meanings.meaning_en: to make sth bigger; to become bigger
meanings.example: There are plans to enlarge the recreation area.
meanings.example_cn: 已经有了扩大娱乐场地的计划。

meanings.meaning_en: an agreement, made between two people or groups to do something in return for something else
meanings.example: I’ve kept my side of the bargain and I expect you to keep yours.
meanings.example_cn: 我履行了我的承诺，希望你也履行你的承诺。

meanings.meaning_en: to discuss the conditions of a sale, agreement etc, for example to try and get a lower price
meanings.example: women bargaining with traders
meanings.example_cn: 和商贩讨价还价的女人

meanings.meaning_en: completely new and different, especially in a way that leads to great improvements
meanings.example: The new cancer drug is a revolutionary breakthrough.
meanings.example_cn: 这种抗癌新药是一个革命性突破。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who joins in or supports a political or social revolution
meanings.example: a revolutionary new drug
meanings.example_cn: 一种革命性的新药

meanings.meaning_en: an example of a particular kind of situation
meanings.example: They came across many instances of discrimination.
meanings.example_cn: 他们遇到很多歧视的事例。

meanings.meaning_en: always thinking of what other people need or want and being careful not to upset them
meanings.example: I think he's the most charming, most considerate man I've ever known.
meanings.example_cn: 我觉得他是我所认识的最有魅力、最体贴的男士。

meanings.meaning_en: to refuse to consider someone’s idea, opinion etc, because you think it is not serious, true, or important
meanings.example: He just laughed and dismissed my proposal as unrealistic.
meanings.example_cn: 他只是笑了笑，认为我的建议不切实际，拒绝考虑。

meanings.meaning_en: to be brave enough to do something that is risky or that you are afraid to do – used especially in questions or negative sentences
meanings.example: He wanted to ask her, but he didn’t dare.
meanings.example_cn: 他想问她，但又不敢。

meanings.meaning_en: a smell, especially an unpleasant one
meanings.example: the faint odour of damp
meanings.example_cn: 一丝潮湿的气味

meanings.meaning_en: to prepare and use land for growing crops and plants
meanings.example: The land was too rocky to cultivate.
meanings.example_cn: 这块地石头太多，无法耕作。

meanings.meaning_en: the loud noise that you hear during a storm, usually after a flash of lightning
meanings.example: We were woken in the night by thunder.
meanings.example_cn: 晚上我们被雷声惊醒。

meanings.meaning_en: if it thunders, there is a loud noise in the sky, usually after a flash of lightning
meanings.example: ‘You must be mad!’ he thundered.
meanings.example_cn: “你一定是疯了！”他怒吼道。

meanings.meaning_en: to put something inside an envelope as well as a letter
meanings.example: Please enclose a cheque with your order.
meanings.example_cn: 请随订单附上支票。

meanings.meaning_en: to come or go into sth
meanings.example: Knock before you enter.
meanings.example_cn: 进来前先敲门。

meanings.meaning_en: if you introduce someone to another person, you tell them each other’s names for the first time
meanings.example: Have you two been introduced? Tom, this is Greg.
meanings.example_cn: 有人给你们俩互相介绍了吗？汤姆，这位是格雷格。

meanings.meaning_en: the ability to make sensible decisions after carefully considering the best thing to do
meanings.example: good/poor/sound judgement
meanings.example_cn: 判断力强 / 弱；正确的判断力

meanings.meaning_en: a hole or container that has been specially made and filled with water so that people can swim or play in it
meanings.example: They have a nice pool in their backyard.
meanings.example_cn: 他们后院有个漂亮的游泳池。

meanings.meaning_en: involving a lot of risk or danger, or brave enough to do risky things
meanings.example: a daring rescue attempt
meanings.example_cn: 大胆的营救行动

meanings.meaning_en: to change the date or time of a planned event or action to a later one
meanings.example: The match had to be postponed until next week.
meanings.example_cn: 比赛不得不推迟到下周举行。

meanings.meaning_en: a message sent by telegraph
meanings.example: The president received a briefing by telegram.
meanings.example_cn: 总裁收到了一份电报简报。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money that is collected and kept for a particular purpose
meanings.example: The fund was set up to try to save the cathedral.
meanings.example_cn: 设立基金以挽救大教堂。

meanings.meaning_en: the period of time during which someone is alive or something exists
meanings.example: It’s the sort of opportunity you see only once in a lifetime.
meanings.example_cn: 这种机会你一辈子也只能碰到一次。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone or something do what you want, or make something happen in the way that you want
meanings.example: Police had to be called in to control the crowds.
meanings.example_cn: 只好调来警察控制人群。

meanings.meaning_en: the ability or power to make someone or something do what you want or make something happen in the way you want
meanings.example: He controlled the urge to laugh.
meanings.example_cn: 他克制住笑的冲动。

meanings.meaning_en: a hard metal that is a mixture of  copper  and  tin
meanings.example: a bell cast in bronze
meanings.example_cn: 青铜浇铸的一口钟

meanings.meaning_en: a hole in the ground, especially one made by digging
meanings.example: a five-foot deep pit
meanings.example_cn: 五英尺深的坑

meanings.meaning_en: a laboratory
meanings.example: the school science lab
meanings.example_cn: 学校的科学实验室

meanings.meaning_en: full of energy and new ideas, and determined to succeed
meanings.example: dynamic and ambitious people
meanings.example_cn: 精力充沛且雄心勃勃的人

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone unable to use a part of their body properly
meanings.example: Carter was permanently disabled in the war.
meanings.example_cn: 卡特在那场战争中成了终生残废。

meanings.meaning_en: connected with studying things to find out how similar or different they are
meanings.example: a comparative study of the educational systems of two countries
meanings.example_cn: 两国教育制度的比较研究

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a fence or outside wall that you can open and close so that you can enter or leave a place
meanings.example: We went through the gate into the orchard.
meanings.example_cn: 我们穿过大门进了果园。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the small hard objects in a fruit such as an apple or orange, from which new fruit trees grow
meanings.example: I sow the seed in pots of soil-based compost.
meanings.example_cn: 我把种子种在一盆盆施有堆肥的土里。

meanings.meaning_en: worth spending time, money or effort on
meanings.example: It is worthwhile to include really high-quality illustrations.
meanings.example_cn: 把真正高质量的插图包括进去是值得的。

meanings.meaning_en: the state of being known about by a lot of people because of your achievements
meanings.example: He claims he is not really interested in fame.
meanings.example_cn: 他称自己对出名真的没有兴趣。

meanings.meaning_en: probably not true or not likely to happen
meanings.example: Prospects for a lasting peace remain doubtful.
meanings.example_cn: 持久和平的前景难料。

meanings.meaning_en: to recognize and understand the difference between two or more things or people
meanings.example: Could he distinguish right from wrong?
meanings.example_cn: 他能辨别是非吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a performance given by musicians or singers
meanings.example: a rock concert
meanings.example_cn: 摇滚音乐会

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which a large number of people have little or no food for a long time and many people die
meanings.example: the great potato famine in Ireland
meanings.example_cn: 爱尔兰严重的土豆荒

meanings.meaning_en: a thin flat piece of food cut from a larger piece
meanings.example: pizza slices
meanings.example_cn: 比萨块

meanings.meaning_en: to enter a country, town, or area using military force, in order to take control of it
meanings.example: The Romans invaded Britain 2,000 years ago.
meanings.example_cn: 2,000年前古罗马人入侵了英国。

meanings.meaning_en: to show that an event or occasion is important by doing something special or enjoyable
meanings.example: It’s Dad’s birthday and we’re going out for a meal to celebrate.
meanings.example_cn: 今天是爸爸的生日，我们打算出去吃饭庆祝一下。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is kept in a prison as a legal punishment for a crime or while they are waiting for their trial
meanings.example: Relationships between the staff and the prisoners are good.
meanings.example_cn: 狱警和犯人相处良好。

meanings.meaning_en: continuing for only a limited period of time
meanings.example: temporary pain relief
meanings.example_cn: 疼痛的暂时缓解

meanings.meaning_en: a close female relation of a king and queen, especially a daughter
meanings.example: Princess Anne
meanings.example_cn: 安妮公主

meanings.meaning_en: a collection of valuable things such as gold, silver and jewellery
meanings.example: buried treasure
meanings.example_cn: 埋藏的财宝

meanings.meaning_en: to keep and care for something that is very special, important, or valuable to you
meanings.example: the priceless art treasures of the Uffizi gallery.
meanings.example_cn: 乌菲齐美术馆收藏的无价艺术瑰宝

meanings.meaning_en: suffering from a disease or not feeling well
meanings.example: Bridget can’t come – she’s ill.
meanings.example_cn: 布里奇特不能来了，她生病了。

meanings.meaning_en: badly or in an unpleasant way
meanings.example: He was unable to join the army because of ill health.
meanings.example_cn: 他因为身体不好没法参军。

meanings.meaning_en: a friend, especially someone who shares difficult work or danger
meanings.example: He misses his comrades from his days in the army.
meanings.example_cn: 他想念在部队时候的战友。

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of something that has broken off or that comes from something larger
meanings.example: glass fragments
meanings.example_cn: 玻璃碎片

meanings.meaning_en: a situation that causes difficulties
meanings.example: She was older than me, but that wasn’t really a problem.
meanings.example_cn: 她比我年长，不过那不算什么问题。

meanings.meaning_en: used before plural or uncountable nouns to mean ‘as many or as much as sb needs or wants ’
meanings.example: Is there enough room for me?
meanings.example_cn: 有足够的地方给我吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to the necessary degree
meanings.example: We didn't leave early enough.
meanings.example_cn: 我们离开得不够早。

meanings.meaning_en: the details of the place where someone lives or works, which you use to send them letters etc.
meanings.example: I can give you the address of a good attorney.
meanings.example_cn: 我可以给你一个好律师的地址。

meanings.meaning_en: an act of washing your whole body by sitting or lying in water
meanings.example: After a week of camping, I really needed a bath.
meanings.example_cn: 我露营了一个星期，实在得洗个澡了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make, design, or think of a new type of thing
meanings.example: Alexander Graham Bell invented the telephone in 1876.
meanings.example_cn: 亚历山大 · 格雷厄姆 · 贝尔于1876年发明了电话。

meanings.meaning_en: when you provide something that someone needs now or in the future
meanings.example: He made provisions for his wife and his children in his will.
meanings.example_cn: 在遗嘱里他为妻子和孩子都做好了安排。

meanings.meaning_en: to organize an activity so that the people involved in it work well together and achieve a good result
meanings.example: The agencies are working together to co-ordinate policy on food safety.
meanings.example_cn: 这些机构在共同合作为食品安全政策做协调工作。

meanings.meaning_en: to use all or most of your time, effort etc in order to do something or help someone
meanings.example: He decided to devote the rest of his life to scientific investigation.
meanings.example_cn: 他决定把余生奉献给科学研究。

meanings.meaning_en: in or into a container or other closed space so as to be completely covered or surrounded
meanings.example: He concealed the key inside his tie.
meanings.example_cn: 他把钥匙藏在领带里面。

meanings.meaning_en: the inner part of something, which is surrounded or hidden by the outer part
meanings.example: The door had been locked from the inside.
meanings.example_cn: 门从里面锁上了。

meanings.meaning_en: that is legally or officially acceptable
meanings.example: a valid credit card
meanings.example_cn: 有效信用卡

meanings.meaning_en: used when you want to get someone’s attention or continue what you are saying
meanings.example: Oh, look, I think that’s Harry over there.
meanings.example_cn: 噢，你看，我想那边那个人是哈里。

meanings.meaning_en: to free prisoners, a city, a country etc from someone’s control
meanings.example: A few days later, our armies liberated the city.
meanings.example_cn: 几天以后，我军解放了这座城市。

meanings.meaning_en: to say things; to speak in order to give information or to express feelings, ideas, etc.
meanings.example: I could hear Sarah and Andy talking in the next room.
meanings.example_cn: 我听到萨拉和安迪在隔壁讲话。

meanings.meaning_en: used in negative sentences and questions, or sentences with if to mean ‘at any time’
meanings.example: Nothing ever seems to upset him.
meanings.example_cn: 似乎从来没有什么事情会使他烦恼。

meanings.meaning_en: the short loud sound made by dogs and some other animals
meanings.example: The dog suddenly started barking at us.
meanings.example_cn: 那条狗突然开始对我们汪汪叫。

meanings.meaning_en: when a dog barks, it makes a short loud sound or series of sounds
a feeling of great shock, fear or disgust
meanings.example: People watched in horror as the plane crashed to the ground.
meanings.example_cn: 人们惊恐地看着飞机坠落到地面上。

meanings.meaning_en: to use the knowledge and information you have in order to understand something or form an opinion about it
meanings.example: Alison cleverly deduced that I was the author of the letter.
meanings.example_cn: 艾莉森聪明地推断出我是这封信的作者。

meanings.meaning_en: to have earned something by good or bad actions or behaviour
meanings.example: What have I done to deserve this?
meanings.example_cn: 我做了什么事，要得到这样的报应？

meanings.meaning_en: to successfully control a feeling or problem that prevents you from achieving something
meanings.example: He struggled to overcome his shyness.
meanings.example_cn: 他努力克服自己的羞怯。

meanings.meaning_en: feeling strong emotions which make you want to shout at someone or hurt them because they have behaved in an unfair, cruel, offensive etc way, or because you think that a situation is unfair, unacceptable etc
meanings.example: I was angry because he hadn’t told me his plans.
meanings.example_cn: 我很生气，因为他没有告诉我他的计划。

meanings.meaning_en: from or relating to Asia, especially India or Pakistan
meanings.example: The financial crisis devitalized the economy of the Asian countries.
meanings.example_cn: 这次金融危机使亚洲国家的经济大伤元气。

meanings.meaning_en: someone from Asia, or whose family originally came from Asia, especially India or Pakistan
meanings.example: The government predicates that the market collapse was caused by Asian financial crisis.
meanings.example_cn: 政府宣布市场不景气是由于亚洲金融危机而引起的。

meanings.meaning_en: clothes for men or women of a particular type or for a particular occasion
meanings.example: a gentleman in evening dress
meanings.example_cn: 穿晚礼服的绅士

meanings.meaning_en: not using time, money, energy etc in the best way
meanings.example: an inefficient use of resources
meanings.example_cn: 资源的浪费

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of food or drink that you put into your mouth at one time
meanings.example: She took a mouthful of water.
meanings.example_cn: 她喝了一大口水。

meanings.meaning_en: a desire for food
meanings.example: Her husband always had a huge appetite.
meanings.example_cn: 她丈夫向来胃口极大。

meanings.meaning_en: a large building where sick or injured people receive medical treatment
meanings.example: They are building a new hospital.
meanings.example_cn: 他们正在建一家新医院。

meanings.meaning_en: two weeks
meanings.example: a fortnight’s holiday
meanings.example_cn: 十四天的假期

meanings.meaning_en: to bite food several times before swallowing it
meanings.example: This meat’s so tough I can hardly chew it!
meanings.example_cn: 这肉太老了，我几乎嚼不动！

meanings.meaning_en: that you can choose to do or have if you want to
meanings.example: three optional courses
meanings.example_cn: 三门选修课

meanings.meaning_en: to help someone to do something
meanings.example: The family decided to assist me with my chores.
meanings.example_cn: 家人决定分担我的琐事。

meanings.meaning_en: heavy woven material for covering floors or stairs, or a piece of this material
meanings.example: My bedroom carpet is green.
meanings.example_cn: 我卧室里的地毯是绿色的。

meanings.meaning_en: how likely something is, sometimes calculated in a mathematical way
meanings.example: You must decide whether, on the balance of probabilities , he committed the crime.
meanings.example_cn: 你们一定要权衡正反两方面的可能性，然后再裁定他是否犯罪。

meanings.meaning_en: a system of tracks along which trains run, or a system of trains
meanings.example: a railway company
meanings.example_cn: 铁路公司

meanings.meaning_en: used to refer to every one of two or more people or things, when you are thinking about them separately
meanings.example: They reviewed each aspect of the plan bit by bit.
meanings.example_cn: 他们对计划的各个方面逐一地进行了审核。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of deliberately causing sth to explode
meanings.example: We heard a loud explosion.
meanings.example_cn: 我们听到一声巨大的爆炸声。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the relationships between different races of people who now live in the same country or area
meanings.example: a victim of racial discrimination
meanings.example_cn: 种族歧视的受害者

meanings.meaning_en: someone who keeps records or accounts in an office
meanings.example: a clerk in a commercial firm
meanings.example_cn: 一家商行的文员

meanings.meaning_en: sleeping
meanings.example: Quiet! The baby’s asleep.
meanings.example_cn: 安静！ 宝宝在睡觉。

meanings.meaning_en: if something is possible, it can be done or achieved
meanings.example: Is it possible to get tickets for the game?
meanings.example_cn: 有没有可能弄到比赛的门票？

meanings.meaning_en: a woman at a party, meal etc who has invited all the guests and provides them with food, drink etc
meanings.example: The hostess introduced them.
meanings.example_cn: 女主人介绍了他们。

meanings.meaning_en: something or someone that is not included in a general statement or does not follow a rule or pattern
meanings.example: It’s been cold, but today’s an exception.
meanings.example_cn: 天气一直寒冷，但今天是个例外。

meanings.meaning_en: the main church of a particular area under the control of a  bishop
meanings.example: St Paul’s Cathedral
meanings.example_cn: 圣保罗大教堂

meanings.meaning_en: when you officially agree to take something that you have been offered
meanings.example: He wrote a letter of acceptance (=  a letter in which you agree to accept a job, university place etc  ) to the university.
meanings.example_cn: 他给那所大学写了一封接受函。

meanings.meaning_en: if something might happen or might be true, there is a possibility that it may happen or may be true, but you are not at all certain
meanings.example: If you need more information, you might try the Internet.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你需要更多的信息，可以试试因特网。

meanings.meaning_en: if different people or organizations unite, or if something unites them, they join together in order to achieve something
meanings.example: Our goal is to unite the opposition parties and defeat the President.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的目标是联合各反对党挫败总统。

meanings.meaning_en: a bull whose sex organs have been removed, often used for working on farms
the process of getting better after an illness, injury etc
meanings.example: Doctors expect him to make a full recovery.
meanings.example_cn: 医生预计他能完全康复。

meanings.meaning_en: a man
meanings.example: Paul’s an easy-going sort of fellow.
meanings.example_cn: 保罗人很随和。

meanings.meaning_en: the colour of earth, wood, or coffee
meanings.example: This particular model is available in brown, white, or grey.
meanings.example_cn: 这个型号的产品有棕色、白色和灰色的。

meanings.meaning_en: not able to see
meanings.example: Doctors think he will go blind.
meanings.example_cn: 医生们认为他会失明。

meanings.meaning_en: to beat against a surface
meanings.example: The boat was dashed repeatedly against the rocks.
meanings.example_cn: 小船一次又一次撞在岩石上。

meanings.meaning_en: an act of going somewhere suddenly and/or quickly
meanings.example: When the doors opened, there was a mad dash for seats.
meanings.example_cn: 门一开，人们便疯狂地朝座位奔去。

meanings.meaning_en: to have to do something because it is necessary or important, or because of a law or order
meanings.example: All passengers must wear seat belts.
meanings.example_cn: 所有乘客都必须系安全带。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being important
meanings.example: He was full of his own importance (= he behaved in an annoying way which showed that he thought he was very important ).
meanings.example_cn: 他自以为很了不起。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular type of welcome for someone
meanings.example: The delegates gave him a warm reception.
meanings.example_cn: 代表团热烈欢迎他。

meanings.meaning_en: a covering that fits very closely to your head
meanings.example: a swimming cap
meanings.example_cn: 泳帽

meanings.meaning_en: a military officer with a fairly high rank
meanings.example: Captain Lance Price
meanings.example_cn: 兰斯·普赖斯上尉

meanings.meaning_en: stiff and not moving or bending
meanings.example: rigid plastic
meanings.example_cn: 硬塑料

meanings.meaning_en: something that has been done in the wrong way, or an opinion or statement that is incorrect
meanings.example: The most common mistake is to plant them too deep.
meanings.example_cn: 最常见的错误就是把它们种得太深了。

meanings.meaning_en: to understand something wrongly
meanings.example: She mistook my meaning entirely.
meanings.example_cn: 她完全误解了我的意思。

meanings.meaning_en: to leave, especially when you are starting a journey
meanings.example: Flights by Air Europe depart Gatwick on Tuesdays.
meanings.example_cn: 欧洲航空公司的航班每逢周二从盖特威克机场起飞。

meanings.meaning_en: to be doing or to become involved in an activity
meanings.example: I have never engaged in drug trafficking.
meanings.example_cn: 我从来没有从事过贩毒。

meanings.meaning_en: very strange or not sensible
meanings.example: The neighbours must think we’re crazy.
meanings.example_cn: 邻居一定会认为我们疯了。

meanings.meaning_en: a person whose job is cutting up and selling meat in a shop/store
to give someone money for something you buy or for a service
meanings.example: How would you like to pay?
meanings.example_cn: 你想怎么付款？

meanings.meaning_en: unhappy because you are alone or do not have anyone to talk to
meanings.example: a lonely old man
meanings.example_cn: 一个孤单的老人

meanings.meaning_en: plants such as wheat,  barley  , and  oats  or their seeds
meanings.example: fields of corn
meanings.example_cn: 一片片麦田

meanings.meaning_en: to make a small hole in or through something, using an object with a sharp point
meanings.example: Steam the corn until it can easily be pierced with a fork.
meanings.example_cn: 把玉米蒸到用叉子可以轻易扎透。

meanings.meaning_en: to change a piece of writing by adding new information, making improvements, or correcting mistakes
meanings.example: The college has revised its plans because of local objections.
meanings.example_cn: 由于地方上的反对，学院已经修改了计划。

meanings.example: The advertisement is aimed primarily at children.
meanings.example_cn: 这则广告的对象主要是儿童。

meanings.meaning_en: an area of land in the country, especially one where crops are grown or animals feed on grass

meanings.meaning_en: an agreement that is achieved after everyone involved accepts less than what they wanted at first, or the act of making this agreement
meanings.example: Compromise is an inevitable part of marriage.
meanings.example_cn: 妥协是婚姻生活中必不可少的。

meanings.meaning_en: a large tall machine used by builders for lifting heavy things
meanings.example: The little prefabricated hut was lifted away by a huge crane.
meanings.example_cn: 那间小小的预制棚屋被一台巨大的起重机吊走了。

meanings.meaning_en: the time after the present

meanings.example_cn: 你未来有什么打算？

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the outside of something or of a person’s body

meanings.example_cn: 大楼的外观

meanings.meaning_en: a very small amount of something
meanings.example: I got these shoes at a fraction of the original price.
meanings.example_cn: 我以原价的一个零头买到了这双鞋子。

meanings.meaning_en: small and having a beautiful shape or appearance

meanings.example_cn: 他纤细的手

meanings.meaning_en: something that is abundant exists or is available in large quantities so that there is more than enough
meanings.example: an abundant supply of fresh water
meanings.example_cn: 充足的淡水供应

meanings.meaning_en: hard but easily broken

meanings.example_cn: 那些树枝又干又脆。

meanings.meaning_en: to state that something is true, even though it has not been proved
meanings.example: I don’t claim to be a feminist, but I’d like to see more women in top jobs.
meanings.example_cn: 我不会自称是女权主义者，但我希望看到更多的女性担任高职。

meanings.meaning_en: to understand how serious or important a situation or problem is or what someone’s feelings are
meanings.example: We appreciate that caring for children is an important job.
meanings.example_cn: 我们理解，照顾小孩子是个重要的工作。

meanings.meaning_en: concerning or relating to a particular subject

meanings.example_cn: 一本有关政治的书

meanings.meaning_en: a public celebration when musical bands, brightly decorated vehicles etc move down the street

meanings.example_cn: 胜利游行

meanings.meaning_en: to walk or march together to celebrate or protest about something
meanings.example: a military paradee
meanings.example_cn: 军事检阅

meanings.meaning_cn: 装备，布置 （房间、建筑物）；供应，提供
meanings.meaning_en: to put furniture and other things into a house or room
meanings.example: Will these finds furnish more information on prehistoric man?
meanings.example_cn: 这些发现是否能提供更多有关史前人类的资料？

meanings.meaning_en: to feel very sad and to miss someone after they have died
meanings.example: Hundreds of people gathered to mourn the slain president.
meanings.example_cn: 成百上千人聚集在一起悼念遇刺的总统。

meanings.meaning_en: something that may be dangerous, or cause accidents or problems
meanings.example: That pile of rubbish is a fire hazard (= something that is likely to cause a fire ).
meanings.example_cn: 那堆垃圾是火灾隐患。

meanings.meaning_en: an act of choosing between two or more possibilities; something that you can choose
meanings.example: He has to make some important choices.
meanings.example_cn: 他得作出一些重要的抉择。

meanings.meaning_en: likely to be affected by a particular kind of problem, illness etc
meanings.example: The car is liable to overheat on long trips.
meanings.example_cn: 这辆汽车跑长途容易过热。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money
meanings.example: He owes me a large sum of money.
meanings.example_cn: 他欠我一大笔钱。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who comes from a different country
meanings.example: Some of the local people are suspicious of foreigners.
meanings.example_cn: 有些当地人不信任外国人。

meanings.meaning_en: wet earth that has become soft and sticky
meanings.example: By the end of the game, all the kids were covered in mud.
meanings.example_cn: 到了比赛快结束的时候，所有的孩子都浑身是泥。

meanings.meaning_en: to make known something that was previously secret or unknown

meanings.example_cn: 他可能因泄露安全部门的机密而被起诉。

meanings.meaning_en: to bend a piece of paper, cloth etc by laying or pressing one part over another

meanings.example_cn: 沿虚线将纸折起来。

meanings.meaning_en: a line made in paper or material when you fold one part of it over another

meanings.example_cn: 对折的话就能放下了。

meanings.meaning_en: hair that grows around a man’s chin and cheeks

meanings.example_cn: 他已经决定蓄胡须。

meanings.meaning_en: to make the meaning of something clearer by giving examples

meanings.example_cn: 让我举个例子来说明这一点。

meanings.meaning_en: to keep someone or something safe from harm, damage, or illness

meanings.example_cn: 我们在保护环境方面做得够吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a company that takes passengers and goods to different places by plane

meanings.example_cn: 航空公司飞行员

meanings.meaning_en: used by, involving, or relating to the army, navy, or airforce

meanings.example_cn: 军用直升机

meanings.meaning_en: a word for a black person, usually considered offensive
going far down from the top or from the surface

meanings.example_cn: 又深又窄的山谷

meanings.meaning_en: a floor or level of a building
meanings.example: A staircase leads to the upper storey.
meanings.example_cn: 有一段楼梯通往上面一层。

meanings.meaning_en: prepared to do something, or having no reason to not want to do it

meanings.example_cn: 他们愿意付多少钱？

meanings.meaning_en: one of four equal parts into which something can be divided

meanings.example_cn: 大概是一又四分之一页。

meanings.meaning_en: to do what someone in authority tells you to do, or what a law or rule says you must do

meanings.example_cn: 这小男孩不肯服从。

meanings.meaning_en: the regular way in which something happens, develops, or is done

meanings.example_cn: 气候模式近年已经发生了变化。

meanings.meaning_en: with only a small amount of weight or force

meanings.example_cn: 我轻轻地敲了敲门。

meanings.meaning_en: to think that something is probably true, based on what you know

meanings.example_cn: 死亡人数远远超过最初的预料。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular situation or a situation of a particular type

meanings.example_cn: 在某些情况下，人们必须等上好几周才能得到约见。

meanings.meaning_en: a long thick warm coat
meanings.example: I sprang 400 pounds for her overcoat.
meanings.example_cn: 给她买那件大衣，我花了400镑。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone fits a piece of equipment somewhere

meanings.example_cn: 警报系统的安装和维护

meanings.meaning_en: the daughter of your brother or sister, or the daughter of your wife’s or husband’s brother or sister

meanings.example_cn: 他的外甥女，他大姐的女儿

meanings.meaning_en: a slope

meanings.example_cn: 陡坡

meanings.meaning_en: to slope at a particular angle, or to make something do this

meanings.example_cn: 这架望远镜以43度角倾斜。

meanings.example_cn: 他们对监狱生活只有最粗浅的了解。

meanings.example_cn: 就诊必须预约。

meanings.meaning_en: a thick rubber ring that fits around the wheel of a car, bicycle etc

meanings.example_cn: 回家的路上我的轮胎瘪了。

meanings.meaning_en: a lack of success in achieving or doing something

meanings.example_cn: 一帆风顺的人往往不太擅长应对失败。

meanings.meaning_en: a quality that people, places, or things have that makes them very attractive to look at

meanings.example_cn: 她的美貌和优雅风姿

meanings.meaning_en: a picture that has been painted
meanings.example: a collection of valuable paintings
meanings.example_cn: 一批珍贵的画作

meanings.meaning_en: to make an angry, unhappy, or confused expression, moving your  eyebrows  together

meanings.example_cn: 她看着信皱起了眉头。

meanings.example_cn: 船翻后许多人淹死了。

meanings.meaning_en: to look like or be similar to someone or something

meanings.example_cn: 布赖恩和史蒂夫真是惊人地相像。

meanings.meaning_cn: 压力；〔工作或生活中的〕压力；压，按
meanings.meaning_en: an attempt to persuade someone by using influence, arguments, or threats

meanings.example_cn: 他们正在向民众施加压力，要求他们投赞成票。

meanings.meaning_en: unusual or surprising and therefore deserving attention or praise

meanings.example_cn: 她取得了显著的进步。

meanings.example_cn: 午睡

meanings.meaning_en: to make something smooth, bright, and shiny by rubbing it

meanings.example_cn: 我整个下午都在擦拭银器。

meanings.meaning_en: a business organization that makes or sells goods or services

meanings.example_cn: 你在哪家公司上班？

meanings.example_cn: 他发表了一些严厉的批判性言论。

meanings.example_cn: 年轻人离开学校以后，职业指导员和他们保持联系。

meanings.example_cn: 巨大的全球计算机网络

meanings.example_cn: 可行的解决方法

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment for changing electricity from one  voltage  to another

meanings.example_cn: 不要靠近那个变压器.

meanings.meaning_en: a machine with an engine that is used to take people or things from one place to another, such as a car, bus, or truck

meanings.example_cn: 对被盗车辆的描述

meanings.meaning_en: someone who works in politics, especially an elected member of the government

meanings.example_cn: 努力争取少数族群选票的政治家

meanings.meaning_en: to think about someone or something in a particular way

meanings.example_cn: 他被看成是近代最成功的总统。

meanings.meaning_en: spoken, not written

meanings.example_cn: 口述的历史

meanings.meaning_en: how tall someone or something is
meanings.example: Sam’s about the same height as his sister now.
meanings.example_cn: 萨姆现在身高和他姐姐差不多了。

meanings.meaning_en: used to show that sth is almost, but not completely, accurate or correct

meanings.example_cn: 旅程大约花了七个小时。

meanings.meaning_en: to want something very much, especially when it seems unlikely to happen soon

meanings.example_cn: 他盼望再见到她。

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of something
meanings.example: He’s taken the engine to bits .
meanings.example_cn: 他把发动机拆开了。

meanings.meaning_en: the bottom surface of your foot, especially the part you walk or stand on

meanings.example_cn: 他的脚掌上沾满了泥巴。

meanings.meaning_en: to put someone in prison or to keep them somewhere and prevent them from leaving
meanings.example: The government imprisoned all opposition leaders.
meanings.example_cn: 政府把反对派领导人全部监禁起来。

meanings.meaning_en: people

meanings.example_cn: 我敢肯定有些人宁愿自己不在这里。

meanings.meaning_en: to make an object or pattern by cutting a piece of wood or stone

meanings.example_cn: 木雕椅子

meanings.meaning_en: doing an activity or training regularly so that you can improve your skill

meanings.example_cn: 学习弹吉他需要长时间的练习。

meanings.example_cn: 本课程加入了商务和管理方面的内容。

meanings.meaning_en: happening or done very quickly and in a very short time

meanings.example_cn: 病人迅速康复。

meanings.meaning_en: based on reason rather than emotions

meanings.example_cn: 父母需要充分了解情况，这样才可以作出合理的决定。

meanings.meaning_en: someone or something that is indispensable is so important or useful that it is impossible to manage without them
meanings.example: Mobile phones have become an indispensable part of our lives.
meanings.example_cn: 移动电话已经成为我们生活中的必需品。

meanings.meaning_en: to communicate with sb, for example by telephone or letter
meanings.example: Contact the Women's Alliance for further details.
meanings.example_cn: 请联系妇女联合会获取详情。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular way of behaving towards someone or of dealing with them
meanings.example: Just lately, Kyra has been giving me the silent treatment (= refusing to speak to me because she is angry with me ) .
meanings.example_cn: 就在最近，凯拉一直对我不理不睬。

meanings.meaning_en: to buy insurance so that you will receive money if something bad happens to you, your family, your possessions etc
meanings.example: Have you insured the contents of your home?
meanings.example_cn: 你给家庭财产投保了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: extremely good or of very high quality
