meanings.example_cn: 极好的建议

meanings.meaning_en: always supporting your friends, principles, country etc
meanings.example: a loyal supporter of the team
meanings.example_cn: 球队的忠实支持者

meanings.meaning_en: not interesting or exciting
meanings.example: Life is never dull when Elizabeth is here.
meanings.example_cn: 有伊丽莎白在这里生活绝不会无聊。

meanings.meaning_en: the spirit of a dead person that some people think they can feel or see in a place
meanings.example: They say the young girl’s ghost still haunts (= often appears in ) the house.
meanings.example_cn: 他们说那个少女的鬼魂依旧在那房子里出没。

meanings.meaning_en: not able to live for ever
meanings.example: Her father’s death reminded her that she was mortal.
meanings.example_cn: 父亲的去世让她认识到终有一天她也会死去。

meanings.meaning_en: to recognize sb/sth and be able to say who or what they are
meanings.example: He was too far away to be able to identify faces.
meanings.example_cn: 他离得太远，没法看面孔认出谁是谁。

meanings.meaning_en: a common hard metal that is used to make steel, is  magnetic  , and is found in very small quantities in food and blood. It is a chemical  element  : symbol Fe
meanings.example: the iron and steel industry
meanings.example_cn: 钢铁工业

meanings.meaning_en: to make clothes, etc. smooth by using an iron
meanings.example: a driveway with large iron gates
meanings.example_cn: 安装了大铁门的私家车道

meanings.meaning_en: the People's Republic of China
an accident in which two or more people or vehicles hit each other while moving in different directions
meanings.example: Two people were killed in a head-on collision (= between two vehicles that are moving directly towards each other ) on highway 218.
meanings.example_cn: 218号公路上有两辆汽车迎面相撞，两人死亡。

meanings.meaning_en: causing harm
meanings.example: the harmful effects of smoking
meanings.example_cn: 吸烟的害处

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of sound produced by a television, radio etc
meanings.example: Can you turn the volume up?
meanings.example_cn: 请你把音量调大好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: an adult male animal of the cattle family
meanings.example: a herd of cows with one bull
meanings.example_cn: 一群母牛加一头公牛

meanings.meaning_en: something that covers all or part of your face, to protect or to hide it
meanings.example: a surgical face mask
meanings.example_cn: 外科手术口罩

meanings.meaning_en: to hide your feelings or the truth about a situation
meanings.example: Her sarcasm is a mask for her insecurity.
meanings.example_cn: 她讽刺挖苦是为了掩饰她的不安全感。

meanings.meaning_en: illegal activities in general
meanings.example: We moved here because there was very little crime.
meanings.example_cn: 我们搬到这里来是因为这里的犯罪率很低。

meanings.meaning_en: discussion of a particular subject that often continues for a long time and in which people express different opinions
meanings.example: the gun-control debate in the US
meanings.example_cn: 美国有关控制枪支的争论

meanings.meaning_en: to discuss a subject formally when you are trying to make a decision or find a solution
meanings.example: The new drug has become the subject of heated debate within the medical profession.
meanings.example_cn: 这种新药成了医学界激烈争论的话题。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of large folded sheets of printed paper containing news, articles, pictures, advertisements etc which is sold daily or weekly
meanings.example: She had read about it in the newspapers.
meanings.example_cn: 关于这件事她已经在报纸上看到了。

meanings.meaning_en: to express your disapproval of someone or something, or to talk about their faults
meanings.example: Ron does nothing but criticize and complain all the time.
meanings.example_cn: 罗恩什么也不干，只是一味指责和抱怨。

meanings.meaning_en: an instrument that you use for writing or drawing, consisting of a wooden stick with a thin piece of a black or coloured substance in the middle
meanings.example: a sharp pencil
meanings.example_cn: 尖尖的铅笔

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being brave when you are facing a difficult or dangerous situation or when you are very ill
meanings.example: Sue showed great courage throughout her illness.
meanings.example_cn: 休在生病期间表现出了极大的勇气。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of your face above your eyes and below your hair
meanings.example: the lines on her forehead
meanings.example_cn: 她前额上的皱纹

meanings.meaning_en: to understand or think of something or someone in a particular way
meanings.example: This discovery was perceived as a major breakthrough.
meanings.example_cn: 这一发现被视为一项重大突破。

meanings.meaning_en: a space or area, for example a particular point on a surface or in a room, building, town, city etc
meanings.example: Make sure you keep the key in a safe place.
meanings.example_cn: 一定要把钥匙放在安全的地方。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you say or do to make people laugh, especially a funny story or trick
meanings.example: I couldn’t go out with someone for a joke, could you?
meanings.example_cn: 我可不能拿谈恋爱当儿戏，对不对？

meanings.meaning_en: to say things that are intended to be funny and that you do not really mean
meanings.example: I never joke about money.
meanings.example_cn: 我从不拿钱开玩笑。

meanings.meaning_en: a large piece of thin cloth that you put on a bed to lie on or lie under
meanings.example: I’ll go and find you some clean sheets and blankets.
meanings.example_cn: 我去给你们找些干净的床单和毯子。

meanings.meaning_en: a small round mark or spot

meanings.example_cn: 圆点图案

meanings.meaning_en: to mark something by putting a dot on it or above it
meanings.example: She never dots her i’s.
meanings.example_cn: 她从来不在i上面加点。

meanings.meaning_en: to put your body or sth else into a position where it is steady and does not fall
meanings.example: She balanced the cup on her knee.
meanings.example_cn: 她把杯子在膝盖上放稳。

meanings.meaning_en: an instrument for weighing things, with two dishes that hang from a bar
a large round fruit with sweet juicy flesh
meanings.example: a slice of melon
meanings.example_cn: 一片瓜

meanings.meaning_en: to hurt yourself or someone else, for example in an accident or an attack
meanings.example: Angus injured his leg playing rugby.
meanings.example_cn: 安格斯在打橄榄球时弄伤了腿。

meanings.meaning_en: a long thin round vegetable with a dark green skin and a light green inside, usually eaten raw
meanings.example: Cut the cucumber into match-sticks.
meanings.example_cn: 将黄瓜切成细条。

meanings.meaning_en: hot bright burning gas that you see when something is on fire
meanings.example: Flames poured out of the windows of the building.
meanings.example_cn: 火焰从大楼窗口冒出来。

meanings.meaning_en: a smaller amount or not as much
meanings.example: Doctors recommend eating less salt.
meanings.example_cn: 医生建议少吃盐。

meanings.meaning_en: not so much or to a smaller degree
meanings.example: Maybe he would worry less if he understood the situation.
meanings.example_cn: 他要是了解情况，也许就不会那么担心了。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation or a period of time in which there is no war or violence in a country or an area
meanings.example: The country is at peace with its neighbours for the first time in years.
meanings.example_cn: 这是多年来该国与其邻国第一次和平共处。

meanings.meaning_en: to find or provide a way of dealing with a problem
meanings.example: Charlie thinks money will solve all his problems.
meanings.example_cn: 查理认为钱能解决他所有的问题。

meanings.meaning_en: the facts, ideas, or things from which something can be developed
meanings.example: Their claim had no basis in fact (=  it was not true  ) .
meanings.example_cn: 他们的说法没有事实根据。

meanings.meaning_en: on one occasion only
meanings.example: I’ve only met her once.
meanings.example_cn: 我只见过她一面。

meanings.meaning_en: a large vehicle that people pay to travel on
meanings.example: I took a bus to San Francisco.
meanings.example_cn: 我乘公共汽车去旧金山。

meanings.meaning_en: the man that a woman is married to
meanings.example: Have you met my husband Roy?
meanings.example_cn: 你见过我的丈夫罗伊吗？

meanings.meaning_en: when you have a haircut, someone cuts your hair for you
meanings.example: I haven’t had a haircut for months!
meanings.example_cn: 我好几个月没理发了！

meanings.meaning_en: to touch someone with your lips as a greeting, to show them love, or as part of a sexual relationship
meanings.example: Maggie leaned forward and kissed her cheek.
meanings.example_cn: 玛吉俯身吻了她的脸颊。

meanings.meaning_en: an act of kissing
meanings.example: Georgina took him in her arms and kissed him on the lips.
meanings.example_cn: 乔治娜抱住他，吻他的嘴唇。

meanings.meaning_en: an animal such as a cat or a dog which you keep and care for at home
meanings.example: They have two pets – a cat and a dog.
meanings.example_cn: 他们有两只宠物，一只猫和一只狗。

meanings.meaning_en: the time when crops are gathered from the fields, or the act of gathering them
meanings.example: every year at harvest time
meanings.example_cn: 每年在收获的季节

meanings.meaning_en: to gather crops from the fields
meanings.example: Plum growers are expecting a bumper harvest this year.
meanings.example_cn: 种植李树的农民期盼着今年有个好收成。

meanings.meaning_en: fairly large, especially large enough to have an effect or be important
meanings.example: Michael has already spent considerable time in Barcelona.
meanings.example_cn: 迈克尔在巴塞罗那已经待了相当长的时间了。

meanings.meaning_en: friendly but quite polite and formal
meanings.example: The talks were conducted in a cordial atmosphere.
meanings.example_cn: 会谈在友好的气氛中进行。

meanings.meaning_en: a simple, quickly made drawing that does not show much detail
meanings.example: The artist is making sketches for his next painting.
meanings.example_cn: 画家正为他的下一幅作品画素描。

meanings.meaning_en: used in the names of streets in a town or city
meanings.example: Fifth Avenue
meanings.example_cn: 第五大街

meanings.meaning_en: shining strongly, or with plenty of light
meanings.example: Her eyes were hurting from the bright lights.
meanings.example_cn: 明亮的光线刺痛了她的眼睛。

meanings.meaning_en: having an extremely close friendship
meanings.example: an intimate friend of Picasso’s
meanings.example_cn: 毕加索的一个密友

meanings.meaning_en: to find the exact position of something
meanings.example: We couldn’t locate the source of the radio signal.
meanings.example_cn: 我们无法确定无线电信号的来源。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling that you are proud of something that you or someone connected with you has achieved
meanings.example: He wore his medals with pride.
meanings.example_cn: 他自豪地戴着奖章。

meanings.meaning_en: to be especially proud of something that you do well, or of a good quality that you have
meanings.example: The people have a sense of pride in their community.
meanings.example_cn: 人们对自己的社区有一种自豪感。

meanings.meaning_en: rock or earth from which metal can be obtained
meanings.example: iron ore
meanings.example_cn: 铁矿石

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of furniture with doors, and sometimes shelves, used for storing clothes, plates, food etc
meanings.example: It’s in the kitchen cupboard.
meanings.example_cn: 它在厨房的碗柜里。

meanings.meaning_en: an object that provides a supply of electricity for something such as a radio, car, or toy
meanings.example: You have to take the top off to change the batteries .
meanings.example_cn: 你得把顶盖拿掉才能更换电池。

meanings.meaning_en: the opinion or feeling you have about someone or something because of the way they seem
meanings.example: When we looked around the school we got a very good impression.
meanings.example_cn: 我们参观了学校，对它的印象很好。

meanings.meaning_en: not allowing water to enter
meanings.example: a waterproof jacket
meanings.example_cn: 防水上衣

meanings.meaning_en: to get back sth/sb that was lost after searching for it/them
meanings.example: I can’t find the car keys.
meanings.example_cn: 我找不到汽车钥匙。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the parts into which a book is divided
meanings.example: Read Chapter 11 as your homework.
meanings.example_cn: 家庭作业是阅读第 11 章。

meanings.meaning_en: a powerful person, organization, group etc is able to control and influence events and other people’s actions
meanings.example: He was one of the most powerful men in Bohemia.
meanings.example_cn: 他是波希米亚最有权势的人物之一。

meanings.meaning_en: time that you spend working at your job after you have worked the normal hours
meanings.example: to do/work overtime
meanings.example_cn: 加班

meanings.meaning_en: something used for carrying something
meanings.example: a baby carrier
meanings.example_cn: 婴儿背带

meanings.meaning_en: soldiers in an organized group
meanings.example: Both countries agreed to withdraw their troops .
meanings.example_cn: 两国都同意撤军。

meanings.meaning_en: waste material, such as paper, empty containers, and food thrown away
meanings.example: Can you take out the garbage when you go?
meanings.example_cn: 你走的时候把垃圾带出去好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: books, plays, poems etc that people think are important and good
meanings.example: He has read many of the major works of literature.
meanings.example_cn: 他读过许多重要的文学作品。

meanings.meaning_en: much more than is reasonable or necessary
meanings.example: his excessive drinking
meanings.example_cn: 他的酗酒

meanings.meaning_en: offensive; in bad taste
meanings.example: to have a nasty mind
meanings.example_cn: 思想肮脏

meanings.meaning_en: on or onto a ship, plane, or train
meanings.example: The plane crashed, killing all 200 people aboard.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机失事，机上200人全部遇难。

meanings.meaning_en: existing, happening, or used outside, not inside a building
meanings.example: a huge outdoor market
meanings.example_cn: 一个规模庞大的露天市场

meanings.meaning_en: to say that you believe someone is guilty of a crime or of doing something bad
meanings.example: The professor stands accused of (=  has been accused of  ) stealing his student’s ideas and publishing them.
meanings.example_cn: 那位教授被指控剽窃学生的观点拿去发表。

meanings.meaning_en: the place where God is believed to live and where good people are believed to go when they die
meanings.example: He believed that he and his wife would one day be together again in heaven.
meanings.example_cn: 他相信他和妻子有一天会在天国重聚。

meanings.meaning_en: if one thing includes another, the second thing is part of the first
meanings.example: Does the price include postage?
meanings.example_cn: 这个价格包含邮费吗？

meanings.meaning_en: containing poison or producing poison
meanings.example: Some mushrooms are extremely poisonous.
meanings.example_cn: 一些蘑菇有剧毒。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance used for treating illness, especially a liquid you drink
meanings.example: Medicines should be kept out of the reach of children.
meanings.example_cn: 药应放在孩子够不到的地方。

meanings.meaning_en: the continent that is north of the Mediterranean and goes as far east as the Ural Mountains in Russia
meanings.example: eastern Europe
meanings.example_cn: 东欧

meanings.meaning_en: to look at something carefully and thoroughly because you want to find out more about it
meanings.example: A team of divers was sent down to examine the wreck.
meanings.example_cn: 一组潜水员被送到水下检查沉船。

meanings.meaning_en: to stop moving
meanings.example: The parade halted by a busy corner.
meanings.example_cn: 游行队伍在一个热闹的拐角处停下了。

meanings.meaning_en: a stop or pause
meanings.example: Heavy snowfalls brought traffic to a halt (= made it stop moving ).
meanings.example_cn: 大雪使得交通陷于停顿。

meanings.meaning_en: to be in a difficult or painful situation for a long time without complaining
meanings.example: It seemed impossible that anyone could endure such pain.
meanings.example_cn: 似乎谁都不可能忍受这样的疼痛。

meanings.meaning_en: first or beginning
meanings.example: the opening match of the season
meanings.example_cn: 本赛季的首场比赛

meanings.meaning_en: the beginning or first part of something
meanings.example: the opening chapter of the book
meanings.example_cn: 本书的第一章

meanings.meaning_en: complete quiet because nobody is talking
meanings.example: There was a brief silence before anyone answered.
meanings.example_cn: 沉默了片刻才有人回答。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone stop talking, or stop something making a noise
meanings.example: ‘Silence in court!’ roared the judge.
meanings.example_cn: “法庭上请保持肃静！”法官吼道。

meanings.meaning_en: a weapon that can fly over long distances and that explodes when it hits the thing it has been aimed at
meanings.example: a nuclear missile
meanings.example_cn: 核导弹

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the job of managing a business or organization and making decisions
meanings.example: a commission with executive powers
meanings.example_cn: 有执行权的委员会

meanings.meaning_en: a manager in an organization or company who helps make important decisions
meanings.example: a marketing executive
meanings.example_cn: 营销主管

meanings.meaning_en: the trait of being dependable or reliable
meanings.example: The incident cast doubt on her motives and reliability.
meanings.example_cn: 这件事使人怀疑她有何动机，以及她是否可靠。

meanings.meaning_en: the daughter of your son or daughter
meanings.example: a drawing of my granddaughter Amelia
meanings.example_cn: 一幅我孙女阿梅莉亚的画像

meanings.meaning_en: happening sometimes but not often or regularly
meanings.example: He made occasional visits to London.
meanings.example_cn: 他有时候会去伦敦。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is fortunate has something good happen to them, or is in a good situation
meanings.example: I’ve been fortunate to find a career that I love.
meanings.example_cn: 我是幸运的，找到了自己喜欢的职业。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the organs on either side of your head that you hear with
meanings.example: She tucked her hair behind her ears.
meanings.example_cn: 她把头发拢到耳朵背后。

meanings.meaning_en: the order that something happens or exists in, or the order it is supposed to happen or exist in
meanings.example: Be careful to perform the actions in the correct sequence.
meanings.example_cn: 注意要按正确的顺序来完成动作。

meanings.meaning_en: a formal promise that something will be done
meanings.example: I’m afraid there’s no guarantee of success.
meanings.example_cn: 恐怕不能保证一定会成功。

meanings.meaning_en: to join two things by putting one through the other
meanings.example: He walked with her, linking arms (= putting his arm around her arm ).
meanings.example_cn: 他与她挽臂同行。

meanings.meaning_en: each ring of a chain
used to emphasize that something is real or exact
meanings.example: I’m not joking. Those were his actual words.
meanings.example_cn: 我没开玩笑，那都是他的原话。

meanings.meaning_en: next to and following sb/sth in order or importance
meanings.example: Your name comes after mine in the list.
meanings.example_cn: 在名单上你的名字在我的后面。

meanings.meaning_en: the way you use to enter a building or reach a place
meanings.example: Access is by means of a small door on the right.
meanings.example_cn: 入口是右边的一扇小门。

meanings.meaning_en: not long ago
meanings.example: He has recently been promoted to Assistant Manager.
meanings.example_cn: 他最近晋升为经理助理。

meanings.meaning_en: an intelligent, well-educated person who spends time thinking about complicated ideas and discussing them
meanings.example: a leading British intellectual
meanings.example_cn: 一位顶尖的英国知识分子

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the ability to understand things and think intelligently
meanings.example: intellectual curiosity
meanings.example_cn: 求知欲

meanings.meaning_en: to turn with a circular movement around a central point, or to make something do this
meanings.example: The Earth rotates on its axis once every 24 hours.
meanings.example_cn: 地球每24小时绕地轴自转一周。

meanings.meaning_en: the top outside floor of a ship or boat
meanings.example: I was the only person on deck at that time of night.
meanings.example_cn: 夜里那段时间只有我一个人在甲板上。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of farm equipment used to turn over the earth so that seeds can be planted
meanings.example: There are new tractors and new ploughs in the machinery lot.
meanings.example_cn: 机器设备场里有新拖拉机和新耕犁。

meanings.meaning_en: to turn over the earth using a plough so that seeds can be planted
meanings.example: In those days the land was plowed by oxen.
meanings.example_cn: 在那个年代是用公牛来犁地的。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance that can cause death or serious illness if you eat it, drink it etc
meanings.example: Belladonna and red arsenic are deadly poisons .
meanings.example_cn: 颠茄和雄黄都是致命的毒物。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone poison, especially by adding it to their food or drink, in order to harm or kill them
meanings.example: a box of rat poison
meanings.example_cn: 一盒鼠药

meanings.meaning_en: used to say that something may be true, but you are not sure
meanings.example: Perhaps she’s next door.
meanings.example_cn: 她也许在隔壁。

meanings.meaning_en: a chemical substance that has a  pH  of less than 7. Strong acids can burn holes in material or damage your skin
meanings.example: sulphuric acid
meanings.example_cn: 硫酸

meanings.meaning_en: having a sharp sour taste
meanings.example: Rye is tolerant of poor, acid soils.
meanings.example_cn: 黑麦耐贫瘠的酸性土壤。

meanings.meaning_en: to choose someone for an official position by voting
meanings.example: the country’s first democratically elected government
meanings.example_cn: 该国第一个民主选举产生的政府

meanings.meaning_en: 1/100th of the standard unit of money in some countries. For example, there are 100 cents in one dollar or in one  euro  : symbol ¢.
meanings.example: A cup of rice which cost thirty cents a few weeks ago is now being sold for up to one dollar.
meanings.example_cn: 几周前价值30美分的1杯米如今卖到了1美元。

meanings.meaning_en: decided or arranged without any reason or plan, often unfairly
meanings.example: an arbitrary decision
meanings.example_cn: 武断的决定

meanings.meaning_en: one or the other of two; it does not matter which
meanings.example: You can park on either side of the street.
meanings.example_cn: 这条街两边都可停车。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or bordering the Atlantic Ocean
meanings.example: They underlaid the Atlantic with a cable.
meanings.example_cn: 他们在大西洋海底铺设了一条电缆。

meanings.meaning_en: Atlantic Ocean
meanings.example: The Straits of Gibraltar are the strategic passage between the Mediterranean and the Atlantic.
meanings.example_cn: 直布罗陀海峡是地中海通向大西洋的咽喉。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who performs in a play or film
meanings.example: His father was an actor in the Cantonese Opera Company.
meanings.example_cn: 他父亲曾是粤剧团的一名演员。

meanings.meaning_en: an illness or a medical condition in which you have a very high temperature
meanings.example: Andy has a fever and won’t be coming into work today.
meanings.example_cn: 安迪发烧了，今天不来上班。

meanings.meaning_en: used to talk about most members of a group, most occasions, most parts of something etc
meanings.example: Green teas are mostly from China or Japan.
meanings.example_cn: 绿茶主要来自中国或日本。

meanings.meaning_en: a person who takes part in a game or sport
meanings.example: a game for four players
meanings.example_cn: 四人玩的游戏

meanings.meaning_en: to become larger and rounder than normal – used especially about parts of the body
meanings.example: The window frame was swollen shut.
meanings.example_cn: 窗框膨胀变形，关得死死的。

meanings.meaning_en: knowledge or skill that you gain from doing a job or activity, or the process of doing this
meanings.example: The advice in the booklet reflects the practical experience we have gained (= experience gained by actually doing something, rather than knowledge from books etc ).
meanings.example_cn: 小册子中的建议反映了我们所获得的实践经验。

meanings.meaning_en: involving the use of imagination to produce new ideas or things
meanings.example: This job is so boring. I wish I could do something more creative.
meanings.example_cn: 这工作太单调了，我希望能做些更有创造性的事情。

meanings.meaning_en: not having any mistakes, faults, or damage
meanings.example: His English was perfect.
meanings.example_cn: 他的英语很地道。

meanings.meaning_en: the feeling of liking or loving sb/sth very much and caring about them
meanings.example: She looked back on those days with affection .
meanings.example_cn: 她深情地回顾那些日子。

meanings.meaning_en: mostly or mainly
meanings.example: The state of Nevada is largely desert.
meanings.example_cn: 内华达州大部分是沙漠。

meanings.meaning_en: how large, important, serious, etc. sth is
meanings.example: I was amazed at the extent of his knowledge.
meanings.example_cn: 他知识之渊博令我惊奇。

meanings.meaning_en: more useful, interesting, satisfactory, effective, suitable etc
meanings.example: Your stereo is better than mine.
meanings.example_cn: 你的音响比我的好。

meanings.meaning_en: to a higher standard or quality
meanings.example: There must be a better way to do this.
meanings.example_cn: 一定还有更好的办法来做这件事。

meanings.meaning_en: to become impossible to see any longer
meanings.example: At this point the path seemed to disappear altogether (= disappear completely ) .
meanings.example_cn: 小路到这里好像完全消失了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone want to achieve something and make them willing to work hard in order to do this
meanings.example: A good teacher has to be able to motivate her students.
meanings.example_cn: 好教师必须能够激发学生的积极性。

meanings.meaning_en: in addition – used to introduce information that adds to or supports what has previously been said
meanings.example: The rent is reasonable and, moreover, the location is perfect.
meanings.example_cn: 租金合理，而且位置也非常好。

meanings.meaning_en: to control an activity or process, especially by rules
meanings.example: strict rules regulating the use of chemicals in food
meanings.example_cn: 限制化学品在食物中使用的严格规定

meanings.meaning_en: in the same order as the things you have just mentioned
meanings.example: The cups and saucers cost £5 and £3 respectively.
meanings.example_cn: 茶杯和茶碟的价钱分别为5英镑和3英镑。

meanings.meaning_en: a door or space through which you can leave a public room, building etc
meanings.example: We made for the nearest exit.
meanings.example_cn: 我们走向最近的出口。

meanings.meaning_en: to finish using a computer program
meanings.example: The heroine made her exit to great applause.
meanings.example_cn: 女主角在热烈的掌声中退场。

meanings.meaning_en: someone, especially a man, who is in charge of a meeting or directs the work of a committee or an organization
meanings.example: deputy/vice chairman Barrett serves as vice chairman.
meanings.example_cn: 巴雷特担任副主席一职。

meanings.meaning_en: a serious magazine produced for professional people or those with a particular interest
meanings.example: the British Medical Journal
meanings.example_cn: 《英国医学杂志》

meanings.meaning_en: at or to a lower level or position than sb/sth
meanings.example: He dived below the surface of the water.
meanings.example_cn: 他潜入了水中。

meanings.meaning_en: the feeling that something is definitely true or definitely exists
meanings.example: a strong belief in God
meanings.example_cn: 笃信上帝

meanings.meaning_en: a small group of people or things within a much larger group
meanings.example: Gaelic is still spoken in Ireland by a tiny minority.
meanings.example_cn: 爱尔兰仍有极少数人在说盖尔语。

meanings.meaning_en: above or higher than something, without touching it
meanings.example: A lamp hung over the table.
meanings.example_cn: 一盏灯悬挂在桌子上方。

meanings.meaning_en: an informal talk in which people exchange news, feelings, and thoughts
meanings.example: a telephone conversation
meanings.example_cn: 电话交谈

meanings.meaning_en: a building or group of buildings in which goods are produced in large quantities, using machines
meanings.example: a car factory
meanings.example_cn: 汽车制造厂

meanings.meaning_en: a small round red or black fruit with a long thin stem and a stone in the middle
meanings.example: a bunch of cherries
meanings.example_cn: 一串樱桃

meanings.meaning_en: agreement about something
meanings.example: The chairman was elected by common consent (= with most people agreeing ) .
meanings.example_cn: 主席是大家一致推选出来的。

meanings.meaning_en: to give your permission for something or agree to do something
meanings.example: Her father reluctantly consented to the marriage.
meanings.example_cn: 她父亲勉强答应了这桩婚事。

meanings.meaning_en: besides or in addition to someone or something
meanings.example: There’s something else I’d like to talk about as well.
meanings.example_cn: 我还有其他事情要谈一谈。

meanings.meaning_en: different
meanings.example: I’d like you to come, and anyone else who’s free.
meanings.example_cn: 我想请你过来，其他人有空也可以来。

meanings.meaning_en: a small furry animal with a pointed nose and a long tail that lives in people’s houses or in fields
meanings.example: The cat laid a dead mouse at my feet.
meanings.example_cn: 猫把一只死老鼠放在我的脚边。

meanings.meaning_en: (<英> disc)a small flat piece of plastic or metal which is used for storing computer or electronic information
meanings.example: Red blood cells are roughly the shape of a disk.
meanings.example_cn: 红细胞大致呈圆盘状。

meanings.meaning_en: connected with the law
meanings.example: a legal adviser
meanings.example_cn: 法律顾问

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the most basic and important parts of something
meanings.example: We have to tackle the fundamental cause of the problem.
meanings.example_cn: 我们必须解决问题的根本原因。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong alcoholic drink such as whisky
meanings.example: hard liquor
meanings.example_cn: 烈性酒

meanings.meaning_en: belonging to a time long ago in history, especially thousands of years ago
meanings.example: the ancient civilizations of Asia
meanings.example_cn: 亚洲的古代文明

meanings.meaning_en: a cloth bag filled with soft material that you put your head on when you are sleeping
meanings.example: I’ll be asleep as soon as my head hits the pillow.
meanings.example_cn: 我头一碰到枕头就会睡着。

meanings.meaning_en: to hold something very tightly
meanings.example: I gripped the rail and tried not to look down.
meanings.example_cn: 我紧紧抓住栏杆，尽量不往下看。

meanings.meaning_en: the way you hold something tightly, or your ability to do this
meanings.example: Hold the microphone in a firm grip and keep it still.
meanings.example_cn: 紧紧握住麦克风不要让它动。

meanings.meaning_en: the act or process of controlling or reducing something
meanings.example: a nuclear limitation treaty
meanings.example_cn: 核限制条约

meanings.meaning_en: highest in rank
meanings.example: He was recently appointed chief economist at the Bank of Scotland.
meanings.example_cn: 他最近被任命为苏格兰银行的首席经济学家。

meanings.meaning_en: with no or very little light, especially because it is night
meanings.example: The church was dark and quiet.
meanings.example_cn: 教堂里黑魆魆的，寂静无声。

meanings.meaning_en: to bend your body forward and down
meanings.example: We had to stoop to pass through the low entrance.
meanings.example_cn: 我们得弯腰通过那低矮的入口。

meanings.meaning_en: if sb has a stoop , their shoulders are always bent forward
meanings.example: Dave stooped down to tie his shoes.
meanings.example_cn: 戴夫俯身系鞋带。

meanings.meaning_en: the group of people who are elected to make a country’s laws and discuss important national affairs
meanings.example: They demanded a free parliament and press.
meanings.example_cn: 他们要求议会自由和新闻自由。

meanings.meaning_en: to join metals by melting their edges and pressing them together when they are hot
meanings.example: The new handle will have to be welded on.
meanings.example_cn: 新的把手得焊上去。

meanings.meaning_en: a joint made by welding
to attach sth, or to be attached, at the top so that the lower part is free or loose
meanings.example: Hang your coat up on the hook.
meanings.example_cn: 把你的大衣挂在衣钩上。

meanings.meaning_en: peaceful and loving or wanting peace
meanings.example: a normally pacific community
meanings.example_cn: 平日里静悄悄的社区

meanings.meaning_en: Pacific Ocean
an official rule or order
meanings.example: There seem to be so many rules and regulations these days.
meanings.example_cn: 如今好像条条框框很多。

meanings.meaning_en: next to and touching an upright surface, especially for support
meanings.example: There was a ladder propped up against the wall.
meanings.example_cn: 有一把梯子靠在墙边。

meanings.meaning_en: the red liquid that your heart pumps around your body
meanings.example: Her body was found in a pool of blood.
meanings.example_cn: 她的尸体被发现倒在血泊之中。

meanings.meaning_en: the period of time when someone is alive
meanings.example: Learning goes on throughout life.
meanings.example_cn: 学习是一生的事。

meanings.meaning_en: a large heavy powerful gun that was used in the past to fire heavy metal balls
meanings.example: The cannons boom, the band plays.
meanings.example_cn: 炮声隆隆，鼓乐齐鸣。

meanings.meaning_en: the early part of the night between the end of the day and the time you go to bed
meanings.example: I do most of my studying in the evening.
meanings.example_cn: 我学习大都在晚上。

meanings.meaning_en: to keep someone or something within the limits of a particular activity or subject
meanings.example: Any soldier who leaves his post will be confined to barracks (= made to stay in the barracks ) .
meanings.example_cn: 任何擅离职守的士兵都要受到在营房里关禁闭的处罚。

meanings.meaning_en: the inner surface of the top part of a room
meanings.example: rooms with high ceilings
meanings.example_cn: 天花板很高的房间

meanings.meaning_en: feeling very sorry and embarrassed because of something you have done
meanings.example: Everyone cries sometimes – it’s nothing to be ashamed of.
meanings.example_cn: 每个人都会有哭的时候——没什么好难为情的。

meanings.meaning_en: exactly
meanings.example: A good strong cup of coffee is just what I need right now.
meanings.example_cn: 我现在正需要喝一杯浓浓的咖啡。

meanings.meaning_en: when something is necessary
meanings.example: I’m afraid it’s become a matter of economic necessity.
meanings.example_cn: 恐怕这已成了一个经济需求的问题。

meanings.meaning_en: Mercury is a silver-coloured liquid metal that is used especially in thermometers and barometers
meanings.example: Some thieves have eaten off their irons with mercury water.
meanings.example_cn: 有些窃贼用汞水腐蚀他们的镣铐。

meanings.meaning_en: the belief that only physical things really exist
meanings.example: Scientific materialism thus triumphed over ignorance and superstition.
meanings.example_cn: 科学唯物主义就这样战胜了无知和迷信。

meanings.meaning_en: to allow someone to do something
meanings.example: I can’t come out tonight – my dad won’t let me.
meanings.example_cn: 今天晚上我不能出来，我爸爸不允许。

meanings.meaning_en: used when speaking to someone you love
meanings.example: Look, darling, there’s Mary.
meanings.example_cn: 看呀，亲爱的，玛丽来了。

meanings.meaning_en: the number 1,000,000,000
meanings.example: The final cost could be as much as one billion dollars.
meanings.example_cn: 最后的费用可能高达十亿美元。

meanings.meaning_en: a structure made of wood, metal, plastic etc that surrounds something such as a picture or window, and holds it in place
meanings.example: They removed the picture from its wooden frame.
meanings.example_cn: 他们把画从木镜框中取下来。

meanings.meaning_en: the soft round part of your face below each of your eyes
meanings.example: Lucy stretched up to kiss his cheek.
meanings.example_cn: 露西伸长了脖子去亲吻他的脸颊。

meanings.meaning_en: something that happens, especially sth unusual or unpleasant
meanings.example: His bad behaviour was just an isolated incident.
meanings.example_cn: 他的不良行为只是个别事件。

meanings.meaning_en: the top part of your body that has your face at the front and is supported by your neck
meanings.example: He kissed the top of her head.
meanings.example_cn: 他吻了一下她的头顶。

meanings.meaning_en: to be in charge of a team, government, organization etc
meanings.example: Alan fell asleep as soon as he put his head on the pillow.
meanings.example_cn: 艾伦头一挨枕头就睡着了。

meanings.meaning_en: someone you know, but who is not a close friend
meanings.example: She was a casual acquaintance of my family in Vienna.
meanings.example_cn: 她是我们家在维也纳的一个交情不深的朋友。

meanings.meaning_en: the number 50
used as the plural of ‘person’ to refer to men, women, and children
meanings.example: How many people were at the meeting?
meanings.example_cn: 有多少人到会？

meanings.meaning_en: an act of putting a drug into someone’s body using a special needle
meanings.example: The nurse gave me a tetanus injection.
meanings.example_cn: 护士给我打了破伤风预防针。

meanings.meaning_en: to go and get something or someone and bring them back
meanings.example: Quick! Go and fetch a doctor.
meanings.example_cn: 快！去请医生来。

meanings.meaning_en: angry and surprised because you feel insulted or unfairly treated
meanings.example: an indignant reply
meanings.example_cn: 愤慨的回复

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is making and repairing wooden objects
meanings.example: He is a carpenter by profession.
meanings.example_cn: 他以木工为业。

meanings.meaning_en: the purpose that something has, or the job that someone or something does
meanings.example: The nervous system regulates our bodily functions (= eating, breathing, going to the toilet etc ) .
meanings.example_cn: 神经系统控制着我们身体的功能。

meanings.meaning_en: allowing you to see through it
meanings.example: a transparent plastic container
meanings.example_cn: 透明的塑料容器

meanings.meaning_en: when someone is in a situation where they are not protected from something dangerous or unpleasant
meanings.example: Prolonged exposure to the sun can cause skin cancer.
meanings.example_cn: 长时间晒太阳会导致皮肤癌。

meanings.meaning_en: when you visit famous or interesting places, especially as tourists
meanings.example: She swam and sunbathed, went sightseeing and relaxed.
meanings.example_cn: 她游泳，晒日光浴，观光，放松。

meanings.meaning_en: surrounding or on all sides of something or someone
meanings.example: The whole family was sitting around the dinner table.
meanings.example_cn: 全家人围坐在饭桌旁。

meanings.meaning_en: everyone
meanings.example: Everybody knows Tom.
meanings.example_cn: 人人都认识汤姆。

meanings.meaning_en: a vehicle with no roof that is pulled by a horse and used for carrying heavy things
meanings.example: a horse and cart
meanings.example_cn: 一套马车

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the study of ideas, especially scientific ideas, rather than with practical uses of the ideas or practical experience
meanings.example: theoretical physics
meanings.example_cn: 理论物理

meanings.meaning_en: a group of animals of one kind that live and feed together
meanings.example: Chobe is also renowned for its large herds of elephant and buffalo.
meanings.example_cn: 乔贝还以其大群的大象和水牛而闻名。

meanings.meaning_en: to make animals move together in a group
meanings.example: It was Tom’s duty to herd the cows.
meanings.example_cn: 汤姆的职责是放牛。

meanings.meaning_en: resulting in someone’s death
meanings.example: potentially fatal diseases
meanings.example_cn: 潜在致命的疾病

meanings.meaning_en: a division of the United Kingdom
a man who plays several different sports
meanings.example: He’s a very keen sportsman .
meanings.example_cn: 他是个非常喜爱运动的人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 强烈，剧烈；〔光、声等的〕强度
meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being felt very strongly or having a strong effect
meanings.example: The intensity of the hurricane was frightening.
meanings.example_cn: 飓风的猛烈程度令人恐惧。

meanings.meaning_en: a plant with small dark purple flowers, or sometimes white or yellow ones
meanings.example: She inhaled the violet perfume, saying “How sweet!”
meanings.example_cn: 她一边闻紫罗兰的芳香， 一边说“好香啊！”

meanings.meaning_en: to have or express the same opinion about something as someone else
meanings.example: Teenagers and their parents rarely agree.
meanings.example_cn: 十几岁的孩子跟父母意见很少一致。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a camera through which the light travels before it reaches the film
meanings.example: a standard 50mm lens
meanings.example_cn: 50毫米标准镜头

meanings.meaning_en: the opinions and feelings that you usually have about something, especially when this is shown in your behaviour
meanings.example: As soon as they found out I was a doctor, their whole attitude changed.
meanings.example_cn: 他们一听说我是医生，态度就完全改变了。

meanings.meaning_en: any substance that makes things dirty, such as mud or dust
meanings.example: You should have seen the dirt on that car!
meanings.example_cn: 你没看见那车上沾了多少泥！

meanings.meaning_en: to come together as a group; to bring people or things together as a group
meanings.example: A large crowd had assembled outside the American embassy.
meanings.example_cn: 一大群人聚集在美国大使馆外。

meanings.meaning_en: thin in an attractive or graceful way
meanings.example: She is slender and stylish.
meanings.example_cn: 她身材修长，穿着时髦。

meanings.meaning_en: made of or covered with a substance that sticks to surfaces
meanings.example: There’s some sticky stuff in your hair.
meanings.example_cn: 你的头发上有什么黏糊糊的东西。

meanings.meaning_en: part of a piece of furniture, such as a desk, that you pull out and push in and use to keep things in
meanings.example: She took a file from her desk drawer .
meanings.example_cn: 她从书桌的抽屉里拿出了一个文件夹。

meanings.meaning_en: a large room for several people to sleep in, for example in a boarding school or hostel
meanings.example: She lived in a college dormitory.
meanings.example_cn: 她住在一幢大学宿舍楼里。

meanings.meaning_en: a straight narrow beam of light from the sun or moon
meanings.example: The room darkened as a cloud hid the sun’s rays.
meanings.example_cn: 一朵云挡住了阳光，房间暗了下来。

meanings.meaning_en: very pleasant to taste or smell
meanings.example: ‘The meal was absolutely delicious,’ she said politely.
meanings.example_cn: “这顿饭味道好极了。” 她礼貌地说道。

meanings.meaning_en: to agree unwillingly that something is true or that someone else is right
meanings.example: ‘Okay, so maybe I was a little bit scared,’ Jenny admitted.
meanings.example_cn: “行了，也许我是有点害怕。”珍妮承认道。

meanings.meaning_en: a long thin string of cotton, silk etc used to sew or weave cloth
meanings.example: I’m looking for a needle and thread.
meanings.example_cn: 我在找针线。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who writes poems
meanings.example: He was a painter and poet.
meanings.example_cn: 他是一位画家兼诗人。

meanings.meaning_en: for some reason that is not clear to you or that you do not understand
meanings.example: Somehow, I just don’t think it’ll work.
meanings.example_cn: 不知为什么，我总觉得那样行不通。

meanings.meaning_en: someone you work with, do an activity with, or share something with
meanings.example: Dad’s office mates are throwing a party for him.
meanings.example_cn: 爸爸的同事要为他办个聚会。

meanings.meaning_en: the particular combination of qualities that makes someone a particular type of person
meanings.example: He has a cheerful but quiet character.
meanings.example_cn: 他的性格乐观文静。

meanings.meaning_en: from one side to the other side of sth
meanings.example: He walked across the field.
meanings.example_cn: 他走过田地。

meanings.meaning_en: a part of the body, such as the heart or lungs, that has a particular purpose
meanings.example: the liver, heart, and other internal organs
meanings.example_cn: 肝脏、心脏及其他内脏器官

meanings.meaning_en: a movement of part of your body, especially your hands or head, to show what you mean or how you feel
meanings.example: Jim raised his hands in a despairing gesture.
meanings.example_cn: 吉姆举起双手，做出绝望的手势。

meanings.meaning_en: the fact of being equal in rights, status, advantages, etc.
meanings.example: racial/social/sexual equality
meanings.example_cn: 种族 / 社会 / 男女平等

meanings.meaning_en: a woman who rents a room, building, or piece of land to someone
meanings.example: There was a note under the door from my landlady.
meanings.example_cn: 门下有我女房东的一张便条。

meanings.meaning_en: to go to an event such as a meeting or a class
meanings.example: Only 12 people attended the meeting.
meanings.example_cn: 只有12个人出席了会议。

meanings.meaning_en: facts, information, documents etc that prove something is true
meanings.example: There is no proof that the document is authentic.
meanings.example_cn: 没有证据证明这份文件是真的。

meanings.meaning_en: to lie or spread over the surface of sth
meanings.example: Much of the country is covered by snow.
meanings.example_cn: 这个国家的大部分地区都被白雪覆盖。

meanings.meaning_en: a thing that is put over or on another thing, usually to protect it or to decorate it
meanings.example: a course covering business law
meanings.example_cn: 一门包括商业法的课程

meanings.meaning_en: to close or join together the two parts of sth; to become closed or joined together
meanings.example: Make sure all the windows are securely fastened before you leave.
meanings.example_cn: 离开前要确保所有的窗子都已关严。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone or something move by pressing them with your hands, arms etc
meanings.example: It didn’t move, so she pushed harder.
meanings.example_cn: 它一动不动，因此她加力去推。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the 12 pairs of curved bones that surround your chest
meanings.example: She was taken to hospital with a broken arm and ribs.
meanings.example_cn: 她胳膊和肋骨断了，被送进医院。

meanings.meaning_en: not very heavy
meanings.example: You can carry this bag – it’s fairly light.
meanings.example_cn: 你可以拿这个袋子——它很轻。

meanings.meaning_en: to move a liquid or substance around with a spoon or stick in order to mix it together
meanings.example: Stir the paint to make sure it is smooth.
meanings.example_cn: 将油漆搅拌至均匀。

meanings.meaning_en: a sudden shaking of the earth’s surface that often causes a lot of damage
meanings.example: An earthquake measuring 6.1 on the Richter scale struck southern California on June 28.
meanings.example_cn: 6月28日加州南部地区发生了里氏6.1级地震。

meanings.meaning_en: the ability to think about something carefully or for a long time
meanings.example: She needed all her powers of concentration to stop herself from slipping on the icy road.
meanings.example_cn: 她需要集中全部注意力才能不让自己在结冰的路上滑倒。

meanings.meaning_en: to produce something, for example by putting the different parts of it together
meanings.example: I’m going to show you how to make a box for your tools.
meanings.example_cn: 我来教你怎么做一个箱子存放工具。

meanings.meaning_en: to turn or twist something several times around something else
meanings.example: The hair is divided into sections and wound around heated rods.
meanings.example_cn: 头发被分成一绺绺缠绕在加热棒上。

meanings.meaning_en: feeling very ashamed and sad because you know that you have done something wrong
meanings.example: She looked self-conscious and guilty.
meanings.example_cn: 她看上去很不自然，很内疚的样子。

meanings.meaning_en: a big dangerous fire – used especially in news reports
meanings.example: Some 4,000 firefighters are battling the blaze.
meanings.example_cn: 约有四千名消防人员正在与大火搏斗。

meanings.meaning_en: to burn very brightly and strongly
meanings.example: the blaze of light from the security lamps
meanings.example_cn: 安全灯的强光

meanings.meaning_en: to buy shares, property, or goods because you hope that the value will increase and you can make a profit
meanings.example: I’ve got a few thousand dollars I’m looking to invest.
meanings.example_cn: 我有几千美元想作投资。

meanings.meaning_en: a cloudy sky, day etc is dark because there are a lot of clouds
meanings.example: a cloudy night with some light rain
meanings.example_cn: 伴有些许小雨的多云的夜晚

meanings.meaning_en: the son of your son or daughter
meanings.example: My grandson's birthday was on Tuesday.
meanings.example_cn: 我孙子的生日是星期二。

meanings.meaning_en: an emotion that you feel, such as anger, sadness, or happiness
meanings.example: Knowing we’d won was a wonderful feeling.
meanings.example_cn: 得知我们赢了，感觉真好。

meanings.meaning_en: a clever trick that is used to catch someone or to make them do or say something that they did not intend to
meanings.example: Mr Smith has walked straight into a trap laid by the Tories.
meanings.example_cn: 史密斯先生直接落入了保守党布设的圈套。

meanings.meaning_en: to trick sb into sth
meanings.example: He felt he had been trapped into accepting the terms of the contract.
meanings.example_cn: 他觉得自己是中了圈套才接受这合同条款的。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which one group of people tries to obtain or achieve something before another group does
meanings.example: The race is on to develop more environmentally friendly forms of energy.
meanings.example_cn: 人们正在竞相开发更环保的能源形式。

meanings.meaning_en: to fail to see or notice sth
meanings.example: It is easy to overlook a small detail like that.
meanings.example_cn: 那样的小细节很容易被忽略。

meanings.meaning_en: a tool for digging that has a long handle and a broad metal blade that you push into the ground
meanings.example: a garden spade
meanings.example_cn: 一把花园里使用的锹

meanings.meaning_en: a small object that produces a high whistling sound when you blow into it
meanings.example: The lifeguard blew his whistle.
meanings.example_cn: 救生员吹响哨子。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a high or musical sound by blowing air out through your lips
meanings.example: Adam whistled happily on his way to work.
meanings.example_cn: 亚当在上班路上愉快地吹着口哨。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of doing something, especially in order to achieve a particular thing
meanings.example: The government must take action (=  do something  ) now to stop the rise in violent crime.
meanings.example_cn: 政府现在必须采取行动遏止暴力犯罪的上升。

meanings.meaning_en: a metal bar that you slide across a door or window to fasten it
meanings.example: He reminded her that he would have to lock and bolt the kitchen door after her.
meanings.example_cn: 他提醒她，他得在她离开后锁上厨房的门并插上门闩。

meanings.meaning_en: to lock a door or window by sliding a bolt across
a medicine, or a substance for making medicines
meanings.example: a drug used in the treatment of cancer
meanings.example_cn: 用于治疗癌症的一种药物

meanings.meaning_en: a gas that has no colour or smell, and that forms most of the Earth’s air. It is a chemical element: symbol N
meanings.example: Well, we know nitrogen has what?
meanings.example_cn: 对于氮气我们知道什么？

meanings.meaning_en: to pay attention to what someone is saying or to a sound that you can hear
meanings.example: Listen! There’s a strange noise in the engine.
meanings.example_cn: 听！引擎发出奇怪的声音。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who murders another person
meanings.example: a convicted murderer
meanings.example_cn: 已定罪的谋杀犯

meanings.meaning_en: facts or signs that show clearly that something exists or is true
meanings.example: We found further scientific evidence for this theory.
meanings.example_cn: 我们找到了进一步证实这种理论的科学根据。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the people who live in a particular place
meanings.example: a city of six million inhabitants
meanings.example_cn: 有600万居民的城市

meanings.meaning_en: used to say what is not used, does not happen etc, when something else is used, happens etc
meanings.example: You probably picked up my keys instead of yours.
meanings.example_cn: 你可能没拿你的钥匙而错拿了我的。

meanings.meaning_en: very similar
meanings.example: My mother and I are alike in many ways.
meanings.example_cn: 我和母亲在许多方面很相似。

meanings.meaning_en: a period of time in which someone is taught a particular skill, for example how to play a musical instrument or drive a car
meanings.example: piano lessons
meanings.example_cn: 钢琴课

meanings.meaning_en: a way of communicating information and news to people, such as newspapers, television etc
meanings.example: Advertising is a powerful medium.
meanings.example_cn: 广告是具有强大影响力的传播媒介。

meanings.meaning_en: of middle size, level, or amount
meanings.example: hair of medium length
meanings.example_cn: 中等长短的头发

meanings.meaning_en: in order to make sure that something will not happen
meanings.example: She turned away from the window lest anyone see them.
meanings.example_cn: 她转身离开窗边，免得有人看见他们。

meanings.meaning_en: to decide that something that was officially planned will not happen
meanings.example: Our flight was cancelled.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的航班取消了。

meanings.meaning_en: a soft yellow food made from cream or milk, used in cooking and for spreading on bread
meanings.example: He spread some butter on his bread.
meanings.example_cn: 他在面包上涂了些黄油。

meanings.meaning_en: a small solid piece of medicine that you swallow whole
meanings.example: He has to take pills to control his blood pressure.
meanings.example_cn: 他必须服药控制血压。

meanings.meaning_en: more than a little, but much less than very
meanings.example: The house had a fairly large garden.
meanings.example_cn: 那幢房子有个不小的花园。

meanings.meaning_en: a simple musical instrument that consists of a curved metal tube that you blow into
meanings.example: A mature cow has horns.
meanings.example_cn: 成年母牛头上长有角。

meanings.meaning_en: to become or make sth become liquid as a result of heating
meanings.example: It was warmer now, and the snow was beginning to melt.
meanings.example_cn: 现在天气暖和了，雪开始融化。

meanings.meaning_en: a word that is used before a noun,  pronoun  , or  gerund  to show place, time, direction etc. In the phrase ‘the trees in the park’, ‘in’ is a preposition.
meanings.example: There is nothing in the rules of grammar to suggest that ending a sentence with a preposition is wrong.
meanings.example_cn: 在语法规则中没有哪一条表明以介词结束一个句子是错误的。

meanings.meaning_en: land that is fruitful produces a lot of crops
the part that is nearest the centre of something, and furthest from the sides, edges, top, bottom etc
meanings.example: We rowed out towards the middle of the lake.
meanings.example_cn: 我们朝湖中央划去。

meanings.meaning_en: half of the way through an event or period of time
meanings.example: They spent the middle part of their vacation in Florida.
meanings.example_cn: 文例句：假期的中间一段他们是在佛罗里达州度过的。

meanings.meaning_en: to jump high into the air or to jump in order to land in a different place
meanings.example: She leapt over the fence.
meanings.example_cn: 她跳过篱笆。

meanings.meaning_en: a big jump
meanings.example: He threw a stick into the river and the dog went after it in a flying leap.
meanings.example_cn: 他把一根枝条扔到河里，那条狗一个飞跃就追了过去。

meanings.meaning_en: the number 1,000,000
meanings.example: The book sold more than a million copies.
meanings.example_cn: 这本书售出了一百多万册。

meanings.meaning_en: an extremely large number of people or things
meanings.example: I’ve got a million ideas.
meanings.example_cn: 我主意多得很。

meanings.meaning_en: to have information about something
meanings.example: Who knows the answer?
meanings.example_cn: 谁知道答案？

meanings.meaning_en: the scientific study of living things
meanings.example: a degree in biology
meanings.example_cn: 生物学学位

meanings.meaning_en: done willingly, not because you are forced
meanings.example: Attendance on the course is purely voluntary.
meanings.example_cn: 听这门课纯粹是自愿的。

meanings.meaning_en: to gain sth by your own efforts, ability or behaviour
meanings.example: She has acquired a good knowledge of English.
meanings.example_cn: 她英语已经学得很好。

meanings.meaning_en: (of countries) having their own government
meanings.example: Mozambique became independent in 1975.
meanings.example_cn: 莫桑比克于1975年获得独立。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the round things under a car, bus, bicycle etc that turns when it moves
meanings.example: The car slid sideways, its rear wheels spinning.
meanings.example_cn: 汽车向一侧打滑，后轮猛转。

meanings.meaning_en: an empty space in something solid
meanings.example: I began digging a hole for the plant.
meanings.example_cn: 我开始挖洞种那棵植物。

meanings.meaning_en: a picture or shape that has a particular meaning or represents a particular organization or idea
meanings.example: The symbol on the packet is a guarantee that the food has been produced organically.
meanings.example_cn: 包装盒上的这个标识保证这种食物是有机生产的。

meanings.meaning_en: wanting to know about something
meanings.example: Puppies are naturally curious.
meanings.example_cn: 小狗天生好奇。

meanings.meaning_en: a part of the sea that is partly enclosed by a curve in the land
meanings.example: a house with a view across the bay
meanings.example_cn: 能看到海湾全景的一幢房子

meanings.meaning_en: to tell someone that they are not allowed to do something, or that something is not allowed
meanings.example: He was forbidden to leave the house, as a punishment.
meanings.example_cn: 作为惩罚，他被禁止离开家。

meanings.meaning_en: to mention or speak about sb/sth
meanings.example: In his speech, he referred to a recent trip to Canada.
meanings.example_cn: 在他的讲话中，他提到了最近的加拿大之行。

meanings.meaning_en: after a long time
meanings.example: After several delays we finally took off at six o’clock.
meanings.example_cn: 几经耽搁后，我们终于在六点起飞了。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong artificial material that is used to make plastics, clothes, rope etc
meanings.example: nylon fabric
meanings.example_cn: 尼龙织物

meanings.meaning_en: determination to be successful, rich, powerful etc
meanings.example: He was young and full of ambition.
meanings.example_cn: 他年轻，而且雄心勃勃。

meanings.meaning_en: needing electricity to work, produced by electricity, or used for carrying electricity
meanings.example: an electric blanket
meanings.example_cn: 电热毯

meanings.meaning_en: the speed of something that is moving in a particular direction
meanings.example: the velocity of light
meanings.example_cn: 光速

meanings.meaning_en: to become or make sth become less tight or stiff
meanings.example: The massage relaxed my tense back muscles.
meanings.example_cn: 按摩使得我背部紧张的肌肉松弛下来。

meanings.meaning_en: a game in which the players hit a small white ball into holes in the ground with a set of golf clubs, using as few hits as possible
meanings.example: He plays golf on Sundays.
meanings.example_cn: 他星期天都去打高尔夫球。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the hard parts that together form the frame of a human, animal, or fish body
meanings.example: The X-ray showed that the bone was broken in two places.
meanings.example_cn: X光检查显示有两处骨折。

meanings.meaning_en: the importance, honour, and praise that people give someone they admire a lot
meanings.example: She dreamt of future glory as an Olympic champion.
meanings.example_cn: 她梦想着将来能得到奥运冠军的荣誉。

meanings.meaning_en: to translate spoken words from one language into another
meanings.example: They spoke good Spanish, and promised to interpret for me.
meanings.example_cn: 他们西班牙语说得很好，答应替我翻译。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you need or want
meanings.example: She spent her life pandering to the wants of her children.
meanings.example_cn: 她一生都在设法满足子女的需要。

meanings.meaning_en: the way you feel at a particular time
meanings.example: You’re in a good mood this morning!
meanings.example_cn: 你今天早晨心情不错啊！

meanings.meaning_en: a bus with comfortable seats used for long journeys
meanings.example: a coach trip to Scotland
meanings.example_cn: 去苏格兰的长途公共汽车之行

meanings.meaning_en: a spoken or written test of knowledge, especially an important one
meanings.example: The examination results will be announced in September.
meanings.example_cn: 考试成绩将于9月公布。

meanings.meaning_en: kind behaviour towards someone
meanings.example: I can’t thank you enough for your kindness.
meanings.example_cn: 你的好意我感激不尽。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of extreme fear
meanings.example: There was a look of sheer terror (= complete terror ) on his face.
meanings.example_cn: 他脸上的表情异常惊恐。

meanings.meaning_en: a woman who is admired for doing something extremely brave
meanings.example: a heroine of the French Resistance
meanings.example_cn: 法国抵抗运动的一位女英雄

meanings.meaning_en: a game between two teams of 11 players in which players try to get points by hitting a ball and running between two sets of three sticks
meanings.example: The boy traded his knife for a cricket bat.
meanings.example_cn: 那男孩用他的刀子换了一个板球棒。

meanings.meaning_en: to move away from a place or an enemy because you are in danger or because you have been defeated
meanings.example: The rebels retreated to the mountains.
meanings.example_cn: 叛乱分子撤退到山区。

meanings.meaning_en: a line that gradually bends like part of a circle
meanings.example: a sweeping curve of railroad track
meanings.example_cn: 铁轨的大弧线

meanings.meaning_en: to bend or move in the shape of a curve, or to make something do this
meanings.example: The car took the curve much too quickly.
meanings.example_cn: 那辆汽车拐弯太快了。

meanings.meaning_en: connected with the structure of something
meanings.example: structural changes in the computer industry
meanings.example_cn: 电脑行业的结构性改变

meanings.meaning_en: travelling through a place on the way to another place
meanings.example: We flew to Athens via Paris.
meanings.example_cn: 我们经由巴黎飞往雅典。

meanings.meaning_en: to fail to understand someone or something correctly
meanings.example: Rachel, you must have misunderstood her! Ellie would never say something like that.
meanings.example_cn: 雷切尔，你一定是误会她了！埃莉绝不会说那样的话。

meanings.meaning_en: a small area of fresh water that is smaller than a lake, that is either natural or artificially made
meanings.example: The path descends to  the pond.
meanings.example_cn: 小路下斜通到池塘。

meanings.meaning_en: something you do in order to prevent something dangerous or unpleasant from happening
meanings.example: Fire precautions were neglected.
meanings.example_cn: 防火措施被忽视了。

meanings.meaning_en: the land along the edge of a large area of water such as an ocean or lake
meanings.example: We could see a boat about a mile from shore.
meanings.example_cn: 我们看见离岸边大约一英里的地方有一艘船。

meanings.meaning_en: the season between summer and winter, when leaves change colour and the weather becomes cooler
meanings.example: autumn mists
meanings.example_cn: 秋天的雾霭

meanings.meaning_en: an idea of what might or will happen in the future
meanings.example: an exciting prospect
meanings.example_cn: 令人兴奋的前景

meanings.meaning_en: a sentence, phrase or word that asks for information
meanings.example: Can I ask you a question?
meanings.example_cn: 我能问你个问题吗？

meanings.meaning_en: at, on, or in the front of something
meanings.example: Two of his front teeth had been knocked out.
meanings.example_cn: 他有两颗门牙被打落了。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of something that is furthest forward in the direction that it is facing or moving
meanings.example: the front cover of ‘Hello!’ magazine
meanings.example_cn: 《Hello!》杂志的封面

meanings.meaning_en: a programme on the radio or on television
meanings.example: a news broadcast
meanings.example_cn: 一档新闻节目

meanings.meaning_en: the details of a person's family, education, experience etc.
meanings.example: a person's family/social/cultural/educational/class background
meanings.example_cn: 一个人的出身 / 社会 / 文化 / 教育 / 阶级背景

meanings.meaning_en: the way someone or something looks to other people
meanings.example: He was always criticising his wife’s appearance.
meanings.example_cn: 他老是批评妻子的外表。

meanings.meaning_en: the thick soft hair that covers the bodies of some animals, such as cats, dogs, and rabbits
meanings.example: a fur coat
meanings.example_cn: 裘皮大衣

meanings.meaning_en: a word that is used instead of a noun or noun phrase, such as ‘he’ instead of ‘Peter’ or ‘the man’
meanings.example: Now if we could only figure out the pronoun problem.
meanings.example_cn: 现在我们可以解决这个代词问题了。

meanings.meaning_en: having a rough surface that feels slightly hard
meanings.example: a jacket of coarse wool
meanings.example_cn: 粗羊毛夹克衫

meanings.meaning_en: to make something clearer or easier to understand
meanings.example: Reporters asked him to clarify his position (= say exactly what his beliefs are ) on welfare reform.
meanings.example_cn: 记者们要求他阐明他在福利改革问题上的立场。

meanings.meaning_en: far from towns or other places where people live
meanings.example: a remote border town
meanings.example_cn: 一个偏远的边境小镇

meanings.meaning_en: an official attempt to find out the truth about or the cause of something such as a crime, accident, or scientific problem
meanings.example: The investigation continued for nearly three years.
meanings.example_cn: 调查持续了近三年。

meanings.meaning_en: a vehicle that travels across water
meanings.example: a fishing boat
meanings.example_cn: 渔船

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is attractive is good looking, especially in a way that makes you sexually interested in them
meanings.example: an attractive young woman
meanings.example_cn: 妩媚动人的年轻女子

meanings.meaning_en: to enter a place in a large group and keep control of it, especially by military force
meanings.example: Students occupied Sofia University on Monday.
meanings.example_cn: 星期一学生们占领了索非亚大学。

meanings.meaning_en: very severe pain
meanings.example: the agony of arthritis
meanings.example_cn: 关节炎的剧烈疼痛

meanings.meaning_en: the raised place beside a railway track where you get on and off a train in a station
meanings.example: The Edinburgh train will depart from platform six.
meanings.example_cn: 开往爱丁堡的火车将从六号站台发车。

meanings.meaning_en: a political system in which the government controls the production of all food and goods, and there is no privately owned property
meanings.example: the ultimate triumph of communism in the world
meanings.example_cn: 共产主义在全世界的最终胜利

meanings.meaning_en: used to make a word, statement, or question negative
meanings.example: Most of the stores do not open until 10 am.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数商店要到上午10点才开始营业。

meanings.meaning_en: involving a lot of activity, effort, or careful attention in a short period of time
meanings.example: a one-week intensive course in English
meanings.example_cn: 为期一周的英语强化课程

meanings.meaning_en: used to say that something may happen or may be true but you are not certain
meanings.example: Maybe it’s all just a big misunderstanding.
meanings.example_cn: 也许这只是一个很大的误会。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong feeling of dislike, annoyance, or disapproval
meanings.example: Joan looked at him with disgust.
meanings.example_cn: 琼厌恶地看着他。

meanings.meaning_en: to use something for a particular purpose
meanings.example: We must consider how best to utilize what resources we have.
meanings.example_cn: 我们必须考虑怎样充分利用现有的资源。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone or something is protected
meanings.example: the protection of the environment
meanings.example_cn: 环境保护

meanings.meaning_en: to join two or more things together
meanings.example: We’d like two rooms with connecting doors (= doors that join the rooms ) .
meanings.example_cn: 我们想要两个有门相通的房间。
